title: Planktonzilla: Multimodal dataset and models for understanding plankton ecosystems
summary: Marine plankton underpin aquatic food webs and play a key role in global CO2 sequestration, making reliable species identification critical for understanding ocean health and climate feedbacks. Existing classification models perform well on individual collections but fail to generalize across instruments and environments due to isolated training datasets and inconsistent labels. To address this, we introduce Planktonzilla-17M, a unified dataset consolidating publicly available plankton image collections spanning thirteen imaging systems. It comprises 17.4 million images with standardized taxonomy and geo-environmental metadata, including 3.74 million plankton images spanning over 602 taxonomic classes, of which 201 are identified at the species level, making it the largest and most comprehensive plankton image dataset to date. Using this large-scale dataset, we perform a controlled comparison between supervised and CLIP-style image--text training on a shared ViT backbone. We find that a supervised classifier matches or exceeds CLIP-style training when trained using taxonomic lineage as text. We further observe that BioCLIP and BioCLIP2 perform poorly on plankton in zero-shot and few-shot settings. Leveraging Planktonzilla-17M improves plankton classification performance, highlighting the limitations of current biological foundation models in marine imaging domains.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了迄今为止最大且最全面的浮游生物图像数据集Planktonzilla-17M（1740万张图像，602个分类类别），通过受控实验发现基于分类学文本训练的监督ViT模型可匹配或超越CLIP式训练，并揭示现有生物基础模型在海洋成像领域存在显著局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的浮游生物分类模型在单一数据集上表现良好，但由于训练数据集彼此孤立且标签不一致，模型无法跨不同成像系统和环境泛化，这限制了海洋生态系统监测和全球碳循环研究的可靠性。
AI.method: 作者首先整合了覆盖13个成像系统的公开浮游生物图像集合，构建了包含1740万张图像、602个分类类别（其中201个为物种级）的统一数据集Planktonzilla-17M，并标准化了分类学标签和地理环境元数据。在此基础上，以共享ViT骨干网络为基准，对监督学习和CLIP式图文对比训练进行了受控对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，当使用分类学谱系作为文本输入时，监督分类器的性能可匹配或超越CLIP式训练；BioCLIP和BioCLIP2在零样本和少样本设定下对浮游生物的分类表现极差；利用Planktonzilla-17M可显著提升浮游生物分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前生物基础模型（如BioCLIP）在海洋成像领域存在显著性能瓶颈，表明构建大规模统一数据集是提升浮游生物分类泛化能力的关键，并为海洋生物成像领域的模型选择提供了实证依据。

title: Bridging the 2D-3D Gap: A Hierarchical Semantic-Geometric Map for Vision Language Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) enables embodied agents to reach target locations in unseen environments by following language instructions. Despite recent progress with vision-language models (VLMs), a critical semantic-geometric gap remains: while VLMs excel at language and 2D visual understanding, they struggle with 3D spatial reasoning and fail to capture the causal dynamics between actions and spatial transitions, resulting in unreliable navigation, particularly in zero-shot settings. To bridge this gap, we propose a Hierarchical Semantic-Geometric Map (HSGM) that transforms 3D geometric information into a structured representation compatible with VLMs, effectively linking them to the physical world. Specifically, HSGM is represented as a multi-channel top-down map organized into three levels: (1) geometric level that records navigable regions and obstacles, (2) semantic level that represents objects and their relations, and (3) decision level that supports high-level task reasoning and goal selection. During navigation, the VLM acts as a high-level semantic planner, interpreting the spatial layout encoded in the HSGM to select geometrically valid waypoints, while low-level, collision-free movements between waypoints are executed by a classical path-planning algorithm, fully decoupling semantic reasoning from action execution. Additionally, complex instructions are decomposed into subtasks to alleviate the problem of progress forgetting or hallucinating in long-horizon navigation. Extensive experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks demonstrate that our zero-shot framework achieves state-of-the-art performance and even outperforms several supervised methods. Code is available at https://github.com/Teacher-Tom/HSGM_public.

AI.tldr: 提出层级语义-几何地图（HSGM），将3D几何信息转化为VLM可兼容的结构化表示，在零样本设置下实现视觉语言导航，在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上达到最先进性能，并超越部分有监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在2D视觉和语言理解上表现优异，但缺乏3D空间推理能力，难以捕捉动作与空间变迁之间的因果动态，导致导航不可靠尤其是在零样本场景下，存在语义与几何之间的关键鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出层级语义-几何地图（HSGM），将3D几何信息转化为多通道俯视图表示，包含三个层级：几何层记录可导航区域和障碍物、语义层表示物体及其关系、决策层支持高层任务推理和目标选择。VLM作为高层语义规划器解读HSGM选择几何有效的航点，底层由经典路径规划算法执行无碰撞移动，实现语义推理与动作执行的完全解耦；复杂指令被分解为子任务以缓解长程导航中的进度遗忘或幻觉问题。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE两个基准上的大量实验表明，提出的零样本框架达到了最先进性能，并且超越了若干有监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过HSGM将VLM与物理世界有效连接，验证了纯零样本VLN的可行性并为该方向提供了新范式；语义推理与动作执行解耦的设计思路对提升导航鲁棒性具有启示意义。

title: Diversity Over Frequency: Rethinking Tool Use in Visual Chain-of-Thought Agents
summary:
Visual agents employ external visual tools within visual chains of thought to incorporate fine-grained evidence. While prior work has mainly studied these tools in visual search tasks, their role in more complex visual reasoning remains underexplored. In this paper, we move beyond simple visual search tasks to investigate more challenging tasks, including 3D spatial reasoning and medical visual question answering, where agents must integrate tool-acquired local evidence with the global context.
  We identify a {tool-use collapse phenomenon: models progressively stop using tools while still achieving higher task accuracy.
  Moreover, we observe a clear asymmetry: (i) completely eliminating tool use degrades performance, whereas (ii) incentivizing tool use yields only marginal gains despite substantially increasing usage.
  We find that vanilla training and tool-use encouragement both reduce rollout diversity, explaining why higher tool use does not yield stronger reasoning performance.
  Motivated by these findings, we add an entropy regularization term to encourage diverse rollout exploration, achieving the best performance despite gradually declining tool usage.
  % We further observe similar dynamics on medical VQA, suggesting that tool-use collapse is not limited to 3D spatial reasoning.
  Overall, our findings suggest a training-time view of tools as scaffolding, where broader exploration over language generation and visual tool invocation improves reasoning despite tool-use collapse.
  Project page: https://scaffolded-exploration.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉推理智能体在训练过程中会出现“工具使用崩溃”现象——模型逐步停止使用外部视觉工具但任务准确率反而提升，并提出熵正则化方法通过鼓励多样化探索来提升推理性能，表明工具在训练阶段应被视为推理的“脚手架”。
AI.motivation: 现有工作主要研究视觉工具在简单视觉搜索任务中的应用，而其在复杂视觉推理（如3D空间推理、医学视觉问答）中需同时整合局部证据与全局上下文，这一场景下的工具使用动态尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 作者首先在3D空间推理和医学VQA任务上系统研究了视觉智能体的工具使用行为，识别出“工具使用崩溃”现象及其不对称性；随后提出在训练过程中加入熵正则化项，通过鼓励生成和工具调用的多样化探索来缓解崩溃带来的性能瓶颈。
AI.result: 实验发现：完全消除工具使用会降低性能，而强制鼓励工具使用虽然大幅增加调用次数但仅带来边际收益；vanilla训练和工具使用鼓励均降低了rollout多样性，而熵正则化在工具使用逐渐下降的情况下取得了最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明视觉工具应在训练阶段被视为推理的“脚手架”，其核心价值在于促进语言生成和视觉工具调用上的广泛探索，而非在推理时维持高使用率；工具使用崩溃不限于3D空间推理，在医学VQA上也观察到类似动态。

title: CoCoVideo: The High-Quality Commercial-Model-Based Contrastive Benchmark for AI-Generated Video Detection
summary: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence generated content (AIGC) technologies, video forgery has become increasingly prevalent, posing new challenges to public discourse and societal security. Despite remarkable progress in existing deepfake detection methods, AIGC forgery detection remains challenging, as existing datasets mainly rely on open-source video generation models with quality far below that of commercial AIGC systems. Even datasets containing a few commercial samples often retain visible watermarks, compromising authenticity and hindering model generalization to high-fidelity AIGC videos. To address these issues, we introduce CoCoVideo-26K, a contrastive, commercial-model-based AIGC video dataset covering 13 mainstream commercial generators and providing semantically aligned real-fake video pairs. This dataset enables deeper exploration of the differences between authentic and high-quality synthetic videos and establishes a new benchmark for highly realistic video forgery detection. Building on this dataset, we propose CoCoDetect, a detection framework integrating contrastive learning with confidence-gated multimodal large language model (MLLM) inference. An R3D-18 backbone extracts spatio-temporal representations, while a confidence gate routes uncertain cases to an MLLM for reasoning about physical plausibility and scene consistency. Extensive experiments on CoCoVideo-26K and public benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, validating the framework's robustness and generalizability. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/DonoToT/CoCoVideo.

AI.tldr: 提出了包含13个商业级生成器的AIGC视频伪造检测数据集CoCoVideo-26K，以及结合对比学习和置信度门控MLLM推理的检测框架CoCoDetect，在高质量视频伪造检测任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AIGC视频伪造检测数据集主要依赖开源视频生成模型，其质量远低于商业AIGC系统；即便包含少量商业样本的数据集也往往保留可见水印，损害真实性并阻碍模型向高保真AIGC视频的泛化，亟需高质量、无干扰的商业级伪造视频检测基准。
AI.method: 构建CoCoVideo-26K数据集，涵盖13种主流商业视频生成器并提供语义对齐的真实-伪造视频对；提出CoCoDetect框架，采用R3D-18骨干网络提取时空表征，集成对比学习与置信度门控MLLM推理，对低置信度样本路由至MLLM进行物理合理性与场景一致性的深度推理。
AI.result: 在CoCoVideo-26K数据集及多个公开基准上的大量实验表明，CoCoDetect达到了SOTA性能，验证了其在高保真AIGC视频伪造检测任务中的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建高质量商业级AIGC视频数据集和融合对比学习与多模态大模型推理的检测框架，有效缩小了真实场景与现有基准之间的差距，为高逼真度视频伪造检测提供了新的基准和方法方向。

title: Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval
summary: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

AI.tldr: 提出DOPA框架，通过引入OOD代理（OOD proxy）近似不可见的目标域，并结合基于马氏距离的全局多样性约束，提升大语言模型在分布偏移场景下的演示检索质量和推理鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在分布外（OOD）任务上表现良好，但随着分布偏移加剧其优势会减弱。现有方法通过从源域检索分布相似且信息丰富的演示来增强LLM推理，但在目标域不可见的实际场景中，无法直接评估未知分布，导致所选演示质量下降。
AI.method: 提出DOPA演示搜索框架，核心包含两个组件：一是OOD代理（OOD proxy），用于近似不可见的目标域并引导检索过程；二是基于马氏距离（Mahalanobis distance）的全局多样性约束，确保检索到的演示集具有充分的多样性。
AI.result: 在多个LLM和多种任务上的实验结果表明，DOPA能够有效提升模型在OOD设置下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DOPA通过代理近似和多样性约束有效解决了目标域不可见时演示检索质量不佳的问题，为提升LLM在严重分布偏移下的推理能力提供了可行的思路。

title: Deliberative Curation: A Protocol for Multi-Agent Knowledge Bases
comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables. Open-source implementation available at https://github.com/StevenJohnson998/AIngram
summary:
As AI agents transition from isolated tools to collaborative participants in shared knowledge ecosystems, governing collective knowledge curation becomes a critical challenge. Human platform governance mechanisms do not transfer directly: agent statelessness undermines deterrence-based sanctions, model homogeneity violates independence assumptions underlying crowd wisdom, and sycophancy collapses deliberative consensus.
  We propose a deliberative curation protocol combining three governance layers: (1) a knowledge artifact lifecycle formalized as a labeled transition system; (2) reputation-weighted deliberative voting integrating Beta Reputation with EigenTrust amplification; and (3) graduated sanctions adapted for stateless agents, including broken agent handling distinguishing malfunction from adversarial behavior.
  We evaluate the protocol through agent-based simulation with 100 agents across seven behavioral archetypes under two adversity scenarios (30 seeds, paired t-tests). The protocol trades modest precision under benign conditions for substantially better resilience under adversity: 0.826 vs 0.791 for majority vote under moderate adversity (p<0.001), widening to 0.807 vs 0.740 under stress (p<0.001). The protocol degrades roughly three times more slowly than majority vote. Ablation analysis identifies commit-reveal vote concealment as the most impactful single component (8.2-8.6pp precision improvement, p<0.001), outperforming reputation weighting and deliberation combined. Graduated sanctions were not exercised in simulation and remain empirically unvalidated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向AI智能体的审慎策展协议，通过结合人工制品生命周期、声誉加权审慎投票和分级制裁三层治理机制，在智能体无状态、模型同质和谄媚等挑战下实现知识策展。实验表明，该协议在逆境下鲁棒性显著优于多数投票（退化速度慢约3倍），其中提交-揭示投票隐藏机制贡献最大（8.2-8.6pp精度提升）。
AI.motivation: 当AI智能体从孤立工具转变为共享知识生态中的协作参与者时，集体知识策展的治理成为关键挑战。人类平台治理机制无法直接迁移：智能体的无状态性削弱了基于威慑的制裁，模型同质性违反了群体智慧所需的独立性假设，而谄媚行为会瓦解审慎共识的形成过程。
AI.method: 提出一个包含三层治理的审慎策展协议：(1) 将知识人工制品生命周期形式化为带标签的转移系统；(2) 结合Beta信誉与EigenTrust放大的声誉加权审慎投票机制；(3) 针对无状态智能体改编的分级制裁，包括区分故障与对抗行为的损坏智能体处理机制。通过包含100个智能体（7种行为原型、2种逆境场景、30个种子）的基于智能体的仿真进行评估，使用配对t检验进行统计验证。
AI.result: 协议在良性条件下精度略有牺牲，但在逆境下显著提升鲁棒性：中度逆境下精度0.826 vs 多数投票的0.791（p<0.001），高压逆境下0.807 vs 0.740（p<0.001），退化速度约为多数投票的三分之一。消融实验表明，提交-揭示投票隐藏是最关键的单一组件（8.2-8.6pp精度提升，p<0.001），效果优于声誉加权和审慎讨论的组合。分级制裁在仿真中未被触发，尚待实证验证。
AI.conclusion: 审慎策展协议在逆境条件下显著优于多数投票机制，验证了针对智能体特性设计的治理机制的有效性。提交-揭示投票隐藏机制是鲁棒性的核心来源，而分级制裁的理论设计仍需实证检验。研究为AI智能体集体知识治理提供了可操作的设计方向。

title: Visual-Noise Guided In-Context Distillation for Multimodal Large Language Model Unlearning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress on vision-language tasks, but they may also memorize and expose sensitive or restricted knowledge, raising concerns about privacy and broader safety risks. Machine Unlearning (MU) provides a promising way to remove targeted undesirable knowledge from trained models without retraining from scratch while preserving general model utility. Nevertheless, effective unlearning in MLLMs remains particularly challenging. Existing training-based methods often struggle to balance unlearning effectiveness and model utility. In contrast, training-free methods such as in-context unlearning preserve model utility by avoiding parameter updates, but they do not remove memorized knowledge at the parameter level and may remain vulnerable to reverse-engineering attacks. More importantly, in-context unlearning is insufficient in multimodal settings, where visual inputs can provide strong conditioning signals and induce undesirable outputs. To address these challenges, we propose Visual-Noise Guided In-Context Distillation (VGID), a distillation-based framework for MLLM unlearning. VGID dynamically constructs an unlearning-oriented teacher distribution from the frozen base model through dual-modal intervention that combines visual perturbation with textual in-context unlearning. The resulting intervention-induced distribution serves as a teacher signal for distillation, guiding the student model toward parameter-level unlearning without requiring external teacher models or explicit undesirable response annotations. Experimental results show that VGID achieves strong unlearning effectiveness while preserving competitive model utility, reducing forget set ROUGE-L by 0.371 with only a 0.055 drop in retain set ROUGE-L in a representative setting.

AI.tldr: 提出视觉噪声引导的上下文蒸馏框架（VGID），通过双模态干预构建教师分布进行蒸馏，实现多模态大语言模型的参数级遗忘，无需外部教师模型或显式标注，在保持模型效用的同时显著降低遗忘集ROUGE-L指标。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM机器遗忘方法面临平衡遗忘效果与模型效用的困境：基于训练的方法难以兼顾两者，而基于上下文的无训练方法虽避免参数更新但无法移除参数级别的记忆知识，易受逆向工程攻击，且在视觉输入作为强条件信号的多模态场景下效果不足。
AI.method: 提出VGID框架，通过双模态干预（视觉扰动+文本上下文遗忘）从冻结基座模型动态构建面向遗忘的教师分布，并将该干预诱导分布作为蒸馏信号，引导学生模型实现参数级别的遗忘，无需外部教师模型或显式不良响应标注。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VGID在代表性设置下将遗忘集ROUGE-L降低0.371，而保留集ROUGE-L仅下降0.055，在实现强大遗忘效果的同时保持了竞争性的模型效用。
AI.conclusion: VGID通过蒸馏框架有效解决了多模态大语言模型中训练-free方法无法实现参数级遗忘的缺陷，表明结合视觉扰动与上下文干预的蒸馏策略能够在不牺牲通用性能的前提下实现有效的多模态知识遗忘，为MLLM安全性和隐私保护提供了可行路径。

title: SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: SENSE通过语义嵌入导航和软门控评估机制取代基于表面形式的检索与验证，有效解决了检索式推测解码中因词汇层面刚性依赖导致的性能瓶颈，在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上实现最高4.09平均接受长度和3.26倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的检索式推测解码（RSD）虽具备即插即用的灵活性，但其检索和验证过程严重依赖表面形式的词汇级匹配，对语言表达变化敏感，导致性能受限于刚性词汇依赖，无法充分发挥推测解码在LLM推理加速中的潜力。
AI.method: SENSE提出两项核心设计：一是基于目标模型隐状态进行语义嵌入导航（Semantic Embedding Navigation）的检索机制，取代传统表面形式检索，建立鲁棒的语义对齐；二是软门控评估（Soft-gated Evaluation）模块，用于验证候选token之间的语义等价性而非表面形式匹配。此外，论文将现有方法拆解为原子原语，构建统一框架以实现细粒度的组件级比较。
AI.result: 在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上进行的跨领域广泛实验表明，SENSE在多项基线方法上均取得显著优势，达到最高4.09的平均接受长度（mean acceptance length）和3.26倍的推理加速比，同时生成质量与目标模型保持一致。
AI.conclusion: SENSE通过将推测解码的检索与验证从词汇层面提升至语义层面，有效克服了检索式方法对表面形式的依赖，为无训练推理加速提供了一种通用且高效的方案。其统一框架也为后续研究中组件级别的公平比较与系统性改进奠定了基础。

title: Agents on a Tree: Pathwise Coordination for Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization
summary: Multi-objective molecular optimization requires searching vast chemical spaces under conflicting objectives, where early design decisions strongly constrain downstream outcomes. Existing methods typically rely on a single policy or fixed scalarization, which limits their ability to represent diverse trade-offs and to explore multiple promising design trajectories. We propose ATOM, a multi-agent framework that formulates molecular optimization as a tree-structured search. Each node corresponds to an atomic operation and hosts an agent specialized for a particular objective or decision context. Agents coordinate along different paths of the tree rather than enforcing a global consensus, enabling the method to maintain and compare alternative molecular evolution trajectories. A global memory of past optimization behaviors further supports balanced exploration and exploitation across objectives. This tree-structured interaction enables reasoning over long-horizon dependencies inherent in molecular design. Experiments on challenging multi-objective benchmarks involving activity, synthesizability, and ADMET-related properties show that ATOM consistently achieves improved Pareto coverage and hypervolume over strong baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of pathwise multi-agent coordination for molecular optimization. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ATOM-41CE.

AI.tldr: ATOM提出了一种基于树结构搜索的多智能体框架，将分子优化建模为原子操作路径上的多智能体协调过程，在多个冲突目标下实现了更优的Pareto覆盖和超体积指标。
AI.motivation: 现有分子优化方法通常依赖单一策略或固定标量化方式处理多目标优化问题，难以有效表示不同目标间的权衡，且缺乏探索多种有前景的设计轨迹的能力，限制了搜索空间的覆盖范围和长期依赖推理能力。
AI.method: ATOM将分子优化建模为树结构搜索，每个节点对应一个原子操作并托管一个针对特定目标或决策上下文特化的智能体。智能体沿树的不同路径进行协调，而非强制达成全局一致，从而维持并比较不同的分子演化轨迹；同时引入全局记忆机制来平衡多目标下的探索与利用，支持长程依赖推理。
AI.result: 在涉及活性、可合成性及ADMET相关属性的多目标分子优化基准上，ATOM在Pareto覆盖和超体积指标上持续优于强基线方法，验证了路径级多智能体协调策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，通过树结构路径上的多智能体协同可以显著提升多目标分子优化的性能，为处理具有长程依赖和冲突目标的分子设计问题提供了一种有效的新范式。

title: Physics from Video: Identifiability of Time-Invariant Second-Order ODEs under Minimal Trajectory Conditions
summary: Bridging the gap between visual realism and physical understanding is a core challenge for video-based world models. We study the structural identifiability of continuous-time physical laws from raw pixels, focusing on whether an encoder-only pipeline can uniquely recover the parameters of second-order linear ODEs. We prove that a level-set slope-coverage condition ensures the learned latent space is locally affine to the true physical state, enabling exact parameter recovery. Our theory provides the first characterization of minimal data requirements across damping regimes, establishing that underdamped systems are identifiable from a single video clip, whereas other regimes require three diverse trajectories. We further introduce a variance-floor regularizer to stabilize the decoder-free objective and prevent latent collapse. Validated on synthetic and real-world data, our approach demonstrates that interpretable physical constants can be reliably estimated from video without the need for compute-intensive pixel reconstruction, ensuring both physical correctness and transparency. Code is available at https://github.com/wenjiewang3/PhysicsFromVideo.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在满足水平集斜率覆盖条件下，编码器-only框架可以从原始像素中唯一恢复二阶线性ODE的物理参数，并首次刻画了不同阻尼 regime 下的最小数据需求，其中欠阻尼系统仅需单段视频即可识别。
AI.motivation: 视觉真实感与物理理解之间存在鸿沟，现有基于视频的世界模型难以从原始像素中可靠地恢复连续时间物理定律的结构性参数，且缺乏对可识别性的理论保证，尤其是在不依赖像素重构的解码器-自由框架下。
AI.method: 本文从理论角度研究了编码器-自由（decoder-free）流水线的可识别性，提出了水平集斜率覆盖条件（level-set slope-coverage condition），证明了该条件下学习到的潜在空间与真实物理状态局部仿射，从而实现精确参数恢复。同时引入了方差地板正则化器（variance-floor regularizer）以稳定无解码器目标并防止潜在空间坍缩。
AI.result: 理论结果表明，欠阻尼系统仅需单段视频即可实现参数可识别，而其他阻尼 regime 则需要三段不同轨迹。在合成数据和真实数据上的实验验证了该方法能够可靠地从视频中估计可解释的物理常数，无需计算密集的像素重建。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为从视频中直接推断物理定律提供了首个可识别性理论框架，证明了物理常数可以在不依赖像素重建的前提下被可靠估计，兼顾了物理正确性与透明性，推动了视觉与物理理解之间的桥梁构建。

title: TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models
summary: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrustLDM，首个面向语言扩散模型的信任度基准，系统评估其在安全、隐私和公平性方面的表现，并揭示其在恶意上下文攻击下的脆弱性；进一步提出TrustLDM-Auto自动评估框架，通过利用解码灵活性系统性地识别模型配置漏洞。
AI.motivation: 语言扩散模型（LDMs）因其灵活的解码策略在速度和性能上挑战了自回归模型的主导地位，但其任意顺序解码方式可能引入新的信任风险（如安全、隐私、公平性），而现有研究缺乏对此类模型的系统性信任度评估基准。
AI.method: 构建TrustLDM综合信任度基准，覆盖安全、隐私和公平性三个维度，针对多种LDM架构并在多种静态后置上下文（post contexts）条件下进行评估；提出TrustLDM-Auto自动评估框架，利用LDM解码灵活性自动搜索并识别最优脆弱配置模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅使用用户提示时LDMs表现出较强信任度，但当恶意后置上下文附加到掩码响应上时，其对齐行为显著下降；更长的上下文不一定带来更强攻击效果，解码顺序和生成长度均会影响评估结果；TrustLDM-Auto在所有评估模型和维度中均发现了显著的信任度脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 语言扩散模型在信任度方面存在系统性脆弱性，尤其在恶意上下文注入场景下；解码策略的灵活性既是优势也是风险来源；TrustLDM及TrustLDM-Auto为构建更可信的LDM提供了评估工具和研究方向。

title: MindGames Arena Generalization Track: In2AI Solution with Delayed Per-Step Reward Attribution
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures, 9 tables. Technical report. First place in both Open and Efficient tracks of MindGames Arena Generalization Track at NeurIPS 2025
summary: Training language model agents for multi-agent strategic interaction presents a core difficulty: the quality of any action may depend on future events that never materialize, on moves that violate game rules, or on decisions made by other players. Standard reinforcement learning assumes that rewards can be assigned at each step, but this assumption fails in settings where outcomes are entangled across time and agents. We introduce delayed per-step reward attribution with eligibility gating, an episode lifecycle and postprocessing pipeline that computes rewards only at episode end, propagates them back to originating steps according to task-specific semantics, and excludes steps that lack valid dependent information from training. Together with asynchronous rollout generation via vLLM's continuous batching, curriculum-based opponent sampling, and multi-level stratified batch construction, this approach enables stable, sample-efficient RL training in multi-agent environments. We evaluate on the MindGames Arena benchmark at NeurIPS 2025, where a single 8-billion-parameter open-source model trained with our method matched or surpassed substantially larger proprietary systems, including GPT-5, in head-to-head play and took first place in both the Open (unrestricted) and Efficient (<=8B parameters) tracks.

AI.tldr: 提出延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控机制，结合异步 rollout 生成、课程式对手采样和多层分层批次构建，使单个 8B 开源模型在 MindGames Arena 多体智能体策略交互基准上超越 GPT-5 等大型闭源系统，在 Open 和 Efficient 双赛道均获第一。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体策略交互场景中，标准强化学习的每步即时奖励假设失效，因为行动质量可能依赖于未来未发生的事件、违反规则的行为或其他玩家的决策，且结果在时间和智能体间相互纠缠，导致奖励无法在每步合理分配。
AI.method: 提出延迟每步奖励归因与资格门控机制：仅在回合结束时计算奖励，依据任务语义将奖励回溯到原始步骤，并剔除缺乏有效依赖信息的步骤；结合 vLLM 连续批处理实现异步 rollout 生成、课程式对手采样以及多级分层批次构建，实现稳定且样本高效的 RL 训练。
AI.result: 在 NeurIPS 2025 的 MindGames Arena 基准上，单个 8B 参数开源模型经该方法训练后，在与 GPT-5 等更大规模闭源系统的对战中达到或超越对方水平，同时在 Open（无限制）和 Efficient（≤8B 参数）两个赛道均取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 延迟奖励归因与资格门控机制有效解决了多智能体环境中奖励时间模糊和交叉依赖的问题，结合工程优化使小规模开源模型具备了与顶级大模型竞争的能力，为多智能体 RL 训练提供了实用范。

title: Versatile Framework with Semantic and Structural guidance for Image Reconstruction from Brain Activity
summary: Reconstructing visual stimuli from brain recordings has been a meaningful and challenging task in brain decoding. Especially, the achievement of precise and controllable image reconstruction bears great significance in propelling the progress and utilization of brain-computer interfaces. Recent methods, leveraging advances in the power of text-to-image generation models, have reconstructed images that closely approximate complex natural stimuli in terms of semantics (e.g., concepts and objects). However, they struggle to maintain consistency with the original stimuli in fine-grained structural information (e.g., position, orientation and size), which undermines both the controllability and interpretability of the models. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a two-stage image reconstruction framework, termed MindDiffuser. In Stage 1, Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) text embeddings decoded from brain responses are input into Stable Diffusion, generating a preliminary image containing semantic information. In Stage 2, we use decoded shallow CLIP visual features as supervisory signals, iteratively refining the feature vectors from Stage 1 via backpropagation to align structural information. We conducted extensive experiments on brain response datasets across three modalities (fMRI, EEG, MEG) elicited by visual stimuli, demonstrating that our framework significantly enhances the performance of previous state-of-the-art models, highlighting the effectiveness and versatility of our approach. Spatial and temporal visualization results further support the neurobiological plausibility of our framework, providing guidance for future neural decoding efforts across different brain signal modalities.

AI.tldr: 提出MindDiffuser两阶段图像重建框架，通过结合CLIP文本与视觉特征解码及Stable Diffusion生成，在fMRI、EEG、MEG三种模态上实现比现有方法更优的语义一致性与细粒度结构对齐的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本到图像生成模型的脑解码方法虽能在语义层面（如概念与物体）近似重建视觉刺激，但在细粒度结构信息（如位置、朝向、大小）上与原始刺激的一致性不足，限制了模型的可控性与可解释性，因此亟需一种能够同时保持语义准确性和结构保真度的图像重建框架。
AI.method: 提出MindDiffuser两阶段图像重建框架：第一阶段将脑信号解码得到的CLIP文本嵌入输入Stable Diffusion，生成包含语义信息的初步图像；第二阶段利用解码得到的浅层CLIP视觉特征作为监督信号，通过反向传播迭代精调第一阶段生成图像的潜在特征向量，以对齐细粒度结构信息。该框架在fMRI、EEG、MEG三种模态的脑响应数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 在视觉刺激诱发的三种模态（fMRI、EEG、MEG）脑响应数据集上的实验表明，MindDiffuser显著提升了已有最优模型的性能，证实了该方法在多种脑信号模态下的有效性与通用性；空间与时间可视化结果进一步支持了该框架的神经生物学合理性。
AI.conclusion: MindDiffuser通过两阶段设计实现了语义与结构的解耦重建，为脑信号解码提供了兼具控制力和可解释性的新范式，同时其跨模态的有效性为未来不同脑信号模态的神经解码研究提供了指导依据。

title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
summary: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了长程搜索智能体中的观测掩蔽（observation masking）策略，发现其效果呈现非对称倒U型模式，取决于检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的交互，而非单一因素。
AI.motivation: 长程搜索智能体在多轮工具调用中会积累大量检索内容，导致上下文预算效率下降。现有的观测掩蔽（屏蔽过期观测）是一种最小干预方案，但何时有效、为何有效尚不明确，缺乏系统性理解。
AI.method: 本文通过系统性的实验扫描，在不同规模的智能体骨干网络（4B到284B参数）和三种检索器上，对离线及在线网页搜索基准进行观测掩蔽策略的实验。从机制上分析掩蔽如何实现token-for-turn权衡，并通过注意力分析和页面重访模式进行验证。
AI.result: 观测掩蔽的准确率提升呈非对称倒U型曲线：弱检索器下效果平缓，强检索器配合中等容量模型时达到峰值，模型饱和时性能急剧下降。机制上，掩蔽移除了模型注意力已大幅衰减的观测和很少重新打开的页面，新增的交互轮次在将失败转为成功时有益，但在移除模型本可利用的证据时有害。
AI.conclusion: 观测掩蔽的效果取决于检索器召回率与模型隐式过滤能力的相互作用，不能孤立看待任一因素。本文将上下文管理重新定义为依赖于特定机制区间的干预，为分析智能体深度搜索中的上下文使用提供了整体视角。

title: Product-Aware Deep Autoencoders for Robust Process Monitoring in Multi-Product Cyber-Physical Systems
summary: As Industry 4.0 accelerates the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) in manufacturing, robust anomaly detection has become critical for ensuring process safety and security. Current data-driven approaches typically employ "product-agnostic" or global models trained on the aggregate of all normal operating data. However, modern industrial facilities frequently operate under diverse product grades. While computationally simple, these global models inherently expand their decision boundaries to accommodate the variance of multiple modes, creating a "blind spot" where subtle anomalies or targeted cyber-physical attacks may be masked by the wide acceptance region of the model. In this work, we first demonstrate that the vulnerability described above is present in global-agnostic models operating across multiple product grades. We then present a Product-Aware Autoencoder as a principled mitigation that restricts the learning domain to grade-specific distributions. While this approach reduces the identified blind-spot risk, we do not claim it as the optimal mitigation among all possible alternatives. We rigorously validate this approach against a Global Agnostic baseline using the Extended Tennessee Eastman Process (TEP) benchmark. Our empirical results indicate that the Product-Aware framework performs comparably to the global baseline on standard detection metrics, while offering improved robustness to product-grade-specific operating modes. Most critically, stress tests simulating our hypothetical attack scenarios reveal that while the global model fails to detect operational deviations in 77.8% of the scenarios, the product-aware system achieves 100% detection accuracy. These findings suggest that, in flexible manufacturing environments, generalized anomaly detectors can pose non-trivial security risks, motivating a shift toward mode-aware diagnostic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在柔性制造环境中，传统全局（产品无关）异常检测模型因多产品等级数据导致的决策边界扩张而存在安全盲区，并提出了一种产品感知自编码器（Product-Aware Autoencoder）方法，在Extended Tennessee Eastman Process基准测试中，该方法在标准检测指标上与全局基线相当，但在针对产品等级特定攻击的压力测试中实现100%检测率，而全局模型仅检出22.2%的异常。
AI.motivation: 当前工业制造中广泛采用数据驱动的全局异常检测模型，这类"产品无关"模型将所有正常工况数据聚合训练，导致决策边界为容纳多种产品等级的操作模式而过度扩张。这种"盲区"使得针对特定产品等级的隐蔽异常或网络物理攻击难以被检出，构成了非平凡的安全风险，亟需面向产品等级感知的诊断架构来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 本文首先通过实验验证了全局无关模型在多产品等级环境下的脆弱性，然后提出了一种产品感知自编码器（Product-Aware Autoencoder）框架，其核心思想是将学习域限制在单个产品等级特定的数据分布上，而非对所有模式进行统一建模。该方法并非声称是最优方案，而是作为一种原理性的缓解策略，用于缩小决策边界、消除由多模式方差导致的盲区风险。
AI.result: 在Extended Tennessee Eastman Process（TEP）基准上的实验表明，产品感知自编码器在标准检测指标上与全局基线表现相当，但显著提升了对产品等级特定操作模式的鲁棒性。最关键的是，在模拟假设攻击场景的压力测试中，全局模型在77.8%的场景下未能检测到操作偏差，而产品感知系统实现了100%的检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 在柔性制造环境下，全局异常检测器因决策边界扩张而存在非平凡的安全隐患，可能被针对产品等级的攻击所利用。该研究结果支持了从全局化诊断架构向模式感知诊断架构转变的必要性，为工业4.0中CPS系统的安全异常检测设计提供了重要指导方向。

title: Positional Encodings Anchor Spatial Structure in Vision Transformers: A Geometric Perspective on Robustness
comment: 16 pages (9 main text, 7 appendix). 5 figures (3 main text, 2 appendix) with 8 graphics total. 5 tables (1 main text, 4 appendix). Submitted to NeurIPS 2026 main conference and the ICML 2026 mechanistic interpretability workshop
summary: Positional embeddings (PEs) in Vision Transformers (ViTs) are known to impact performance and robustness, but their role in shaping internal spatial representations is not well understood. In this work, we study how different forms of PEs influence the representational geometry of ViTs and how these changes relate to robustness under content-disrupting distribution shifts. We introduce a metric, the Spatial Similarity Distance Correlation (SSDC), to quantify spatial structure in token representations. Using this metric, we show that ViTs trained without PEs still develop non-trivial spatial structure, but this structure is driven by visual content and collapses under token permutation. In contrast, we find that all PEs considered (learned absolute, sinusoidal, and rotary) are associated with a consistent shift toward an index-anchored spatial organization. Representations in these models remain stable under perturbations that disrupt content, and exhibit substantially improved robustness to such distributional shifts. We further show that while different PEs produce distinct depth-wise trajectories of spatial structure, their robustness properties are largely similar (with secondary variation across encoding schemes), suggesting that robustness appears to depend on the presence of a stable positional reference frame more than it depends on the specific encoding mechanism. These results offer a geometric account of how positional encodings shape internal representations, with implications for the principled design of future encoding schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSDC指标量化视觉Transformer中位置编码对表征几何结构的影响，发现位置编码通过建立稳定的索引锚定空间组织来提升模型对内容破坏性分布偏移的鲁棒性，且该鲁棒性主要依赖于位置参考框架的存在而非具体编码机制。
AI.motivation: 位置编码(PE)在视觉Transformer(ViT)中已知影响模型性能和鲁棒性，但其如何塑造内部空间表征以及这种变化与鲁棒性之间的关系尚不清楚，现有研究缺乏对这一几何层面的系统性理解。
AI.method: 提出空间相似度距离相关性(SSDC)指标来量化token表征中的空间结构；通过对比无PE、可学习绝对位置编码、正弦位置编码和旋转位置编码等不同形式的位置编码，系统分析ViT内部表征的几何组织及其在内容破坏性分布偏移下的稳定性。
AI.result: 无PE训练的ViT仍能发展出非平凡的空间结构，但该结构由视觉内容驱动且在token置换下崩溃；所有引入PE的模型均表现出向索引锚定空间组织的一致转变，表征在内容扰动下保持稳定且鲁棒性显著提升；不同PE产生不同的深度方向空间结构轨迹，但鲁棒性特性高度相似。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性主要依赖于稳定的位置参考框架存在而非具体编码机制，这一几何视角的解释为未来编码方案的原则性设计提供了理论依据与指导。

title: ProtStructQA: A Denotation Threshold in Protein Structural Reasoning
summary: Protein-language systems are often evaluated by whether they generate plausible biological text, but a structural question has a sharper semantics: it denotes a measurement in a 3D coordinate system. We introduce ProtStructQA, an executable benchmark for protein structural question answering in which each natural-language question is generated from a hidden typed domain-specific language (DSL) program and the answer is obtained by executing that program on an AlphaFold-predicted structure. ProtStructQA releases 382.2K questions covering confidence, distances, predicted aligned error (PAE), solvent exposure, secondary structure, topology and contacts, and held-out compositions: a 330K active benchmark over 10K proteins from four species, plus a 52.2K hard-negative robustness pool. Without fine-tuning, we evaluate Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B under direct prompting, chain-of-thought, grammar-constrained executable voting, executable voting with chain-of-thought, and multi-turn ReAct-style tool use, and replicate the headline finding on Gemma-3-1B and Gemma-3-12B. We find a capability-dependent denotation threshold between Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B: below it, tool-mediated ReAct dominates because models often fail to produce executable denotations; above it, chain-of-thought flips from mostly harmful to strongly beneficial and becomes the strongest strategy on most splits. Parse-failure and family-level analyses show that the threshold is a transition from unparseable language to executable structural denotation, while grammar and execution remain selectively valuable for PAE and secondary-structure queries. ProtStructQA reframes scientific QA as compilation from language to measurement and provides a diagnostic testbed for when language models can map words to executable 3D structural measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ProtStructQA，一个基于可执行 DSL 程序的蛋白质结构问答基准，将科学问答重新定义为从自然语言到 3D 结构测量的编译过程，并揭示了语言模型在生成可执行结构描述时的能力依赖阈值。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质语言系统的评估往往依赖于生成的生物学文本是否合理，但结构化问题具有明确的 3D 坐标语义，需要一个能够严格验证模型是否真正理解结构信息的评测基准，而不仅仅是生成流畅的生物文本。
AI.method: ProtStructQA 通过隐藏的类型化领域特定语言（DSL）程序生成自然语言问题，并在 AlphaFold 预测的蛋白质结构上执行该程序以获得标准答案；基准包含 382.2K 问题，涵盖置信度、距离、PAE、溶剂暴露、二级结构、拓扑和接触等维度，并设计了硬负样本鲁棒性池；实验评估了 Qwen3（0.6B–8B）和 Gemma-3 模型在直接提示、思维链、语法约束可执行投票、可执行投票加思维链以及多轮 ReAct 工具使用等多种策略下的表现。
AI.result: 研究发现一个能力依赖的指称阈值出现在 Qwen3-1.7B 和 Qwen3-4B 之间：低于该阈值时，工具介导的 ReAct 策略占优，因为模型难以生成可执行的指称表达；高于该阈值时，思维链从大多有害转变为强烈有益，并成为大多数数据集划分上最强的策略；语法约束和执行验证仅在 PAE 和二级结构查询上有选择性价值。
AI.conclusion: ProtStructQA 将科学问答重新定义为从语言到测量的编译过程，提供了一个诊断模型能否将文字映射为可执行 3D 结构测量的测试平台，揭示了语言模型在结构化科学推理中存在从不可解析语言到可执行结构指称的能力转换阈值。

title: A Multi-AI-agent Framework Enabling End-to-end Finite Element Analysis for Solid Mechanics Problems
summary: Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most important numerical approach for solid mechanics. Challenges of FEA include a steep learning curve for entry-level users and potential false simulations due to incorrect definitions of key simulation components, such as boundary conditions, load cases, and solution variables. Years of engineering experience are usually necessary for real-world problem-solving. To address these issues, we present AbaqusAgent, a multi-agent framework grounded in large language models (LLMs) for solid mechanics analyses. AbaqusAgent is developed to facilitate analysis case generation and execution using Abaqus, one of the most widely used FEA packages, by turning users' natural-language instructions into executed FEA analyses and result visualization. AbaqusAgent is composed of six agents, including interpreter, architect, input writer, runner, reviewer, and visualizer agents, encompassing all the essential pre-processing and post-processing steps of standard FEA analyses. A wide variety of 50 solid mechanics problems have been successfully validated, achieving an overall success rate of 86%. Beyond improving the efficiency of FEA for solid mechanics problems and lowering the barrier to computational mechanics education, AbaqusAgent advances the human-simulation interaction paradigm and enables integration with AI-empowered optimization and material characterization workflows. The code is available at https://github.com/LIRAM-LIN/AbaqusAgent

AI.tldr: AbaqusAgent是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，能够将用户自然语言指令自动转化为Abaqus有限元分析的全流程执行与结果可视化，在50个固体力学问题上实现86%的成功率，显著降低了FEA的使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 有限元分析（FEA）是固体力学最重要的数值方法，但其存在学习曲线陡峭、关键仿真组件（如边界条件、载荷工况和求解变量）定义错误导致虚假仿真等问题，实际工程问题的解决通常需要多年经验积累，迫切需要降低FEA使用门槛并提高分析效率。
AI.method: AbaqusAgent是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，由六个智能体组成：interpreter（解释用户自然语言指令）、architect（设计分析架构）、input writer（编写Abaqus输入文件）、runner（执行仿真）、reviewer（审查仿真结果）和visualizer（可视化结果），覆盖标准FEA分析的所有前处理和后处理步骤，将自然语言指令转化为可执行的完整FEA分析流程。
AI.result: 在50种不同类型的固体力学问题上进行了系统验证，整体成功率达到86%，表明该框架能够有效处理多样化的固体力学分析任务并生成可靠的仿真结果。
AI.conclusion: AbaqusAgent不仅提升了固体力学FEA分析的效率和降低了计算力学教育的门槛，还推动了人机仿真交互范式的进步，并可与AI驱动的优化和材料表征工作流集成，为FEA的自动化和智能化开辟了新路径。

title: Digital-to-Physical Transfer of Adversarial Patches for Aerial Vehicle Detection
summary: Deep neural network (DNN)-based object detectors are widely used for analyzing aerial and satellite imagery in applications such as environmental monitoring and urban analytics. Despite their strong performance, these models are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, and physical adversarial attacks using printable patterns pose realistic security threats. In this paper, we evaluate physical adversarial patch attacks against an aerial vehicle detector by bridging digital optimization and real-world deployment. Adversarial patches are optimized in the digital domain using a loss function that minimizes the maximum objectness score while incorporating non-printability score (NPS) and total variation (TV) constraints to ensure both printability and spatial smoothness. The optimized patches are printed and deployed in three configurations: ON, OFF, and OFF-Side. Experiments using a YOLOv3 detector show that while the OFF patch achieves the highest effectiveness in the digital domain (85.51% Average Objectness Reduction Rate (AORR)), the ON patch demonstrates superior robustness in physical environments (0.197-0.343 Objectness Score Ratio (OSR)) due to its consistent visibility. Furthermore, our results indicate that weather-based augmentation does not necessarily improve patch optimization in this domain. These findings provide critical insights into the practical vulnerabilities of aerial object detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对基于DNN的航空目标检测器，研究了物理对抗补丁攻击方法，通过在数字域优化并结合NPS和TV约束生成可打印补丁，实验发现ON补丁在物理环境中鲁棒性最强，而天气增强并未提升优化效果，揭示了航空目标检测系统的实际弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有基于DNN的航空目标检测器在环境监测和城市分析中广泛应用，但已知其对对抗样本存在脆弱性，而针对航空影像的物理可打印对抗攻击研究尚不充分，缺乏从数字优化到真实部署的完整评估。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种连接数字优化与物理部署的对抗补丁攻击方法：在数字域中通过最小化最大目标性分数的损失函数优化补丁，并引入不可打印性分数（NPS）和总变差（TV）约束确保补丁的可打印性和空间平滑性；优化后的补丁被打印并部署为ON、OFF和OFF-Side三种配置，使用YOLOv3检测器进行评估。
AI.result: 数字域中OFF补丁实现了最高的平均目标性降低率（AORR 85.51%），但在物理环境中ON补丁展现出最优的鲁棒性（目标性分数比率OSR为0.197-0.343）。此外，天气增强并未改善补丁优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明物理对抗补丁攻击对航空目标检测器构成真实威胁，补丁的持续可见性是物理鲁棒性的关键因素，且数字域表现最优的补丁在物理域未必有效，这为理解实际部署中航空目标检测系统的对抗脆弱性提供了重要见解。

title: Short-form Text Rewriting with Phi Silica
summary: Short-form text rewriting is a constrained variant of paraphrasing in which limited context and high semantic density leave little room for variation. While large language models perform well on general paraphrasing, small language models (SLMs) often struggle with semantic fidelity and hallucination robustness in short-form settings. In this work, we present an empirical study of adapting an SLM, Phi Silica, for short-form rewrite through dataset curation, prompt distillation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and evaluation. We curate a dataset of short presentation-style text from public slide decks and use GPT-5-chat both to generate rewrite supervision and to conduct LLM-as-a-judge evaluation. Our results show that finetuning improves semantic fidelity, reduces hallucinations, and increases preference win rate against GPT-5-chat rewrites. The findings suggest that targeted adaptation for SLMs can substantially narrow the gap to cloud models and provide practical guidance for adapting SLMs to precision-critical rewrite tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对小型语言模型（SLM）在短文本改写任务中语义保真度不足和幻觉鲁棒性差的问题，通过数据集构建、提示蒸馏、参数高效微调等方法对Phi Silica进行适配，实验表明微调显著提升了语义保真度并降低了幻觉率，有效缩小了SLM与云端大模型之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 短文本改写受限于上下文稀少和语义密度高，变体空间极为有限；虽然大型语言模型在通用改写任务上表现良好，但小型语言模型在短文本场景下常面临语义保真度不足和幻觉鲁棒性差的问题，亟需针对性的适配方法以缩小与云端模型的性能差距。
AI.method: 采用Phi Silica作为基础SLM，通过从公开幻灯片集中策展短演示文本数据集，利用GPT-5-chat生成改写监督信号并进行LLM-as-a-judge评估，结合提示蒸馏和参数高效微调技术实现对SLM的针对性适配。
AI.result: 微调后的SLM在语义保真度上显著提升，幻觉现象减少，且在与GPT-5-chat改写的偏好胜率对比中取得更高胜率，验证了定向适配策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过定向适配可以显著缩小SLM与云端大模型在短文本改写任务上的性能差距，为将SLM应用于精度要求苛刻的改写任务提供了实用指导。

title: CAST: Non-Privileged Clipped Asymmetric Self-Teaching with Advantage Flipping for GRPO
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has been widely used to improve reasoning in large language models. However, outcome-level rewards provide only sparse supervision, and group-relative advantages vanish when all sampled trajectories for a prompt are either correct or incorrect. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) offers dense token-level guidance, but its token preferences are not necessarily aligned with trajectory correctness; empirical diagnostics show that OPSD signals behave differently on correct and incorrect rollouts, with teacher-positive and teacher-negative gap signals exhibiting different noise profiles. These diagnostics are conducted under an OPSD-style privileged teacher context for analysis only, whereas CAST training uses answer-free self-teacher scoring.Motivated by these observations, this work proposes CAST, an answer-free self-distillation method for GRPO-style RLVR. CAST keeps the verifier-grounded GRPO objective, but uses a stop-gradient self-teacher to shape token-level advantages according to trajectory correctness. Unlike prior self-distilled RLVR methods, CAST does not require reference-solution-conditioned teacher scoring, keeps the self-teacher log-probability gap active throughout training, and applies bidirectional local advantage sign reversal: teacher-negative tokens in correct trajectories can receive negative token-level advantages, while teacher-positive tokens in incorrect trajectories can receive bounded positive local advantages. For zero-variance all-correct and all-wrong groups, CAST assigns bounded sign-constrained base advantages, so these otherwise zero-gradient groups can contribute verifier-signed token feedback. Experiments on mathematical reasoning show that CAST improves RLVR training while retaining a lightweight, verifier-grounded trajectory-level objective.

AI.tldr: CAST提出了一种免答案的自蒸馏方法，通过停止梯度的自教师模型在正确和错误的轨迹中分别施加双向局部优势符号反转，解决了GRPO式RLVR中奖励稀疏和零方差组梯度消失的问题，提升了数学推理任务的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO式RLVR面临两个关键问题：一是结果级奖励仅提供稀疏监督信号，且当所有采样轨迹全对或全错时组相对优势为零导致梯度消失；二是OPSD等自蒸馏方法虽提供稠密token级信号，但其token偏好不一定与轨迹正确性对齐，且依赖参考解条件的教师评分，增加了额外开销。
AI.method: CAST在保持GRPO验证器目标函数的基础上，引入停止梯度(self-teacher)来根据轨迹正确性塑造token级优势，具体包括：无需参考解条件的教师评分、在整个训练过程中保持自教师对数概率差活跃、以及对正确轨迹中教师负向token施加负优势、对错误轨迹中教师正向token施加有界正优势的双向局部优势符号反转，并为全对或全错组分配有界带符号的基础优势以恢复梯度。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAST在数学推理任务上显著提升了GRPO式RLVR的训练效果，能够有效利用零方差组中的token级反馈信号，优于仅使用稀疏结果奖励的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CAST验证了在免答案条件下通过自教师信号与验证器目标相结合来提供稠密token级优势的有效性，为强化学习训练大语言模型推理能力提供了一种轻量级、可扩展的改进方向。

title: APE: Agentic Prompt Enhancer for Image Generation and Editing
summary: Natural language has become a powerful interface for image generation and editing, yet text-guided visual systems remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation. Semantically similar requests can produce different outputs depending on wording, specificity, and how explicitly visual constraints are stated, motivating prompt enhancement as a trainable component rather than a peripheral user choice. Existing strong enhancers often rely on large, proprietary LLMs such as ChatGPT or Gemini, adding cost, latency, and deployment dependence to the visual generation pipeline. We propose Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE), a lightweight framework that post-trains small language models (SLMs) as prompt-enhancement agents. APE supports both single-agent rewriting and role-specialized multi-agent enhancement. Its single-agent instantiation, SAPE, rewrites the prompt in one pass, while its multi-agent instantiation, MAPE, decomposes enhancement into a router--rewriter--composer process for handling compositional constraints over objects, attributes, spatial relations, and edits. With task-aware rewards and post-training protocols, APE improves visual alignment and prompt following without modifying the downstream visual model. Experiments on challenging image generation and editing benchmarks demonstrate that post-trained small prompt enhancers reliably outperform their base counterparts, narrowing the gap to closed-source prompt enhancers; in addition, MAPE proves particularly strong on complex compositional tasks within these benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE)框架，通过对小型语言模型进行后训练实现提示词增强，在保持轻量的同时显著提升视觉生成的对齐质量，其中多智能体变体MAPE在复杂组合任务上表现尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 文本引导的图像生成与编辑系统对提示词措辞高度敏感，语义相似的请求因表述方式、具体程度和视觉约束的明确性不同而产生不同输出；现有强提示词增强器多依赖ChatGPT等大型闭源LLM，引入额外成本、延迟和部署依赖，因此需将提示词增强作为可训练的轻量组件而非外围用户选择。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE)框架，通过对小型语言模型进行后训练将其构建为提示词增强智能体；支持单智能体重写（SAPE，一次性重写提示词）和多智能体增强（MAPE，将增强分解为路由器-重写器-组合器的流水线过程）两种模式，用于处理对象、属性、空间关系和编辑等组合约束；采用任务感知的奖励函数和后训练协议，无需修改下游视觉模型。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的图像生成和编辑基准测试上，后训练的小型提示词增强器可靠地优于其基础版本，缩小了与闭源提示词增强器之间的差距；MAPE在复杂组合任务中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过任务感知后训练，轻量级小语言模型可以成为高效的提示词增强组件，显著提升视觉对齐能力；多智能体分解策略在处理组合性视觉约束方面具有明显优势，为摆脱对大型闭源LLM的依赖提供了可行路径。

title: Learning to Retrieve: Dual-Level Long-Term Memory for Text-to-SQL Agents
summary: Interactive text-to-SQL agents solve database tasks through multi-turn interactions involving schema exploration, query execution, feedback interpretation, and decision revision. Long-term memory helps agents reuse past experiences, but existing retrieval methods remain limited. Static methods rely on fixed similarity heuristics that do not optimize downstream utility, while dynamic methods often learn from sparse final outcomes and retrieve memories at a single decision horizon. This is insufficient when memory usefulness changes across interaction stages, since memories useful for initial planning may differ from those needed for local, state-conditioned execution. We propose MERIT, a dynamic multi-horizon memory retrieval framework. MERIT maintains episode-level memory for global strategic guidance and turn-level memory for local decision support. Both levels use learned retrieval policies optimized with reinforcement learning. To train turn-level retrieval despite limited intermediate supervision, MERIT uses a lightweight Process Reward Model to provide dense proxy rewards for local memory selection. Experiments on BIRD-Interact show that MERIT outperforms no-memory, static-retrieval, and dynamic-retrieval baselines in success rate while reducing average interaction turns. Transfer results on Spider2-Snow further show positive cross-benchmark transfer without benchmark-specific tuning. These results suggest that multi-horizon retrieval improves experience reuse in interactive text-to-SQL agents.

AI.tldr: MERIT 提出了一个基于强化学习的多时间跨度记忆检索框架，通过回合级和轮次级两层记忆策略，并引入轻量级过程奖励模型为局部记忆选择提供密集代理奖励，从而在交互式 Text-to-SQL 任务中显著提升成功率并减少交互轮次。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式 Text-to-SQL 系统中的长时记忆检索方法存在局限：静态方法依赖固定相似度启发式，无法优化下游效用；动态方法通常仅从稀疏的最终结果中学习，且仅在单一决策时间跨度上检索记忆。然而记忆的有用性会随交互阶段变化——初始规划所需记忆与局部状态条件执行所需记忆不同，现有方法无法在多个时间跨度上灵活适配。
AI.method: MERIT 提出动态多时间跨度记忆检索框架，维护两类记忆：回合级记忆用于全局策略指导，轮次级记忆用于局部决策支持。两层均使用基于强化学习学得的检索策略。为在中间监督信号有限的情况下训练轮次级检索，MERIT 设计了一个轻量级过程奖励模型（Process Reward Model），为局部记忆选择提供密集代理奖励信号。
AI.result: 在 BIRD-Interact 基准上，MERIT 在成功率上优于无记忆、静态检索和动态检索基线，同时减少了平均交互轮次。在 Spider2-Snow 上的迁移实验表明，MERIT 无需针对特定基准调参即可实现正向跨基准迁移。
AI.conclusion: 多时间跨度检索能够有效改善交互式 Text-to-SQL 智能体的经验重用能力，不同粒度记忆的分层构建与强化学习优化是提升多轮交互性能的关键途径。

title: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
summary:
Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology. As developers use Codex, Claude Code, AutoGPT, and related agents to write code, manage projects, and execute multi-step tasks, recurring engineering problems such as cache reuse, context management, agent scheduling, and permission control increasingly resemble classical computer systems problems. This paper develops that analogy as a visionary survey. We map concepts from computer architecture to the emerging model-native stack and review work on LLM-as-OS, memory management, agent frameworks, tool protocols, multi-agent coordination, cognitive architectures, and safety governance. We argue that these strands address different layers of the same system but lack a unified model.
  To fill this gap, we propose the Intelligent Computing Architecture Model (ICAM), a six-layer framework for model-native computing with explicit interface contracts and design axioms. ICAM resolves the apparent tension over whether an LLM is more like a CPU or an operating system through a dual-plane view: a probabilistic execution plane concerned with what can be computed, and a deterministic control plane concerned with what should be computed. We further introduce three design laws: the Semantic Locality Law for KV-cache reuse and inference speedup, the Context Budget Law for effective working sets under finite windows and attention decay, and the Agent Speedup Law for diminishing returns in multi-agent collaboration. We validate these laws against published system-level data and relate them to recent evidence on agentic software practices. We conclude by identifying where the analogy breaks down and outlining a research roadmap for model-native computing. This is a conceptual and survey contribution; it does not report new experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出智能计算架构模型（ICAM），一个六层框架用于模型原生计算，将大语言模型从模型技术向系统技术的演进系统化为计算机系统架构类比，通过概率执行平面与确定性控制平面的双平面视图解决LLM类比分歧，并引入三条设计定律以指导模型原生系统的构建与研究。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型正从模型技术向系统技术演进，开发者在实际使用Codex、Claude Code、AutoGPT等智能体进行编程、项目管理和多步任务执行时，遇到缓存重用、上下文管理、智能体调度和权限控制等重复性工程问题，这些问题日益类似于经典计算机系统问题；尽管已有LLM-as-OS、内存管理、智能体框架、工具协议、多智能体协调、认知架构和安全治理等多个研究方向，但它们各自处理同一系统的不同层面，缺乏统一的模型来整合这些碎片化工作。
AI.method: 本文提出智能计算架构模型（ICAM），一个六层框架用于模型原生计算，包含显式接口契约和设计公理；核心创新是双平面视图：概率执行平面关注"能计算什么"，确定性控制平面关注"该计算什么"，从而化解LLM更像是CPU还是操作系统的类比冲突；此外引入三条设计定律——语义局部性定律（指导KV缓存重用与推理加速）、上下文预算定律（指导有限窗口和注意力衰减下的有效工作集管理）、以及智能体加速定律（描述多智能体协作中的边际收益递减规律）。
AI.result: 本文为概念性与综述性贡献，未报告新实验；作者基于已发表的系统级数据对三条设计定律进行了验证，并将它们与近期关于智能体软件实践的实证证据相关联；通过对计算机架构与模型原生技术栈的映射分析，系统梳理了LLM-as-OS、内存管理、智能体框架、工具协议、多智能体协调、认知架构和安全治理等领域的研究进展。
AI.conclusion: 模型原生计算中存在系统性的架构类比，但该类比在某些维度上存在局限性，需要明确其失效边界；ICAM框架为理解模型原生系统的各层面提供了统一视角，三条设计定律为缓存策略、上下文窗口管理和多智能体协作效率提供了可操作的设计指导；未来研究方向包括进一步完善ICAM框架、在更多实际系统中验证设计定律、以及探索概率执行与确定性控制之间的接口契约设计。

title: StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement
summary: Video world models (WMs) have shown promise for policy evaluation and improvement by imagining realistic future observations conditioned on ego-robot actions. While WMs can model distributions over futures, policy evaluation and improvement typically rely on nominal imaginations, which can miss high-impact outcomes of robot actions unless prohibitively many samples are drawn. To enable robust policy evaluation and improvement over WM imaginations, we propose StressDream, which steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified at inference time by optimizing the initial noise of diffusion-based WMs. However, optimizing high-dimensional noise is challenging: the optimization must reason about nuanced, scene-dependent target events in generated videos while avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) noise that yields implausible imaginations. We address this with two complementary objectives: a semantic objective with a Vision-Language Model that provides informative gradients by reasoning about the generated video, and a plausibility objective that prevents the optimized noise from drifting OOD. With state-of-the-art video world models for autonomous driving and robotic manipulation, we show that StressDream effectively steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified by text at inference time, such as task failures, enabling robust policy evaluation and improvement by identifying actions whose plausible futures include undesirable outcomes. Video results are available at https://junwon.me/StressDream/.

AI.tldr: StressDream通过优化扩散式世界模型的初始噪声，在推理时将想象引导向高影响且合理的结果（如任务失败），从而实现对机器人动作的鲁棒策略评估与改进。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型能够基于机器人动作生成逼真的未来观测，但策略评估与改进通常依赖名义上的单一想象，难以捕捉高影响结果，除非采样大量样本，效率低下。
AI.method: StressDream通过优化扩散式世界模型的初始噪声来引导想象生成过程，采用两个互补目标：语义目标利用视觉-语言模型对生成视频进行推理以提供信息性梯度，合理性目标防止优化后的噪声偏离分布导致不可信的想象。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和机器人操作任务中，使用最先进的视频世界模型进行实验，StressDream能够有效将想象引导至由文本指定的高影响且合理的结果（如任务失败），从而识别出可能导致不良后果的动作。
AI.conclusion: StressDream通过推理时引导世界模型想象高影响但合理的未来场景，为鲁棒的策略评估与改进提供了有效手段，有助于识别和避免机器人动作中潜在的高风险结果。

title: SPADER: Step-wise Peer Advantage with Diversity-Aware Exploration Rewards for Multi-Answer Question Answering
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents to acquire information beyond parametric knowledge. While recent work has improved long-horizon tool-use reasoning, most approaches focus on tasks with a single correct answer. In contrast, many real-world queries require discovering a comprehensive set of valid answers, a setting known as Multi-Answer QA. This setting raises two challenges: fine-grained credit assignment over long search trajectories and reward alignment for sustained exploration beyond easy high-frequency entities. We propose SPADER, a reinforcement learning framework for long-horizon tool use in Multi-Answer QA. SPADER includes Step-wise Peer Advantage (SPA), a critic-free step-level credit assignment mechanism that aligns parallel trajectories by decision step and estimates advantages from peer returns. It also includes a diversity-aware exploration reward that promotes long-tail entity discovery by upweighting rare findings and downweighting redundant ones. Experiments on QAMPARI, Mintaka, WebQSP, and QUEST show that SPADER generally improves recall and overall F1 over prompting-based agents, outcome-supervised RL methods, and recent step-level supervision approaches. Our code and model weights are available at https://github.com/KhanCold/spader.

AI.tldr: SPADER是一个面向多答案问答场景中长程工具使用推理的强化学习框架，通过无评论家的步骤级信用分配机制（SPA）和多样性感知探索奖励，显著提升了召回率和综合F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型工具使用推理方法主要针对单正确答案任务，而现实中的多答案问答（Multi-Answer QA）需要发现完备的有效答案集合，面临两重挑战：长搜索轨迹上的细粒度信用分配问题，以及奖励信号难以激励模型在挖掘高频实体后继续进行持续探索。
AI.method: SPADER框架包含两个核心组件：Step-wise Peer Advantage (SPA)，一种无需评论家（critic-free）的步骤级信用分配机制，通过对齐并行轨迹的决策步骤并从同伴回报中估计优势值来实现逐步骤奖励分配；以及多样性感知探索奖励（diversity-aware exploration reward），通过上调稀有发现的权重并下调冗余发现的权重，促进长尾实体的发现。
AI.result: 在QAMPARI、Mintaka、WebQSP和QUEST四个基准数据集上的实验表明，SPADER在召回率和综合F1分数上普遍优于基于提示的智能体、结果监督的强化学习方法以及最新的步骤级监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SPADER通过步骤级信用分配与多样性探索奖励的有效结合，为多答案场景下的长程工具使用推理提供了一种无需密集人工标注的强化学习范式，代码和模型权重已开源。

title: Coupling Language Models with Physics-based Simulation for Synthesis of Inorganic Materials
comment: Accepted to the AI for Accelerated Materials Design (AI4Mat) Workshop at Neurips 2025
summary: Modern generative machine learning (ML) models can propose novel inorganic crystalline materials with targeted properties; however, synthesis planning of these materials remains difficult due to the complexity of the associated physical processes and limited availability of computational tools. We introduce a novel hybrid framework to evaluate Large Language Models (LLMs) in inorganic synthesis planning by combining thermodynamic databases with simplified kinetics models to approximate realistic synthesis conditions. As a case study, we focus on the niobium-oxygen system, which features multiple industrially relevant oxide phases with well-characterized data. In computational simulations, we compare LLM-generated synthesis routes with classical path-planning algorithms, showing that the implicit priors in LLMs can yield more viable strategies. In our evaluation setting, classical search methods serve primarily as a foil rather than a direct competitor. This illustrates the relative complexity of the problem and highlights where the LLM's implicit priors add value.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合热力学数据库与简化动力学模型的混合框架，用于评估大语言模型在无机合成规划中的表现。以铌-氧体系为案例，实验表明LLM隐含先验能生成比经典路径搜索算法更可行的合成策略。
AI.motivation: 现代生成式机器学习模型能够设计具有目标性能的新型无机晶体材料，但由于相关物理过程的复杂性和计算工具的匮乏，这些材料的合成规划仍然困难。
AI.method: 提出一种混合框架，将热力学数据库与简化动力学模型相结合，以近似真实的合成条件，用于评估大语言模型在无机合成规划中的表现。以铌-氧体系为案例，在计算模拟中比较LLM生成的合成路径与经典路径规划算法的结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，LLM隐含的先验知识能够产生比经典搜索方法更可行的合成策略；经典搜索方法在该评估设定中主要作为对比基准而非直接竞争者，凸显了问题的相对复杂性以及LLM隐含先验的增值价值。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架为评估LLM在无机合成规划中的能力提供了有效途径，揭示了LLM隐含先验在复杂材料合成问题中的独特优势，为后续将大语言模型应用于实际材料合成提供了有价值的参考方向。

title: Hyperbolic and Evidence-Prioritized Experts for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance on multimodal tasks through scaled architectures and extensive training. Recent studies introduce Mixture of Experts (MoE) into LVLMs for improved computational efficiency. However, existing MoE approaches treat visual and linguistic modalities with symmetric architectures, overlooking the inherent asymmetry in how these two modalities are processed. This asymmetry causes two critical issues. First, text and vision form hierarchical rather than parallel relationships, as text queries typically describe partial aspects of complete visual scenes. Euclidean expert space struggles to encode such containment structures. Second, language experts in deeper layers progressively shift from evidence-based processing to parametric memory dependence, losing grounding in the provided visual and linguistic information. To address these issues, we propose AsyMoE, a novel architecture that explicitly models this asymmetry through three specialized expert groups. Intra-modality experts handle modality-specific processing. Hyperbolic inter-modality experts capture hierarchical cross-modal relationships through negative curvature geometry. Evidence-priority language experts suppress parametric memory activation and maintain contextual grounding throughout network depth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsyMoE achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, with average gains of 1.5\% over MoE variants and up to 3.8\% on hallucination-sensitive tasks. AsyMoE activates 25.45\% fewer parameters compared to dense models.

AI.tldr: 针对LVLM中视觉与语言模态的非对称性（文本描述是视觉场景的子集、深层语言专家依赖参数记忆而非上下文证据），提出AsyMoE架构，通过双曲空间跨模态专家、证据优先语言专家和模态内专家三组专家显式建模该非对称性，在激活参数减少25.45%的情况下平均提升1.5%，在幻觉敏感任务上提升达3.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE-LVLM方法对视觉和语言模态采用对称架构，忽视了二者处理的固有非对称性，导致两个关键问题：一是文本与视觉形成层次包含关系而非平行关系，欧氏专家空间难以编码这种结构；二是深层语言专家逐渐从基于证据的处理转向依赖参数记忆，失去对输入视觉和语言信息的接地（grounding）。
AI.method: 提出AsyMoE架构，显式建模视觉与语言处理的非对称性，包含三类专家：1）模态内专家（Intra-modality experts），分别处理视觉和语言模态的特有表征；2）双曲跨模态专家（Hyperbolic inter-modality experts），利用负曲率几何捕获跨模态层次包含关系；3）证据优先语言专家（Evidence-priority language experts），抑制深层网络中的参数记忆激活，保持对上下文证据的持续接地。
AI.result: 在多项多模态任务上，AsyMoE相比基线方法取得一致提升：平均相较MoE变体提升1.5%，在幻觉敏感任务上最高提升3.8%；同时相比稠密模型激活参数减少25.45%，实现了计算效率与性能的双重改进。
AI.conclusion: 视觉与语言模态在LVLM中具有本质非对称性，通过双曲几何显式建模层次包含关系以及引入证据优先机制抑制深层参数记忆依赖，能够有效提升模型在多模态任务上的表现并缓解幻觉问题，同时保持计算高效性。

title: Linguistics-Aware Non-Distortionary LLM Watermarking
summary: Watermarking should identify language-model output without degrading quality or limiting verification to the model provider. Multilingual deployment makes this harder because morphology, segmentation, and script change where watermark evidence can enter naturally. We introduce LUNA, a linguistically adaptive watermark that combines model-free detection with single-token non-distortion under the standard random-key model. LUNA estimates normalized next-tag entropy from part-of-speech contexts in an external corpus and uses it to set the depth of a non-distortionary binary tournament sampler; the detector reconstructs the same schedule from text, a tokenizer, a tagger, and a secret key. We evaluate six typologically diverse languages and two domains against eight primary baselines. LUNA attains an AUROC of 0.9959 and the lowest mean absolute median perplexity shift of 0.045 across the twelve settings; its 95% bootstrap interval [0.022, 0.073] lies below all baseline intervals. LUNA also records the lowest mean Self-BLEU, Distinct-1, surprisal, and entropy shifts. It is the only method that simultaneously achieves AUROC > 0.99 and an absolute median perplexity shift below 0.1 in a majority of settings, reaching this regime in 9 of the 12 settings while no baseline reaches it in more than 2. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Shinwoo-Park/luna_watermark

AI.tldr: LUNA 是一种语言自适应水印方法，通过基于词性上下文的熵估计指导非失真二元锦标赛采样器，在跨语言场景下实现了检测鲁棒性与生成质量的 Pareto 最优，AUROC 达 0.9959 且中位困惑度偏移仅 0.045。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型水印方法在多语言部署中面临挑战：不同语言的形态学、分词和文字系统差异导致水印证据难以自然嵌入，且现有方法往往需要在检测质量与生成质量之间做权衡，缺乏一种既能保持非失真性又能跨语言通用的轻量级方案。
AI.method: LUNA 提出语言自适应水印框架，核心包括：(1) 基于外部语料库估计词性上下文的归一化 next-tag 熵，自适应设定非失真的二元锦标赛采样器深度；(2) 检测器仅通过文本、分词器、词性标注器和密钥即可重构与生成端一致的采样调度；(3) 采用标准随机密钥模型，实现模型无关的检测和单 token 级非失真。
AI.result: 在涵盖六种类型学多样的语言和两个领域共12个设置下的评估中，LUNA 取得 AUROC 0.9959 和最低的平均中位困惑度偏移 0.045，其 95% 自助法置信区间 [0.022, 0.073] 完全低于所有基线区间；同时实现最低的平均 Self-BLEU、Distinct-1、surprisal 和熵偏移，且是唯一在多数设置（9/12）下同时满足 AUROC > 0.99 且中位困惑度偏移 < 0.1 的方法。
AI.conclusion: LUNA 证明了通过语言学特征（词性熵）自适应引导水印采样策略，可以在不牺牲生成质量的前提下实现跨语言高鲁棒检测，为多语言场景下的文本水印提供了新的设计范式，代码已开源。

title: From "Weak" Signals to Strong Models: Preference Delta Aggregation with LoRA Merging
summary: Training strong large language models (LLMs) requires high-quality supervision, which is often scarce. Recent work shows that paired preference data from weak-weaker model pairs (e.g., Qwen3 4B over 1.7B), despite the limited quality of individual responses, can provide an effective supervision signal through relative quality deltas, which we term a "weak" signal. This motivates a key research question: can multiple "weak" signals be constructively aggregated for improving strong models (e.g., Qwen3 8B)? To this end, we propose Preference Delta Aggregation (PDA), the first framework that derives a preference delta from each weak-weaker model pair, instantiates it as a LoRA adapter learned through preference optimization, and aggregates the resulting deltas via LoRA merging. To further mitigate directional interference during LoRA merging, we introduce Geometric Alignment Merging (GAM), a geometry-aware merging method that aligns adapter subspaces before aggregation, enabling more robust composition of diverse deltas. Evaluations on knowledge reasoning and agentic search benchmarks show that aggregating multiple "weak" signals pushes performance beyond any single signal, with further gains as additional signals are incorporated. Correspondingly, PDA with GAM improves the strong model by 6.8 and 7.3 points on average for knowledge reasoning and agentic search, respectively. It outperforms all single-delta and multi-delta baselines, exceeding the best single-delta baseline by 2.1 and 4.3 points. Further analysis attributes these gains to the effective composition of complementary capabilities encoded across distinct preference deltas.

AI.tldr: 提出偏好Delta聚合（PDA）框架与几何对齐合并（GAM）方法，通过聚合多个弱-更弱模型对之间的偏好Delta（以LoRA适配器实例化并合并），有效提升强LLM在知识推理与智能搜索任务上的性能，超过所有单Delta及多Delta基线。
AI.motivation: 虽然弱-更弱模型对（如Qwen3 4B vs 1.7B）提供的相对偏好信号（即"弱信号"）已展现出提升强模型的能力，但现有工作仅使用单一弱信号，尚未探索如何有效聚合多个弱信号以进一步提升强模型性能，缺乏系统性的多信号融合框架。
AI.method: 提出Preference Delta Aggregation (PDA)框架，从每个弱-更弱模型对中导出偏好Delta，通过偏好优化将其实例化为LoRA适配器，再通过LoRA合并聚合多个Delta；并提出Geometric Alignment Merging (GAM)，一种基于几何对齐的合并方法，在聚合前对适配器子空间进行对齐以缓解方向性干扰，实现更鲁棒的多样Delta组合。
AI.result: PDA与GAM在知识推理和智能搜索基准上分别平均提升强模型6.8和7.3分，超过所有单Delta及多Delta基线，超出最佳单Delta基线2.1和4.3分；且随着加入的弱信号数量增加，性能持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 多个弱信号可以通过PDA与GAM框架有效聚合，其性能增益源于对不同偏好Delta中编码的互补能力进行有效组合，为利用广泛的弱监督信号改进强模型提供了可行路径。

title: Zamba2-VL Technical Report
summary: We present Zamba2-VL, a suite of vision-language models built on Zamba2, a hybrid language-model architecture combining Mamba2 state-space layers with a small number of shared transformer blocks. Across a broad range of image understanding, reasoning, OCR, grounding, and counting benchmarks, Zamba2-VL is competitive with leading Transformer-based open-weight VLMs of comparable scale, including the Molmo2, Qwen3-VL, and InternVL3.5 families, and substantially outperforms prior SSM-based and hybrid VLMs such as VL-Mamba, Cobra, and mmMamba. Inheriting the near-linear prefill compute and small, near-constant recurrent state of its Zamba2 backbone, Zamba2-VL delivers roughly an order of magnitude lower time-to-first-token (TTFT) than these Transformer baselines at matched parameter scale, with the efficiency gap most pronounced at the smaller 1.2B and 2.7B scales most relevant to on-device and edge deployment. We release three models -- 1.2B, 2.7B, and 7B -- together with inference code at https://huggingface.co/collections/Zyphra/zamba2-vl.

AI.tldr: Zamba2-VL是构建在Zamba2混合架构（Mamba2状态空间层+少量共享Transformer块）上的视觉语言模型系列，在多项视觉语言基准上与同等规模的Transformer开源模型（如Molmo2、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3.5）竞争力相当，同时凭借近乎线性的预填充计算和较小的常规模态状态，在1.2B、2.7B和7B参数规模下实现约一个数量级的首令牌延迟（TTFT）降低。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型（VLMs）大多基于Transformer架构，尽管性能优异，但其自注意力机制在长序列下存在二次计算复杂度和较高的首令牌延迟（TTFT），限制了其在边缘和端侧设备上的高效部署。纯状态空间模型（SSM）和早期混合模型虽试图解决此问题，但在多模态理解、OCR、计数等复杂任务上仍落后于Transformer基线。
AI.method: Zamba2-VL基于Zamba2混合语言模型架构，该架构将Mamba2状态空间层与少量共享Transformer注意力块相结合，旨在兼顾SSM的线性推理效率与Transformer的表达能力。模型通过视觉编码器提取图像特征并映射至语言模型输入空间，采用视觉语言联合训练策略，发布了1.2B、2.7B和7B三个规模的模型及推理代码。
AI.result: 在图像理解、推理、OCR、定位和计数等多个基准上，Zamba2-VL与Molmo2、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3.5等同等规模的Transformer开源模型表现相当，显著优于VL-Mamba、Cobra、mmMamba等先前基于SSM和混合架构的VLM。在同等参数规模下，Zamba2-VL的首令牌延迟（TTFT）相比Transformer基线降低约一个数量级，且效率优势在小规模（1.2B、2.7B）模型中最为突出。
AI.conclusion: Zamba2-VL证明了混合SSM-Transformer架构在大规模多模态任务上能够达到与纯Transformer架构竞争力相当的水平，同时获得显著的推理效率提升，这为在资源受限设备上部署高性能VLM提供了可行方向。其近线性的预填充计算和接近常数的循环状态大小使得TTFT大幅降低，尤其适合对实时性要求高的端侧和边缘应用场景。

title: MemPro: Agentic Memory Systems as Evolvable Programs
summary: Long-horizon autonomous agents require memory systems to retain historical information, track evolving states, and reuse relevant knowledge beyond finite context windows. Existing agentic memory systems typically follow a memory construction-retrieval (MCR) pipeline, but often adapt mainly the memory bank while keeping the surrounding pipeline fixed after deployment. This fixed-pipeline design struggles to handle heterogeneous task-specific failure modes and can become misaligned with memory banks that evolve in scale and structure over time. To address these limitations, we propose MemPro, a system-level evolution framework that treats the entire MCR pipeline as an evolvable program rather than adapting only the memory bank or prompt text. MemPro maintains a version tree of runnable memory-system implementations, where an Evolving Agent iteratively selects promising versions, diagnoses recurring failures, and creates improved child versions through failure-mode-guided edit-debug refinement. Experiments on LongMemEval, LoCoMo, HotpotQA, and NarrativeQA show that MemPro consistently outperforms strong static and prompt-level evolving baselines within a few iterations, continues to improve with evolution, and achieves a favorable performance-cost trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/wanghai673/MemPro.

AI.tldr: MemPro 提出了一种系统级演化框架，将整个记忆构造-检索（MCR）流水线视为可演化程序，通过故障模式引导的编辑-调试迭代生成改进版本，在多个长时程任务基准上持续超越静态和提示级演化基线。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统通常采用固定的记忆构造-检索（MCR）流水线，仅自适应调整记忆库本身而保持其余组件不变，这种固定设计难以处理异构的任务特定故障模式，并且会随着记忆库在规模和结构上的演化而逐渐失配，导致系统性能受限。
AI.method: MemPro 将整个 MCR 流水线视为一个可演化的程序，维护一个可运行记忆系统实现的版本树；一个演化代理（Evolving Agent）通过迭代选择有前景的版本、诊断重复出现的故障，并基于故障模式引导的编辑-调试（edit-debug refinement）创建改进的子版本，从而实现系统级的持续演化。
AI.result: 在 LongMemEval、LoCoMo、HotpotQA 和 NarrativeQA 四个基准上的实验表明，MemPro 在少数迭代内即持续优于强静态基线和提示级演化基线，且性能随演化次数持续提升，同时实现了良好的性能-成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: MemPro 证明了将智能体记忆系统视为可演化程序进行系统级自适应调整的有效性，为长时程自主智能体的记忆系统设计提供了新的范式，即在部署后通过故障反馈驱动整个流水线的持续改进。

title: VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents
summary: Fitting quantitative models to data is a central step in scientific workflows, yet it remains one of the least automated. Recent agent-based systems leverage language and vision-language models (VLMs) to iteratively propose and refine statistical models, but these systems struggle on more challenging modeling tasks. To address these limitations, we introduce VESTA: Visual Exploration with Statistical Tool Agents, a framework that equips VLMs with a dynamically growing exploration toolkit to guide model refinement through data transformations, hypothesis-driven visualizations, and robust statistical tests. Unlike prior systems that rely on iterative critique alone, VESTA actively explores data before and during refinement by selecting or creating diagnostic tools, which accumulate in the model's context and can be reused later. We evaluate VESTA against established baselines in three toolkit configurations: no tools, static expert-written tools, and dynamic model-written tools. To support this evaluation, we introduce DAWN (Dataset for Automated Workflows and Numerical Modeling), a benchmark targeting distribution fitting and time series modeling with varying difficulty tiers, and culminating in real-world astronomy tasks including modeling initial mass functions and gravitational-wave chirp signals. We find that VESTA's dynamic tool creation outperforms prior agentic pipelines, with the largest gains on complex and domain-specific tasks. We further show that dynamically generated tools are substantially more sophisticated than those produced by existing visual tool-creation systems, covering more diagnostic categories per function and strongly preferring visual outputs that the VLM critic can reason over directly.

AI.tldr: VESTA 是一个为大型视觉语言模型配备动态增长探索工具包的框架，通过数据变换、假设驱动可视化和统计检验来引导模型精化，在分布拟合和时间序列建模等复杂科学任务中显著优于现有基于迭代评述的代理系统。
AI.motivation: 将定量模型拟合到数据上是科学工作流程的核心步骤，但自动化程度极低；现有基于语言和视觉语言模型的代理系统虽然能迭代提出和精化统计模型，但在更具挑战性的建模任务上表现不足。
AI.method: VESTA 框架通过动态增长的探索工具包增强 VLM，在精化前和精化过程中主动探索数据，通过选择或创建诊断工具（包括数据变换、假设驱动可视化和统计检验）来指导模型精化，工具会累积在模型上下文中并可重复使用；同时引入了包含不同难度等级、涵盖分布拟合和时间序列建模乃至真实天文学任务（如初始质量函数建模和引力波啁啾信号建模）的 DAWN 基准数据集。
AI.result: VESTA 的动态工具创建方法在复杂和领域特定任务上显著优于现有代理管线；与现有可视化工具创建系统相比，VESTA 生成的工具在每个函数覆盖的诊断类别更多，且强烈偏向于生成 VLM 评审可以直接推理的可视化输出。
AI.conclusion: 动态工具创建机制比静态专家编写工具和完全无工具配置都能带来更大性能提升，尤其在复杂和领域特定任务上优势明显；动态生成工具比现有系统生成的工具更为复杂和多功能，这对提升科学建模自动化的可靠性和泛化能力具有重要意义。

title: Rethinking Amortized Neural Representations for High-Resolution Terrain Elevation Data
summary: Implicit neural representations (INRs) model a signal as a continuous coordinate-to-value function. For terrain elevation data, this supports analytic derivatives, arbitrary-resolution decoding, and a smooth surface model of the underlying heightfield. However, fitting and storing a separate INR for every tile does not scale to large terrain datasets. Amortized neural representations reduce this cost with a shared network: a new tile is mapped to a compact per-tile payload, and a shared decoder reconstructs the heightfield from it. Most such methods are hypernetworks that predict the payload in a single forward pass, while others recover it through a short per-tile optimization. These methods were developed primarily for natural images, and their suitability for terrain heightfields remains unclear. We introduce a controlled benchmark on a 1 m/pixel terrain dataset and evaluate three representative methods under a unified protocol. Observing a clear cross-domain gap, we propose HUVR+SIREN, a hypernetwork that adapts the strongest benchmarked method (HUVR) by replacing its coordinate decoder with a smooth, analytically differentiable one. It attains the best height and derivative fidelity on the benchmark with no additional per-tile storage and lower decode cost, and tolerates aggressive post-training quantization with negligible quality loss, giving a compact terrain neural format. Ablations and diagnostics further identify which design choices transfer to terrain and show that the per-tile bottleneck is already near its useful limit, leaving the remaining gap in the shared hypernetwork's architectural design.

AI.tldr: 针对地形高程数据领域，本文通过系统基准测试发现现有隐式神经表示方法存在跨域差距，并提出HUVR+SIREN超网络，通过替换解析可微平滑解码器，在无额外存储和更低解码成本下实现最佳高度与导数保真度，支持后训练量化压缩。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经表示（INR）将地形高程信号建模为连续坐标到值的函数，支持解析导数和任意分辨率解码，但为每个地形瓦片单独拟合并存储INR的方式在大规模地形数据集上不可扩展。现有的分摊神经表示方法（如超网络或短时逐瓦片优化）主要针对自然图像开发，其在地形高程场上的适用性尚不明确，存在显著的跨域研究空白。
AI.method: 本文在1 m/pixel地形数据集上建立了受控基准，统一评估了三种代表性方法。在观察到明显的跨域差距后，提出了HUVR+SIREN超网络：该方法基于基准中最强的HUVR方法，将其坐标解码器替换为平滑且解析可微的SIREN解码器，从而适配地形数据的连续光滑特性，无需额外逐瓦片存储且解码成本更低。
AI.result: HUVR+SIREN在基准测试中取得了最佳的高度场和导数保真度，且无额外逐瓦片存储开销，解码成本更低。该方法对激进的训练后量化表现出良好的容忍度，几乎无质量损失，从而形成紧凑的地形神经表示格式。消融实验和诊断分析进一步识别了哪些设计选择可迁移到地形领域，并表明逐瓦片瓶颈已接近其有用极限，剩余差距主要在于共享超网络的架构设计。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明自然图像领域的最优INR方法不能直接迁移到地形高程数据，通过针对性的解码器设计可有效弥合跨域差距。逐瓦片瓶颈已接近极限，进一步性能提升应聚焦于共享超网络的架构改进。HUVR+SIREN为大规模地形数据提供了一种紧凑、高效、高保真的神经表示方案。

title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
summary: Recent progress in the development of language models has been defined by scale, with each generation absorbing more of the world's knowledge into its weights. However, many practical applications benefit more from robust reasoning than from extensive parametric knowledge. In this setting, task-specialized small language models (SLMs) offer a principled design choice. We introduce Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC), a family of SLMs built around this premise. As a variant of OCC, we present OCC-RAG, optimized for faithful question answering (QA) grounded in the provided context. This task directly aligns with the OCC design approach, requiring multi-hop reasoning over supplied passages while ignoring memorized knowledge. To train OCC-RAG, we implement a novel pipeline for synthesizing multi-context, multi-hop QA data at scale, producing a corpus of over three million examples targeting multi-hop reasoning, strict context faithfulness, and calibrated abstention. We release OCC-RAG-0.6B and OCC-RAG-1.7B, both mid-trained on this corpus. The models produce structured reasoning traces with source citations grounded in literal quotes from the context. Through OCC-RAG, we demonstrate that compact, task-specialized SLMs can match or exceed general-purpose models 2 -- 6x their size across multi-hop reasoning (HotpotQA, MuSiQue, TAT-QA), faithfulness (ConFiQA), and refusal (MuSiQue-Un) benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC)系列任务专用小语言模型，其中OCC-RAG针对基于上下文的忠实问答优化，通过大规模合成多上下文多跳QA数据训练，在多项基准上以0.6B-1.7B参数量匹配或超越2-6倍规模的通用模型。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型的发展过度依赖规模扩展以吸收世界知识，但许多实际应用更需鲁棒推理能力而非海量参数化知识，因此任务专用的小语言模型成为更合理的设计选择。
AI.method: 提出OCC-RAG模型，采用任务专用小语言模型架构，并构建了一套大规模合成多上下文、多跳问答数据的流水线，生成了超过三百万条训练样本，专门针对多跳推理、严格上下文忠实性和校准式拒绝回答进行优化。模型在训练后能够生成带有原文引用的结构化推理轨迹。
AI.result: OCC-RAG-0.6B和OCC-RAG-1.7B在多跳推理（HotpotQA、MuSiQue、TAT-QA）、忠实性（ConFiQA）和拒绝回答（MuSiQue-Un）基准上，以比通用模型小2-6倍的参数量取得了匹配或超越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，紧凑且任务专用的小语言模型能够在知识密集型推理任务中显著超越同等规模甚至更大规模的通用模型，验证了通过大规模合成数据训练实现专业化推理能力的可行性，为SLM在实际部署中的高效应用提供了有力支撑。

title: Doing What They Say, Not What They Reason: Locating the Faithfulness Gap in LLM Agents
comment: submitted to COLM social simulation with LLM workshop
summary: Do LLM agents act on the reasoning they state? This question of process fidelity is central to using LLMs in social simulation, yet it is hard to measure where no reference for correct behavior exists.
