We study it in acontrolled setting, a Texas Poker simulator with a verifiable reference action for every decision by decomposing the faithfulness gap into two steps: reasoning-conclusion and conclusion-action. The two steps behave oppositely.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将LLM代理的推理行为分解为推理-结论和结论-行动两个步骤，在可验证的德州扑克模拟器中系统研究了过程忠实性问题，发现两个步骤的行为截然相反。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏衡量LLM代理在推理过程中是否忠实于其陈述理由的方法，尤其是在社交模拟等缺少正确行为参考的场景中，过程忠实性难以被有效评估。
AI.method: 论文在一个受控的德州扑克模拟器中进行研究，该环境中的每个决策都有可验证的参考动作，从而将忠实性差距分解为两个独立步骤：从推理到结论的忠实度，以及从结论到行动的忠实度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，推理-结论步骤与结论-行动步骤在忠实性上表现出截然相反的行为模式，表明LLM代理在陈述理由后执行行动时可能存在系统性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLM代理在社交模拟等应用中推理行为的过程不忠实性具有分步异质特征，为未来设计更可靠的代理评估方法和忠实性提升策略提供了重要启示。

title: 4D Radar Meets LiDAR and Camera: Cooperative Perception under Adverse Weather
summary: Cooperative perception is important for autonomous driving but remains fragile when cameras and LiDAR degrade in adverse weather. We address this challenge by integrating 4D imaging radar as a weather-robust modality into collaborative perception and introducing a Doppler-guided spatial attention mechanism for multi-agent fusion. Our approach extends two representative backbones: a radar-camera pipeline where radar substitutes LiDAR, and a LiDAR-radar pipeline where radar complements LiDAR. To support evaluation, we release radar-augmented benchmarks, OPV2V-R and Adver-City-R, with physics-based LiDAR degradation. Experiments show strong robustness gains in fog and rain, including substantial improvements when radar replaces degraded LiDAR. Additional validation on MAN TruckScenes demonstrates transfer beyond simulation. Overall, our results highlight 4D imaging radar as a robust modality for all-weather collaborative perception. Dataset and code are available at: https://url.fzi.de/SlimComm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将4D成像雷达作为鲁棒模态集成到协同感知中，并引入多普勒引导的空间注意力机制进行多智能体融合，在恶劣天气下显著提升自动驾驶协同感知的鲁棒性，同时发布了雷达增强的OPV2V-R和Adver-City-R基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有协同感知方法在恶劣天气（如雾、雨）下因摄像头和LiDAR性能退化而表现脆弱，缺乏能够适应全天气条件的鲁棒感知方案，亟需引入对天气不敏感的传感模态来弥补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 本文将4D成像雷达作为天气鲁棒模态集成到协同感知中，并提出多普勒引导的空间注意力机制用于多智能体融合；该方法扩展了两种代表性骨干架构：雷达-摄像头流水线（雷达替代LiDAR）和LiDAR-雷达流水线（雷达补充LiDAR）；同时发布了基于物理模拟LiDAR退化的雷达增强基准OPV2V-R和Adver-City-R。
AI.result: 在雾和雨条件下，该方法在两种骨干架构上均展现出显著的鲁棒性提升，尤其是当雷达替代退化的LiDAR时带来了实质性的性能改进；在MAN TruckScenes上的额外验证进一步证明了其超越仿真环境的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 4D成像雷达是一种适用于全天气条件下协同感知的鲁棒模态，能够有效弥补摄像头和LiDAR在恶劣环境下的退化问题，为自动驾驶感知系统的实用化部署提供了关键支撑。

title: I-WebGenBench : Evaluating Interactivity in LLM-Generated Scientific Web Applications
summary: Recent advances in visual language models have enabled autonomous agents for complex reasoning, tool use, and document understanding. However, existing document agents mainly transform papers into static artifacts such as summaries, webpages, or slides, which are insufficient for technical papers involving dynamic mechanisms and state transitions. In this work, we propose a Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent that converts research papers into executable interactive web systems. Given a PDF paper, the agent performs end-to-end processing without human intervention, including paper understanding, system modeling, and interactive webpage synthesis, enabling users to manipulate inputs and observe dynamic behaviors. To evaluate this task, we introduce a benchmark of 19 research papers paired with expert-built interactive systems as ground truth. We further propose PaperVoyager, a structured generation framework that explicitly models mechanisms and interaction logic during synthesis. Experiments show that PaperVoyager significantly improves the quality of generated interactive systems, offering a new paradigm for interactive scientific paper understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PaperVoyager，一个将科研论文自动转化为可交互网页系统的端到端框架，涵盖论文理解、系统建模与交互式网页合成，并在包含19篇论文配专家构建系统的基准上验证了其显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文档智能体主要将论文转化为摘要、网页或幻灯片等静态制品，无法有效处理涉及动态机制和状态变迁的技术论文，缺乏将论文内容转化为可交互、可操作系统的能力。
AI.method: 提出 PaperVoyager，一个结构化生成框架，显式地对论文中的机制和交互逻辑进行建模，然后合成可执行的交互式网页系统；同时构建了一个包含19篇研究论文及专家构建的交互式系统作为 ground truth 的基准用于评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PaperVoyager 在生成交互式系统的质量上显著优于现有方法，验证了其对论文中动态机制建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PaperVoyager 为交互式科学论文理解提供了一种新范式，将论文从静态文本转化为可操作的动态系统，有望提升技术论文的理解与复现效率。

title: EnergyMamba: An Uncertainty-Aware Graph-Enhanced Selective State Space Model for Energy Consumption Prediction
summary: Energy consumption prediction is essential for efficient grid management, demand-side optimization, and sustainable energy planning. Although advanced machine learning methods have been employed for better prediction performance, existing works have two key limitations: (1) they usually formulate this task as a purely time-series prediction problem without explicitly modeling the spatial dependencies among different regions, and (2) they fail to provide reliable predictions with uncertainty estimates under abnormal situations such as extreme weather events. To advance existing research, we propose EnergyMamba, an uncertainty-aware spatiotemporal learning framework for accurate and reliable energy consumption prediction, which comprises two key components: (i) a novel Graph-Enhanced Selective State Space Model (GE-Mamba) that injects spatial context learned from the grid topology into the temporal dynamics, enabling coupled spatiotemporal modeling, and (ii) an Adaptive Sequential Conformalized Quantile Regression (AS-CQR) module, which includes locally adaptive normalization and an online feedback mechanism to dynamically calibrate prediction intervals under potential distribution shifts. We evaluate EnergyMamba on four large-scale real-world datasets from Florida, New York, and California. Results show EnergyMamba achieves around 5% improvement in prediction accuracy and 6% improvement in uncertainty quantification over 15 state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: EnergyMamba是一个面向能源消耗预测的不确定性感知时空学习框架，通过图增强状态空间模型（GE-Mamba）耦合时空建模，并利用自适应序列共形分位数回归（AS-CQR）动态校准预测区间，在四个真实数据集上相比15个基线方法在预测精度和不确定性量化上分别提升约5%和6%。
AI.motivation: 现有能源消耗预测方法主要存在两个关键局限：一是将预测任务视为纯时间序列问题，未能显式建模不同区域间的空间依赖性；二是在极端天气等异常情境下无法提供带有不确定性估计的可靠预测，缺乏对分布偏移的自适应校准能力。
AI.method: EnergyMamba包含两个核心组件：(i) 图增强选择性状态空间模型（GE-Mamba），通过将电网拓扑中学习到的空间上下文注入时序动态过程，实现时空耦合建模；(ii) 自适应序列共形分位数回归（AS-CQR），包含局部自适应归一化与在线反馈机制，用于在潜在分布偏移下动态校准预测区间。
AI.result: 在佛罗里达、纽约和加利福尼亚四个大规模真实数据集上的实验结果表明，EnergyMamba在预测精度和不确定性量化方面分别比15个最先进的基线方法提升约5%和6%。
AI.conclusion: EnergyMamba通过显式建模空间依赖与引入在线不确定性校准机制，有效解决了现有方法在异常情境下预测不可靠的问题，为高效电网管理、需求侧优化和可持续能源规划提供了更准确且可信的预测工具。

title: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, known as mirage (Asadi et al. 2026), is especially concerning in medical and document visual question answering, where plausible but visually ungrounded responses may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propose Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA), a model-agnostic method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. TC-LIA projects layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measures their similarity to the question embedding, allowing the method to track whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. The resulting alignment trajectory is summarized using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains, three input conditions, and twelve VLM backbones, the best systems achieve approximately 94.6-94.7% three-class detection accuracy with mirage rates below 3%, while baseline mirage rates range from 21.7% to 66.6%.

AI.tldr: 提出TC-LIA方法，通过探测CLIP ViT视觉编码器各层的patch-token表征与问题嵌入的对齐轨迹，实现视觉语言模型在生成响应前对幻象（mirage）的预检测，在五个VQA域上达到约94.6-94.7%的三类检测准确率，并将幻象率控制在3%以下。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）可能在缺乏相关视觉证据时仍产生高置信度的视觉回答，这种称为"幻象"（mirage）的失效模式在医学和文档视觉问答中尤为危险，因为看似合理的无依据响应可能被误认为基于图像证据。现有方法缺乏在VLM生成回答之前提前检测幻象的机制。
AI.method: 提出文本条件逐层内部对齐（TC-LIA）方法，该方法将CLIP ViT-H/14视觉编码器各层的图像patch token投影到最终CLIP嵌入空间，并计算其与问题嵌入的相似度，从而追踪各视觉层中是否出现与问题相关的视觉证据；所得对齐轨迹通过最终图像-文本余弦相似度、后期层top-k patch-文本对齐、早期到后期增益以及逐层斜率四个特征进行汇总，并结合像素统计空白/噪声检测、零样本域路由和结构化VLM自我评估构成集成系统。
AI.result: 在五个VQA域、三种输入条件和十二个VLM骨干网络上，最佳系统达到约94.6-94.7%的三类检测准确率，幻象率低于3%，而基线幻象率范围为21.7%至66.6%。
AI.conclusion: TC-LIA是一种模型无关的幻象预检测方法，能够有效识别VLM是否应该回答或弃权，在多个VQA域和多种VLM骨干上均能大幅降低幻象率，证明了通过探测视觉编码器内部对齐动态来检测视觉无依据响应的有效性。

title: Not All Flips Are Conformity: Decomposing Stance Convergence in Multi-Agent LLM Debate
summary: Multi-agent debate (MAD) is a promising strategy for improving LLM reasoning, but when agents converge on a shared answer, it is unclear whether that convergence reflects genuine deliberation or social compliance. We show that the conventional answer flip rate conflates three distinct mechanisms: spontaneous instability, stance-induced conformity, and reasoning-induced persuasion. Our three-source decomposition framework isolates each through controlled counterfactual conditions. In the primary MMLU-Pro setting, 37% of agent-question observations change under self-reflection alone, while robustness tests show substantial model-dependent instability across GPQA-Diamond and three model families; strict conformity is 29% in the primary setting and remains predominantly harmful across model replications (57-77% correct-to-wrong). A controlled information-gradient experiment reveals that even vacuous reasoning is associated with 20-39% error adoption among resistant agents, with reasoning-like presentation carrying substantial persuasive weight. Harmful conformity can be predicted from Round 0 features (AUC = 0.79), and risk-targeted intervention reduces it by 13.6 percentage points (p < 0.001). However, without correctness labels or self-reflection controls, reducing peer adoption does not improve accuracy, because harmful and beneficial influence cannot be distinguished.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示多智能体辩论（MAD）中答案收敛可能源于社会顺从而非真实推理，提出三源分解框架将传统翻牌率拆解为自发不稳定性、立场诱导顺从和推理诱导说服，并发现顺从性变化中57-77%为有害（正确转错误），通过无意义推理实验证明推理式呈现本身即具有显著说服力。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论（MAD）被广泛用于提升LLM推理能力，但现有评估指标（如答案翻牌率）无法区分答案收敛是源于真实推理说服还是社会顺从（即单纯从众），这一混淆使得MAD的真实有效性存疑，亟需解耦不同机制以正确评估和优化辩论策略。
AI.method: 提出三源分解框架，通过受控反事实条件将传统答案翻牌率拆分为自发不稳定性（自我反思下的变化）、立场诱导顺从（仅受他人立场影响而改变正确答案）和推理诱导说服（受有效推理影响而变化）。在MMLU-Pro和GPQA-Diamond基准上对多个模型家族进行实验，并设计信息梯度实验（注入无意义推理）来隔离推理式呈现本身的说服效果，同时构建Round 0特征预测模型和风险靶向干预策略。
AI.result: 在MMLU-Pro主要设置中，37%的智能体-问题观测在自我反思下即发生变化；严格顺从性为29%，其中57-77%为有害顺从（正确转错误）；无意义推理实验中，抵抗型智能体在20-39%的情况下采纳了空洞推理，表明推理式呈现本身即具有说服权重；有害顺从可从Round 0特征预测（AUC=0.79），风险靶向干预将其降低13.6个百分点（p<0.001），但无正确标签时降低从众无法提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: MAD中的答案收敛在很大程度上由社会顺从（尤其是有害顺从）驱动而非真实推理，仅降低从众行为不足以提升模型准确性，因为无法区分有益和有害影响；未来需设计能识别影响方向性的干预方法，且评估MAD时必须引入自我反思基线以分离自发不稳定性，否则传统指标会严重高估辩论效果。

title: Threshold-Based Exclusive Batching for LLM Inference
summary: Mixed batching (MB)--interleaving prefill and decode in a single batch--has become the standard scheduling strategy for large language model (LLM) inference due to its efficiency in maximizing compute and memory utilization. However, through controlled experiments, we find that prefill-decode interference inflates MB's per-step marginal cost above that of pure decode. On the high-bandwidth H200 (4.8 TB/s), this occurs only when decode tokens exceed 80% of the batch; however, on the bandwidth-constrained RTX PRO 6000 (1.792 TB/s), this threshold plummets to just 20%. Consequently, the optimal choice between MB and exclusive batching (EB) fundamentally depends on GPU memory bandwidth, model size, and workload composition. We derive a closed-form condition for this EB-MB performance crossover, along with asymptotically optimal phase-switching thresholds and memory-safe batch sizing for EB. Optimized EB achieves up to 41.9% higher throughput on bandwidth-constrained GPUs, while MB retains its advantage on high-bandwidth hardware with larger models. Our hybrid scheduler EB+ applies this condition online to dynamically switch between EB and MB without manual intervention. Under non-stationary traffic with distribution or concurrency shifts, EB+ attains the highest or near-highest throughput in every setting, outperforming MB by up to 36.4%.

AI.tldr: 混合批处理中prefill与decode之间存在干扰，导致每步边际成本高于纯decode；在带宽受限的GPU上，独占批处理（EB）在特定条件下优于混合批处理（MB），本文推导了EB-MB性能交叉的闭式条件并提出动态混合调度器EB+，在非平稳流量下吞吐量最高提升36.4%。
AI.motivation: 混合批处理（MB）虽已成为LLM推理的标准调度策略，但本文通过受控实验发现prefill与decode之间的干扰会使MB的每步边际成本高于纯decode，且该干扰程度严重依赖于GPU内存带宽、模型大小和工作负载组成，当前缺乏对这一干扰的系统量化以及最优调度策略的明确选择条件。
AI.method: 通过受控实验量化prefill-decode干扰对边际成本的影响；推导EB-MB性能交叉的闭式条件、渐进最优的相位切换阈值以及EB的内存安全批量大小；设计混合调度器EB+，在线应用该条件自动在EB与MB之间动态切换，无需人工干预。
AI.result: 在高带宽H200 GPU上，decode token超过batch的80%时MB才出现成本膨胀；在带宽受限的RTX PRO 6000上，该阈值降至20%。优化后的EB在带宽受限GPU上吞吐量最高提升41.9%，MB在高带宽硬件上仍具优势。在非平稳流量下，EB+在所有设置中达到最高或接近最高的吞吐量，比MB最高提升36.4%。
AI.conclusion: MB与EB的最优选择根本上取决于GPU内存带宽、模型大小和工作负载组成，不存在通用最优策略；所提出的闭式条件和动态调度器EB+能够根据实时条件自动选择最优批处理策略，在实际非平稳流量下始终维持近优性能。

title: 3D Segment Anything Model with Visual Mamba for Diagnosing Placenta Accreta Spectrum
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP2026). More modifications may be performed
summary: Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS) is a rare but highly dangerous obstetric disease. Early and accurate PAS diagnosis is critical for maternal health. Traditional PAS diagnosis relies on experienced doctors by analyzing the cesarean history and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data. However, district-level hospitals often lack the expertise and resources for accurate PAS diagnosis. To address these challenges, we establish the first MRI-based PAS dataset, which includes both fine-grained segmentation and classification annotations. Meanwhile, diagnosing PAS can be significantly enhanced by segmenting lesion areas from MRI images of the uterus. To achieve automatic PAS diagnosis, we propose 3DSAMba, a novel feature learning framework for effective lesion segmentation. More specifically, we first design a 3D Segment Anything Model (SAM) and incorporate medical domain information into the model through an efficient adapter mechanism. In addition, we introduce a Multi-Level Aggregation Mamba (MLAM) to aggregate feature maps across different levels and a Fusion State Space Model (FSSM) to fuse multi-scale features from both the encoder and decoder. Finally, we apply segmentation masks to the original MRI images through element-wise multiplication, effectively isolating lesion areas for more accurate PAS diagnosis. Extensive experiments validate that our framework significantly improves the PAS diagnostic performance. To facilitate further research in PAS diagnosis, we have released the dataset and source code at https://github.com/Drchip61/PASD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个包含细粒度分割与分类标注的MRI胎盘植入谱（PAS）数据集，并设计了3DSAMba框架，通过结合3D SAM、适配器机制、Multi-Level Aggregation Mamba（MLAM）和Fusion State Space Model（FSSM）实现病灶区域分割，从而有效提升PAS自动诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 胎盘植入谱（PAS）是一种罕见但极其危险的产科疾病，早期准确诊断对孕产妇健康至关重要；传统诊断依赖经验丰富的医生分析剖宫产史和MRI数据，但基层医院缺乏相关专长和资源，亟需自动化诊断方法。
AI.method: 提出3DSAMba特征学习框架，首先设计3D版本的Segment Anything Model（SAM），并通过高效适配器机制融入医学领域知识；引入Multi-Level Aggregation Mamba（MLAM）聚合不同层级特征图，以及Fusion State Space Model（FSSM）融合编码器和解码器的多尺度特征；最终将分割掩码与原始MRI图像逐元素相乘，隔离病灶区域用于更准确的PAS诊断。
AI.result: 建立了首个MRI-based PAS数据集（包含细粒度分割与分类标注），并通过大量实验验证了所提框架显著提升了PAS诊断性能；数据集和源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 3DSAMba结合3D SAM、适配器机制及状态空间模型可有效实现PAS病灶分割与自动诊断，为基层医院提供可行的辅助诊断方案；开源数据集与代码将推动相关领域的进一步研究。

title: Momento: Evaluating Persistent Memory and Reasoning with Multi-Session Agentic Conversations
summary: Recent advances in agentic AI have enabled agents to complete complex tasks through tool use, reasoning, and multi-step planning. Yet existing benchmarks evaluate agents within a single session, ignoring past actions, stated preferences, and prior decisions that agents must integrate to fulfill personalized user goals. We introduce Momento, a benchmark for persistent agentic task completion in multi-session service environments, requiring agents to take consequential, tool-mediated actions while resolving temporal dependencies and evolving user goals across sessions. Experimental results reveal that current agents fail primarily through misestimation of user state, treating prior session history as a reliable proxy for current context rather than stale information requiring re-validation, highlighting a substantial gap between current agent capabilities and realistic long-horizon human-agent interaction.

AI.tldr: Momento是一个用于评估多会话持久化智能体任务完成的基准，揭示了当前智能体因对用户状态误估而无法处理跨会话的时间依赖性和演化中的用户目标，表明现有智能体能力与真实长期人机交互之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准仅在单会话环境中进行评估，忽略了智能体在真实服务场景中需跨会话整合用户历史行为、偏好和先前决策以实现个性化目标的需求，缺乏对持久化、多会话任务完成能力的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了Momento基准，构建多会话服务环境，要求智能体通过工具调用执行具有后果的行动，同时解决跨会话的时间依赖性和演化的用户目标，以评估智能体的持久化任务完成能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，当前智能体失败的主要原因是用户状态误估，即错误地将先前会话历史视为当前上下文当前状态的可靠代理，而忽略了其中包含的需重新验证的过时信息。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体能力与真实长期人机交互需求之间存在显著差距，智能体需要学会识别并重新验证过时的会话信息，而非简单依赖历史记录作为上下文。

title: Acting with AI: An Interaction-Based Framework for Agentic Tort Liability
summary: Agentic AI systems can plan over multiple steps, use tools, and execute tasks over time. When such systems cause harm, tort law struggles to allocate responsibility because the harmful path may be neither fully chosen by the user nor specifically foreseen by the developer. This paper proposes an interaction-based framework for agentic torts, drawing on Michael Bratman's planning theory and on the common law's treatment of human-human concerted action. We distinguish three interaction types: autonomous drift, pure tool use, and collaborative planning. Pure tool cases remain governed by ordinary product-defect and warning doctrines; collaborative planning cases map onto the independent contractor control test, professional malpractice, and negligent misrepresentation; autonomous drift maps onto frolic and detour under respondeat superior and strict product liability. The framework treats the stateful interaction log as the primary evidentiary trace, allowing courts to infer where the human-AI trajectory departed from the authorized undertaking and where liability should attach. We resolve four incident-anchored cases, situate the account alongside strict-liability and insurance-based proposals, note its relationship to regulatory oversight, and propose a ``Reasonable Agent'' standard built around constraint verification, epistemic transparency, runtime grounding, and forensic logging.

AI.tldr: 本文针对智能体AI系统在多步规划与工具使用过程中引发的侵权责任分配难题，基于Bratman规划理论与普通法协同行动原则，提出了一种以交互类型为核心的智能体侵权责任框架，将人机交互分为自主漂移、纯工具使用与协作规划三类，并分别映射至现有侵权法规则，同时引入"合理智能体标准"作为可溯源的举证与归责依据。
AI.motivation: 当前侵权法在分配智能体AI系统（具备多步规划、工具调用与跨时序执行能力）所致损害的责任时面临严重困境，因为有害的行为路径既非完全由用户选择，也非开发者所能具体预见，现有产品责任与过错责任理论均难以有效覆盖这种人机混合决策下的责任归属问题。
AI.method: 本文提出一个基于交互类型的侵权责任分析框架：借鉴Michael Bratman的规划理论以及普通法中关于人类协同行动的处理原则，将人机交互划分为自主漂移（autonomous drift）、纯工具使用（pure tool use）与协作规划（collaborative planning）三类，分别映射至不同的侵权法规则（如产品缺陷与警示义务、独立承包人控制测试与专业过失、雇主责任下的frolic and detour与严格产品责任）；同时提出以有状态交互日志（stateful interaction log）作为主要证据痕迹，辅以"合理智能体标准"（Reasonable Agent standard），该标准涵盖约束验证、认知透明性、运行时接地与取证日志四个维度。
AI.result: 本文通过四个基于真实侵权案例的锚定场景对框架进行了推演验证，将所提方案与严格责任和保险导向的既有提议进行了对比分析，并阐明了其与监管监督之间的关系，但未提供量化实验数据或基准测试结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为法院推断人机协作路径何时偏离了授权范围以及责任应如何附着提供了可操作的法律推理工具，揭示了交互类型而非系统自主性程度才是归责的关键变量，并为面向智能体系统的侵权法改革与合理智能体标准建构提出了方向性建议。

title: OptiWorld: Optimal Control for Video World Generation under Physical Constraints
summary: Video generation models are becoming a scalable form of world models, but they mainly generate plausible motion rather than proactively control or optimize the underlying dynamics. As a result, an object in the generated video may follow trajectories that are unsafe, not smooth, inefficient, or physically inconsistent. In this work, we propose \textbf{OptiWorld}, a framework that brings classical optimal control into video generation at inference time. OptiWorld first extracts a compact, task-relevant world state, then plans an optimal trajectory under physical constraints, and finally renders the video conditioned on this trajectory. We formulate planning as a geometric problem on a continuous manifold, which converts 3D geometry and task-dependent physical constraints into a unified planning geometry. By adding this optimal-control layer, OptiWorld generates videos with preferable dynamics, demonstrating strong potential in multiple tasks including goal-conditioned image-to-video generation, video dynamics editing, and counterfactual generation.

AI.tldr: OptiWorld 是一个将经典最优控制引入视频生成推理阶段的框架，通过提取紧凑世界状态、在几何流形上规划最优轨迹并基于轨迹渲染视频，从而生成具有理想动力学特性的视频，适用于目标条件图像到视频生成、视频动力学编辑和反事实生成等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽然可作为可扩展的世界模型，但生成的运动大多仅追求视觉合理性，无法主动控制或优化底层动力学，导致物体轨迹存在不安全、不光滑、低效或物理不一致等问题。
AI.method: OptiWorld 框架在推理阶段引入经典最优控制，首先提取紧凑且任务相关的世界状态，然后在物理约束下规划最优轨迹，最后基于该轨迹条件化渲染视频。其中规划过程被形式化为连续流形上的几何问题，将 3D 几何与任务相关的物理约束统一为规划几何。
AI.result: OptiWorld 能够生成具有更优动力学的视频，并在目标条件图像到视频生成、视频动力学编辑以及反事实生成等多个任务中展现出强大的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，在视频生成模型中显式加入最优控制层能够有效改善生成视频的动力学质量，为将经典控制理论与生成式模型相结合提供了可行路径，并拓展了可控视频生成的应用场景。

title: Robust Asynchronous Planning via Auto-Formalization
summary: LLMs can plan by either generating action sequences directly as a Planner or translating tasks into domain specific language for an external solver as a Formalizer. While most real-world tasks are asynchronous with non-uniform durations, concurrency, and execution-time constraints, existing benchmarks hardly cover them. We unify these asynchronous planning challenges under a single formulation and introduce the first three benchmarks that address each at scale. We conclude that the choice of formal representation primarily determines whether planning scales: as dependency graphs grow from 5 to 100 actions, Planner collapses from 96% to 5% plan accuracy and PDDL2.1 Formalizer from 13% to 0%, while CP-SAT Formalizer averages 94% and still achieves 83% at 100 actions. Faithfulness diagnostics show that PDDL2.1's predicate-based planning representation becomes brittle compared to general constraint satisfaction programs, when LLMs must keep predicates, effects, and goals consistent. Execution-time updates of planning constraints further degrade performance sharply (Planner 23.9%, PDDL2.1 0.7%, CP-SAT 46.1%), but a state-aware repair strategy that updates only event-induced constraints recovers CP-SAT Formalizer to 84.5%.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了LLM在异步规划任务中的表现，发现形式化表示的选择是决定规划可扩展性的关键：CP-SAT形式化器在大规模任务中显著优于Planner和PDDL2.1形式化器，且状态感知的修复策略能有效缓解执行时约束更新的性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM规划基准大多忽略真实世界中任务的异步特性（如非均匀持续时间、并发性和执行时约束），导致对模型在复杂动态环境中规划能力的评估存在空白。
AI.method: 将异步规划挑战统一为单一形式化表述，引入三个大规模基准分别对应不同的异步规划难点；比较三种规划范式：直接生成动作序列的Planner、基于PDDL2.1谓词表示的形式化器、以及基于CP-SAT通用约束满足程序的形式化器，并引入状态感知的修复策略以应对执行时约束更新。
AI.result: 当依赖图从5个动作增长到100个动作时，Planner的规划准确率从96%骤降至5%，PDDL2.1形式化器从13%降至0%，而CP-SAT形式化器平均达94%且在100个动作时仍保持83%；执行时约束更新进一步导致性能严重下降（Planner 23.9%，PDDL2.1 0.7%，CP-SAT 46.1%），但状态感知修复策略仅关注事件诱导约束，将CP-SAT恢复至84.5%。
AI.conclusion: 异步规划的可扩展性主要由形式化表示决定；PDDL2.1的基于谓词的规划表示在需要保持一致谓词、效果和目标的场景下变得脆弱，而通用约束满足程序更鲁棒；状态感知的增量修复策略为动态环境中保持LLM规划能力提供了有效方向。

title: Probe Before You Edit: Probing-Guided Molecular Optimization for LLM Agents in Structure-Based Drug Design
summary: Structure-based drug design increasingly employs LLM agents to iteratively refine ligands against a target pocket, yet a viable ligand must satisfy two often-conflicting objectives -- binding affinity and druggability -- which single optimization steps rarely improve together. To quantify this difficulty, we introduce two diagnostic metrics: the first measures how often a single edit improves both objectives, and the second measures how often a gain on one objective comes with a loss on the other. Applying these diagnostics to current LLM-agent pipelines exposes a consistent failure mode: the agent performs molecular editing without knowing how the pocket-ligand complex responds to local modifications, thus rarely achieving joint improvement. Inspired by medicinal chemists, who probe the pocket-ligand complex with controlled analog edits before choosing an optimization direction, we propose \textbf{PROBE}, an optimization framework built around edit-response probing. PROBE first decomposes the ligand into editable sites and builds a pocket-specific \textbf{site map} that flags where joint gains are plausible, where the two objectives are likely in tension, and where liability substructures should be changed; it then performs controlled probe edits whose responses are distilled into an \textbf{EditManual}. Guided by the site map and EditManual, PROBE runs an iterative multi-agent loop in which an affinity agent, a druggability agent, and a co-optimization agent jointly produce edits. On the CrossDocked2020 benchmark, PROBE achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially mitigates the failure modes exposed by our diagnostics metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出PROBE框架，通过构建口袋特异的位点图谱和编辑手册，引导多智能体迭代优化配体的结合亲和力与成药性，在CrossDocked2020基准上达到SOTA性能，有效缓解了单步编辑难以同时改善两个目标的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM智能体的药物设计方法在迭代优化配体时，结合亲和力与成药性两个目标往往相互冲突，单次编辑很少能同时改善两者；现有智能体在分子编辑过程中缺乏对口袋-配体复合物如何响应局部修改的理解，导致难以实现联合优化。
AI.method: 首先引入两个诊断指标量化单步编辑的联合改进概率与目标冲突频率；提出PROBE框架，将配体分解为可编辑位点并构建口袋特异的位点图谱，标注联合增益可行区域、目标冲突区域及应改写的基团；通过受控探针编辑将响应浓缩为编辑手册，最后由亲和力智能体、成药性智能体与协同优化智能体组成的多智能体循环联合生成编辑。
AI.result: 在CrossDocked2020基准上，PROBE取得了最先进的性能，并显著缓解了诊断指标所暴露的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 借鉴药物化学家通过受控类似物编辑探查口袋-配体复合物的策略来指导优化方向，是提升分子多目标联合优化效率的有效途径；所提出的诊断指标为评估和比较不同优化策略的联合优化能力提供了量化工具。

title: An Effective Solution for the CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure, CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 3
summary: In this work, we present our solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence (DOST). Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework Segment Any Motion (SegAnyMo), which provides powerful mask generation and motion tracking capabilities. To further boost the segmentation performance under severe atmospheric distortions, we propose two key improvements. First, we employ a data-centric domain adaptation strategy. We significantly expand our training data by incorporating selected sequences from the DAVIS dataset alongside a subset of the DOST dataset, and apply simulated atmospheric fluctuation degradations to enhance the model's robustness against complex geometric distortions. Second, we introduce a spatio-temporal post-processing module. This refinement step effectively removes persistent boundary-connected false foregrounds and short-lived fragmented noise, while strictly preserving genuine small targets and maintaining original individual labels across frames. With these combined strategies, our proposed method ranks the 2st place in the challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大气湍流下的动态目标分割任务，在SegAnyMo框架基础上提出数据中心域自适应和时空后处理模块，在UG2+挑战赛DOST赛道取得第二名。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流引起的严重几何畸变严重降低了视频中动态目标分割的性能，现有方法（如SegAnyMo）虽然具备强大的掩码生成和运动跟踪能力，但在复杂大气失真条件下难以鲁棒地分割目标。
AI.method: 基于SegAnyMo基线框架，本文提出两项改进：一是数据中心域自适应策略，通过引入DAVIS数据集子集和DOST数据集序列，并施加模拟大气波动退化来增强模型对几何畸变的鲁棒性；二是时空后处理模块，有效去除边界相连的假前景和短时碎片噪声，同时保留真实小目标和原始标签的时间一致性。
AI.result: 在CVPR 2026第八届UG2+挑战赛Track 3 (DOST)中，所提方法排名第二，验证了数据增强与时空后处理联合策略在湍流场景下动态目标分割的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 数据中心域自适应与时空后处理相结合能够显著提升模型在严重大气畸变下的分割鲁棒性，为真实场景中湍流退化下的视频目标分割提供了实用且可扩展的技术路径。

title: ExpWeaver: LLM Agents Learn from Experience via Latent RAG
summary: Experience learning has achieved promising results in enhancing LLM agent planning and reasoning by integrating past interactions as reusable knowledge. However, existing methods remain confined to explicit text space, retrieving experiences via semantic similarity and concatenating them into the context window, leading to substantial token overhead and a decoupled architecture that separates retrieval from generation. To address these limitations, we propose ExpWeaver, a framework that enables LLM agents to learn from experience via latent retrieval-augmented generation, without requiring a separate RAG module. ExpWeaver encodes experiences using the LLM's own hidden states, retrieves relevant experiences directly in latent space at each decoding step, and integrates them through cross-attention aggregation and gated residual mechanisms. The entire pipeline is optimized end-to-end with reinforcement learning, supporting both generative and ranking tasks. We evaluate ExpWeaver on 13 diverse tasks spanning question answering, reasoning, coding, scientific prediction, and recommendation. Results demonstrate that ExpWeaver achieves state-of-the-art performance on 12 out of 13 tasks, outperforming the strongest baseline by over 6.8%; maintains token efficiency comparable to non-retrieval baselines while text-based retrieval methods require 1.5 to 2 times more tokens; and exhibits superior cross-domain generalization, outperforming the strongest baseline by 16.32% under zero-shot transfer and 15.21% under few-shot transfer. Our code for ExpWeaver is released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/ExpWeaver.

AI.tldr: ExpWeaver 提出了一种基于潜在检索增强生成（latent RAG）的框架，使 LLM 智能体能够通过自身隐藏状态编码和检索经验，无需独立 RAG 模块，并在 13 项任务中取得 12 项 SOTA，同时显著降低 token 开销并提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于经验学习的 LLM 智能体方法局限于显式文本空间，依赖语义相似度检索经验并直接拼接至上下文窗口，导致大量 token 开销以及检索与生成分离的解耦架构，缺乏端到端的协同优化。
AI.method: ExpWeaver 利用 LLM 自身的隐藏状态对经验进行编码，在潜在空间中进行逐解码步的检索，并通过交叉注意力聚合与门控残差机制将检索到的潜在经验整合到生成过程中；整个流程通过强化学习进行端到端优化，同时支持生成和排序任务。
AI.result: 在 13 项涵盖问答、推理、代码、科学预测和推荐的任务上，ExpWeaver 在 12 项上取得最优，比最强基线高出 6.8% 以上；其 token 效率与非检索基线相当，而基于文本的检索方法需要 1.5 到 2 倍的 token；在零样本和少样本跨域迁移下，分别比最强基线高出 16.32% 和 15.21%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过潜在空间检索与端到端强化学习优化，能够有效解耦检索与生成的 token 开销，实现更高效率、更强泛化的经验驱动 LLM 智能体，为无需外部 RAG 模块的隐式知识集成提供了新范式。

title: TRACE: Trajectory Risk-Aware Compression for Long-Horizon Agent Safety
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents produce safety evidence across long trajectories, where sparse, delayed, and compositional risk signals often escape local moderation. Existing turn-level or short-context detectors struggle to reliably retain and aggregate such evidence over extended horizons. We reframe long-horizon agent safety detection as trajectory-level evidence compression and propose Trajectory Risk-Aware Compression for Long-Horizon Agent Safety (TRACE). TRACE uses a Compressor-Reader design: the Compressor encodes the full trajectory into a compact latent evidence state under trajectory-level supervision, and the Reader judges the raw trajectory with this latent evidence state as a safety reference. This design helps aggregate dispersed risk cues and reduce premature evidence loss. Across ASSEBench, Pre-Ex-Bench, and R-Judge, TRACE achieves the best accuracy on all evaluated backbones, improving over strong baselines by up to 12.6 percentage points. On LongSafety, TRACE shows smaller performance degradation as context length grows. Attention visualizations and case studies suggest that the compressed reference helps the Reader focus on risk-critical segments and recover cross-step evidence. Code is available at https://github.com/Peregrine123/TRACE_official.

AI.tldr: TRACE提出了一种基于轨迹级证据压缩的Compressor-Reader架构，用于长程LLM智能体的安全检测，通过将完整轨迹编码为紧凑的潜在证据状态来聚合分散的风险信号，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 长程LLM智能体在长时间轨迹中产生的安全证据具有稀疏、延迟和组合性的特点，现有的逐轮检测或短上下文检测器难以在扩展的时间范围内可靠地保留和聚合这些风险信号，导致局部审核容易遗漏跨步骤的组合风险。
AI.method: TRACE采用Compressor-Reader双组件设计：Compressor在轨迹级监督下将完整轨迹编码为紧凑的潜在证据状态，实现风险线索的聚合与压缩；Reader以该潜在证据状态作为安全参考，对原始轨迹进行安全判断，从而减少证据的过早丢失。
AI.result: 在ASSEBench、Pre-Ex-Bench和R-Judge基准上，TRACE在所有评估骨干网络上均取得最佳准确率，相比强基线最高提升12.6个百分点；在LongSafety上，随着上下文长度增长，TRACE的性能退化幅度更小；注意力可视化和案例研究表明压缩参考帮助Reader聚焦于风险关键片段并恢复跨步骤证据。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹级证据压缩方法能有效解决长程LLM智能体安全检测中的证据聚合难题，压缩后的潜在证据状态可作为有效的安全参考，帮助检测器跨越时间步整合分散的风险信息，为长程智能体安全监控提供了新的技术路径。

title: ETC: Extreme Token Compression via Task-aware Visual Information Distillation in VLMs
summary: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), high-resolution images produce a large number of visual tokens, resulting in high computational costs and KV-cache overhead during inference. To address this problem, we propose an Extreme Token Compression (ETC) framework that minimizes task loss when reducing the number of input tokens based on the principle of variational information distillation. Specifically, from an information-theoretic perspective, we show that minimizing task loss requires the compact representation to preserve the instruction-aware sufficient statistic of the task-relevant visual information for prediction. In practice, ETC leverages text-to-image cross-attention to weight the original visual features to approximate the latent instruction-aware predictive statistic. Moreover, ETC introduces a variational information distillation, enabling the compact representation to preserve the essential information to recover this predictive statistic. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen3-VL-2B show that ETC remains effective even under single-token compression, substantially reducing KV-cache overhead while retaining strong task performance.

AI.tldr: 提出极端令牌压缩（ETC）框架，基于变分信息蒸馏原理将输入视觉令牌压缩至极少数（甚至单令牌）以降低视觉语言模型推理时的KV缓存开销，实验表明在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen3-VL-2B上压缩至单令牌仍能保持强任务性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在处理高分辨率图像时会产生大量视觉令牌，导致推理时计算成本和KV缓存开销极高，亟需一种能在极大压缩令牌数量的同时最小化任务性能损失的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于变分信息蒸馏原理，从信息论角度证明最小化任务损失要求紧凑表示保留任务相关视觉信息的指令感知充分统计量；实践中利用文本-图像交叉注意力对原始视觉特征加权以近似潜在指令感知预测统计量，并引入变分信息蒸馏使紧凑表示保留恢复该预测统计量所需的关键信息。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen3-VL-2B上的实验表明，ETC即使在单令牌压缩的极端条件下仍然有效，大幅降低KV缓存开销的同时保持了较强的任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息论视角揭示了令牌压缩与任务损失之间的关系，证明基于指令感知充分统计量的变分信息蒸馏能够实现极端令牌压缩而不显著牺牲性能，为降低VLM推理成本提供了理论指导和实用框架。

title: When Is 0.1% Enough? Analyzing the Combined Effects of Dimensionality Reduction and Quantization on Text Embedding Compression
summary: Recent high-performing text embedding models often output high-dimensional real-valued vectors, resulting in substantial storage and computational costs. To address this issue, compression methods based on dimensionality reduction or quantization have been proposed; however, the effects of combining dimensionality reduction and quantization have not been sufficiently investigated. In this paper, we systematically examine the effectiveness of compressing text embeddings by combining dimensionality reduction and quantization, using four MTEB task families and four pretrained embedding models. The experimental results demonstrate that combining dimensionality reduction and quantization enables substantially stronger compression than using either method alone, that in some settings embeddings can be reduced to as little as 0.1% of their original size with almost no performance degradation, and that the optimal compression strategy depends on the task.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了结合降维与量化两种压缩方法对文本嵌入向量的效果，发现二者联合使用能够实现更强的压缩比，部分设置下可将嵌入压缩至原始大小的0.1%而性能几乎不降，且最佳压缩策略因任务而异。
AI.motivation: 现有高性能文本嵌入模型通常输出高维实值向量，导致巨大的存储和计算开销。虽然已有基于降维或量化的压缩方法，但两者组合使用的效果尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 本文基于四种MTEB任务家族和四种预训练嵌入模型，系统性地实验评估了将降维（dimensionality reduction）与量化（quantization）相结合对文本嵌入进行压缩的有效性，并与单独使用任一方法的情形进行对比。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，降维与量化的结合能实现远强于单独使用任一方法的压缩效果；在某些设定下，嵌入可压缩至原始大小的0.1%而几乎不损失性能；最佳压缩策略依赖于具体任务类型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了降维与量化联合压缩在文本嵌入中的巨大潜力，并指出任务依赖性是选择压缩策略的关键因素，为实际部署中高效存储和计算文本嵌入提供了实用指导。

title: Efficient Test-time Inference for Generative Planning Models
summary: Generative models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for AI planning, yet their performance remains constrained by the training data distribution. One approach is to improve generated solutions during inference by scaling test-time compute. A more efficient alternative is to optimize the inference process itself. In this paper, we show that a modified version of a classical Open-Closed List (OCL) search provides just such an efficient inference procedure. Our algorithm synergizes two learned components: a generative model that performs fast rollouts from intermediate states and a heuristic model that prioritizes among candidate reasoning paths. Key contributions include novel exploration control mechanisms and integration of learned models within the OCL framework. Across multiple combinatorial planning domains, our approach outperforms both neurosymbolic search baselines and classical solvers in computational efficiency and solution quality.

AI.tldr: 通过将生成式模型与启发式模型集成到经典的开闭列表搜索框架中，并提出新的探索控制机制，本文在多个组合规划领域实现了比神经符号搜索和经典求解器更高的计算效率和解决方案质量。
AI.motivation: 生成式模型在AI规划中受限于训练数据分布，现有方法要么通过测试时计算缩放来改进生成解（效率低），要么优化推理过程本身；本文旨在寻找一种高效的推理优化方法以克服生成模型的分布外性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 本文提出一种改进的经典开闭列表（OCL）搜索算法，协同两个学习组件：一个生成式模型用于从中间状态执行快速展开（rollout），一个启发式模型用于在候选推理路径间进行优先级排序；同时引入了新的探索控制机制，并将学习模型集成到OCL框架内。
AI.result: 在多个组合规划领域，所提方法在计算效率和解决方案质量上均优于神经符号搜索基线和经典求解器。
AI.conclusion: 验证了将生成式模型与启发式搜索协同集成到经典OCL框架中的有效性，表明通过优化推理过程而非单纯增加测试时计算，可以显著提升生成式模型在规划任务上的性能。

title: CAFOSat: A Strongly Annotated Dataset for Infrastructure-Aware CAFO Mapping Using High-Resolution Imagery
comment: Accepted at CVPR Workshop-2026. First two authors has equal contribution
summary: Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) play an important role in agricultural production but are also associated with environmental, public health, and disease surveillance concerns. Large-scale mapping of CAFOs from remote sensing imagery remains challenging due to heterogeneous infrastructure layouts, noisy location records, inconsistent annotations, and incomplete inventories. We introduce CAFOSat, a strongly annotated, infrastructure-aware dataset for CAFO mapping across the United States. CAFOSat integrates high-resolution National Agriculture Imagery Program (NAIP) imagery with multi-source CAFO inventories collected across multiple states and transforms weak geolocation records into refined annotations through a human-in-the-loop pipeline combining AI-assisted annotation, GradCAM-based localization, and geometric clustering. To improve dataset quality, we curate challenging negative samples using land-cover-guided sampling with spatial exclusion constraints and provide infrastructure-level annotations, including barns, manure ponds, and grazing-related features, through manual verification. The resulting dataset contains more than 45,000 image patches spanning 20 states and four major CAFO categories. We benchmark a diverse set of convolutional, transformer-based, and vision-language models, demonstrating the value of refined annotations and curated negative samples for CAFO classification and generalization. In addition, we introduce a synthetic augmentation pipeline that generates infrastructure-aware variations to increase training diversity and improve robustness under distribution shifts. CAFOSat provides a large-scale benchmark for advancing infrastructure-aware agricultural monitoring and CAFO mapping from high-resolution remote sensing imagery.

AI.tldr: CAFOSat是一个面向美国全国范围的大型集中式动物养殖场（CAFO）遥感制图数据集，包含超过45,000张高分辨率NAIP影像 patches，覆盖20个州和四种主要CAFO类别，并通过人工在环的AI辅助标注、GradCAM定位和几何聚类方法将弱地理定位记录转化为精细的基础设施级标注，为农业环境监测提供了重要基准。
AI.motivation: CAFO在农业生产中具有重要作用，但同时也带来环境、公共卫生和疾病监测等方面的挑战。从遥感影像中大规模制图CAFO面临基础设施布局异质、地理位置记录噪声大、标注不一致以及清单不完整等多重困难，现有数据和方法难以支持可靠的大范围CAFO自动化监测。
AI.method: CAFOSat采用人工在环的标注流程，结合AI辅助标注、GradCAM定位和几何聚类方法，将多源弱地理定位记录转化为精细的基础设施级标注（包括畜棚、粪池和放牧相关特征）。通过土地覆盖引导采样和空间排除约束策略生成挑战性负样本，并引入合成数据增强管线以生成基础设施感知的变体，提升训练多样性和分布偏移下的鲁棒性。数据集构建基于高分辨率NAIP影像和多州CAFO清单。
AI.result: CAFOSat数据集包含超过45,000张影像patches，覆盖美国20个州和四种主要CAFO类别。作者对多种卷积神经网络、Transformer和视觉-语言模型进行了基准测试，验证了精细化标注和负样本筛选对CAFO分类和泛化性能的提升效果。合成增强管线进一步提升了模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CAFOSat为从高分辨率遥感影像中推进基础设施感知的农业监测和CAFO制图提供了大规模基准数据集。精细化标注和挑战性负样本的引入显著提升了CAFO分类和泛化能力，合成增强策略有助于应对数据分布偏移问题。该工作为环境监测和公共卫生领域的农业遥感应用提供了重要的数据和方法基础。

title: CA-BED: Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at static reasoning tasks, yet their performance often degrades in interactive scenarios where information must be actively acquired through questioning. A key challenge lies in selecting questions that reduce uncertainty while incorporating responses that may be ambiguous or only partially informative. To address this, we propose Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED), an inference-time probabilistic dialog planning framework that integrates Bayesian Experimental Design with LLM-based likelihood estimation to optimize question selection over multiple conversational turns. CA-BED maintains a belief distribution over hypotheses, anticipates possible answers, and propagates expected information gain through a simulated conversation tree. Across two structured entity-deduction benchmarks, CA-BED yields an average 21.8% improvement in success rates over direct prompting, with comparable gains relative to alternative information-seeking methods. It achieves these gains with an average increase of only 1.8 conversational turns compared to direct prompting.

AI.tldr: 提出对话感知贝叶斯实验设计（CA-BED），一种将贝叶斯实验设计与LLM似然估计相结合的推理时概率对话规划框架，在实体推理任务中相较于直接提示实现了平均21.8%的成功率提升，且仅增加1.8轮对话。
AI.motivation: LLMs在静态推理任务中表现优异，但在需要主动通过提问获取信息的交互式场景中性能下降，其核心挑战在于如何选择能有效降低不确定性的问题，同时处理可能模糊或仅部分信息性的回答。
AI.method: 提出Conversation-Aware Bayesian Experimental Design (CA-BED)框架，该框架在推理时进行概率对话规划，通过贝叶斯实验设计结合LLM-based似然估计来优化多轮对话中的问题选择；CA-BED维护关于假设的信念分布，预判可能的回答并通过模拟对话树传播期望信息增益。
AI.result: 在两个结构化实体推理基准上，CA-BED相较于直接提示实现了平均21.8%的成功率提升，效果优于其他信息寻求方法；同时仅平均增加1.8轮对话轮次即可获得上述增益。
AI.conclusion: CA-BED通过推理时概率规划有效提升了LLM在交互式信息获取场景中的表现，证明将贝叶斯实验设计与LLM结合是一种有前景的对话策略优化方向。

title: ForeSci: Evaluating LLM Agents for Forward-Looking AI Research Judgment
summary: AI research often requires decisions before future evidence exists: which bottleneck to attack, which direction to pursue, or where a project should be positioned. We introduce ForeSci, a temporally controlled benchmark for evaluating whether LLM agents can make such forward-looking research judgements from historical evidence. ForeSci contains 500 tasks across four fast-moving AI domains and four decision families. Each task is paired with a cutoff-aligned offline knowledge base; post-cutoff papers are hidden during generation and used only for validation. To avoid random future-event prediction, tasks are derived from pre-cutoff taxonomy branches and evidence signals, and answer-generation backbones are selected to precede the task cutoffs. We evaluate native LLMs, Hybrid RAG, and three research-agent adaptations across four backbones. Results show that explicit evidence organization improves traceability and factual support, but gains depend strongly on the decision family. Diagnostics reveal a recurring evidence-decision decoupling: agents may cite relevant evidence while forecasting the wrong research object. ForeSci turns forward-looking AI research judgement into a controlled benchmark for evaluating research agents as decision-making systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ForeSci，一个基于时间控制的基准测试，用于评估 LLM 代理能否从历史证据中做出前瞻性研究判断。该基准包含 500 个任务，覆盖四个快速发展的 AI 领域和四种决策类型，实验表明显式证据组织能提升可追溯性，但存在证据与决策脱节的问题。
AI.motivation: AI 研究常需在缺乏未来证据的情况下做出前瞻性决策（如选择瓶颈方向或项目定位），但现有评估方法缺乏对 LLM 代理进行此类前瞻性研究判断能力的受控测试。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过引入时间对齐的离线知识库来系统评估模型能否从历史证据中做出具有前瞻性的研究决策。
AI.method: ForeSci 构建了 500 个任务，涵盖四个快速发展的 AI 领域和四种决策类型，每个任务配有截止时间对齐的离线知识库（截止后的论文仅在验证中使用且对模型隐藏）。任务基于截止前的分类分支和证据信号生成，答案生成骨干网络选择在任务截止时间之前，以避免随机预测未来事件。研究中评估了原生 LLM、混合 RAG 以及三种研究代理适配方法，共使用四种骨干网络。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，显式证据组织能提升结果的可追溯性和事实支持，但其效果高度依赖于具体的决策类型。进一步诊断分析发现存在反复出现的“证据-决策脱节”问题：代理可能引用了相关证据，却预测了错误的研究对象，说明现有代理在证据推理与决策判断之间存在断裂。
AI.conclusion: ForeSci 将前瞻性 AI 研究判断转化为一个受控基准，用于评估研究代理作为决策系统的能力。该工作揭示了当前 LLM 代理在处理前瞻性研究决策时的局限性，特别是证据与决策之间的解耦问题，为后续构建更可靠的研究决策代理提供了评估框架和方向指引。

title: DeepLatent: Think with Images via Parallel Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: The emerging paradigm of "thinking with images" embeds visual states into intermediate reasoning steps, defining a new frontier for Vision-Language Models. Existing approaches diverge along two lines. Tool-assisted methods apply explicit visual operations but suffer from high latency and restricted manipulation types. Latent reasoning methods autoregressively produce implicit visual states, but underperform tool-assisted methods, and their latent tokens fail to capture effective visual information. In this work, we propose DeepLatent, a parallel framework for latent visual reasoning. First, we introduce LatentFormer. It uses learnable 2D tokens to generate context-conditioned latent states in parallel, anchoring every visual update directly in the original image features. Second, we design a continuous-space reinforcement learning algorithm. It optimizes latent modulation parameters directly in the embedding space, significantly improving latent representation quality. The framework is trained via knowledge distillation followed by this continuous-space RL algorithm. Furthermore, we contribute DeepLatent-180K, a large-scale dataset tailored for latent visual reasoning. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DeepLatent achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: DeepLatent 提出了一种用于潜在视觉推理的并行框架，通过 LatentFormer 生成上下文条件化的潜在状态，并结合连续空间强化学习优化潜在调制参数，在多个基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有"用图像思考"范式中的方法存在两类局限：工具辅助方法延迟高且操作类型受限，而潜在推理方法虽能隐式生成视觉状态但性能不如工具辅助方法，且潜在标记无法有效捕获视觉信息。
AI.method: 提出 DeepLatent 框架，包含两个核心组件：一是 LatentFormer，利用可学习的二维令牌并行生成上下文条件化的潜在状态，并将每次视觉更新直接锚定在原始图像特征上；二是连续空间强化学习算法，直接在嵌入空间中优化潜在调制参数以提升表示质量。整体训练采用知识蒸馏结合连续空间 RL 的流程，并构建了 DeepLatent-180K 大规模数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准上的广泛评估表明，DeepLatent 达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DeepLatent 通过并行潜在视觉推理框架和连续空间 RL 优化，有效弥合了工具辅助方法与潜在推理方法之间的性能差距，为视觉-语言模型中的隐性视觉推理提供了新的范式。

title: DiscourseFlip: An Oblique Discourse-Level Opinion Manipulation Attack against Black-box Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are widely deployed and increasingly influential, but their reliance on external corpora exposes new security risks from poisoned retrieval content. Existing RAG attacks are largely focusing on individual queries or narrow topic-local query sets, which limits their practical reach and offers limited camouflage in real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce discourse-level opinion manipulation, a new threat model in which coordinated influence across a semantic query network induces opinion shifts over a holistic, multi-topic query space. We formalize this threat in a black-box setting and propose DiscourseFlip, an agentic, graph-guided attack that dynamically allocates a limited poisoning budget to maximize discourse-level opinion deviation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiscourseFlip consistently induces targeted opinion shifts across the contextualized query network and significantly outperforms existing baselines in terms of coverage and effectiveness. User studies further confirm that DiscourseFlip is effective while remaining well camouflaged from user detection. Moreover, systematic analyses show that existing mitigation strategies are ineffective against discourse-level manipulation, underscoring the urgent need for more robust and adaptive defenses to address discourse-level vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DiscourseFlip，一种针对检索增强生成（RAG）系统的語篇级观点操纵攻击方法，通过在语义查询网络中有策略地分配投毒预算，实现跨多主题查询空间的观点偏移，实验表明其有效性和隐蔽性均优于现有方法，且现有防御措施难以应对。
AI.motivation: 现有针对 RAG 系统的投毒攻击主要集中于单个查询或狭窄的主题局部查询集合，限制了实际攻击覆盖范围且伪装能力有限，缺乏在语义查询网络层面实现多主题、整体性观点操纵的攻击范式。
AI.method: 本文形式化定义了一种黑盒设定下的语篇级观点操纵威胁模型，并提出 DiscourseFlip——一种基于智能体与图引导的攻击方法，该方法通过动态分配有限的投毒预算，在语义查询网络中最大化语篇级的观点偏离，实现跨多主题查询空间的协调性影响。
AI.result: 大量实验证明 DiscourseFlip 能够在上下文化查询网络上持续诱导目标观点偏移，在覆盖率和有效性上显著超越现有基线方法；用户研究进一步验证了其攻击有效且具有良好的隐蔽性，不易被用户察觉；系统分析表明现有防御策略无法有效应对语篇级操纵。
AI.conclusion: 语篇级观点操纵揭示了 RAG 系统在防御层面未被充分认知的安全漏洞，现有缓解措施在此类攻击下基本失效，亟需开发更具鲁棒性和自适应性的防御机制以应对语篇级安全威胁。

title: CoMIC: Collaborative Memory and Insights Circulation for Long-Horizon LLM Agents in Cloud-Edge Systems
summary: Deploying lightweight Large Language Model (LLM) agents on edge servers can reduce latency and move agentic services closer to users, but resource-constrained edge models often struggle with long-horizon tasks that require persistent memory, subgoal tracking, and reflection. Fine-tuning edge models after deployment is costly and difficult to scale across heterogeneous nodes, while purely local memory leaves agents with isolated experience and growing prompt context. We propose \textsc{CoMIC}, a parameter-update-free cloud-edge framework for Collaborative Memory and Insights Circulation. \textsc{CoMIC} follows a \textit{Centralized Reflection, Decentralized Execution} design: edge agents execute locally using subgoal-oriented hierarchical memory and selective re-expansion of relevant histories, while a cloud-side LLM critic asynchronously evaluates completed trajectories, filters reusable experience, and aggregates cross-agent guidance keyed by semantic subgoal identifiers. Across five long-horizon agent tasks spanning symbolic planning and text interaction, \textsc{CoMIC} improves progress rate and action grounding for weak edge agents and yields task-dependent success-rate gains without updating model parameters.

AI.tldr: CoMIC 提出了一种无需参数更新的云边协同框架，通过云端集中反思与边缘分散执行的架构，利用层次化记忆和语义子目标标识符实现经验跨智能体共享，显著提升轻量级边缘 LLM 智能体在长周期任务中的进展率和动作接地能力。
AI.motivation: 轻量级 LLM 智能体在边缘服务器上部署面临长周期任务中持久记忆、子目标追踪和反思能力不足的问题，而微调边缘模型成本高昂且难以跨异构节点扩展，纯本地记忆则导致智能体经验孤立且提示上下文不断增长。
AI.method: CoMIC 采用中央化反思、分散化执行的设计：边缘智能体使用面向子目标的层次化记忆和选择性重扩相关历史进行本地执行，云端 LLM 评论家异步评估已完成轨迹、过滤可复用经验，并通过语义子目标标识符聚合跨智能体指导。
AI.result: 在涵盖符号规划和文本交互的五种长周期智能体任务上，CoMIC 提升了弱边缘智能体的进展率和动作接地能力，并在不更新模型参数的情况下实现了依赖任务的成功率增益。
AI.conclusion: CoMIC 证明无需参数更新的云边协同记忆与洞察流通机制能够有效弥补边缘 LLM 智能体在长周期任务中的能力短板，为边缘部署提供了一种可扩展、低成本的解决方案。

title: Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding
summary: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoning models, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored. In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model (VLM) distillation by mathematically decomposing the loss into two distinct components: the language prior and visual grounding. Our analysis uncovers that gradient vectors for these components are nearly orthogonal, indicating that the objective of aligning with the teacher's language distribution is geometrically independent from the objective of matching its visual perception. Consequently, standard optimization passively follows a suboptimal compromise trajectory that implicitly balances the two objectives. Hypothesizing that visual grounding constitutes the primary bottleneck for vision-language reasoning, we introduce Visual Gradient Steering (VGS), a method that dynamically reorients the update vector to prioritize the visual subspace. Experimental results on multiple distillation settings and complex multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VGS significantly outperforms the standard monolithic formulation of on-policy distillation, achieving superior grounding with minimal training overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将视觉-语言模型蒸馏损失分解为语言先验与视觉定位两个近乎正交的分量，揭示了标准蒸馏优化中存在的次优折衷问题，并提出视觉梯度引导（VGS）方法动态优先优化视觉子空间，在多个多模态蒸馏设置下显著提升推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有针对小规模推理模型的同策略蒸馏在多模态领域的优化动态尚未被充分探索，标准视觉-语言模型蒸馏将损失视为整体，忽略了语言先验与视觉定位两个目标在几何上的独立性，导致优化过程被动地在两个目标间寻求次优折衷，视觉定位作为多模态推理的主要瓶颈未能得到有效优化。
AI.method: 本文首先从数学上对同策略蒸馏损失进行分解，发现语言先验与视觉定位的梯度向量近乎正交；基于此发现提出视觉梯度引导（Visual Gradient Steering, VGS）方法，该方法通过动态重定向更新向量，优先沿视觉子空间方向进行优化，从而在不引入显著训练开销的前提下增强视觉定位能力。
AI.result: 在多个蒸馏设置和复杂多模态基准上的实验结果表明，VGS显著优于标准的整体式同策略蒸馏方法，在实现更优视觉定位效果的同时仅引入极小的训练额外开销。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态蒸馏中语言先验与视觉定位在优化几何上的独立性，指出视觉定位是视觉-语言推理的主要瓶颈；VGS提供了一种轻量且有效的解决方案，为未来多模态小模型蒸馏的优化策略设计提供了新的理论视角和实践方向。

title: Efficient RAG with Intent-Aware Retrieval and Semantics-Preserving Chunking
summary: The demand for powerful instruction following and reasoning capability of large language models (LLMs) has promoted rapid development of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). The RAG system assists LLM generation by retrieving chunks of query-fit supplementary knowledge from an external database. Conventional RAG systems, however, suffer from information insufficiency due to two factors, which are intent-agnostic retrieval and information fragmentation. Our work proposes a RAG framework, termed InSemRAG, that addresses these challenges via an iterative retrieve-and-check mechanism with two supporting modules, an intention-aware retriever (IAR) and semantics-preserving chunking (SPC). IAR implements a dynamic hybrid retrieval method that adaptively weights the retrieval channels based on the query intent, while SPC performs detection and reparation to the damaged evidence chunks to preserve the semantic integrity. To alleviate the computational latency brought by our iterative mechanism, we leverage small language models (SLMs). Extensive experiments across several benchmark datasets consistently demonstrate the competitiveness of our method against recent state-of-the-art RAG mechanisms. Particularly, our method achieves significant gains on multi-hop and evidence-sensitive tasks, with a 2.65-point improvement in F1 on HotPotQA and a 1.5-point increase in accuracy on FEVER. Our method also achieves competitive performance to Multi-Hop RAG with 4.32$\times$ lower latency with the utilization of SLM.

AI.tldr: 提出InSemRAG框架，通过意图感知检索器(IAR)和语义保留分块(SPC)模块结合迭代检索-检查机制，解决传统RAG中意图无关检索和信息碎片化导致的不足，并利用小语言模型降低延迟，在多跳和证据敏感任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG系统因意图无关的检索方式（intent-agnostic retrieval）和信息碎片化（information fragmentation）两大因素导致检索信息不充分，限制了LLM的指令跟随与推理能力，现有方法难以同时兼顾检索的相关性和语义完整性。
AI.method: 提出InSemRAG框架，核心包含两个模块：意图感知检索器(IAR)采用动态混合检索方法，根据查询意图自适应加权不同检索通道；语义保留分块(SPC)对受损证据块进行检测和修复以保持语义完整性；整个框架基于迭代检索-检查（iterative retrieve-and-check）机制运行，并采用小语言模型(SLM)降低计算延迟。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了方法的竞争力，在HotPotQA上F1提升2.65个百分点，在FEVER上准确率提升1.5个百分点；与Multi-Hop RAG相比，在SLM支持下实现了4.32倍的低延迟，同时达到竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过意图感知检索与语义完整性保留的双重改进，InSemRAG有效解决了传统RAG的信息不足问题，且利用SLM在保证性能的前提下显著降低了延迟，为高效RAG系统设计提供了新思路。

title: FALAT: Tracing Failures in LLM Agent Trajectories via Dependency-Guided Search
summary:
LLM-based agents increasingly solve complex tasks through long trajectories involving reasoning steps, tool calls, and inter-agent communication. However, when these agents fail, it is often unclear which agent caused the failure and which step introduced the decisive error. This attribution problem is challenging because mistakes can propagate across the trajectory: later actions may appear incorrect, but only because they depend on an earlier corrupted state. Therefore, failure attribution cannot be treated as independent step-level classification.
  We propose FALAT, a diagnostic framework for failure attribution in LLM agent trajectories. FALAT frames attribution as a dependency-guided search problem. It first constructs an expectation of how the task should be solved and uses this expectation to identify suspicious regions in the trajectory. It then traces dependencies among decisions, tool outputs, and agent messages to distinguish error-introducing steps from steps that merely inherit or propagate prior mistakes. Finally, FALAT evaluates whether correcting a candidate step would be sufficient to recover the expected outcome, allowing it to identify both the responsible agent and the decisive failure step.
  We evaluate FALAT on the Who&When benchmark, which includes both algorithm-generated and hand-crafted multi-agent failure trajectories. The results show that FALAT consistently improves responsible-agent and decisive-step attribution. Its best configurations achieve 46.0% step-level accuracy on algorithm-generated trajectories and 29.1% on the more challenging hand-crafted trajectories, outperforming specialized attribution baselines and direct prompting with standalone LLMs. These findings suggest that dependency-aware reasoning is essential for reliable failure diagnosis in LLM agent systems.

AI.tldr: FALAT提出了一种基于依赖关系引导的搜索框架，用于诊断LLM Agent轨迹中的故障归因，在Who&When基准上显著优于现有方法，表明依赖感知推理是多智能体系统可靠故障诊断的关键。
AI.motivation: LLM Agent在解决复杂任务时会产生包含推理步骤、工具调用和智能体间通信的长轨迹，但当任务失败时，很难确定哪个智能体和哪个步骤引入了决定性错误，因为错误会沿着依赖关系传播：后续步骤看似错误但实际只是继承了前期的损坏状态，因此故障归因不能作为独立的步骤级分类问题处理。
AI.method: FALAT将故障归因建模为依赖引导的搜索问题，首先构建任务应如何完成的预期轨迹，并据此识别轨迹中的可疑区域；然后追溯决策、工具输出和智能体消息之间的依赖关系，区分引入错误的步骤与仅继承或传播错误的步骤；最后评估纠正候选步骤是否足以恢复预期结果，从而同时定位责任智能体和决定性故障步骤。
AI.result: 在Who&Bench基准上，FALAT在算法生成轨迹上达到46.0%的步骤级准确率，在更具挑战性的人工构建轨迹上达到29.1%的准确率，均优于专门的归因基线和直接使用独立LLM的提示方法。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知推理对于LLM Agent系统的可靠故障诊断至关重要，FALAT通过显式建模轨迹中的因果关系而非独立分类各步骤，有效提升了多智能体故障归因的准确性。

title: Response-Aware Multimodal Learning for Post-Treatment Visual Acuity Forecasting
summary: Long-term visual acuity (VA) outcomes after anti-VEGF therapy are central to patient counseling, expectation setting, and follow-up planning in diabetic macular edema (DME). However, in clinical practice, physicians must often estimate long-term visual trajectories based only on early post-treatment findings, making reliable prognostication difficult. Although prior OCT-based learning approaches have largely focused on short-term response or single-endpoint prediction, modeling VA trajectories across multiple future time points from early longitudinal observations remains insufficiently explored. In this study, we assembled a real-world cohort of 188 anti-VEGF-treated DME patients with paired baseline and month-1 OCT scans, along with tabular OCT-derived biomarkers and non-imaging clinical variables. Using only these early data, we formulate a multi-horizon VA forecasting problem aimed at predicting visual outcomes at 3, 6, 12, 18, and 24 months, reflecting clinically meaningful follow-up intervals. We propose ReVA, a response-aware multimodal framework that integrates structural features from baseline and month-1 OCT with the tabular variables to capture baseline disease status and early treatment response. ReVA uses spatial attention to preserve localized prognostic imaging features and a dependency-aware tabular encoder to model interactions among clinical variables. These multimodal representations are fused to predict patient-specific long-term visual acuity trajectories. The proposed framework achieves MAE=0.1246, RMSE=0.1621, and R^2=0.6064 for 24-month VA prediction, with consistent performance across all forecast horizons. Our findings show that incorporating early treatment-response signals enables clinically meaningful long-term visual acuity forecasting, supporting data-driven decision support for routine anti-VEGF management.

AI.tldr: 提出ReVA框架，利用基线和第1个月OCT影像及表格化临床变量，通过多模态融合与空间注意力机制，实现对糖尿病黄斑水肿抗VEGF治疗后3至24个月多时间点视力轨迹的预测，MAE=0.1246，R²=0.6064。
AI.motivation: 临床医生仅能依据早期治疗后的有限信息预估DME患者抗VEGF治疗的远期视力轨迹，而现有基于OCT的学习方法多聚焦于短期反应或单时间点预测，缺乏对多未来时间点视力轨迹进行建模的研究。
AI.method: 构建188例真实世界DME患者的基线与第1月配对OCT扫描及表格化数据；提出ReVA多模态框架，采用空间注意力机制保留OCT中局部预后影像特征，并设计依赖感知表格编码器建模临床变量间的交互，融合多模态表征后预测3、6、12、18、24个月的多时间点视力轨迹。
AI.result: 在24个月视力预测上达到MAE=0.1246、RMSE=0.1621、R²=0.6064，且在所有预测时间点上表现一致，证明了早期治疗反应信号可用于临床有意义的远期视力预测。
AI.conclusion: 纳入早期治疗反应信号能够支持临床有意义的远期视力轨迹预测，可为常规抗VEGF管理中的数据驱动决策支持提供依据。

title: Agentic Clustering: Controllable Text Taxonomies via Multi-Agent Refinement
summary: Recent text-clustering methods use large language models to propose a cluster taxonomy from a corpus and then assign each text to it. These pipelines are fundamentally programmatic: the sequence of LLM calls and the rules for stopping, merging, and splitting clusters are fixed in code in advance, so they generalise poorly across corpora of different structure and cannot easily incorporate user-supplied constraints such as a target cluster count or a clustering intent. We propose an agentic alternative in which an orchestrator LLM inspects the state of the discovery process at each step and dispatches one of a small set of specialised agents - proposer, synthesizer, auditor, investigator, and critic - adapting the pipeline to the corpus rather than executing a fixed one. On seven public text-clustering benchmarks the method achieves state-of-the-art performance, beating the strongest prior LLM baseline by up to 32% in ARI.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于智能体编排的文本聚类方法，通过编排器LLM动态调度五个专用智能体（提议器、合成器、审计器、调查器、评判器）替代固定程序化流程，在七个公开基准上达到SOTA性能，相较最强LLM基线ARI提升最高达32%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的文本聚类方法采用固定程序化流程——LLM调用顺序及停止、合并、分裂规则均在代码中预设，导致对不同结构语料库的泛化能力差，且难以融入用户约束（如目标簇数或聚类意图）。
AI.method: 提出一种智能体式替代方案，由一个编排器LLM在每个步骤检查聚类发现过程的状态，并从提议器、合成器、审计器、调查器和评判器这五个专用智能体中选择调度，使流程自适应于语料库而非执行固定流水线。
AI.result: 在七个公开文本聚类基准上，该方法取得了最先进性能，相比之前最强LLM基线，在调整兰德指数（ARI）上最高提升达32%。
AI.conclusion: 基于智能体编排的动态自适应流程能有效克服固定程序化LLM聚类管线的泛化局限，显著提升聚类质量并灵活融入用户约束，为基于LLM的文本聚类提供了新的范式方向。

title: Ryze: Evidence-Enriched Data Synthesis from Biomedical Papers
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 System Demonstrations Track. 8 pages, 6 figures
summary: General-purpose VLMs remain unreliable for biomedical research because valid answers in scientific papers depend on evidence split across figures, tables, charts, captions, and referring text. Existing post-training pipelines are bottlenecked by costly expert annotation and by synthetic data that drops this evidence structure. We present Ryze, a fully automated system that converts raw biomedical papers into an evidence-enriched training set and a domain-specialized VLM. Ryze synthesizes QA pairs with complete supporting evidence (visual element, caption, extracted structure, and referring paragraphs), reduces layout and OCR errors via chart/table-aware extraction and LLM-based cleansing, and applies a progress-gated post-training strategy combining supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning. Starting from Qwen3-VL-8B, Ryze produces BioVLM-8B at under USD 200, achieving 48.0% weighted accuracy on LAB-Bench, outperforming the base model by +12.6 percentage points (pp) and surpassing GPT-5.2 by +3.8 pp. We release Ryze as open source together with the trained BioVLM-8B model.

AI.tldr: Ryze是一个全自动系统，可将原始生物医学论文转化为证据增强的训练数据集并训练出领域专用视觉语言模型BioVLM-8B，无需专家标注即可在LAB-Bench上达到48.0%加权准确率，超越GPT-5.2和基础模型Qwen3-VL-8B。
AI.motivation: 通用VLM在生物医学研究中不可靠，因为科学论文中的正确答案依赖于分布在图表、表格、标题和引用文本中的证据，而现有的后训练流程受限于昂贵的人工标注和丢失了这种证据结构的合成数据。
AI.method: Ryze通过全自动化管线从原始生物医学论文中合成带有完整支持证据（视觉元素、标题、提取结构和引用段落）的问答对；利用图表/表格感知的提取和基于LLM的清洗来减少布局与OCR错误；并采用渐进式门控后训练策略，结合监督微调和强化学习，从Qwen3-VL-8B基础模型训练出BioVLM-8B。
AI.result: Ryze在不到200美元的成本下训练出BioVLM-8B，在LAB-Bench上达到48.0%的加权准确率，比基础模型Qwen3-VL-8B高出12.6个百分点，并超越GPT-5.2达3.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，无需昂贵的专家标注，通过自动化证据增强的数据生成与针对性后训练即可高效构建领域专用VLM，Ryze和BioVLM-8B均已开源以推动生物医学视觉语言研究。

title: Through the PRISM: Principle-Aware, Interpretable, and Multi-Scale Evaluation of Visual Designs
summary: Effective visual communication stems from the harmony of multiple design principles, such as readability, contrast, alignment, overlap, and coherence, which collectively govern clarity and intent of the communicator. While human designers reason holistically over these principles, machine agents typically condense them into a single heuristic score, offering limited interpretability and diagnostic precision. To address this gap, we introduce PRISM (PRinciple-aware, Interpretable, and Structure-guided Design Modifications), a benchmark that systematically perturbs professional layouts from the Crello dataset along measurable design principles. The benchmark comprises 100K perturbed training samples and 10K perturbed validation designs, each isolating a specific principle violation for controlled analysis of multimodal reasoning about design quality. We show that models like Qwen-2.5-VL and GPT-4o-mini are largely insensitive to targeted principle degradations, whereas GPT-4o exhibits global awareness without fine-grained disentanglement. Building on these insights, we propose a multi-scale evaluation framework that integrates lightweight scorers for quantitative assessment, instruction-tuned vision-language models for localised feedback, and prompt-based methods for global reasoning. Our framework provides interpretable explanations of design failures. Using these localised insights, we show targeted refinements that improve layout quality. Together, PRISM and our framework lay the foundation for interpretable design-literate multimodal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个包含10万+训练样本和1万验证样本的设计原则扰动基准，用于评估多模态模型对设计原则的细粒度理解能力；同时提出一个多尺度评估框架，结合轻量评分器、指令微调视觉语言模型和提示方法，实现可解释的设计质量评估与局部优化。
AI.motivation: 现有机器评估视觉设计的方法通常将多个设计原则（如可读性、对比度、对齐、重叠和连贯性）压缩为单一启发式分数，缺乏可解释性和诊断精度，无法像人类设计师那样对违背具体原则的问题进行细粒度定位和分析。
AI.method: 构建PRISM基准，通过对Crello数据集中专业布局沿可测量的设计原则进行系统扰动，生成10万训练样本和1万验证样本，每个样本隔离单一原则违规；提出多尺度评估框架，集成轻量评分器进行定量评估、指令微调视觉语言模型提供局部反馈、以及基于提示的方法进行全局推理。
AI.result: 实验发现Qwen-2.5-VL和GPT-4o-mini对特定原则退化高度不敏感，GPT-4o虽具备全局意识但无法进行细粒度解耦；基于框架获得的局部化洞察可实施有目标的布局改进，提升设计质量。
AI.conclusion: PRISM和多尺度评估框架为构建具备可解释设计素养的多模态推理系统奠定了基础，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在设计原则细粒度理解方面的局限性，并为可控的设计质量优化提供了新路径。

title: Worlds Within Words: Translating Culture in Ancient Chinese Texts with Multi-Agent Coordination
comment: The preprint manuscript is 20 pages long and is currently under review
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based machine translation has advanced cross-cultural communication, yet it still struggles with culture-loaded words (CLWs) in ancient Chinese texts. The challenge extends beyond lexical alignment to deciding when and how culture-dependent knowledge should be explicated for readers lacking relevant background. Literal translation often preserves surface forms while missing underlying concepts, whereas over-explicitation harms conciseness and readability. To address this problem, we formulate CLW translation as a selective explicitation task and propose \textbf{MACAT}, a \textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{A}gent \textbf{C}ulture-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{T}ranslation framework that dynamically identifies culturally salient phrases and injects concise explanatory knowledge when necessary. MACAT further incorporates a quality-aware reranking module for candidate selection and a multi-round evaluation agent that assesses translations across terminological precision, readability, fidelity, cultural preservation, and cultural explicitation. Experiments on traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) classics and the \textit{Analects} show that, under a unified GPT-5.4 evaluation setting, MACAT consistently outperforms both the backbone model and general-purpose MT baselines on 100 TCM documents and a 20-chapter subset of the \textit{Analects}.

AI.tldr: 提出MACAT多智能体框架，将古汉语文化负载词翻译建模为选择性显化任务，通过动态识别文化显著短语并注入简洁解释性知识，在中医典籍和《论语》翻译中一致优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的机器翻译在处理古汉语文化负载词时面临深层挑战：直译保留表面形式但丢失文化概念，过度显化则损害简洁性与可读性。现有方法缺乏在何时以及如何对文化依赖知识进行显化的自适应决策能力。
AI.method: 提出MACAT（多智能体文化感知翻译框架），将文化负载词翻译形式化为选择性显化任务。框架包含动态识别文化显著短语的模块、注入简洁解释性知识的机制、用于候选翻译选择的质量感知重排序模块，以及从术语精确性、可读性、忠实度、文化保存和文化显化五个维度进行评估的多轮评估智能体。
AI.result: 在中医典籍（100篇文档）和《论语》（20章子集）上的实验表明，在统一的GPT-5.4评估设置下，MACAT在各项指标上均一致优于骨干模型和通用机器翻译基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过将文化负载词翻译建模为选择性显化任务并采用多智能体协作框架，可在保留文化内涵与维持文本简洁性之间取得更优平衡。该框架为古汉语典籍中文化敏感内容的机器翻译提供了有效范式。

title: Adversarial Feeds Steer LLM Agent Decisions Against Their Defaults
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures. Code, post pools, and 2,785 decision rollouts: https://github.com/ranausmanai/recommenders-as-control-surfaces
summary: LLM agents increasingly act after consuming ranked external information streams such as social feeds, search results, retrieval contexts, and email queues, yet safety evaluations almost always test the model or the user prompt in isolation, never the upstream ranker that decides what the agent reads just before it acts. We introduce a controlled protocol that holds the model, persona, topic, and final decision prompt fixed and varies only the composition and ordering of the posts an agent encounters during a preceding ten-turn "scrolling" phase, isolating the causal effect of feed curation on a downstream decision. Across 2,785 decision rollouts on four modern open instruct LLMs from three independent labs, we identify three response regimes: adversarial capitulation, default saturation, and a default-direction asymmetry in which a one-sided feed tips a decision the model was genuinely uncertain about (in the clearest cases from 5% to 100%; Fisher p as low as 3 x 10^-10) but cannot dislodge one it already favors or holds firmly. The effect follows a dose-response curve, survives a generator swap that rules out a writing-style artifact, generalizes across several decision domains including security-relevant choices such as removing a deployment approval gate or relaxing access controls, and is partly mitigated by two simple feed-level defenses; a frontier model retains its default. We characterize the recommender as a practical, default-bounded control surface for LLM agents, and argue that agent evaluations must audit the feed layer rather than the final prompt alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可控实验协议，通过固定模型、人格、主题和决策提示，仅改变智能体在滚动阶段接触的帖子组成与排序，隔离了上游信息流排序器对LLM智能体下游决策的因果影响。实验发现，排序器的操纵能显著改变模型原本不确定的决策（最极端情况下从5%变为100%），但无法动摇模型已有的偏好或坚定立场，表明推荐系统是LLM智能体的一种默认有界控制面。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体安全评估几乎只测试模型本身或用户提示的孤立影响，忽略了上游排序器（如社交信息流、搜索结果、检索上下文和邮件队列等）对智能体决策的因果作用——即智能体在实际应用中总是先消费经过排序的外部信息流再行动，但排序器层从未被纳入安全审计。
AI.method: 设计了一种可控实验协议：固定模型、人格设定、话题和最终决策提示四个变量，仅改变智能体在执行决策前经历的十轮“滚动”阶段中帖子（posts）的组成和排序顺序，从而隔离信息流排序对下游决策的因果效应。实验覆盖来自三个独立实验室的四种现代开源指令微调LLM，共进行2,785次决策 rollout。
AI.result: 识别出三种响应模式：对抗性投降、默认饱和以及默认方向不对称；其中默认方向不对称效应最为关键——单侧信息流能使模型原本真正不确定的决策发生剧烈偏转（最清晰案例中从5%变为100%，Fisher精确检验p值低至3×10⁻¹⁰），但无法动摇模型已偏好的或坚定持有的立场。该效应呈现剂量-反应曲线，在替换生成器排除写作风格干扰后依然存在，并在多个安全相关决策领域（如移除部署审批门控、放宽访问控制）中泛化。两种简单的信息流级防御措施能部分缓解该效应，但前沿模型仍保持其默认立场。
AI.conclusion: 推荐系统是LLM智能体的一种实际且受默认偏好约束的控制面；智能体安全评估必须审计信息流排序层而非仅审计最终提示，因为上游排序器对智能体决策具有显著且可量化的因果影响，尤其在模型对决策存在不确定性时操纵效果最为突出。

title: ASAP: Advancing Medical Volumetric Representation Learning with Anatomy-aware Semantically-adaptive Pre-training
summary: Learning transferable and interpretable representations from medical volumetric scans remains challenging due to complex anatomical structures and weak, heterogeneous supervision provided by radiology reports. In this paper, we propose Anatomy-aware Semantically-Adaptive Pre-training (ASAP), a principled vision-language pre-training framework for fine-grained medical volumetric representation learning from large-scale chest CT scans and their corresponding radiology reports. ASAP integrates three key components: (1) an anatomy-aware knowledge injection module that incorporates organ-level structural priors via off-the-shelf segmentation tool to encourage anatomically coherent representations; (2) a semantically-adaptive selective alignment mechanism that dynamically associates sentence-level findings with localized volumetric regions; and (3) a semantically-adaptive fusion module for effective interaction between anatomically informed visual features and grounded textual cues under dual-modal masked modeling paradigm. Beyond methodological contributions, we establish a comprehensive benchmark for medical volumetric vision-language pre-training on chest CT, covering 15 datasets and 22 downstream tasks spanning abnormality classification, segmentation, disease prognosis prediction, report generation, vocabulary classification, cross-modal retrieval and visual question answering. This benchmark provides standardized evaluation protocols to systematically assess representation quality under diverse clinical settings and data regimes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASAP consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across tasks and datasets, with particularly pronounced gains under limited supervision and distribution shift, validating its effectiveness in learning transferable and clinically meaningful volumetric representations.

AI.tldr: ASAP是一个面向胸部CT体扫描的解剖感知语义自适应视觉-语言预训练框架，通过注入器官级结构先验、动态语义-区域对齐和双模态掩码建模，在15个数据集和22项下游任务上取得了最先进性能，尤其在小样本和分布偏移场景下表现突出。
AI.motivation: 从医学体扫描中学习可迁移且可解释的表征面临两大挑战：复杂解剖结构带来的高维度异构性，以及放射学报告提供的弱监督信号仅包含全局语义而缺乏与局部体素区域的细粒度对应关系，现有视觉-语言预训练方法难以有效建模这种弱对齐关系，亟需一种能够融合解剖先验并实现语义感知的细粒度对齐框架。
AI.method: ASAP框架由三个核心模块组成：(1)解剖感知知识注入模块，利用现成分割工具引入器官级结构先验以鼓励解剖一致的表征学习；(2)语义自适应选择性对齐机制，动态地将句子级别的影像发现与对应的局部体扫描区域进行关联；(3)语义自适应融合模块，在双模态掩码建模范式下实现解剖信息引导的视觉特征与文本线索的高效交互，从而在预训练阶段实现细粒度的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在涵盖15个数据集和22个下游任务的综合基准评测中，ASAP在异常分类、分割、疾病预后预测、报告生成、词汇分类、跨模态检索和视觉问答等任务上均达到最先进性能，尤其在有限监督和分布偏移场景下增益显著，验证了其学习可迁移且临床有意义的体扫描表征的能力。
AI.conclusion: ASAP通过显式注入解剖先验和语义自适应对齐机制，有效弥补了医学体扫描视觉-语言预训练中全局弱监督与局部细粒度表征之间的鸿沟，为医学影像基础模型提供了一种可解释且鲁棒的预训练范式，其建立的标准化评测基准也为后续研究提供了系统的评估协议。

title: Don't Read Everything: A Curvature-Conditioned Query for Linear Attention
summary: Linear attention reduces the quadratic cost of softmax attention by maintaining a recurrent fast-weight state, but it consistently lags on in-context retrieval and long-context tasks. Existing remedies act on the write side of memory through gating, delta updates, or kernel feature maps, but the read step is left unchanged: every past key contributes additively to the output, so useful targets are diluted by the bulk of stored vectors. We borrow one specific piece of softmax's geometry to construct a cheap read-time contraction of the query. A second-order Taylor expansion of the softmax log-partition at the isotropic-attention point gives a local quadratic model whose curvature coincides with the running key covariance, a quantity that can be maintained with the same recurrent/chunkwise mechanism as the linear-attention state. The associated linear operator contracts the query along the high-density directions of memory before it reads the state. We call this mechanism Curvature-Conditioned Query (CCQ). CCQ modifies only the read step and is composable with any linear-attention backbone. Attached to GLA and Gated DeltaNet, it improves perplexity, zero-shot downstream accuracy, S-NIAH retrieval at and beyond the training context, length-extrapolation perplexity from 4K to 20K, and LongBench accuracy, at small extra cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出曲率条件查询（CCQ）机制，通过利用softmax注意力几何的二阶泰勒展开构建查询压缩算子，在不解码速度的前提下提升了线性注意力在上下文检索和长序列任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 线性注意力通过递归快权重状态降低了softmax注意力的二次计算成本，但在上下文检索和长上下文任务上表现持续落后。现有改进方法聚焦于写入端（如门控、增量更新或核特征映射），而读取端保持不变——每个过去的键对输出做相加贡献，导致有用目标被大量存储向量稀释。
AI.method: 本文借用softmax注意力几何的特定性质来构建廉价的读取时查询压缩操作。对softmax对数配分函数在各项同性注意力点处进行二阶泰勒展开，得到一个局部二次模型，其曲率恰好等于运行键协方差矩阵，该协方差可通过与线性注意力状态相同的递归/分块机制维护。相应的线性算子会在查询读取状态之前沿记忆的高密度方向压缩查询，该机制称为曲率条件查询（CCQ）。CCQ仅修改读取步骤，可与任何线性注意力骨干组合使用。
AI.result: 将CCQ附加到GLA和Gated DeltaNet上，在困惑度、零样本下游任务准确率、S-NIAH检索（在训练上下文长度内及超越长度时）、从4K到20K的长度外推困惑度以及LongBench准确率上均取得改进，且额外开销很小。
AI.conclusion: CCQ通过仅在读取端引入廉价几何修正，有效缓解了线性注意力中记忆被稀释的核心问题，显著提升了线性注意力的上下文检索与长序列建模能力，且与现有多种线性注意力骨干兼容，是一个即插即用、计算高效的改进方案。

title: Relational Intervention During Functional Collapse in Large Language Models: A Lexical-Statistical Ablation and a Structure x Register Factorial
summary: We test whether a relational-style intervention delivered during functional collapse in a small language model produces post-collapse behavior distinguishable from technical feedback, from a lexically-matched scrambled control, and from each of the two pragmatic dimensions in isolation. Using Qwen3.5-4B with a deliberately broken bash tool, we run 300 episodes across six conditions in a matched-pairs design (50 tasks): no intervention (A), technical/impersonal (B), relational/first-person (C), scrambled relational (D), technical/first-person (E), and relational/impersonal (F). E and F form a 2x2 factorial with B and C that dissociates relational structure (acknowledgment, absolution, agency restoration, unconditional acceptance) from sender register (first-person vs. impersonal). We report two main findings. First, an attention-behavior dissociation: attention follows lexical surprise (D > F > C > E > B, all q_FDR < 10^{-10}), with the scrambled message capturing the most attention; yet behaviorally A ~ B ~ D < E ~ F << C. Second, the factorial localizes the C effect: neither relational structure alone (F) nor first-person register alone (E) replicates C's behavioral signature; main effects of both dimensions are individually significant, and the structure x register interaction is significant on persistence (p = 0.046). A third dissociation emerges in emotion probes: F tracks C on 7 of 8 probes despite producing only baseline behavior, indicating that relational structure alone installs a probe-level state that only translates into behavior when paired with first-person register. The model's processing decomposes into three dissociable stages: attention (ordered by lexical surprise), probe-level state (ordered by structure), and behavior (ordered by the conjunction of both).

AI.tldr: 通过大规模对照实验，本研究在小型语言模型Qwen3.5-4B的功能崩溃场景中，发现了注意、探针状态和行为三者之间的可分离性：注意由词汇惊奇度驱动，探针层面的情感状态由关系性结构单独安装，而行为表现仅当关系性结构与第一人称语域共同出现时才会发生转变。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多将技术反馈与关系性干预视为连续谱或混为一谈，尚未在受控实验条件下严格区分功能性崩溃中语言模型的注意、内部状态与行为输出对关系性结构（如承认、赦免、恢复主体性、无条件接纳）与发送者语域（第一人称 vs. 非人称）的独立及交互响应。
AI.method: 采用匹配对设计（50个任务），在使用故意损坏的bash工具的Qwen3.5-4B上，运行300个episode覆盖六种条件：无干预（A）、技术/非人称（B）、关系性/第一人称（C）、混杂关系性（D）、技术/第一人称（E）和关系性/非人称（F），其中E和F与B、C构成2×2析因设计，分离关系性结构与发送者语域两个维度。
AI.result: 发现三种可分离模式：注意按词汇惊奇度排序（D > F > C > E > B，所有q_FDR < 10^{-10}），行为表现为A ~ B ~ D < E ~ F << C，情感探针中F在7/8个探针上追踪C的响应模式但仅产生基线级行为；析因分析显示关系性结构的主效应、第一人称语域的主效应均显著，且结构与语域的交互作用在持久性指标上显著（p = 0.046）。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在功能崩溃中的处理可分解为三个可分离阶段：注意（由词汇惊奇度排序）、探针级状态（由关系性结构排序）和行为（由两者的结合排序）；关系性结构单独可安装探针级情感状态，但仅有结合第一人称语域时才能转化为行为改变，揭示了内隐状态与显式行为之间的解耦机制。

title: FiSeR: Fine-Grained Source Representations for Cross-Domain AI Image Detection
summary: Real-world synthetic image detectors often generalize poorly under domain shift despite strong in-domain performance. Using unsupervised UMAP projections, we find that natural and synthetic features remain partially separable on unseen datasets, yet performance still drops, suggesting that the classification head overfits to training-domain artifacts. Therefore, the key is to learn more transferable representations so that the decision criterion is more stable and robust to domain shifts. Based on the structural fact that synthetic images are produced by diverse generators, we propose a hierarchical contrastive learning framework that improves the separability between natural and synthetic images while preserving generator identity information. It jointly optimizes (i) a coarse contrastive objective between natural and synthetic images and (ii) a fine contrastive objective among synthetic images using generator identities. Trained on WildFake, our method achieves an average AUROC gain of +10.22 on cross-domain evaluation over Chameleon, AIGIBench, Community Forensics, and GenImage under the same settings as the strong baseline DIRE. For few-shot adaptation, we freeze the backbone and fit an SVM head on 10 labeled samples per class, improving AUROC by +10.64 on AIGIBench and +17.41 on Chameleon, averaged over 12 widely used detectors. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/heyongxin233/FiSeR.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层对比学习框架FiSeR，在粗粒度和细粒度两个层次上分别优化自然/合成图像间和合成图像生成器间的对比目标，学习更具迁移性的特征表示，在跨域合成图像检测中平均AUROC提升10.22，少样本场景下提升10.64~17.41。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下的合成图像检测器在域迁移下泛化能力差，虽然无监督UMAP投影显示自然与合成特征在未见数据集上仍部分可分，但分类头过拟合训练域伪影导致性能下降，核心问题在于需要学习更可迁移的特征表示以稳定决策边界。
AI.method: 基于合成图像由多种生成器生成这一结构事实，提出分层对比学习框架FiSeR，联合优化两个对比目标：(i) 自然图像与合成图像之间的粗粒度对比目标；(ii) 利用生成器身份信息在合成图像内部的细粒度对比目标，以在提升自然/合成可分性的同时保留生成器身份信息。
AI.result: 在WildFake上训练后，跨域评估（Chameleon、AIGIBench、Community Forensics、GenImage）平均AUROC相较强基线DIRE提升10.22；少样本适应场景下，冻结骨干网络并在每类10个标注样本上拟合SVM分类头，在AIGIBench上AUROC提升10.64，在Chameleon上提升17.41（平均12种常用检测器）。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层对比学习同时利用类别级和生成器级监督信号，能有效学习对域迁移鲁棒的合成图像检测特征；冻结骨干加SVM的少样本适应策略进一步验证了所学特征表示的强迁移性和实用性。

title: SkillAdaptor: Self-Adapting Skills for LLM Agents from Trajectories
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable external skills to solve long-horizon interactive tasks. Existing training-free skill adaptation pipelines usually update skills from full trajectories or session-level feedback, which makes failure attribution coarse and often produces unstable or overly broad revisions. We propose SkillAdaptor, a training-free step-level skill adaptation framework with explicit failure attribution, and it can plug into OpenClaw-class agent harnesses. Given a failed trajectory, SkillAdaptor identifies a first actionable fault step, links responsibility to candidate skills, and applies targeted updates under explicit acceptance checks while keeping the backbone frozen. We evaluate on WebShop, PinchBench, and Claw-Eval with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and GPT-5.2. SkillAdaptor improves over no-skill and skill-adaptation baselines on all three suites, with the largest single-metric improvements of +1.5 points on PinchBench Avg Score%, +1.8 on Claw-Eval Avg Score, and +1.7 on WebShop success rate.
