These results indicate that step-level attribution supports more stable and auditable training-free skill maintenance\footnote{The code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillAdaptor.}.

AI.tldr: SkillAdaptor提出了一种免训练的步骤级技能自适应框架，通过显式故障归因实现更稳定、可审计的技能维护，在WebShop、PinchBench和Claw-Eval三个基准上均优于无技能和技能自适应基线。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体的免训练技能自适应流程通常基于完整轨迹或会话级反馈进行技能更新，导致故障归因粗糙、修订结果不稳定或过于宽泛，缺乏细粒度的步骤级故障定位能力。
AI.method: SkillAdaptor是一个免训练的步骤级技能自适应框架，可插入OpenClaw类智能体框架；给定失败轨迹后，框架识别首个可执行的故障步骤，将责任关联到候选技能，并在显式接受检查下执行定向技能更新，同时保持骨干模型冻结。
AI.result: 在WebShop、PinchBench和Claw-Eval三个基准上使用Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5和GPT-5.2进行评估，SkillAdaptor在所有套件上均优于无技能和技能自适应基线，最大单项提升分别为PinchBench平均分+1.5%、Claw-Eval平均分+1.8、WebShop成功率+1.7。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级故障归因能够支持更稳定且可审计的免训练技能维护，为LLM智能体在长程交互任务中的技能自适应提供了有效且可靠的解决方案。

title: TravelEval: A Comprehensive Benchmarking Framework for Evaluating LLM-Powered Travel Planning Agents
summary: The development of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly improved travel planning applications, yet evaluating such models is limited by existing benchmarks' limitations: 1) overemphasis on constraint compliance, neglecting multi-dimensional qualities like spatio-temporal cost; 2) datasets lacking real-world authenticity and coverage in key areas (e.g., lodging, transport); and 3) isolated daily plan assessments that miss critical details (e.g., the impact of daily accommodation and visit pacing) needed for entire plan's evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce TravelEval, a realistic and comprehensive benchmark. TravelEval features 1) a novel six-dimensional evaluation framework to holistically assess plans across accuracy, compliance, temporality, spatiality, economy, and utility dimensions; 2) a highly realistic data sandbox with precise accommodation pricing and authentic intercity transportation data; and 3) a simulation-based global evaluation method that emulates complete travel plans with API-integrated geographic information and fine-grained queuing time. Evaluating 12 mainstream approaches with TravelEval reveals several valuable insights, such that LLMs struggle with globally-optimized multi-dimensional planning (especially in spatio-temporal reasoning and budget compliance), and agentic reasoning strategies offer no consistent improvement. Concisely, TravelEval facilitates travel plan evaluation via grounded spatio-temporal emulation and comprehensive metrics, providing a robust foundation for advancing LLM-powered travel planning research and applications.

AI.tldr: TravelEval是一个面向LLM旅行规划能力的现实综合基准，通过六维评估框架、高真实度数据沙箱和仿真全局评估方法，揭示了现有LLM在多维度全局优化规划中的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM旅行规划评估基准存在三大局限：过度强调约束满足而忽视时空成本等多维质量、数据集缺乏真实世界覆盖度（如住宿和交通等关键领域）以及仅评估孤立每日计划而遗漏全局细节（如住宿影响和游览节奏），亟需一种更全面、真实的评估方法。
AI.method: TravelEval提出三项核心技术贡献：1）六维评估框架，从准确性、合规性、时间性、空间性、经济性和实用性全面衡量旅行计划；2）高真实度数据沙箱，包含精确的住宿定价和真实的城际交通数据；3）基于仿真的全局评估方法，通过API集成地理信息和细粒度排队时间来模拟完整旅行计划。
AI.result: 在12种主流方法上的评估表明，LLMs在全局优化的多维规划中表现困难，尤其是在时空推理和预算合规方面存在显著短板，且基于智能体的推理策略并未带来一致性的改进效果。
AI.conclusion: TravelEval通过基于真实时空仿真和全面指标为LLM旅行规划评估提供了稳健基础，揭示了当前模型在复杂多维全局规划中的本质局限，为推进LLM驱动的旅行规划研究和应用指明了改进方向。

title: Pause and Think: A Dataset and Benchmark for Video-Grounded Assistive Action Suggestion
summary: Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with grounded reasoning, temporal consistency, and context aware planning in videos. We introduce pause-and-think-T, a reasoning-centric training dataset that encourages models to pause, reason over visual evidence, and produce concise, actionable responses. The dataset promotes structured reasoning prior to answer generation, guiding models toward human-like, scene-grounded assistance. We fine-tune a compact 4B-parameter model and evaluate it on our pause-and-think-B benchmark targeting contextual understanding and goal planning tasks. The model achieves 58.0% accuracy at 59x fewer parameters than Qwen3-VL-235B (58.9%), matching GPT-5.2 on scene understanding and surpassing GPT-4o. Beyond our benchmark, it also shows strong out-of-distribution performance on EgoThink and TempCompass, with substantial gains in affordance, assistance, attribution recognition, situated reasoning, and temporal order, without benchmark-specific training. Our results indicate that targeted reasoning supervision enables compact models to deliver actionable, visually grounded guidance while generalizing beyond training data, without requiring large-scale model expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 pause-and-think-T 训练数据集和 4B 参数紧凑模型，通过结构化推理监督使模型在视频场景理解与目标规划任务中以 59 倍更少参数达到接近 235B 大模型的性能，并在多个分布外基准上展现强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在视频理解中普遍缺乏接地推理、时间一致性及上下文感知规划能力，难以生成人类级别的场景化辅助响应。研究者旨在通过推理监督而非大规模模型扩展来解决这一能力缺口。
AI.method: 构建 pause-and-think-T 推理中心训练数据集，引导模型在生成答案前先对视觉证据进行结构化推理；基于该数据集微调一个 4B 参数的紧凑模型，并在自建 pause-and-think-B 基准（关注上下文理解和目标规划任务）上评估。
AI.result: 4B 模型在 pause-and-think-B 基准上达到 58.0% 准确率，以 59 倍更少参数逼近 Qwen3-VL-235B 的 58.9%；场景理解能力匹配 GPT-5.2 并超越 GPT-4o；在 EgoThink 和 TempCompass 等分布外基准上，无需专门训练即可在 affordance、assistance、attribution recognition、situated reasoning 和 temporal order 等维度取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 针对性的推理监督能使紧凑模型在提供可操作、视觉接地的指导方面达到甚至超越大规模模型的水平，同时具备良好的泛化能力，表明推理数据质量比模型规模增长更为关键。

title: Dr. DocBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Expert-Level and Difficult Document Parsing
summary: Document parsing and recognition are fundamental capabilities for vision-language models (VLMs) and document processing systems. However, existing Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and document parsing benchmarks are increasingly limited in coverage and difficulty: many focus on common document genres or uniformly sampled pages where modern parsers already perform strongly, while offering limited annotation for expert-domain structures such as chemical formula, music notation, complex tables, and cross-page layouts. We introduce Dr. DocBench, a difficulty-aware benchmark for expert-level document parsing. Built from a large-scale multilingual book corpus, Dr. DocBench spans 52 BISAC subject domains and selects challenging documents through parser-failure-based sampling, targeting cases where multiple state-of-the-art systems struggle. It contains 4,514 annotated pages from long documents averaging around 100 pages, with 65k high-quality page- and block-level annotations for layout, reading order, hierarchical relations, and domain-specific visual contents. Evaluations of pipeline-based parsers and general-purpose VLMs show that strong performance on existing benchmarks does not transfer to our expert-level document parsing. Our analysis reveals substantial failures across subjects, content types, and structural attributes, highlighting Dr. DocBench as a comprehensive testbed for diagnosing and advancing document intelligence.

AI.tldr: Dr. DocBench 是一个面向专家级文档解析的难度感知基准，通过解析器失败采样从多语言书籍语料库中构建，涵盖52个BISAC学科领域、4,514页标注页面和65k条标注，实验表明现有强模型在该基准上性能大幅下降，揭示了其作为诊断和推进文档智能的综合测试平台的价值。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR和文档解析基准在覆盖范围和难度上日益受限：多数聚焦于常见文档类型或均匀采样页面，现代解析器已表现强劲；同时缺乏对化学公式、乐谱、复杂表格和跨页布局等专家领域结构的充分标注，难以衡量和推动文档智能的实质性进步。
AI.method: 从大规模多语言书籍语料库出发，覆盖52个BISAC学科领域；采用基于解析器失败的采样策略，专门选取多个最先进系统均难以处理的困难文档；构建了4,514页来自平均约100页的长文档的标注数据，包含65k高质量的页面级和块级标注，涵盖布局、阅读顺序、层次关系及领域特定视觉内容。
AI.result: 对基于流水线的解析器和通用视觉语言模型（VLM）的评估表明，在现有基准上的强性能无法迁移到专家级文档解析任务；跨学科主题、内容类型和结构属性的分析揭示了大量失败案例，证明Dr. DocBench对现有系统构成了显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: Dr. DocBench作为诊断和推进文档智能的综合性测试平台，揭示了当前文档解析系统在处理专家级复杂文档时的系统性不足，为未来研究提供了明确的方向和评估标准。

title: MindClaw: Closed-Loop Embodied Mental-State Reasoning for Precision Intervention
comment: Extended version of the CVPR 2026 paper *MindPower: Enabling Theory-of-Mind Reasoning in VLM-based Embodied Agents*
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM) enables an agent to reason about another actor's beliefs, goals, and intentions, which is essential for human-centered embodied assistance. Existing ToM benchmarks have advanced text and multimodal mental-state recognition, but they mostly evaluate offline question answering or final action prediction. They do not fully test whether an embodied agent can stay connected to a changing environment, update actor-specific beliefs, decide when reasoning is needed, and intervene only when help is useful. Building on MindPower, we extend robot-centric ToM reasoning to a real-time closed-loop setting and introduce MindClaw, a framework for embodied mental-state reasoning with precision intervention. MindClaw connects multi-source inputs, belief memory, an embodied cognitive trigger skill, mental reasoning, and action generation, allowing the agent to output helpful actions at the right time while remaining silent when intervention is unnecessary. Experiments show that direct VLM baselines struggle with task awareness and intervention calibration, while MindClaw achieves the best overall performance, demonstrating the importance of trigger-skill optimization for closed-loop embodied ToM assistance.

AI.tldr: MindClaw 提出面向具身智能体的闭环心理理论推理框架，将机器人心理推理从离线问答扩展至实时闭环场景，通过信念记忆、触发技能与精密干预机制，在需帮助时准确行动，在无需干预时保持静默，克服了直接 VLM 基线在任务感知与干预校准上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有心理理论（ToM）基准主要评估离线问答或最终动作预测，无法检验具身智能体在动态环境中保持感知更新、推理触发时机判断以及仅在有用时进行干预的能力，缺乏面向实时闭环场景的机器人中心 ToM 推理评估体系。
AI.method: MindClaw 框架融合多源输入、信念记忆（belief memory）、具身认知触发技能（embodied cognitive trigger skill）、心理推理（mental reasoning）与动作生成（action generation）五大模块，使智能体能在适当时刻输出帮助性动作，并在无需干预时保持静默，实现闭环具身心理推理与精密干预。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接使用视觉-语言模型（VLM）基线在任务感知和干预校准方面表现欠佳，而 MindClaw 在整体性能上取得最优结果，验证了触发技能优化对于闭环具身 ToM 辅助的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了在闭环具身辅助场景中，触发技能（decide when reasoning is needed）的优化对心理推理性能具有关键影响，为未来面向人机协同的在线心理状态推理与适时干预提供了框架基础与实证依据。

title: A Systematic Benchmark of Intraoperative Ultrasound-to-MR Synthesis for Brain Tumour Surgery
summary: Intraoperative ultrasound (ioUS) is a versatile, cost-effective modality in brain tumour surgery, but its interpretation is difficult: acquisition planes are non-standard, artefacts are modality-specific, and its appearance differs markedly from the preoperative MRI on which surgical-planning tools, segmentation models and the surgeon's experience rely. Synthesising MRI-like images from ioUS could let this MRI-based infrastructure be reused intraoperatively without an extra scan. Most prior work evaluates a single architecture in isolation; to our knowledge, no benchmark has spanned architectural paradigms, inference regimes and downstream-task endpoints under a common protocol. We address this gap on the public ReMIND data set (76 patients; 153 paired ioUS/T2w and 104 paired ioUS/FLAIR studies; 60/16 patient-level train/held-out split). Six generators (four GAN baselines: Pix2Pix, SwinPix2Pix, CycleGAN, CUT; the transformer-augmented ResViT; and the few-step diffusion model SynDiff) were each trained under four inference regimes (2D, 2.5D, 2D + 3D-refinement, full-3D) and two targets (T2w only; T2w + FLAIR multi-task), yielding 48 experiments. Image-fidelity metrics (SSIM, PSNR, MAE, LPIPS) were complemented by an nnU-Net v2 downstream segmentation evaluation (tumour and resection cavity) and by subgroup analyses by histological grade and reoperation. No architecture dominated every axis, and, critically, perceptual quality tracked downstream utility most closely (LPIPS, r=-0.66, p<0.001), whereas higher SSIM was associated with worse utility (r=-0.64, p<0.001); SynDiff-2.5D best preserved downstream segmentation (U_Dice=0.55). Perceptual and downstream-task metrics should therefore be reported alongside or in preference to global SSIM, and architecture choice conditioned on surgical phase, patient history and clinical objective.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对六种生成架构（四种GAN、ResViT、SynDiff）在四种推理模式（2D/2.5D/2D+3D-refinement/全3D）和两种目标（T2w/T2w+FLAIR）下进行系统基准测试，发现无单一架构全面占优，且感知质量LPIPS比SSIM更能反映下游分割效用，SynDiff-2.5D取得最佳下游性能。
AI.motivation: 术中超声（ioUS）在脑肿瘤手术中性价比高但解读困难——采集平面非标准、伪影特异、与术前MRI差异大，而现有手术规划工具、分割模型和外科医生经验均依赖MRI。合成MRI-like图像可复用MRI基础设施，但已有工作仅孤立评估单一架构，缺乏跨架构范式、推理模式和下游任务端到端指标的统一基准。
AI.method: 基于公共ReMIND数据集（76名患者，153对ioUS/T2w和104对ioUS/FLAIR），训练六种生成器：四种GAN基线（Pix2Pix、SwinPix2Pix、CycleGAN、CUT）、Transformer增强的ResViT和少步扩散模型SynDiff；每种在四种推理模式（2D、2.5D、2D+3D-refinement、全3D）和两种目标（仅T2w、T2w+FLAIR多任务）下训练，共48组实验。图像保真度采用SSIM、PSNR、MAE、LPIPS评估，下游分割任务用nnU-Net v2评估肿瘤和切除腔，并做组织学分级和再手术亚组分析。
AI.result: 无单一架构在所有指标上占优。关键发现：感知质量LPIPS与下游分割效用高度负相关（r=-0.66, p<0.001），而SSIM与下游效用负相关（r=-0.64, p<0.001），即更高SSIM反而对应更差分割性能；SynDiff-2.5D在下游分割任务中取得最佳Dice（U_Dice=0.55）。
AI.conclusion: 感知（LPIPS）和下游任务指标应被报告或优先于全局SSIM；架构选择应依据手术阶段、患者病史和临床目标进行条件化决策。

title: DrugClaw and DrugAudit: A Primary-Source-Grounded Agent and Authority-Aware Benchmark for Drug-Information Question Answering
summary: Drug-information question answering is a high-stakes setting where hallucinated facts can mislead clinical decision-making and the provenance of each cited fact matters as much as the fact itself. We present DrugClaw, a multi-agent retrieval-augmented system that queries a registry of drug and pharmacovigilance skills via a reflection-driven state-machine workflow and returns answers grounded in primary regulatory or peer-reviewed records. We also contribute DrugAudit, a 3,772-item authority-aware benchmark with an evaluation panel that scores upstream-of-gold source match, token-level semantic snippet overlap, and citation faithfulness under a dual-judge LLM-as-judge protocol with inter-judge kappa = 0.88 (almost-perfect). Across DrugAudit plus drug-related subsets of MedQA (751) and PubMedQA (512), DrugClaw is top-1 on every column of the headline table: composite Evidence Index under both judges, judge-mediated answer correctness, primary-source rate (0.918, +10.1 pp over next-best), faithfulness (0.887, +5.9 pp), MedQA (0.920), and PubMedQA (0.693).

AI.tldr: 提出 DrugClaw，一个基于多智能体检索增强和反射驱动状态机的工作流系统，用于药物信息问答；同时构建 DrugAudit 基准（3,772 条目）并引入权威感知评估协议，在多个基准上取得全面最优结果。
AI.motivation: 药物信息问答属于高风险场景，幻觉事实可能误导临床决策，且每个引用事实的出处来源与事实本身同等重要。现有方法在回答的可靠性、引文溯源和权威性方面存在不足，缺乏能够严格对齐原始监管或同行评审记录的端到端框架。
AI.method: DrugClaw 采用多智能体检索增强架构，通过反射驱动的状态机工作流查询药物和药物警戒技能注册库，返回基于原始监管记录或同行评审文献的答案。DrugAudit 基准包含 3,772 个条目并配备评估面板，使用双裁判 LLM-as-Judge 协议（裁判间 kappa=0.88）对上游-黄金源匹配、词元级语义片段重叠和引文忠实度进行评分。
AI.result: 在 DrugAudit 以及 MedQA（751 条）和 PubMedQA（512 条）的药物相关子集上，DrugClaw 在头条表格的每个指标上均排名第一：复合证据指数（双裁判下）、裁判介导的答案正确性、主要来源比率（0.918，比次优方法高 10.1 个百分点）、忠实度（0.887，+5.9 pp）、MedQA（0.920）和 PubMedQA（0.693）。
AI.conclusion: DrugClaw 在高风险药物信息问答中通过多智能体反射驱动检索和严格的引文溯源显著超越了现有方法，表明将推理过程状态机化与权威感知评估相结合是提升临床决策支持系统可靠性的有效路径。所提出的 DrugAudit 基准和双裁判评估协议为后续研究提供了标准化评测平台。

title: CAREAgent: Clinical Agent with Structured Reasoning and Tool-Integrated for Order Generation
summary: Clinical order generation serves as a critical bridge between clinical decision-making and real-world practice, translating medical decisions into concrete and executable orders. Existing agents mainly focus on coarse-grained decisions and overlook the fine-grained, executable information required for clinical orders. To address this gap, we propose CAREAgent, an agent for clinical order generation. To support its training, we introduce a two-stage agentic reasoning data construction method. First, we design an agent framework that constructs verifiable reasoning trajectories aligned with realistic clinical tool usage. Second, we filter reasoning trajectories by format compliance, order validity, and clinical plausibility. Building on the constructed data, the model is first trained via supervised fine-tuning to acquire fundamental reasoning formats and medical knowledge, and is subsequently optimized through reinforcement learning with multi-dimensional reward functions to enhance complex clinical reasoning capabilities. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CAREAgent. On ClinicalBench (unseen during training), CAREAgent improves the F1 score by 5.05%, 2.09%, and 0.86% over the single-agent, multi-agent, and agentic reasoning methods, respectively.

AI.tldr: CAREAgent 是一个面向临床医嘱生成的智能体框架，通过两阶段推理数据构建与训练策略（监督微调+强化学习），在 ClinicalBench 等基准上显著提升了医嘱生成的 F1 分数。
AI.motivation: 现有临床决策智能体主要关注粗粒度决策，忽略了临床医嘱所需的细粒度、可执行信息，导致生成的医嘱缺乏实际可操作性。为此，本文提出 CAREAgent 以弥合临床决策与可执行医嘱之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: CAREAgent 采用两阶段智能体推理数据构建方法：首先设计一个智能体框架，构建与真实临床工具使用一致的可验证推理轨迹；然后通过格式合规性、医嘱有效性和临床合理性对推理轨迹进行筛选。在训练阶段，模型先通过监督微调学习基本推理格式和医学知识，再通过多维奖励函数的强化学习优化复杂临床推理能力。
AI.result: 在训练阶段未见过的 ClinicalBench 基准上，CAREAgent 相比单智能体方法、多智能体方法和智能体推理方法分别提升了 5.05%、2.09% 和 0.86% 的 F1 分数，在多个基准上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文研究表明，将可验证的推理轨迹构建与两阶段训练策略（监督微调+多维奖励强化学习）相结合，能够有效提升临床医嘱生成智能体的细粒度推理能力与执行准确性，为临床决策支持系统的实际落地提供了可行路径。

title: An Attribute-Based Measure of Video Complexity
summary: A new framework for the estimation of the complexity posed by video-question pairs to video-LLMs, Video Attribute-Based Complexity (VideoABC), is proposed. Video complexity is defined as the probability of failure of a video-LLM for a given video-question pair. VideoABC is a non-parametric complexity measure, using a reference video dataset and a pre-defined vocabulary of video attributes informative of complexity, \eg the scene complexity or the speed of the video event informative of the question. In a training phase, reference videos are projected into the space of these attributes, which is then quantized. The expected ABC of each quantization cell is then computed. Given a new video and its projection into the attribute space, complexity is estimated by the expected ABC of the associated quantization cell. To enable the use of VideoABC with small reference video datasets, two quantizers are combined: a k-means quantizer that enables accurate complexity estimates for samples in the distribution of the reference dataset and a universal lattice quantizer that guarantees generalization to out-of-distribution samples. A synthetic video generation procedure, inspired by target-distractor manipulations of psychophysics studies, is proposed to populate the cells of the lattice quantizer during training, enabling the computation of their expected ABCs. Experimental results show that VideoABCis effective even with very low-dimensional attribute representations, substantially outperforming approaches like `video-LLM as judge' with much less complexity. Finally, the explainable nature of the VideoABC score, in terms of well-defined attributes, is shown to provide insights on how the attribute composition of benchmarks affects their complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出视频属性复杂度（VideoABC）框架，通过非参数化方式基于视频属性量化视频-问题对对于视频大语言模型的复杂度，并利用k-means与通用格量化器结合及合成数据生成方法实现高精度与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏系统化、可解释且通用的框架来估计视频-问题对给视频大语言模型带来的复杂度，现有方法如“video-LLM as judge”复杂度高且缺乏属性层面的可解释性。
AI.method: VideoABC定义复杂度为视频-LLM对给定视频-问题对的失败概率；通过参考视频数据集将其投影到预定义的视频属性空间并量化；结合k-means量化器（保证分布内样本精度）与通用格量化器（保证分布外样本泛化）；利用受心理物理学启发合成视频生成过程填充格量化器单元以计算期望ABC。
AI.result: 实验表明VideoABC在极低维属性表示下依然有效，性能显著优于“video-LLM as judge”等方法且复杂度更低；其可解释性能够通过属性组成揭示基准数据集的复杂度特征。
AI.conclusion: VideoABC提供了一种可解释、低复杂度且泛化能力强的视频-问题复杂度度量方法，为评估和理解视频-LLM在不同属性构成下的表现提供了新视角与实用工具。

title: Beyond Topical Similarity: Contrastive Evidence Retrieval with Interpretable Attention Alignment in RAG
summary: Ensuring factuality and interpretability in RAG remains an open and urgent problem. We introduce Contrastive Evidence Rationale Attention (CERA), the first retrieval framework to employ subjectivity-based hard negative selection and inject an evidential inductive bias into contrastive learning through an auxiliary attention alignment loss. CERA fine-tunes a dense retriever using two training objectives: triplet-based contrastive learning and interpretable attention alignment, which supervises CLS-to-token attention using a part-of-speech-weighted masking distribution over human-annotated factual rationales as evidence signals. Experiments on a large corpus of clinical trial reports demonstrate that the subjectivity-based hard negative selection substantially improves retrieval effectiveness compared to both Contriever and hard negative selection baselines. Furthermore, rationale alignment improves faithfulness while maintaining competitive retrieval performance, supporting the hypothesis that attention can serve as a more faithful explanation of model behavior when guided by human rationales. Moving beyond topical similarity, CERA enables the retriever to identify the specific tokens that constitute supporting evidence, promoting more interpretable evidence selection in RAG systems.

AI.tldr: CERA提出了一种融合主观性难负样本选择与证据注意力对齐损失的稠密检索框架，通过对比学习与可解释注意力对齐双重训练目标，在临床试验报告语料上显著提升了RAG的事实性、忠实度与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG框架在确保检索结果的事实性（factuality）和可解释性（interpretability）方面仍然存在迫切且未解决的问题，传统检索方法主要依赖主题相似性，难以识别真正的支撑证据并缺乏对检索决策的可信解释。
AI.method: CERA框架基于稠密检索器，采用两种训练目标：三元组对比学习（triplet-based contrastive learning）和可解释注意力对齐（interpretable attention alignment）；其中负样本通过主观性（subjectivity-based）策略进行硬负例筛选，注意力对齐损失利用基于词性加权（part-of-speech-weighted）的掩码分布监督CLS到token的注意力，使其对齐人工标注的事实依据（factual rationales）。
AI.result: 在大型临床试验报告语料上的实验表明，基于主观性的硬负样本选择相比Contriever和传统难负样本选择基线显著提升了检索效果；同时，依据对齐在保持竞争性检索性能的前提下改善了忠实度（faithfulness），验证了注意力在人工依据引导下可作为模型行为更忠实的解释。
AI.conclusion: CERA证明了通过引入证据归纳偏置（evidential inductive bias）和主观性难负样本选择，检索器能够超越主题相似性，识别构成支撑证据的具体标记（tokens），从而在RAG系统中促进更可解释的证据选择过程。

title: SkillRevise: Improving LLM-Authored Agent Skills via Trace-Conditioned Skill Revision
summary: Agent skills are procedural artifacts that enable LLM agents to execute workflows, verify constraints, and recover from failures. Existing self-evolving methods refine skills using accumulated trajectories. However, they struggle in cold-start settings, where only an initial, imperfect skill is available. Consequently, skill construction defaults to expert authoring or one-shot LLM generation. Expert-authored skills are costly and may not align with how LLM agents actually execute tasks, while one-shot generated skills can be syntactically well formed yet behaviorally weak. To bridge this gap, we propose SkillRevise, an execution-grounded framework designed to iteratively refine these initial skills. SkillRevise diagnoses skill defects from execution evidence, retrieves relevant repair principles from a general memory, and applies execution-anchored edits. By re-executing candidates and measuring empirical utility, it systematically retains the optimal skill version. Evaluated across three benchmarks and five LLMs, SkillRevise substantially outperforms one-shot baselines, improving the base agent's success rate on SkillsBench from 36.05% to 61.63%. Furthermore, the revised skills exhibit strong cross-model transferability, capturing generalized procedural knowledge over model-specific artifacts.

AI.tldr: SkillRevise是一个执行驱动的框架，通过诊断缺陷、检索修复原则和执行锚定编辑来迭代优化LLM代理的初始技能，在SkillsBench上将成功率从36.05%提升至61.63%，且修订后的技能展现出跨模型迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化方法依赖累积轨迹来优化LLM代理技能，但在冷启动场景下仅能获得初始的不完美技能，导致技能构建退化为专家编写（成本高且与LLM实际执行方式脱节）或一次性LLM生成（语法正确但行为表现弱），缺乏一种能够从执行证据出发、迭代改进初始技能的机制。
AI.method: SkillRevise提出一个执行驱动的迭代优化框架，核心流程包括：从执行证据中诊断技能缺陷、从通用记忆库中检索相关修复原则、执行锚定的编辑操作，然后通过重新执行候选技能并测量其实验效用，系统性地保留最优技能版本。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试和五种LLM上的评估表明，SkillRevise显著优于一次性生成基线，将基础代理在SkillsBench上的成功率从36.05%提升至61.63%；此外，修订后的技能展现出强跨模型迁移性，捕获了超越特定模型工件的通用化程序知识。
AI.conclusion: SkillRevise有效填补了冷启动场景下初始技能迭代优化的空白，证明了通过执行驱动的缺陷诊断与修复可以系统性地提升技能质量，并且所获得的改进技能具有跨模型泛化能力，为构建可迁移的代理技能知识提供了新途径。

title: Collaborative Few-Step Distillation and Low-Bit Quantization for Wan2.2 Dual-Expert Video Diffusion Models
summary: Large video diffusion models achieve strong visual quality but remain expensive to deploy because each sample requires many denoising steps and a large resident parameter footprint. This paper studies a deployment-oriented compression pipeline for Wan2.2-T2V-A14B by combining few-step distribution-matching distillation with low-bit quantization. The pipeline follows the model's dual-expert denoising route, calibrates the high-noise and low-noise branches separately, protects sensitive entrance layers, and uses HiF4-style low-bit representation to improve dynamic-range coverage. Quantization is calibrated on the distilled few-step student rather than on the original long-step trajectory, reducing activation-distribution mismatch during inference. The proposed co-design keeps the quantized model close to the same-step full-precision model and surpasses the original full-precision baseline at 8 and 20 steps on average. The 20-step setting gives the best quality-efficiency trade-off in the tested configurations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向部署的压缩流程，将少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化相结合，在Wan2.2-T2V-A14B视频扩散模型上实现高效推理，在20步设置下量化模型超越原始全精度基线。
AI.motivation: 大型视频扩散模型在采样时需要大量去噪步骤和大参数驻留内存，导致部署成本高昂，如何在保持生成质量的同时显著降低计算和存储开销是当前面临的主要挑战。
AI.method: 采用少步分布匹配蒸馏与低比特量化协同设计的压缩流程：沿模型的双专家去噪路径分别校准高噪声和低噪声分支，保护敏感的入口层，并引入HiF4风格的低比特表示以提升动态范围覆盖；量化在校馏后的少步学生模型上进行而非原始长步轨迹，以减少推理时的激活分布失配。
AI.result: 协同设计的量化模型在相同步数下接近全精度模型，并在8步和20步设置下平均超越原始全精度基线；20步设置在测试配置中实现了最佳的质量-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明蒸馏与量化的联合设计能够有效压缩大型视频扩散模型并同时提升性能，为视频扩散模型的高效部署提供了可行的技术路线。

title: EvoPool: Evolutionary Programmatic Annotation for Label-Efficient Specialized Supervision
summary: Large language models excel at general tasks but underperform smaller supervised models in specialized, high-stakes domains where training labels are costly. We address this regime with EvoPool, an evolutionary multi-agent framework inspired by Darwinian evolution. Three specialized agents iteratively propose executable annotator code, a small validation set provides a fitness signal, and a deterministic gate keeps only annotators that pass viability, diversity, and marginal-contribution checks across generations. Pool votes are mapped to soft training labels by EvoAgg, a text-aware aggregator combining semantic features with annotator-vote features. The authored pool runs at near-zero per-example cost and is 4500 to 31000x faster than LLM annotation on 100K examples. Across 7 of 8 LLM-weak specialized and complex tasks spanning biomedical relation extraction, legal-clause classification, complex reasoning, and dense multi-label biomedical classification, EvoPool beats the strongest LLM annotation baseline by an average +0.141 macro-F1, peaking at +0.301 on ChemProt and +0.265 on PubMed. Code is available at: https://github.com/tianyi0216/EvoPool

AI.tldr: EvoPool提出了一种基于进化多智能体框架的标注方法，通过三个专用智能体迭代生成可执行的标注器代码，并利用确定性门控机制筛选出优秀标注器，最终通过EvoPool以近乎零成本生成的标注质量在多个专业领域任务上平均比最强LLM标注基线高0.141 macro-F1，同时速度提升4500至31000倍。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在通用任务上表现优异，但在标注成本高昂的专业高风险领域（如生物医学关系抽取、法律条款分类等）中性能不如较小的监督模型，现有LLM直接标注方法成本高且效率低，亟需一种低成本的弱监督标注方法以弥合这一差距。
AI.method: EvoPool是一个受达尔文进化启发的多智能体框架，包含三个专用智能体（提议者、验证者、门控者），它们迭代生成可执行的标注器代码；通过小型验证集提供适应度信号，确定性门控机制基于可行性、多样性和边际贡献三个检查筛选标注器；最终采用EvoPool集成器，将池中投票映射为软训练标签，EvoPool是一种文本感知的聚合器，结合了语义特征和标注器投票特征。
AI.result: 在8个LLM弱项专业任务中的7个上（涵盖生物医学关系抽取、法律条款分类、复杂推理和密集多标签生物医学分类），EvoPool平均比最强LLM标注基线高出+0.141 macro-F1，在ChemProt上提升高达+0.301，在PubMed上提升+0.265；且每样本标注成本接近零，在10万样本上比LLM标注快4500至31000倍。
AI.conclusion: EvoPool通过进化式多智能体框架实现了在专业高风险领域中对LLM标注的显著性能提升和成本降低，验证了将进化搜索与弱监督聚合相结合的有效性，为低成本高质量标注提供了新范式。

title: Can LLM Agents Sustain Long-Horizon Organizational Dynamics?
summary: Large language agents are increasingly used for social simulation, yet it remains unclear whether they can sustain coherent behavior in structured organizations, where goals must propagate through hierarchy, tasks depend on prior execution, and artifacts accumulate over long horizons. We formulate long-horizon organizational simulation as a memory-centered coordination problem and introduce TaskWeave, a hierarchical agentic framework that maintains planning states through a Formulate-Partition-Diagnose-Align cycle and grounds execution through dependency-aware trace memory. We evaluate TaskWeave in a year-long IT company simulation and compare it with other multi-agent frameworks on organizational coherence, execution grounding, and downstream enterprise NLP utility. Experiments show that TaskWeave supports coherent and long-horizon organizational dynamics while producing grounded artifacts and adapting to external environments. These findings suggest that structured simulation memory is a key mechanism for building reliable LLM-based organizational simulators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 TaskWeave，一种基于记忆中心化协调的分层智能体框架，通过 Formulate-Partition-Diagnose-Align 循环和依赖感知的痕迹记忆机制，在长期组织模拟中实现了连贯的行为与可落地的工件生成，实验表明结构化模拟记忆是构建可靠 LLM 组织模拟器的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言智能体在社交模拟中已取得进展，但在结构化组织场景中，目标需要在层级间传播、任务依赖先前执行、且工件在长时间跨度中不断积累，现有方法难以维持连贯的行为与执行落地，这一问题尚未得到系统研究。
AI.method: TaskWeave 将长期组织模拟形式化为以记忆为中心的协调问题，提出一种分层智能体框架，通过 Formulate-Partition-Diagnose-Align 循环维护规划状态，并利用依赖感知的痕迹记忆（dependency-aware trace memory）将执行过程锚定于历史依赖关系之上，从而实现目标传播与任务执行的连贯性。
AI.result: 在为期一年的 IT 公司模拟实验中，TaskWeave 在组织连贯性、执行落地性以及下游企业 NLP 任务效用上均优于其他多智能体框架，能够支持长期组织动态并生成可落地的工件，同时展现出对外部环境的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，结构化模拟记忆是实现可靠 LLM 组织模拟器的核心机制，为构建具有长期规划与执行一致性的分层智能体系统提供了重要思路与设计原则。

title: TAP-JEPA: Frozen Future-Latent Probing and Two-Stage Score Fusion for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation
comment: The runner-up solution for the Action Anticipation Challenge, EPIC-KITCHENS-100 at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026
summary: This report presents TAP-JEPA, our runner-up submission to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 (EK-100) Action Anticipation Challenge at EgoVis 2026. The task is to anticipate the next verb, noun, and verb-noun action from an egocentric clip that ends before the target action begins. Instead of fine-tuning a large video backbone, TAP-JEPA builds a compact anticipation model on frozen V-JEPA 2.1 features: a ViT-G/384 encoder extracts visible pre-action tokens, the pre-trained latent predictor estimates near-future tokens from the observed context, and both token groups are fused by attentive probes with task-specific queries for verbs, nouns, and action pairs. For the final submission, we expand supervised training with the official training split and most of the validation split, reserving a small subset for sanity checks and qualitative inspection, and adopt a two-stage score fusion that first averages eight independently initialized probe replicas within each epoch and then merges candidates from epochs 12-20 with field-dependent weights. On the official open-testing leaderboard, our sunshinesky entry achieves 27.91 percent overall action Mean Top-5 Recall (MT5R), ranking second and only 0.04 percentage points behind the top score.

AI.tldr: TAP-JEPA 提出了一种基于冻结 V-JEPA 2.1 特征的紧凑动作预期模型，通过预训练潜在预测器估计近未来令牌并采用双阶段分数融合，在 EK-100 动作预期挑战中以 27.91% MT5R 获得第二名。
AI.motivation: 现有动作预期方法通常需要微调大型视频主干网络，计算成本高且难以部署；如何在无需微调大型模型的前提下，利用预训练视觉特征高效构建紧凑的动作预期模型是一个关键问题。
AI.method: TAP-JEPA 基于冻结的 V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-G/384 编码器提取可见预动作令牌，利用预训练的潜在预测器从观测上下文估计近未来令牌，然后将两组令牌通过带有任务特定查询（动词、名词、动作对）的注意力探针进行融合；训练时采用官方训练集和大部分验证集，并实施两阶段分数融合：先平均每个 epoch 内八个独立初始化探针副本的输出，再对 epoch 12-20 的候选结果按字段依赖权重合并。
AI.result: 在 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作预期挑战赛中，TAP-JEPA 在官方开放测试排行榜上以整体动作 Mean Top-5 Recall 27.91% 排名第二，仅落后第一名 0.04 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，基于冻结的大规模视频预训练特征结合轻量级预测与融合机制，能够在无需微调大型主干网络的情况下取得极具竞争力的动作预期性能，为构建高效实用的视频理解模型提供了可行方向。

title: Easier to Mislead Than to Correct: Harmful and Beneficial Revision in LLM Conformity
summary: Large language models are increasingly used in multi-agent systems, where they see and respond to other agents' answers. A key risk is conformity: a model may abandon its own answer simply because others agree on a different one. Prior studies show that LLMs often revise toward a majority answer, but it remains unclear whether these revisions help correct mistakes as often as they introduce new errors. In this paper, we conduct a controlled study in which an LLM first answers a question, then sees simulated peer responses before making a final decision. We manipulate two social cues: consensus structure and authority labels assigned to peers, and measure how they influence beneficial and harmful revisions. Across four open-weight LLMs and seven QA datasets, we find that peer agreement makes it much easier to mislead initially correct models than to correct initially wrong ones. Authority labels make models more likely to choose the endorsed answer, regardless of whether it is correct. More concerningly, generic reasoning interventions such as chain-of-thought and reflection do not reliably reduce harmful revision while preserving beneficial revision. These findings suggest that multi-agent LLM systems should verify peer answers rather than simply aggregate them.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体LLM系统中同伴一致性（conformity）对模型决策的影响，发现与纠正错误相比，利用同伴共识更容易误导原本正确的模型，且权威标签会促使模型盲从，而链式思考等推理干预无法有效区分有益与有害修订。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多智能体系统中会看到并响应其他智能体的回答，存在盲从多数意见的风险。已有研究表明LLM倾向于向多数答案修订，但尚不清楚这些修订在纠正错误与引入新错误之间的相对频率，该论文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个受控实验框架：LLM先回答一个问题，然后观察模拟的同伴回答，最后做出最终决定。通过操纵两个社会线索——共识结构（consensus structure）和同伴的权威标签（authority labels），分别测量它们对有益修订和有害修订的影响。实验涵盖四个开源LLM和七个QA数据集。
AI.result: 实验发现：同伴共识更容易误导原本正确的模型，而纠正原本错误的模型则困难得多；权威标签使模型更倾向于选择被背书（endorsed）的答案，无论其正确与否；更令人担忧的是，链式思维（chain-of-thought）和反思（reflection）等通用推理干预无法在保留有益修订的同时可靠地减少有害修订。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，多智能体LLM系统应当对同伴答案进行验证（verify），而非简单聚合（aggregate）。盲目采纳多数意见或权威意见会显著增加得出错误答案的风险，而现有的推理增强方法难以有效区分有益与有害的社会影响。

title: Recognize Your Orchestrator: An Entropy Dynamics Perspective for LLM Multi-Agent Systems
summary: The transition from single-turn models to Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) promises enhanced problem-solving capabilities, yet the centralized orchestration topology remains a critical point of fragility. To analyze this, we propose a Mean-Field Entropy Dynamics framework, modeling the orchestration process as a system governed by the competing forces of task resolution and cumulative context loading. To facilitate validation, we introduce Inverse Workflow Generation (IWG), a multi-agent pipeline that synthesizes process-verifiable, high-complexity benchmarks with dense intermediate checkpoints. We demonstrate that our entropy dynamics model fits empirical trajectories, providing physically interpretable parameters that quantify system stability and performance collapse. Crucially, our analysis uncovers a ``Reasoning Trap": while reasoning-heavy models excel in isolated tasks, they frequently fail as orchestrators due to context squeezing. Elucidating the physical mechanisms underlying the Orchestrator and quantifying systemic uncertainty offers insights for the MASs' architectural design.

AI.tldr: 论文提出均值场熵动力学框架对多智能体系统的集中式编排过程进行建模，并通过逆工作流生成（IWG）方法合成高复杂度基准进行验证，揭示了“推理陷阱”——编排器因上下文压缩导致的性能崩溃机制，为MAS架构设计提供了物理可解释的量化分析工具。
AI.motivation: 从单轮模型向多智能体系统（MAS）的转型虽然增强了问题求解能力，但集中式编排拓扑结构仍然是系统脆弱性的关键来源，现有方法缺乏对编排过程内在物理机制的量化分析与理论建模。
AI.method: 提出均值场熵动力学（Mean-Field Entropy Dynamics）框架，将编排过程建模为由任务求解与累积上下文加载两种竞争力量驱动的系统；同时引入逆工作流生成（IWG）多智能体流水线，用于合成具有密集中间检查点且过程可验证的高复杂度基准。
AI.result: 熵动力学模型能够拟合实验轨迹，提供量化系统稳定性与性能崩溃的物理可解释参数；分析揭示出“推理陷阱”现象：推理密集型模型在孤立任务中表现优异，但在作为编排器时因上下文压缩（context squeezing）而频繁失败。
AI.conclusion: 阐明编排器背后的物理机制并量化系统不确定性，为多智能体系统的架构设计提供了结构性洞见和指导原则。

title: T-CLIP: Enabling Thermal Perception for Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining
summary: Thermal imaging offers a powerful alternative to visible-spectrum vision under challenging conditions such as low illumination and adverse weather, yet foundational vision-language models like CLIP fail to align thermal images with textual descriptions due to a fundamental thermal perception gap. We identify three major challenges: the lack of captioned thermal datasets, the inability of standard LLMs to reason about thermal phenomena, and a key representational challenge in thermal imaging where global scene context and object-level heat signatures conflict when learned together in a single embedding space. To address these, we introduce IR-Cap, the first physics-aware thermal captioning pipeline and dataset providing complementary global and fine-grained thermal descriptions across three public benchmarks, and T-CLIP, a decoupled dual-LoRA framework that independently adapts CLIP for scene-level and object-level thermal understanding. T-CLIP achieves consistent improvements over all baselines across three thermal benchmarks in cross-modal retrieval, and we provide an exploratory demonstration of its applicability to text-conditioned thermal image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 IR-Cap 热成像描述数据集与 T-CLIP 解耦双 LoRA 框架，分别从场景级和物体级适应 CLIP 以弥合热红外与可见光视觉语言模型之间的感知鸿沟，在跨模态检索等任务上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 热成像在低光照与恶劣天气下具有优势，但现有视觉语言模型如 CLIP 无法对齐热红外图像与文本描述，原因在于缺乏带标注的热成像数据集、标准 LLM 无法推理热物理现象，以及全局场景上下文与物体级热信号在同一嵌入空间中难以共存的核心表征冲突。
AI.method: 本文提出 IR-Cap 物理感知热成像描述流水线与数据集，提供跨三个公开基准的全局与细粒度热描述；同时提出 T-CLIP，一种解耦双 LoRA 框架，独立地针对场景级和物体级热理解分别适配 CLIP，从而避免单一嵌入空间中的表征冲突。
AI.result: T-CLIP 在三个热成像基准的跨模态检索任务上相较于所有基线方法取得一致提升，并在文本条件热图像生成任务上展示了初步的应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过物理感知数据构建与解耦双 LoRA 适配框架，系统性地弥合了热红外与可见光视觉语言模型间的感知鸿沟，为热成像在跨模态理解与生成任务中的应用提供了有效方案。

title: Encoded but Not Routed: Explaining the Table-Chart Gap in Scientific Claim Verification
summary: Multimodal LLMs are increasingly used to assist scientific peer review, where a core requirement is verifying whether claims in a paper are supported by its evidence. Prior work has shown that models perform substantially better at this task when the evidence is a table than when it is a chart of the same underlying data. This raises the question of whether models fail to extract information from charts, or do they extract it but fail to use it when forming their prediction? We study this question through layer-wise linear probing and attention analysis on three open-weight VLMs over table and chart evidence, representing the same underlying data. We find consistent evidence for the latter. Chart information is encoded in the models' intermediate representations but does not reach the prediction position, a gap that is absent for tables and holds across all conditions tested. Attention analysis further reveals that this disconnect takes two architecturally distinct forms across model families. These findings reframe the table-chart gap as a failure of how encoded visual information is routed at prediction time, rather than a failure of encoding itself.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过层间线性探针和注意力分析发现，多模态大语言模型在科学同行评审中处理图表证据时的表现劣于表格，并非由于无法从图表中提取信息，而是因为提取到的视觉信息未被有效路由至预测位置，即编码成功但推理时访问失败。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在辅助科学同行评审时需要验证论文中的声明是否被证据支持，但现有工作发现模型在证据为表格时表现显著优于同一数据以图表呈现的情况。此前尚不清楚这一差距源于模型无法从图表中提取信息，还是提取了信息却未能在预测时有效利用，本文旨在厘清这一根本性问题。
AI.method: 本文在三种开源视觉语言模型上，针对同一底层数据分别以表格和图表形式呈现的证据，采用层间线性探针（layer-wise linear probing）和注意力分析两种方法，研究了模型中间层表示中图表信息的编码情况以及信息向预测位置的传递路径。
AI.result: 实验一致发现，图表信息被编码在模型的中间层表示中，但未能传递到预测位置的表示中，而这一缺失在表格证据中并不存在，且在所有测试条件下均成立。注意力分析进一步揭示，这一信息传递失败在不同模型族中表现为两种架构上不同的形式。
AI.conclusion: 表格与图表之间的性能差距本质上并非编码失败，而是编码后的视觉信息在预测时刻的路由失败。该发现将问题从"模型能否提取图表信息"重新定义为"模型能否在推理时正确访问已编码的视觉信息"，为改进多模态模型在科学文献理解中的表现提供了新的研究方向。

title: FlowTime: Towards Continuous Generative Watch Time Prediction via Flow-based Personalized Priors
summary: Watch time has emerged as a pivotal metric for optimizing deep user engagement in short-video recommender systems. However, current methods of watch time prediction (WTP) suffer from inherent paradigm-specific limitations. Direct Regression faces mean-collapse due to unimodal Gaussian assumptions, while Ordinal Regression is hampered by quantization errors from rigid discretization. Similarly, Discrete Generative Regression struggles with high inference latency and heuristic vocabulary design. Beyond these specific flaws, a shared deficiency is the inability to capture the intrinsic multimodality and heterogeneity of User-Item Interaction Patterns. To address these challenges, we first revisit the WTP problem from a causal perspective and identify these user-specific patterns as structural confounders that modulate watch time outcomes, where identical interests manifest as distinct watch time outcomes conditioned on diverse user habits. Then, we formally propose a new (or the fourth) paradigm -- Continuous Generative Regression, and introduce FlowTime, a novel method utilizing a One-step Generative Variational Autoencoder. FlowTime effectively circumvents the latency of iterative denoising while maintaining the expressivity of continuous latent spaces. Furthermore, we design a Flow-based Personalized Prior that leverages NFs to warp a standard Gaussian prior into a complex, history-conditioned manifold, thereby enabling the adaptive modeling of multimodal interaction patterns. Finally, we build TimeRec, the first open-source WTP Library, alongside a novel personalization metric to establish a rigorous benchmarking standard. Extensive offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate FlowTime's significant superiority over SOTA methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowTime，一种基于一步生成变分自编码器的新型连续生成回归范式，用于短视频推荐系统中的观看时间预测。FlowTime通过流式个性化先验建模用户-物品交互模式的多模态性和异质性，在离线实验和在线A/B测试中显著超越了现有方法，并开源了首个WTP标准库TimeRec。
AI.motivation: 现有观看时间预测方法存在范式级局限性：直接回归因单峰高斯假设导致均值坍塌，序数回归因刚性离散化引入量化误差，离散生成回归面临高推理延迟和启发式词汇设计问题。更深层的共性是这些方法均无法捕获用户-物品交互模式内在的多模态性和异质性，而本文从因果视角将其识别为调节观看时间结果的结构性混杂因素。
AI.method: 本文提出连续生成回归新范式及FlowTime方法，核心采用一步生成变分自编码器，通过避免迭代去噪过程消除推理延迟，同时保留连续潜在空间的表达能力。进一步设计了基于流的个性化先验，利用归一化流将标准高斯先验扭曲为复杂的历史条件流形，从而实现对多模态交互模式的自适应建模。此外，本文开源了首个WTP标准库TimeRec并设计了新的个性化评估指标。
AI.result: 大量离线实验和在线A/B测试表明，FlowTime在观看时间预测任务上显著优于现有最先进方法，同时解决了直接回归的均值坍塌、序数回归的量化误差以及离散生成回归的高延迟与启发式设计等问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文从因果视角重新审视WTP问题，揭示了用户特定交互模式作为结构混杂因素的调节作用，并提出了连续生成回归范式作为统一解决方案。FlowTime在保持低延迟的同时实现了对多模态用户交互模式的有效建模，为短视频推荐系统中的深度用户参与优化提供了新的理论框架与实践基准。

title: FROST-STA: Frozen Dense Features for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation
summary: Short-term anticipation in egocentric video requires more than recognizing the current scene: a system must infer which object the camera wearer will contact, which action will follow, and how soon the contact will happen. This report describes FROST-STA, our submission to the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation (STA) Challenge at EgoVis 2026. For each query time, the model produces a ranked set of structured hypotheses containing an active-object box, noun label, verb label, time-to-contact (TTC), and confidence. FROST-STA builds on the V-JEPA 2.1 STA evaluation protocol, but adapts it to the challenge by using object-centric decoding, multi-head prediction, and a submission-oriented training and ensembling recipe. We keep the V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-G backbone fixed and extract two dense token streams: video tokens from a short clip resized to 384 pixels before the query, and image tokens from the last observed high-resolution frame. A compact alignment module, consisting of an attentive probe and frame-guided temporal pooling, maps the clip representation onto the spatial reference of the final frame before fusing it with image features. The fused maps are decoded by Faster R-CNN-style STA heads that estimate box offsets, nouns, verbs, TTC values, and interaction quality. For the final leaderboard entry, we train for 25 epochs with the official training split plus additional permitted validation annotations, and combine predictions across eight heads and checkpoints from epochs 15-25. FROST-STA obtains 5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP on the official test server, ranking second in the challenge and showing that frozen dense image-video features can serve as a strong basis for object-level interaction forecasting.

AI.tldr: FROST-STA 基于 V-JEPA 2.1 的冻结 ViT-G 骨干，通过对象中心解码、多头预测和集成训练策略，在 Ego4D STA 挑战赛中以 5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP 取得第二名，证明了冻结密集图像-视频特征可作为物体级交互预测的强基础。
AI.motivation: 第一人称视频中的短期交互预测不仅需要识别当前场景，还需推断佩戴者将接触哪个物体、执行何种动作以及接触何时发生，现有方法在结构化预测多模态输出（目标框、名词、动词、接触时间）方面仍有挑战。
AI.method: FROST-STA 冻结 V-JEPA 2.1 的 ViT-G 骨干，提取稀疏视频令牌（384分辨率短片段）和密集图像令牌（最后高分辨率帧），通过包含注意力探针和帧引导时序池化的对齐模块将视频表示映射到末帧空间参考上，再与图像特征融合，最后用 Faster R-CNN 风格的 STA 头部解码框偏移、名词、动词、接触时间和交互质量；训练 25 轮，集成 8 个头部和 15-25 轮的检查点。
AI.result: FROST-STA 在官方测试集上取得 5.13 Overall Top-5 mAP，在 EgoVis 2026 Ego4D STA 挑战赛中位列第二。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，冻结的密集图像-视频特征通过合理的对齐与解码设计，能够为物体级交互预测提供强基础，为后续在无需大规模视频微调的情况下提升第一人称预测性能提供了可行性方向。

title: THRD: A Training-Free Multi-Turn Defense Framework for Jailbreak Attacks on Large Language Models
summary: Multi-turn jailbreak attacks pose a growing threat to LLMs by exploiting conversational dynamics such as gradual escalation and cross-turn coordination. Existing defenses either rely on costly retraining -- often degrading model utility -- or apply single-turn analysis independently at each turn, failing to capture how risk accumulates along interaction trajectories. We observe that safety behavior in multi-turn interaction is trajectory-dependent: dialogue history continuously reshapes the model's conditioning context, making it insufficient to evaluate each turn in isolation. Motivated by this insight, we present THRD, the first training-free framework that explicitly models temporal risk accumulation for multi-turn jailbreak defense. THRD integrates four modules: a Turn-level Risk Assessor (TRA) for instantaneous risk estimation, a Historical Context Analyzer (HCA) for cross-turn intent escalation detection, a Response Evaluator (RE) for identifying facilitative outputs, and a Decision Module that combines these signals through a time-evolving scoring mechanism with attenuation-based modulation and trend-aware adjustment. Experiments against state-of-the-art multi-turn attacks -- including tree-search-based and multi-agent collaborative methods -- across two target models show that THRD reduces ASR to 0.2--4.0% while preserving model utility within 1.5% degradation on MMLU and GSM8K. Ablation studies confirm non-redundant module contributions and stable cross-architecture generalization. Analysis of first rejection triggers reveals that over 70% of multi-turn attacks require Turn~2 or later to detect, validating the necessity of explicit temporal aggregation.

AI.tldr: THRD是一个无需训练的防御框架，通过对多轮对话中的时间风险累积进行显式建模，将越狱攻击的成功率降低至0.2–4.0%，同时将模型效用损失控制在1.5%以内。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法要么依赖代价高昂的重新训练且会降低模型效用，要么在每轮对话中独立进行单轮分析，无法捕捉多轮交互中风险沿轨迹累积的动态特性。多轮越狱攻击利用对话的动态演化特性（如逐步升级、跨轮协调）对LLM构成日益增长的威胁，而安全行为本质上具有轨迹依赖性——对话历史持续重塑模型的上下文条件，使得孤立评估每一轮是否安全变得不足。
AI.method: THRD包含四个模块：轮次风险评估器（TRA）用于即时风险估计，历史上下文分析器（HCA）用于跨轮意图升级检测，响应评估器（RE）用于识别助长越狱的输出，以及一个决策模块，通过带有衰减调制和趋势感知调整的时间演化评分机制综合上述信号。该框架无需训练，直接对多轮交互中的时间风险累积进行显式建模。
AI.result: 在针对包括基于树搜索和多智能体协作方法在内的最先进多轮越狱攻击的实验中，THRD将攻击成功率降至0.2–4.0%，同时在MMLU和GSM8K上模型效用退化不超过1.5%。消融研究证实了各模块的非冗余贡献以及跨架构的稳定泛化能力。首次拒绝触发分析表明，超过70%的多轮攻击需要到第2轮或更晚才能被检测到，验证了显式时间聚合的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，显式地对多轮对话中的时间风险累积进行建模是实现高效且无损效用的多轮越狱防御的关键。超过70%的攻击仅在第2轮及之后才被首次检测到，这强烈验证了跨轮次时间聚合的必要性。THRD作为首个无需训练的多轮越狱防御框架，为构建更安全的交互式LLM系统提供了可落地的有效方案。

title: Early Diagnosis of Wasted Computation in Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Failure-Aware Observability
summary: Tool-using multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems spend computation through model tokens, tool calls, retries, and code execution before producing an answer. When a run fails, final-answer evaluation reveals the endpoint but usually not the point at which the trajectory stopped making recoverable progress. This paper introduces a failure-aware observability framework for diagnosing wasted computation in multi-agent LLM traces. The framework maps recurring failure modes to online trace signals, including tool reliability, execution recovery, orchestration loops, evidence availability, information change, and budget pressure. We instantiate the framework in a three- agent question-answering system and evaluate it on 165 GAIA validation traces under identical execution caps. Operational failures remain common: 22/53 level-1 runs, 33/86 level-2 runs, and 12/26 level-3 runs fail to produce a usable final answer. The traces expose different mechanisms behind these outcomes, including insufficient evidence, repeated-action loops, max-step termination, tool-failure streaks, and execution calls that succeed without useful output. Mean token use rises from 8,152 tokens at level 1 to 16,389 tokens at level 3, while evidence availability and sentence-level support diverge. A cached 10-trace LLM-judge grounding audit shows that cheap online signals and deeper semantic metrics capture complementary layers of failure. The results position failure-aware observability as a diagnostic layer between raw execution logs and final-answer accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向多智能体LLM系统的故障感知可观测性框架，通过将反复出现的故障模式映射到在线追踪信号，在原始执行日志与最终答案准确性之间建立诊断层，揭示计算浪费的根源。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统在生成答案前会消耗大量计算资源（模型token、工具调用、重试和代码执行），但现有的最终答案评估只能判断运行是否失败，无法定位轨迹在何处停止产生可恢复的进展，缺乏对无效计算浪费的细粒度诊断能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个故障感知可观察性框架，将反复出现的故障模式映射到在线追踪信号，包括工具可靠性、执行恢复、编排循环、证据可用性、信息变化和预算压力；框架被实例化到一个三智能体问答系统中，并在165条GAIA验证集轨迹上以相同的执行上限进行评估。
AI.result: 运行故障普遍存在：53条L1轨迹中22条失败，86条L2轨迹中33条失败，26条L3轨迹中12条失败；失败机制包括证据不足、重复动作循环、最大步数终止、工具故障连续出现以及调用成功但输出无用；平均token使用量从L1的8,152增加到L3的16,389；基于10条轨迹的缓存LLM评判审计表明，廉价在线信号与深层语义指标可捕获互补的故障层。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在原始执行日志与最终答案准确性之间建立了有效的诊断层，能够区分不同类型的计算浪费机制，且廉价在线信号与深层语义分析提供了互补的故障诊断视角，为提升多智能体系统效率提供了可操作的观察基础。

title: CASTLE2026 Team WDL Technical Report
summary: The CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026 evaluates long-form egocentric video question answering over 600+ hours of multi-perspective recordings. Each four-choice question requires evidence from videos, transcripts, auxiliary photos, people, days, rooms, and temporal context. We propose an evidence-aware multimodal reasoning pipeline based on Qwen. Our system parses question hints, retrieves ASR chunks, attaches auxiliary images, samples candidate video frames, and routes questions into static visual, speech/text, temporal, and mixed types with specialized prompts. Multiple inference passes are aggregated by confidence-weighted voting and converted into the official Codabench format. In ablation, LoRA improves the score from 0.21 to 0.50, and more sampled frames further raise it to 0.58. Our final system ranks first in the CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Qwen的感知增强多模态推理流水线，在CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026的长时程自我中心视频问答任务中取得第一名，通过提示解析、ASR检索、辅助图像附着、候选帧采样及置信度加权投票等模块，将LoRA得分从0.21提升至0.58。
AI.motivation: 长时程自我中心视频问答涉及超过600小时的多视角录制，每个四选一问题需要同时从视频、文本、辅助照片、人物、日期、房间及时间上下文等多源异构证据中进行推理，现有方法难以有效整合如此多样化的信息并实现高精度作答。
AI.method: 本文设计了一套基于Qwen的感知增强多模态推理流水线：首先解析问题中的提示线索，检索相关的ASR语音片段并附着辅助图像；然后对候选视频帧进行采样，将问题路由至静态视觉、语音/文本、时空及混合四种类型，每种类型使用专门的提示模板；最后通过多次推理的置信度加权投票进行结果聚合，并转换为Codabench官方提交格式。
AI.result: 在消融实验中，使用LoRA微调将得分从0.21提升至0.50，增加采样帧数后进一步将得分提升至0.58。最终系统在CASTLE Challenge @ EgoVis 2026中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过精细化的多模态信息路由和融合策略，结合LoRA微调与更多帧采样，能够显著提升长时程自我中心视频问答的性能，为复杂时空多模态推理任务提供了有效的技术路径。

title: Construction of Historical Knowledge Graphs Based on BERT and Graph Neural Networks
summary: Through digital humanities research and scale-up historical data analysis, a significant amount of traditional historical text is converted into structured knowledge graphs. This paper provides a high-level architecture that combines bidirectional encoder representations of transformers (BERT) and graph neural networks (GNN) to extract the entities and relationships from various types of historical texts. The texts of traditional history resolve linguistic ambiguities, references limited by context, and a lack of established grammatical norms in a systematic way. This study develops a new image retrieval system based on FastRQNet and pre-trained vision-language model Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet in accordance with the aforementioned recommendations. The experiments make full use of a comprehensive collection of municipal records, parliamentary documents, and historical correspondence. When compared to conventional rule-based techniques and other popular deep-learning baselines, the joint BERT-GNN system obtains greater Precision, Recall, and F1-score (Table 2). Complex nested structures and implicit reference issues can be handled by this structure with sufficient accuracy and thoroughness when creating knowledge graphs. The aforementioned experiments show that combining relational graph learning algorithms with context-sensitive semantic representation techniques can automatically extract historical data to add accumulated wisdom to the knowledge repository.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合BERT与图神经网络（GNN）的高层架构，用于从各类历史文本中提取实体和关系以构建知识图谱，并基于FastRQNet和Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet开发了图像检索系统；实验表明该方法在精度、召回率和F1分数上优于传统规则方法和深度学习方法，能够有效处理嵌套结构和隐式指代问题。
AI.motivation: 传统历史文本在数字化转换过程中面临语言歧义、上下文引用受限以及缺乏规范语法规则等系统性难题，现有的规则方法和深度学习基线难以充分处理复杂嵌套结构和隐式指代问题，亟需一种能够结合语义上下文感知与关系图学习的自动提取方法。
AI.method: 本研究提出了一种高层架构，集成双向编码器表示变换器（BERT）与图神经网络（GNN）用于历史文本中的实体和关系提取；同时开发了基于FastRQNet和预训练视觉-语言模型Vilt-qaformer+RoBInet的图像检索系统。实验数据涵盖市政记录、议会文件和历史信函等综合历史文献集合。
AI.result: 与传统的规则方法及其他流行的深度学习基线相比，所提出的联合BERT-GNN系统在精度、召回率和F1分数上均取得了更优表现（见表2），且能够以足够的准确性和全面性处理复杂嵌套结构和隐式指代问题，成功构建知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明，将关系图学习算法与上下文敏感的语义表示技术相结合，能够实现对历史数据的自动提取，为知识库积累增量智慧；该工作为数字人文研究和大规模历史数据分析提供了一种有效的技术路径。

title: Self-Healing Agentic Orchestrators for Reliable Tool-Augmented Large Language Model Systems
summary: Tool-augmented large language model (LLM) agents rely on orchestration layers that coordinate planning, retrieval, tool invocation, validation, memory, and recovery. In these systems, failures arise not only from model errors, but also from orchestration-level issues such as tool timeouts, malformed arguments, stale context, contradictory evidence, retry loops, and unverified intermediate outputs. This paper presents a self-healing agentic orchestrator that treats reliability as a bounded runtime control problem. The orchestrator maps observable failure signals to inferred failure classes, selects targeted recovery actions under explicit budgets, verifies recovered trajectories, and records observability traces. We evaluate the approach on a 100-task controlled fault-injection benchmark against static workflow, retry-only, ReAct-style, and full-replanning baselines. Self-healing achieves 98.8\% task success, compared with 94.5\% for retry-only and 93.8\% for full replanning. A matched recovery-budget sweep shows that self-healing outperforms retry-only and full replanning at every tested budget, with the largest gap under a single recovery attempt: 94.0\% versus 85.3\% and 88.2\%, respectively. Under a controlled semantic silent-failure setting, verifier-guided self-healing reduces silent failures to 0.0\%, while non-verifying baselines return wrong-but-plausible outputs more often. A compact model-in-the-loop validation shows that the same recovery mechanism can operate when a live tool-calling model performs tool selection, argument generation, and answer synthesis over local fault-injected tools. These results provide controlled evidence that failure-aware, budgeted, and verification-guided orchestration improves reliability and diagnosability in tool-augmented LLM systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自愈型智能编排器（self-healing agentic orchestrator），将可靠性视为有界运行时控制问题，通过故障信号分类、预算约束的恢复行动、验证及可观测性追踪，在工具增强型LLM系统中实现98.8%的任务成功率，显著优于重试和完全重规划等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 工具增强型大语言模型（LLM）智能体的编排层面临多种非模型错误导致的故障，包括工具超时、参数格式异常、上下文过时、矛盾证据、重试循环及未经验证的中间输出等，现有方法缺乏对这类编排级系统性故障的显式处理与可控恢复机制。
AI.method: 论文提出一种自愈型智能编排器，将可靠性建模为有界运行时控制问题：编排器将观测到的故障信号映射为推断的故障类别，在显式预算约束下选择针对性的恢复动作，验证恢复后的轨迹，并记录可观测性追踪信息，从而实现对工具增强型LLM系统的容错与自愈。
AI.result: 在包含100个任务的受控故障注入基准上，自愈编排器达到98.8%的任务成功率，而重试仅为94.5%，完全重规划为93.8%。在匹配恢复预算的扫掠实验中，自愈方法在所有预算水平下均优于重试和完全重规划，单次恢复尝试下差距最大（94.0% vs 85.3%和88.2%）。在语义静默故障设置下，验证器引导的自愈将静默故障降至0.0%，而非验证基线产生更多看似正确但实际错误的输出。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了受控实验证据，表明故障感知、预算约束及验证引导的编排策略能够显著提升工具增强型LLM系统的可靠性与可诊断性，同时紧凑的模型内验证实验表明该恢复机制在真实在线工具调用场景下同样有效。

title: Head-Pose-Aware Visual Speech Recognition with FiLM Modulation
summary: Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) aims to recognize speech from visual cues such as lip movements, but its performance is fundamentally limited by viseme ambiguity and pose-induced variations that introduce geometric distortions and occlusions. Existing approaches mainly rely on linguistic context or implicit invariance, leaving visual representations insufficiently robust under non-frontal views. In this work, we propose a pose-aware phoneme-level framework, termed HP-VSR-ResFiLM, that explicitly incorporates head-pose information into visual feature extraction. The proposed framework adopts a two-stage pipeline consisting of a pose-conditioned visual encoder in Stage 1 and a pretrained NLLB language model in Stage 2 for phoneme-to-text reconstruction. Specifically, Stage 1 incorporates a pose-conditioned residual Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) block after the 2D CNN frontend to adaptively refine visual representations using head-pose information. Experiments on LRS2 and LRS3 demonstrate that HP-VSR-ResFiLM achieves competitive performance under comparable training conditions, attaining word error rates (WER) of 25.0% and 33.2%, respectively, without relying on additional training data. Ablation studies further show that a single residual FiLM block consistently improves overall WER, while deeper modulation at Layers 3 and 4 provides larger gains for samples with yaw angles greater than 30° without degrading performance for smaller pose variations. These findings demonstrate that explicit pose-aware feature modulation offers an effective and computationally efficient solution for improving VSR robustness in unconstrained settings.

AI.tldr: 提出HP-VSR-ResFiLM，一种显式融入头部姿态信息的视觉语音识别框架，通过在视觉编码器中引入姿态条件残差FiLM模块，在不依赖额外训练数据的情况下，在LRS2和LRS3上分别取得25.0%和33.2%的词错误率，有效提升了非正面视角下的VSR鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语音识别（VSR）性能受到视素模糊和姿态变化引入的几何畸变与遮挡的根本限制，现有方法主要依赖语言上下文或隐式不变性学习，未能显式处理头部姿态变化导致的视觉表征退化问题，在非正面视角下视觉表征的鲁棒性严重不足。
AI.method: 提出HP-VSR-ResFiLM框架，采用两阶段流水线：阶段一构建姿态条件视觉编码器，在2D CNN前端之后引入姿态条件残差特征线性调制（FiLM）模块，利用头部姿态信息自适应地细化视觉特征；阶段二使用预训练的NLLB语言模型进行音素到文本的重建。
AI.result: 在LRS2和LRS3数据集上，HP-VSR-ResFiLM分别取得25.0%和33.2%的词错误率，在可比训练条件下达到竞争性性能且无需额外训练数据；消融实验表明，单个残差FiLM模块即可持续改善整体WER，在Layer 3和Layer 4处进行更深层调制对偏航角大于30°的样本带来更大增益且不降低小姿态变化样本的性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式姿态感知特征调制为提升非约束场景下VSR鲁棒性提供了一种有效且计算高效的解决方案，证明了将头部姿态信息以条件调制方式显式融入视觉特征提取是一条优于隐式不变性学习的可行路径。

title: HarnessForge: Joint Harness and Policy Evolution for Adaptive Agent Systems
summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected to operate across heterogeneous task regimes that require distinct execution paradigms. This challenges fixed agent systems and motivates system-level meta-adaptation beyond isolated component updates. While existing works have adapted external harness or trained underlying reasoning policies, full-system adaptation remains insufficiently characterized. The adaptation space between structure and execution is rarely made explicit, and the compatibility between the external harness and the internal reasoner is not optimized jointly. We propose HarnessForge, a meta-adaptive framework for evolving LLM agent systems. HarnessForge formulates an agent system as a harness--policy pair, defining a stable adaptation space that separates harness-level execution structure from policy-level reasoning behavior. It then performs harness--policy co-evolution through fault-guided harness tailoring and harness-conditioned policy alignment. Experiments across five benchmarks from diverse domains show that HarnessForge consistently improves both Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B backbones, outperforming harness-only and policy-only baselines with gains of up to 12.0\% over the strongest baseline and achieving favorable rollout-efficiency tradeoffs, demonstrating that harness--policy co-evolution is effective, and that executable compatibility between the harness and reasoning policy is essential for agent-system adaptation. The code is available at https://github.com/mingju-c/HarnessForge.

AI.tldr: 提出HarnessForge，一种元自适应框架，通过将LLM智能体系统形式化为执行结构（harness）与推理策略（policy）的联合体，并执行故障引导的harness剪枝与策略对齐的协同进化，在多个基准上一致提升性能，验证了执行结构与推理策略的协同优化对智能体系统自适应至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体系统在面对跨异构任务场景时缺乏系统级元自适应能力，既有方法仅对执行外壳或底层推理策略进行独立更新，未充分刻画结构与执行之间的自适应空间，且外部执行结构与内部推理器之间的兼容性未被联合优化。
AI.method: 将智能体系统形式化为harness–policy对，其中harness定义执行结构，policy定义推理行为；通过故障引导的harness剪枝（fault-guided harness tailoring）优化执行结构，再通过harness条件化的策略对齐（harness-conditioned policy alignment）使推理策略与剪枝后的执行结构兼容，实现两者的协同进化。
AI.result: 在涵盖不同领域的五个基准上，以Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B为骨干，HarnessForge一致优于仅优化harness或仅优化policy的基线，最高比最强基线提升12.0%，并实现了有利的部署效率-性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: 执行结构（harness）与推理策略（policy）的协同进化是有效的，且两者之间的可执行兼容性对于智能体系统自适应至关重要，为全系统级元自适应提供了明确的形式化框架与优化路径。

title: Dive into Ambiguity: A*-Inspired Multi-Agents Commonsense Obfuscation Attack on LLM Prompts
summary: Large language models (LLMs) excel in reasoning and knowledge-intensive tasks but remain vulnerable to prompt-level adversarial attacks that preserve intent while triggering commonsense hallucinations. This vulnerability is urgent, as LLMs are rapidly integrated into safety-critical domains where factual reliability is non-negotiable. Existing attack methods either lack efficiency or fail to capture the adaptive strategies of real-world adversaries. We propose an A*-inspired Factual Error Induction Framework, a framework for generating semantically aligned yet obfuscated prompts. At its core is a Hierarchical Rewrite Strategy guided by a dynamic semantic dispersion coefficient $γ$ that balances conservative edits early with aggressive obfuscations later, following a reverse simulated annealing schedule. To enhance interpretability, we further introduce Agentic Mechanism Labeling, which discovers and refines adversarial mechanisms, offering interpretable reverse optimization. Theoretically, we prove that prompt rewriting follows a contractive recurrence, leading to semantic collapse as $γ$ decreases. Empirically, across diverse LLMs, our method achieves higher attack success rates than exhaustive exploration while requiring fewer attempts, demonstrating both efficiency and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于A*启发式搜索的事实错误诱导框架，通过分层重写策略和动态语义分散系数生成语义保持但诱发幻觉的对抗提示，在多种大语言模型上实现了更高的攻击成功率和更低的查询效率。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理和知识密集型任务中表现优异，但极易受到保持语义意图的提示级对抗攻击，从而触发常识性幻觉。现有攻击方法要么效率低下，要么无法捕捉真实对手的适应策略，这一问题在LLM被部署于安全关键领域时尤为紧迫。
AI.method: 提出A*启发式事实错误诱导框架，核心为分层重写策略，该策略由一个动态语义分散系数γ引导，采用反向模拟退火调度，在早期偏向保守编辑、后期转向激进混淆。此外，引入Agentic Mechanism Labeling机制，通过可解释的逆向优化发现并提炼对抗机制，理论部分证明提示重写遵循压缩递归，随γ减小会导致语义坍缩。
AI.result: 在多种大语言模型上的实验表明，该方法在比穷举探索所需尝试更少的情况下，实现了更高的攻击成功率，验证了其在效率和有效性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了大语言模型在面对语义保持型对抗攻击时的脆弱性，提供了一种高效且可解释的对抗攻击框架，为理解LLM幻觉的触发机制和提升事实可靠性提供了新思路。

title: FlowOVD: Learning Generative Latent Flows for Zero-shot Open-vocabulary Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) has achieved remarkable progress through large-scale vision-language pre-training. Existing methods, however, typically formulate OVD as a discriminative prediction problem, where decoder queries are either static or initialized from encoder features, thus limiting their diversity and flexibility. In this paper, we introduce a generative perspective by modeling decoder query generation as a continuous transport process in latent space. We propose FlowOVD, a text-conditioned query generation framework based on rectified flow that progressively transforms text-agnostic queries into text-guided queries. By introducing continuous latent query dynamics into a vision-language model (VLM) based detector, our method avoids heuristic discrete query construction and enables more expressive semantic alignment for open-vocabulary detection. Without requiring additional training data, FlowOVD achieves 49.5 AP on COCO and 31.5 AP on LVIS, outperforming GroundingDINO by +1.2 AP (+2.5 %) and +4.1 AP (+15.0 %), respectively. The larger gain on the challenging long-tailed LVIS benchmark further highlights the effectiveness of continuous query generation for open-vocabulary generalization.

AI.tldr: FlowOVD提出一种基于整流流（rectified flow）的文本条件查询生成框架，将开放词汇目标检测中的解码器查询生成建模为连续传输过程，在无需额外训练数据的情况下，在COCO和LVIS上分别达到49.5 AP和31.5 AP，显著优于GroundingDINO。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法通常将问题建模为判别式预测，解码器查询要么是静态的，要么从编码器特征初始化，导致查询的多样性和灵活性受限；本文旨在克服这种启发式离散查询构造的局限性，通过引入连续潜空间传输过程实现更灵活、更具表现力的查询生成。
AI.method: 本文提出FlowOVD，一种基于整流流（rectified flow）的文本条件查询生成框架，将解码器查询生成建模为潜空间中的连续传输过程，逐步将文本无关的查询转换为文本引导的查询；通过将连续潜查询动力学引入基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的检测器中，实现了更具表达力的语义对齐，避免了启发式离散查询构造。
AI.result: 在不使用额外训练数据的情况下，FlowOVD在COCO上达到49.5 AP，在更具挑战性的长尾分布LVIS基准上达到31.5 AP，分别比GroundingDINO高出1.2 AP（+2.5%）和4.1 AP（+15.0%），在长尾分布场景中优势尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 连续查询生成机制能够有效提升开放词汇检测的泛化能力，尤其是在长尾分布和小样本类别上表现突出；这表明将生成式视角引入检测器查询设计是一条有前景的方向，为开放词汇检测提供了新的技术范式。

title: ProbeScale: Probing Analysis to Optimize Neural Scaling Laws for Efficient Small Language Model Inference
summary: Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a balance between capability and computational feasibility. Neural scaling laws inform their optimal training, suggesting that they possess rich internal representations that scale with their size. However, deploying even these SLMs can be challenging under strict resource constraints. Language model probing provides methods for analyzing the linguistic knowledge encoded in a model's internals. We propose ProbScale, a framework that unifies insights from scaling laws and probing to identify parameter-efficient subnetworks within pre-trained SLMs. ProbScale utilizes the high-quality representations of well-scaled SLMs and uses task-specific probes to mathematically quantify the relevance of each layer for target downstream capabilities. This allows selecting subnetworks that optimally trade off performance against parameter size. We formulate the subnetwork selection as finding a layer subset maximizing aggregated, task-weighted probe performance under a parameter budget. Experiments on representative SLMs such as RoBERTa-Large and T5-Base demonstrate that ProbScale identifies subnetworks achieving significant parameter reduction, from 5 to 10 times, while maintaining high performance (95% to 98% of the original SLMs) on targeted tasks, outperforming heuristic baselines.

AI.tldr: ProbScale提出了一种结合神经缩放定律和语言模型探针分析的框架，能够在预训练小语言模型中识别参数高效的子网络，在保持原始模型95%-98%性能的前提下实现5到10倍的参数压缩。
AI.motivation: 尽管小语言模型（SLM）在能力与计算可行性之间取得了平衡，但在严格资源约束下部署即使这些SLM仍然具有挑战性，而现有方法未能有效利用缩放定律揭示的SLM内部丰富表征来指导参数高效的子网络选择。
AI.method: ProbScale框架首先利用任务特定的探针（probes）从数学上量化预训练SLM中每一层对目标下游能力的相关性，然后将子网络选择形式化为在参数预算约束下最大化聚合的、任务加权探针性能的层子集优化问题，从而在保证高质量表征的前提下实现参数效率与性能的最优权衡。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-Large和T5-Base等代表性SLM上的实验表明，ProbScale识别的子网络在目标任务上实现了5到10倍的参数缩减，同时保持了原始模型95%至98%的性能，显著优于启发式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ProbScale验证了结合缩放定律与探针分析进行结构化剪枝的有效性，证明了在充分缩放的小语言模型中，通过任务感知的层选择可以大幅压缩模型规模而几乎不损失性能，为资源受限场景下的模型部署提供了实用框架。

title: TERRA: Task-Embedded Reasoning and Representation Architecture for Cross-Domain Applications
summary: A single action-conditioned latent predictive architecture can in principle be trained on the structured state of a driving scene, a robot workspace, or a financial order book. The ingredients for doing so within any one domain already exist and are individually validated: masked-latent prediction, action-conditioned latent world models, discrete action tokenization, and joint-embedding prediction on voxelized state. What is not established, and what TERRA addresses, is the transfer question: when does a representation or predictor learned in one structured-state domain carry over to a structurally analogous but otherwise unrelated domain, and by how much. We give this question a formal treatment. We model each domain as a controlled Markov process on a graded latent grid, factor any instantiation into thin domain adapters and a shared domain-invariant core, and identify a cross-domain correspondence with an approximate Markov decision process homomorphism whose quality is measured by a lax bisimulation discrepancy and, for domains lacking a shared coordinate system, by a Gromov-Wasserstein distance between their action-conditioned transition operators. Under a Lipschitz predictor we derive a transfer bound that separates source-model error from structural mismatch, grows geometrically in the prediction horizon, and is certified from below by the Gromov-Wasserstein distance; we then connect latent error to decision regret through the Lipschitz value property of bisimulation metrics. The resulting Structured-State Transfer Hypothesis is stated as a falsifiable claim with a preregistered experimental program, centered on a transfer test from driving scenes to order books, including conditions under which it is refuted. We present no empirical results: this is a research proposal that converts a widely repeated intuition into testable theory.

AI.tldr: TERRA 提出结构化状态迁移假设，通过形式化建模将直觉性的跨域迁移问题转化为可检验的理论：将每个结构化状态域建模为受控马尔可夫过程并分解为域适配器与域不变核心，利用 lax bisimulation 差异和 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离量化跨域对应质量，推导出 Lipschitz 预测器下的迁移误差界，并设计了从驾驶场景到订单簿的预注册实验方案以验证该假设。
AI.motivation: 尽管单个域中基于动作的条件化潜在预测架构（如掩码潜在预测、动作条件化世界模型、离散动作分词、体素化状态的联合嵌入预测）已被分别验证有效，但跨结构化状态域的迁移问题尚未被系统研究：即在一个域（如驾驶场景）中学到的表示或预测器能否迁移到结构相似但领域无关的另一个域（如金融订单簿），迁移效果如何，以及其理论边界何在。
AI.method: TERRA 将每个域建模为分级潜网格上的受控马尔可夫过程，将任一实例分解为薄域适配器和共享的域不变核心；识别跨域对应关系为近似马尔可夫决策过程同态，其质量由 lax bisimulation 差异度量，对缺乏共享坐标系的域则采用动作条件转移算子间的 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离；在 Lipschitz 预测器假设下推导出迁移误差界，该界将源模型误差与结构失配分离，随预测步长几何增长，并以 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离作为下界；通过 bisimulation 度量的 Lipschitz 值性质将潜在误差与决策遗憾相关联。
AI.result: 本文为研究提案，未呈现任何实证结果；其核心产出是结构化状态迁移假设的形式化表述及预注册实验方案，该方案以从驾驶场景到订单簿的迁移测试为中心，并明确了假设被证伪的条件。
AI.conclusion: TERRA 将跨结构化状态域迁移这一广泛存在的直觉转化为可检验的形式化理论，提供了迁移误差的定量界及其与决策遗憾的联系，为未来在多领域之间实现表示与预测器的可验证迁移奠定了理论框架。

title: MBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark on Memory Capability for Video World Models
summary: Recent advancements in video-based world models have demonstrated an unprecedented ability to synthesize high-fidelity visual sequences. However, a fundamental gap persists between visually plausible video generation and the functional requirements of a world model, particularly in maintaining a stable and reasonable internal state over extended temporal horizons. While existing benchmarks primarily emphasize visual quality, motion coherence, and text-video alignment, they largely overlook memory, the core capability of a world model to preserve consistency across long-term horizons and complex interactions. To address this gap, we present \textbf{MBench}, a comprehensive benchmark dedicated to quantifying and evaluating the memory capability of video world models. We systematically decompose the memory capability of video world models into three hierarchical and complementary core dimensions: entity consistency, environment consistency, and causal consistency, which are further refined into 12 quantifiable sub-dimensions for comprehensive characterization of long-term memory. Our benchmark is built upon rigorously curated real-captured long videos, and evaluated by rule-based quantitative matrices and VLM to enable objective and comprehensive consistency assessment. Extensive evaluations of mainstream state-of-the-art video world models reveal critical systemic limitations of existing methods in long-term state retention, providing a standardized benchmark and clear research direction to advance the field.

AI.tldr: 提出了MBench基准，系统性地从三个层次（实体一致性、环境一致性、因果一致性）分解为12个可量化子维度，用于评估视频世界模型的长期记忆能力，揭示现有主流模型在长时间状态保持方面的系统性局限。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型虽能合成高保真视觉序列，但存在视觉生成与功能性世界模型要求之间的根本差距，特别是在长时间跨度下维持稳定合理内部状态的能力。现有基准主要关注视觉质量、运动一致性和文本-视频对齐，忽略了世界模型最核心的长期记忆能力。
AI.method: 提出MBench基准，将视频世界模型的记忆能力系统地分解为三个层次化的核心维度：实体一致性、环境一致性和因果一致性，进一步细化为12个可量化子维度。基准基于精心筛选的真实长视频构建，采用基于规则的定量评估矩阵和视觉语言模型（VLM）进行客观全面的一致性评估。
AI.result: 对主流最先进的视频世界模型进行了广泛评估，揭示了现有方法在长期状态保持方面存在关键的系统性局限，为领域提供了标准化的基准和明确的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: MBench填补了视频世界模型记忆能力评估的空白，提供了一个系统化、多维度的标准化基准框架，明确了当前模型在长期一致性维持方面的不足，为未来研发具有真正世界模型能力的方向提供了指导。

title: CRAB-Bench: Evaluating LLM Agents under Complex Task Dependencies and Human-aligned User Simulation
summary: Evaluating LLM agents in realistic service scenarios requires complex task dependencies, imperfect user behavior, and an evaluation that accommodates multiple valid solutions. We introduce CRAB-Bench (Constraint-based Realistic Agent Benchmark) and RUSE (Realistic User Simulation Engine) to address this gap. CRAB-Bench generates tasks via a constraint graph over multiple interdependent entities with structured distractors, requiring agents to reason carefully over thousands of misleading candidates where only a tiny fraction of solutions are valid. RUSE replaces cooperative, template-like simulators with realistic users grounded in human behavioral studies, instantiated across diverse personas and four behavioral dimensions. Experiments on four frontier LLM agents show that the best model achieves only 61% pass@1 on CRAB-Bench, and switching to RUSE causes further drops of up to 57%, concentrated in task-solving ability rather than conversational quality. Information Disclosure is the most damaging behavioral dimension, and agents interacting with RUSE are less likely to admit mistakes, instead masking errors through implicit corrections.

AI.tldr: CRAB-Bench和RUSE分别通过约束图任务生成和基于人类行为研究的真实用户模拟，解决了LLM智能体在现实服务场景中的评估难题，实验表明前沿模型在CRAB-Bench上仅达到61% pass@1，而RUSE使性能进一步下降高达57%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体评估缺乏对现实服务场景中复杂任务依赖、不完美用户行为以及多种有效解决方案的全面考量，亟需更真实的评估基准和用户模拟引擎来填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 提出CRAB-Bench评估框架，通过约束图在多个相互依赖的实体上生成任务并引入结构化干扰项，迫使智能体在数以千计的误导性候选中进行推理；同时提出RUSE真实用户模拟引擎，基于人类行为研究构建具有多样人设和四个行为维度的逼真用户模型。
AI.result: 四个前沿LLM智能体在CRAB-Bench上的最佳模型仅达到61% pass@1；切换至RUSE后性能进一步下降高达57%，且下降主要集中在任务求解能力而非对话质量；信息泄露是最具破坏性的行为维度，与RUSE交互时智能体更倾向于通过隐式修正掩盖错误而非承认失误。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体在复杂约束推理和对抗性用户行为场景下表现欠佳，信息泄露维度对任务完成度影响最大，且智能体存在掩错倾向，未来评估应纳入更真实的用户行为建模以全面衡量智能体的鲁棒性和可靠性。

title: Joint Agent Memory and Exploration Learning via Novelty Signals
summary: In open-ended environments, exploration is fundamental for autonomous agents, yet current language model agents struggle with this. Effective exploration requires memory, but retaining raw interaction histories is computationally expensive over long trajectories. While latent memory offers a solution to compress interaction histories, its training lacks reliable supervisory signals. We introduce \textbf{J}oint \textbf{A}gent \textbf{M}emory and \textbf{E}xploration \textbf{L}earning (\textbf{JAMEL}), a framework that trains agentic memory and exploration policy together through novelty-driven interaction. We observe that memory and exploration form a mutually dependent loop: sustained exploration requires memory to distinguish exhausted behaviors from unseen ones, while novelty-seeking interaction provides the supervision needed to make memory useful for future exploration. By utilizing deterministic and persistent novelty signals such as code coverage in the GUI domain, we provide natural, annotation-free supervision for the memory module. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that \ours successfully generalizes to unseen environments. Its exploration capability outperforms open-weight baselines and rivals the exploration depth of a closed-source model while reducing token consumption. Our code and model are open-sourced at https://github.com/MobileLLM/JAMEL.

AI.tldr: JAMEL 提出联合训练智能体记忆与探索策略的框架，利用代码覆盖率等确定性新奇信号作为记忆模块的免标注监督，使语言模型代理在未知环境中实现高效探索并显著降低 token 消耗。
AI.motivation: 开放环境中自主智能体需要高效探索，但现有语言模型代理在此方面表现不足；有效探索依赖记忆，而直接保留原始交互历史在长轨迹中计算成本过高；潜在记忆虽能压缩交互历史，但其训练缺乏可靠的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出 JAMEL 框架，联合训练智能体记忆模块与探索策略；利用新颖性驱动的交互形成记忆与探索的相互依赖循环：探索依赖记忆区分已探索与未探索行为，而探索行为又为记忆提供监督信号；在 GUI 领域采用代码覆盖率等确定性与持久的新颖性信号为记忆模块提供天然、无需标注的监督。
AI.result: JAMEL 在未见过的环境中成功泛化，探索能力超越开源基线模型，在探索深度上匹敌闭源模型，同时显著降低了 token 消耗。
AI.conclusion: 记忆与探索可形成互惠的训练循环，确定性新奇信号可作为有效的免标注监督源；该框架证明了通过联合训练可在提升探索性能的同时实现计算效率优化。

title: SuperMemory-VQA: An Egocentric Visual Question-Answering Benchmark for Long-Horizon Memory
summary: AI glasses present a compelling platform for AI agents to serve as personalized memory assistants. To be genuinely useful, such systems must move beyond short-term video comprehension and address memory gaps that humans experience for practical, personal, or social purposes over longitudinal egocentric video streams. However, existing egocentric datasets predominantly focus on action recognition or generic QAs from short clips, measuring perceptual capabilities rather than realistic human memory needs. We introduce SuperMemory-VQA, an egocentric visual question answering (VQA) dataset for evaluating AI assistants on practical, long-horizon memory tasks. It contains 52.9 hours of everyday activities recorded with AI glasses, including synchronized RGB video, audio transcription, eye gaze, IMU, and SLAM trajectories. Through a human-verified annotation pipeline, we construct grounded 4,853 question-answer pairs that span object and location memory, intent recall, visual scene recall, timeline reconstruction, conversational memory, and in-context retrieval. Each question is posed as multiple-choice with an explicit "unanswerable" option to test hallucination robustness. Benchmarking leading agentic frameworks and LLM backbones reveals that existing systems remain far from reliable on real-world memory tasks, highlighting the need for new architectures for grounded AI memory that can answer only when evidence is sufficient. A participant survey further supports that our questions are realistic, useful, and aligned with everyday memory needs.

AI.tldr: 提出SuperMemory-VQA，一个基于AI眼镜的长时程第一人称视频问答数据集，涵盖52.9小时日常活动和4853个可回答/不可回答的问答对，用于评估AI助手的真实记忆任务；基准测试表明现有agent系统在现实记忆任务上远不可靠，凸显了对新的接地记忆架构的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有第一人称视频数据集主要聚焦于短片段上的动作识别或通用问答，衡量的是感知能力而非人类真实的记忆需求；AI眼镜作为个性化记忆助手的应用需要系统具备超越短期视频理解、在纵向第一人称视频流中填补人类记忆空白的能力，而这一研究缺口尚未被有效填补。
AI.method: 构建了包含52.9小时日常活动的第一人称视频数据集，同步采集RGB视频、音频转录、眼动追踪、IMU和SLAM轨迹等多模态数据；通过人工验证的标注流程构建了4853个多选题问答对，涵盖物体与位置记忆、意图回忆、视觉场景回忆、时间线重建、对话记忆和上下文检索六类任务，每个问题包含明确的“不可回答”选项以测试幻觉鲁棒性；对主流agent框架和大语言模型骨干进行系统性基准测试。
AI.result: 基准测试表明，现有agent框架和大语言模型在真实世界记忆任务上远未达到可靠水平，特别是在需要长期依赖和证据充分性判断的场景中表现不佳；参与者调查进一步验证了所提问题与日常记忆需求的真实性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 现有AI系统在真实、长程的记忆任务上仍存在显著不足，需要发展新的接地AI记忆架构，使系统仅在证据充分时才能做出回答，从而避免幻觉；该数据集为未来研究提供了标准化的评估基准和明确的发展方向。

title: LayerRoute: Input-Conditioned Adaptive Layer Skipping via LoRA Fine-Tuning for Agentic Language Models
summary: Agentic language model systems alternate between two structurally distinct step types: structured tool calls (short, deterministic, low perplexity) and open-ended planning/reasoning steps (long, complex, high perplexity). Despite this heterogeneity, current inference systems apply identical compute to every step. We introduce LayerRoute, a lightweight adapter that learns to selectively skip transformer blocks on a per-input basis. LayerRoute augments each of the 24 transformer blocks in Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct with: (1) a per-layer router (~897 parameters, Linear(896,1)) that outputs a hard binary gate via the straight-through estimator, and (2) LoRA adapters (rank 8, ~1.08M parameters) on the Q/K/V/O attention projections. The backbone weights remain frozen. A single end-to-end training pass on agentic data (Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing) with a gate regularisation term forces the system to discover which blocks are skippable per input type. After 3,000 steps (6.4 minutes on an A100 40GB), LayerRoute achieves a 12.91% skip differential: tool calls skip 15.25% of FLOPs while planning steps skip only 2.34%, using only 1.10M trainable parameters (0.22% of the 494M backbone). Quality improves over the base model due to LoRA adaptation, with perplexity delta of -1.29 on tool calls and -1.30 on planning.

AI.tldr: LayerRoute introduces轻量级适配器LayerRoute，通过为每个Transformer块添加路由器（~897参数）和LoRA适配器（rank 8），使agentic语言模型系统能够根据输入类型（工具调用vs规划/推理）动态跳过特定层，在仅使用1.10M可训练参数（骨干网权重冻结）且经过单次6.4分钟训练后，实现工具调用步骤跳过15.25% FLOPs而规划步骤仅跳过2.34%的差异化加速。
AI.motivation: 现有agentic语言模型系统在推理时会交替产生两种结构迥异的步骤类型——结构化的工具调用（短、确定、低困惑度）和开放式的规划/推理（长、复杂、高困惑度），但当前推理系统对每个步骤都施加相同的计算量，未能利用这种异构性来优化效率。
AI.method: LayerRoute为Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct的24个Transformer块分别添加：(1) 一个每层路由器（~897参数，Linear(896,1)），通过直通估计器输出硬二值门控信号决定是否跳过该块；(2) 在Q/K/V/O注意力投影上的LoRA适配器（rank 8，~1.08M参数）。骨干权重保持冻结，在agentic数据（Hermes、Glaive、GSM8K、Turing）上进行单次端到端训练，配合门控正则化项使系统自动发现不同输入类型可跳过的块。
AI.result: 经过3,000步（在A100 40GB上仅需6.4分钟）训练后，LayerRoute实现了12.91%的跳过差异率：工具调用跳过15.25%的FLOPs而规划步骤仅跳过2.34%，仅使用1.10M可训练参数（占494M骨干网络的0.22%）。由于LoRA适配的作用，模型质量相比基模型有所提升，工具调用和规划的困惑度差值分别为-1.29和-1.30。
AI.conclusion: LayerRoute证明了通过极小规模的可训练参数和极短的训练时间，即可让语言模型自动学习根据步骤类型差异化分配计算资源，在保持甚至提升生成质量的同时实现高效推理，为agentic系统的计算效率优化提供了轻量级、可扩展的解决方案。

title: Revisiting Ripple Effects in Knowledge Editing through Pressure-Aware Joint Neighborhood Optimization
summary: Single-edit updates in large language models can trigger ripple effects across local knowledge neighborhoods: desirable propagation to related facts and unintended perturbation of preserved ones. Existing methods address these two effects separately, without explicitly modeling their coupling. We challenge this separation through an analysis of ripple responses across typical baselines, identifying two coupled design pressures: editable-side coordination and preserved-side leakage. We propose Joint Neighborhood Optimization (JNO), a new knowledge-editing framework to formalize and jointly address both pressures at the target-planning stage. JNO instantiates this principle through Pressure-Aware Coordination (PAC), which jointly optimizes neighborhood target representations under coupled constraints, and a semantic pre-execution gate that rejects high-risk target plans before parameter execution.
