Experiments on RippleEdits show JNO improves propagation and preservation metrics by at least 7.0% while preserving cross-backbone editing stability.

AI.tldr: 提出联合邻域优化（JNO）框架，通过显式建模可编辑侧协调与保留侧泄漏两种耦合压力，在目标规划阶段联合优化邻域表示，显著提升大语言模型知识编辑中的传播与保留性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识编辑方法分别处理单次编辑在局部知识邻域中引发的期望传播与非预期扰动，但未显式建模这两种效应的耦合关系；本文通过分析基线方法的涟漪响应，识别出两种耦合的设计压力——可编辑侧协调与保留侧泄漏，并旨在同时形式化与联合解决这两种压力。
AI.method: 提出Joint Neighborhood Optimization（JNO）知识编辑框架，在目标规划阶段联合处理两种耦合压力；JNO实例化为Pressure-Aware Coordination（PAC），在耦合约束下联合优化邻域目标表示，并引入语义预执行门控机制，在参数执行前拒绝高风险目标计划。
AI.result: 在RippleEdits基准上，JNO在传播和保留指标上均提升至少7.0%，同时保持跨骨干网络的编辑稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了显式建模编辑中传播与保留效应的耦合性对于知识编辑至关重要，所提出的联合优化策略为高保真知识编辑提供了新的设计范式。

title: RoboStressBench: Benchmarking VLM Robustness to Physical Visual Stress in Embodied Scenes
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and are increasingly deployed in embodied AI systems, where reliable perception under real conditions is essential. However, existing benchmarks assess VLMs using clean images or isolated perturbations rather than stresses caused by physical scene formation. This design has two limitations: it covers only a narrow subset of everyday visual stresses, and some perturbations rarely appear in realistic embodied scenes. This gap raises a fundamental question: how can we define visual stress in a principled way that captures the diverse factors encountered in physical environments? To address this question, we formulate visual perception from an inverse graphics perspective and introduce RoboStressBench, a benchmark for evaluating VLM robustness to physical visual stress in embodied scenes. Inspired by the physical rendering equation, RoboStressBench decomposes visual stress into four physically grounded dimensions: Material (M), Viewpoint (V), Lighting (L), and Geometry (G). This design enables RoboStressBench to cover a broad range of visual stresses in real-world environments, while allowing controlled analysis of their effects on VLM capabilities such as visual recognition, reasoning, and planning. Through comprehensive evaluations of state-of-the-art VLMs, we identify stress-specific failure modes and reveal that different physical factors degrade different embodied capabilities, which are often obscured by aggregate accuracy. We further introduce a stress-aware agentic solver that detects visual stressors and invokes visual-editing skills before reasoning, improving robustness in high-stress scenarios. Overall, RoboStressBench provides a principled evaluation framework for diagnosing and improving VLM perception under real-world physical stress, supporting the development of more reliable embodied AI systems.

AI.tldr: RoboStressBench 是一个基于逆图形学视角构建的基准，用于系统评估视觉-语言模型在物理视觉压力下的鲁棒性，通过将视觉压力分解为材质、视角、光照和几何四个物理维度，揭示了不同压力因素对 VLM 不同能力的差异化退化模式，并提出了一个压力感知 agentic solver 来提升高压力场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLM 基准仅使用干净图像或孤立扰动进行评估，无法覆盖现实物理场景中多样化的视觉应力因素，缺乏一种能够从物理场景形成原理出发、系统定义并测试视觉应力的原则性评估框架。
AI.method: 从逆图形学角度公式化视觉感知问题，受物理渲染方程启发，将视觉应力分解为材质（M）、视角（V）、光照（L）和几何（G）四个物理维度，构建 RoboStressBench 基准；并提出一个压力感知 agentic solver，通过检测视觉压力源并在推理前调用视觉编辑技能来增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 对多个 SOTA VLM 的全面评估揭示了应力特定的失败模式，不同物理因素对不同具身能力（如视觉识别、推理和规划）产生差异化退化，这些退化模式在聚合准确率中往往被掩盖。
AI.conclusion: RoboStressBench 提供了一个原则性的评估框架，能够系统诊断和改善 VLM 在真实世界物理压力下的感知能力，为开发更可靠的具身 AI 系统提供支持；压力感知 agentic solver 在高压力场景下展现了鲁棒性改进效果。

title: MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?
summary: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

AI.tldr: 提出Guide-to-Skill学习问题及MMG2Skill-Bench基准，并设计MMG2Skill闭环框架，将多模态异构网络指南转化为可执行技能，通过轨迹级根因反馈持续优化，在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌任务中显著提升VLM智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 网络上存在大量蕴含程序性知识的多模态异构指南，但其面向人类执行者，包含噪声且难以直接转化为智能体可用的技能，现有方法无法有效弥合人类导向指南与智能体可执行技能之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出MMG2Skill闭环框架，包含三个核心环节：将网络指南编译为可编辑的结构化技能；在执行阶段用固定VLM智能体条件化这些技能；从轨迹级根因反馈中修订技能而不使用基准得分。同时构建MMG2Skill-Bench基准，涵盖GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌三类任务。
AI.result: 在六个VLM骨干网络上，MMG2Skill在所有模型-域设置中一致优于基线智能体，骨干网络上的宏平均增益为+12.8至+25.3个百分点。消融实验表明，直接用原始指南提示智能体会降低性能，结构化技能构建和轨迹驱动修订对提升均不可或缺。在成功可推断任务中，基于分析器的早停机制可防止后期性能退化，在校准正确时节省25%-53%的尝试次数。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明将异构网络指南转化为结构化可编辑技能并结合轨迹级反馈闭环优化，是提升VLM智能体长时任务能力的有效范式，原始指南的直接使用反而有害，结构化构建与轨迹驱动修订是关键组件。

title: ReSkill: Reconciling Skill Creation with Policy Optimization in Agentic RL
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) enables LLM agents to improve continuously from environment rewards, yet the resulting policies do not systematically accumulate reusable strategies that generalize across tasks. Modular skills can provide such reusable strategies, yet existing skill-augmented RL methods decouple skill creation from policy optimization, risking adopting skills that conflict with the evolving policy. Inspired by Anthropic's Skill Creator, we introduce ReSkill, an RL-in-the-loop skill creation framework that reconciles skill evolution with policy learning. ReSkill exploits the group-wise structure of GRPO to naturally embed three mechanisms with only marginal additional overhead: (1) an assertion-driven skill creator that diagnoses failures from past experience and proposes conditional, trigger-based skill revisions; (2) within-group rollout sampling that enables controlled comparison of skill versions, capturing which version best supports the policy's ongoing learning; and (3) Thompson Sampling with adaptive discounting to balance exploration and exploitation in skill version selection as the policy evolves. Across several domains, ReSkill consistently outperforms existing memory and skill-based RL methods, with the largest gains on unseen tasks. Analysis of the skill lifecycle shows skills being automatically created, tested, refined, and pruned as the policy improves, demonstrating reconciled skill-policy co-evolution.

AI.tldr: ReSkill提出了一种强化学习在环中的技能创建框架，通过在GRPO的群体结构中嵌入断言驱动技能创建、组内轨迹采样和自适应汤普森采样三种机制，实现了技能演化与策略学习的协同优化，在多个领域持续超越现有记忆型和技能型强化学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能体强化学习方法虽然能使LLM智能体从环境奖励中持续改进，但所得策略无法系统性地积累可跨任务泛化的可复用策略；而现有的技能增强型强化学习方法将技能创建与策略优化解耦，导致技能可能与不断演化的策略产生冲突，二者缺乏协同演化机制。
AI.method: ReSkill利用GRPO的群体结构自然嵌入三种机制：基于断言的技能创建器通过诊断历史经验中的失败并提出条件触发式技能修订方案；组内轨迹采样支持技能版本间的受控对比，捕获最能助力策略持续学习的技能版本；结合自适应折扣因子的汤普森采样在策略演化过程中平衡技能版本选择的探索与利用。
AI.result: 在多个领域的实验中，ReSkill持续优于现有的记忆型和技能型强化学习方法，在未见任务上的性能提升最为显著。对技能生命周期的分析显示，技能能够随着策略的改进自动经历创建、测试、优化和剪枝的过程，验证了技能与策略协同演化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ReSkill通过在强化学习环路中内化技能创建过程，成功实现了技能演化与策略学习的统一，为LLM智能体提供了系统性地积累可复用策略的有效范式，其技能自动生命周期管理机制为构建持续进化的智能体系统提供了重要启示。

title: The Right Inference Strategy Is All You Need: Nearly Training-Free Domain-Wise Inference for EgoCross Challenge
summary: EgoCross evaluates multimodal large language models on egocentric video question answering under substantial domain shift, where test videos come from surgery, industrial assembly, extreme sports, and animal-mounted cameras rather than ordinary daily-life scenes. In the source-limited track, the base model is fixed to Qwen3-VL-4B, while the official task-specific support set contains only 20 training samples. This setting makes the challenge less about model scaling and more about exposing the right visual, temporal, and answer-selection cues to a constrained model. Our key observation is that the frozen baseline model is not simply incapable of these rare scenarios; rather, it often fails to transfer its existing visual-language knowledge to the new task format without an appropriate interface. We therefore use a domain-wise inference strategy that treats the four target domains separately and designs different input, prompting, and answer-mapping procedures according to each domain's task characteristics. These strategies make the rare egocentric scenes more interpretable to the VLM by emphasizing the cues that matter for each domain. The resulting system is nearly training-free: surgery, and animal questions are answered with the base Qwen3-VL-4B model, while XSports and industry use only the official SFT checkpoint trained for two epochs on the provided 20 training samples. On the final evaluation, this simple strategy reaches 66.98\% overall accuracy, suggesting that careful domain-aware inference can compensate for limited base-model strength and recover much of the ability already present in the baseline model.

AI.tldr: EgoCross 提出了一种领域感知推理策略，在仅20个训练样本和固定Qwen3-VL-4B基座模型的源受限设定下，通过为手术、工业组装、极限运动及动物佩戴相机四个罕见第一人称视频域分别设计不同的输入、提示和答案映射策略，实现了66.98%的整体准确率，揭示了冻结基座模型的知识转移瓶颈在于缺乏合适的接口而非模型能力不足。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在日常生活场景的第一人称视频问答中表现良好，但在面临手术、工业组装、极限运动和动物佩戴相机等存在显著域迁移的罕见第一人称场景时性能大幅下降，且源受限设定下仅有20个训练样本，模型被固定为Qwen3-VL-4B，因此亟需探索如何在极有限数据下挖掘冻结基座模型中已有的多模态知识以适应新领域。
AI.method: 提出领域感知推理策略，将四个目标域（手术、工业、极限运动、动物佩戴相机）分开处理，根据各域任务特点分别设计不同的输入预处理、提示词构造和答案映射流程；其中手术和动物域直接使用冻结的Qwen3-VL-4B基座模型，极限运动和工业域仅使用在20个训练样本上微调两轮得到的官方SFT检查点；整个系统几乎无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在最终评测中，该领域感知推理策略在源受限赛道取得66.98%的整体准确率，证明即使基座模型能力受限，精心设计的领域感知推理流程也能有效恢复基座模型本身已具备的视觉语言知识。
AI.conclusion: 核心洞见在于冻结的基线模型并非缺乏处理罕见场景的能力，而是在没有合适接口的情况下难以将已有的视觉语言知识迁移到新的任务格式中；领域感知的推理策略通过针对性地强化各域关键线索，使罕见的第一人称场景对多模态大语言模型更具可解释性，在极小训练样本下仍能取得可观性能。

title: Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis
summary: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

AI.tldr: GAIS提出了一种基于两阶段接地机制（协议锚定环境构建与结构引导规划）的自动化框架，用于合成高质量、多样化的智能体交互数据，使基础模型在多个基准上匹配甚至超越官方指令微调版本，且展现出更优的数据效率与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体数据合成方法依赖无约束生成，往往退化为对LLM内部先验的有偏随机采样，无法捕捉真实世界域的多样性与难度，也难以构建高保真、长程的复杂任务，导致合成数据质量受限。
AI.method: GAIS包含两阶段接地机制：首先，基于真实世界的Model Context Protocol (MCP)服务器构建协议锚定环境，确保功能的多样性与难度；其次，采用结构引导规划方法主动执行逻辑依赖与对抗策略，在该环境中生成复杂任务。
AI.result: 在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上，GAIS合成数据显著超越现有基线方法，使基础模型匹配甚至超越其官方指令微调版本；GAIS展现出更优的数据效率与可扩展性，在基线停滞时仍能保持持续增长。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过接地机制约束合成过程而非依赖LLM无约束生成，可以系统性地提升智能体交互数据的质量与多样性，为规模化构建通用智能体训练数据提供了一条可行路径。

title: MobEvolve: An Agentic Self-Evolving Heuristic System for Interpretable Human Mobility Generation
summary: Human mobility generation aims to synthesize realistic trip chains for target populations based on individual features. Existing paradigms, including deep generative models, LLM-based methods, and traditional heuristics, struggle to satisfy the complex demands of this task while simultaneously maintaining interpretability, behavioral plausibility, population-level distributional alignment, and inference efficiency. To bridge this gap, we introduce MobEvolve, the first agentic self-evolving heuristic framework for human mobility generation. MobEvolve initializes a behavior-inspired heuristic system and employs an LLM agent to iteratively evolve its internal logic. By diagnosing empirical misalignments and failure cases on a validation set, the agent proposes targeted updates and accumulates evolution memory for cumulative self-improvement. Extensive evaluations on the Singapore and Montreal benchmarks demonstrate that MobEvolve significantly outperforms state-of-the-art deep generative and LLM-based methods in individual trajectory fidelity, population-level distribution alignment, and behavioral plausibility, while preserving interpretability and high inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: MobEvolve 提出了首个智能体自进化启发式框架用于人类移动性生成，通过 LLM 代理迭代优化启发式逻辑，在个体轨迹保真度、群体分布对齐和行为合理性上超越现有深度生成与 LLM 方法，同时保持可解释性和高推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的人类移动性生成方法——包括深度生成模型、基于 LLM 的方法和传统启发式方法——难以同时满足个体轨迹保真度、群体层面分布对齐、行为合理性、可解释性和推理效率等多重复杂需求，存在明显的性能与实用性权衡缺口。
AI.method: MobEvolve 初始化一个基于行为启发式的规则系统，利用 LLM 代理在验证集上诊断经验偏差与失败案例，据此提出针对性的更新策略，并累积进化记忆以实现持续的自我改进，从而迭代演化系统内部逻辑。
AI.result: 在新加坡和蒙特利尔两个基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，MobEvolve 在个体轨迹保真度、群体分布对齐和行为合理性方面显著优于最先进的深度生成方法和 LLM 方法，同时保持了可解释性和高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: MobEvolve 证明了通过智能体自进化范式可以弥合传统启发式方法与深度/LLM 方法之间的性能与实用性鸿沟，为移动性生成领域提供了兼具高精度、可解释性和高效性的新路径，其进化记忆机制也为持续自我改进奠定了基础。

title: Benchmarks for Vision-Language Models in Urban Perception Should Be Reliability-Aware and Negotiated
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to generate structured descriptions of street-level imagery for tasks such as streetscape auditing, mapping, and public consultation. These uses combine observable attributes with appraisal categories, and the human targets are often distributions of judgments with disagreement and explicit non-response. This paper argues that benchmarking VLMs for urban perception should treat disagreement and abstention as measurement outcomes, report inter-annotator reliability alongside model alignment, and treat the label space and scoring policy as negotiable artifacts when outputs are intended to inform urban governance. We ground the argument in a benchmark of 100 Montreal street scenes annotated along 30 dimensions by 12 participants from seven community organizations, and in a deterministic zero-shot evaluation of seven VLMs. Across dimensions, model agreement with human consensus co-varies with dimension-level human reliability, and for the appraisal dimension Overall Impression models and annotators exhibit distributional mismatch including different rates of Not applicable. We close with actions for benchmark creators, model developers, and institutions to make uncertainty and benchmark assumptions visible in evaluation reports.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了在面向城市治理的街道场景感知任务中，应将标注者的分歧与弃权视为有效测量结果，在基准测试中同时报告人类间信度与模型对齐度，并将标签空间与评分策略视为可协商的设计产物。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在街道场景结构化描述任务中，通常将人类标注视为单一真实值，忽略了感知任务中普遍存在的标注者分歧、弃权（Not applicable）等不确定性，且缺乏对标注空间与评分策略选择如何影响模型评估的反思，无法满足城市治理场景对评估透明性和可问责性的需求。
AI.method: 基于100张蒙特利尔街景、7个社区组织12名参与者沿30个维度标注的数据集，采用确定性零样本评估方法对7种视觉-语言模型进行评测，分析模型与人类共识的一致性、人类间信度与模型对齐度的协变关系，并比较模型与标注者在Overall Impression维度上的分布差异，包括Not applicable比例的差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，模型与人类共识的一致性程度与维度层面的人类间信度存在协变关系；在Overall Impression这一评价维度上，模型与标注者的评分分布存在显著错配，包括Not applicable比例的不同。
AI.conclusion: 研究建议基准创建者、模型开发者和机构应将不确定性和基准假设在评估报告中明确可视化，包括将分歧与弃权作为测量结果、报告人类间信度、以及将标签空间与评分政策视为可协商的设计选择。

title: DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding
summary: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.

AI.tldr: BlockDiffusion提出了一种轻量级逐层融合机制，使草稿模型的每一层都能关注一组目标层的可学习组合，从而打破DFlash中单一融合表示的瓶颈，在支持更深层草稿架构的同时，在数学推理、代码生成和对话任务上分别实现约5.52倍、5.46倍和3.91倍的推理加速，较DFlash提升约5%-11%。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进方法DFlash将草稿模型的所有层约束为共享一个仅从少数目标层导出的单一融合表示，这限制了逐层的表达能力，阻碍了草稿模型容量的进一步扩展，从而无法充分挖掘块级并行推测解码的加速潜力。
AI.method: 本文提出BlockDiffusion，通过一种轻量级逐层融合机制代替DFlash的窄瓶颈：每个草稿层独立地关注一组广泛目标层（而非仅少数层）的可学习组合，以极小的开销为每个草稿层注入更丰富的目标模型内部知识并提供不同的输入表示。这种增强的逐层表达能力使得草稿模型可以扩展到更深的架构，同时将训练数据从80万样本扩展到240万样本以充分利用增大的模型容量。
AI.result: 在涵盖数学推理、代码生成和对话的六个基准测试上，BlockDiffusion在Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B和GPT-OSS-20B上分别实现了平均5.52倍、5.46倍和3.91倍的墙钟时间加速，相较DFlash分别提升了约11%、8%和5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过解除DFlash中草稿层间的表示共享约束，逐层差异化地融合更广泛的目标层知识是提升块级推测解码性能的有效途径；该方法在多种模型规模和任务类型上均取得了持续且显著的加速改进，验证了其通用性和可扩展性。

title: Characterization of Multi-Model Agentic AI Systems on General Tasks via Trace-Driven Simulation
summary: Agentic AI completes tasks through iterative planning, tool use, and reasoning based on observed outcomes. Despite its popularity, its system-level behavior remains poorly understood, particularly for complex datasets and agent architectures-owing to highly non-deterministic execution, prohibitive evaluation costs, and limited visibility into proprietary models. This paper presents GAIATrace, the first token-level trace dataset of two state-of-the-art agentic systems (MiroThinker and OWL) running GAIA, a benchmark composed of a heterogeneous mix of general-purpose tasks. Unlike prior trace datasets, GAIATrace captures full reasoning tokens, task-level structures, and activities of every major participating LLMs, enabling in-depth systems research. Complementing the dataset, we present Vidur-Agent, a trace-driven simulator that can replay GAIATrace to perform reproducible, low-cost system evaluation across diverse simulated environments. Using both artifacts, we characterize how modern agentic systems handle general tasks and how various system design choices shape their behavior, yielding several unique findings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GAIATrace，首个捕捉GAIA基准测试中两个最先进智能体系统（MiroThinker和OWL）完整推理token、任务级结构及参与LLM活动的细粒度轨迹数据集，并配套开发了Vidur-Agent轨迹驱动模拟器，用于可复现、低成本的系统评估，从而揭示了现代智能体系统处理通用任务时的行为特征与系统设计选择的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管Agentic AI通过迭代规划、工具使用和推理广泛流行，但其系统级行为在复杂数据集和智能体架构下仍缺乏理解，主要由于执行高度非确定性、评估成本过高以及专有模型可见性有限，亟需可复现、低成本的数据集与评估工具来支撑系统层面的深入研究。
AI.method: 本文构建了GAIATrace数据集，捕获了运行GAIA基准任务的两个SOTA智能体系统MiroThinker和OWL的完整推理token、任务级结构和每个主要参与LLM的活动日志；并开发了Vidur-Agent轨迹驱动模拟器，通过回放GAIATrace轨迹在多种模拟环境中实现可复现的系统评估。
AI.result: 基于GAIATrace和Vidur-Agent，本文刻画了现代智能体系统处理通用任务的行为特征，并揭示了多种系统设计选择对智能体行为的影响，获得了若干独特的发现。
AI.conclusion: GAIATrace与Vidur-Agent为智能体系统的系统级行为分析与可复现评估提供了关键基础设施，有助于理解非确定性执行下的智能体行为规律，并为未来智能体系统设计与优化提供了实证依据。

title: MMDG-Bench: A Benchmark for Multimodal Domain Generalization
summary: Multi-modal Domain Generalization (MMDG) seeks to leverage complementary modalities to enhance model robustness on unseen domains. Despite extensive progress in Multi-modal Learning (MML) and Domain Generalization (DG) as individual fields, their systematic integration remains under-explored. Current MMDG research is largely confined to action recognition and lacks standardized evaluation protocols. To address this, we introduce MMDG-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring two foundational frameworks: DG then MML (D2M) and MML then DG (M2D). We provide unified experimental protocols across diverse tasks, including video-audio-flow action recognition and RGB-Depth-IR face anti-spoofing. By instantiating ten MMDG baselines through pairing a unified MML configuration with five DG techniques under both D2M and M2D orderings, we demonstrate that these structured combinations frequently outperform existing state-of-the-art methods, underscoring the necessity of a unified benchmarking effort. Our analysis yields three key insights: (1) Integrating DG techniques provides consistent generalization gains across various backbones, whereas non-DG methods are highly sensitive to backbone shifts; (2) The optimal framework choice depends on inter-modal stability: D2M excels when modal relations are stable across domains, while M2D is more robust to cross-domain relational variance; (3) Stronger backbones yield amplified performance dividends when integrated into our structured frameworks. MMDG-Bench provides a principled foundation and actionable design guidelines for future research in multi-modal robustness. Code is released at https://github.com/qszhan/MMDG-Bench.

AI.tldr: MMDG-Bench是首个面向多模态域泛化的系统化基准，通过提出D2M和M2D两种框架组合范式，在多种任务和十种基线方法上统一评估，揭示了DG技术与MML结合的显著优势，并给出了最优框架选择与骨干网络设计的关键准则。
AI.motivation: 多模态学习与域泛化作为两个独立领域均已取得长足进展，但二者的系统性集成（即多模态域泛化）仍缺乏深入探索，现有研究局限于动作识别任务且缺少标准化评估协议，亟需统一基准来推动该方向的规范研究。
AI.method: 提出了MMDG-Bench基准，定义了两种基础框架：先域泛化后多模态学习（D2M）和先多模态学习后域泛化（M2D）；通过将统一的多模态学习配置与五种域泛化技术配对，在两种框架顺序下实例化了十种MMDG基线方法，并在视频-音频-光流动作识别和RGB-深度-红外人脸防伪等多样任务上建立了统一实验协议。
AI.result: 实验表明，这些结构化组合方法在多个任务上持续超越现有最优方法；DG技术的集成在不同骨干网络上均带来一致的泛化增益，而非DG方法对骨干网络更换高度敏感；D2M在模态关系跨域稳定时更优，M2D在模态关系跨域变化大时更具鲁棒性；更强的骨干网络在结构化框架中能放大性能收益。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统性基准实验揭示了多模态域泛化的三大关键洞察，为后续研究提供了原则性的基础框架和可操作的设计指导，推动多模态鲁棒性研究迈向标准化与范式化的新阶段。

title: Cross-Environment Neural Reranking for Sample-Efficient Action Selection in Text-Based Agents
summary: Large language model agents achieve strong performance on text-based benchmarks but incur prohibitive inference costs, motivating the use of compact neural rerankers for action selection. We investigate whether a single lightweight model can perform action selection across multiple diverse environments, a capability that would eliminate per-environment model maintenance. Training DeBERTa-v3 (184M-434M parameters) jointly on ALFWorld, WebShop, and ScienceWorld with minority-class upsampling, we find that rebalanced two-environment joint training substantially improves over single-environment ALFWorld performance (net gain +0.412) while maintaining competitive WebShop performance (+0.214 vs. +0.249 single-environment). Three-environment training yields a mean combined net gain of +0.551 +/- 0.024 across 4 seeds, with per-environment results approaching specialized single-environment models while providing positive cross-domain transfer. Cross-environment adaptation is highly sample-efficient: fine-tuning on only 9.2% of target-domain data recovers 93% of full-data performance, and scaling model capacity yields limited benefits, indicating data diversity is the primary driver. Environment-aware LoRA adapter routing with PCGrad achieves a best-seed result of +0.611 (seed 42), with seeds 456 and 789 at +0.554 and +0.559, but exhibits high variance due to seed 123 collapsing to +0.263 (4-seed mean +0.497 +/- 0.158), representing a promising but currently unstable direction. Joint training with clean splits and data rebalancing is a key ingredient. We will release our three-environment benchmark of 51,580 training instances (41,740 raw unique states with minority-class upsampling) and all model checkpoints upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究能否用单个轻量级神经重排序器（DeBERTa-v3）在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld等多个异构环境中统一进行动作选择，发现联合训练与数据重平衡能实现正跨域迁移，性能接近专用单环境模型，且跨环境适应具有高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型智能体在基于文本的基准测试中表现强劲，但推理成本高昂，促使研究者探索使用紧凑型神经重排序器进行动作选择。然而，现有方法通常需要为每个环境维护独立的模型，因此需要研究单个轻量级模型能否在多个不同环境中统一执行动作选择，以消除按环境维护模型的负担。
AI.method: 采用DeBERTa-v3（184M-434M参数）作为基础重排序器，在ALFWorld、WebShop和ScienceWorld三个环境上联合训练，并使用少数类上采样（minority-class upsampling）缓解数据不平衡。实验探索了双环境和三环境联合训练，并进一步引入环境感知的LoRA适配器路由结合PCGrad梯度投影进行多任务优化。
AI.result: 重平衡的双环境联合训练在ALFWorld上相比单环境显著提升（净增益+0.412），WebShop性能保持竞争力（+0.214 vs 单环境+0.249）。三环境训练在4个种子上的平均综合净增益为+0.551±0.024，性能接近专用单环境模型。仅使用9.2%目标域数据微调即可恢复全数据性能的93%。LoRA+PCGrad方案最佳种子达+0.611，但种子123崩塌至+0.263，四种子平均为+0.497±0.158，存在高方差问题。
AI.conclusion: 数据多样性相比模型容量是提升跨环境动作选择性能的主要驱动因素；联合训练配合干净数据划分和数据重平衡是实现正迁移的关键要素；环境感知LoRA路由与PCGrad虽有潜力但当前稳定性不足，是值得继续探索的方向。

title: TrafficRAG: A Multimodal RAG Framework for Traffic Accident Liability Determination
summary: Traffic accident liability analysis is a critical yet challenging task in intelligent transportation and legal assistance. Existing methods often suffer from low efficiency, subjective judgment, and inconsistent analysis results. Meanwhile, large language models are constrained by noisy video inputs and insufficient legal domain knowledge. To address these issues, this work presents TrafficRAG, a multimodal retrieval-augmented framework for automated traffic accident analysis and report generation. Specifically, the proposed framework first adopts a vision-language model to produce structured textual descriptions of accident scenarios, which serve as accurate retrieval queries. Based on these textual queries, a hybrid retrieval strategy integrating BM25 sparse retrieval and dense embedding retrieval is employed to fetch relevant traffic regulations and similar historical cases. Finally, the large language model incorporates retrieved legal knowledge and multimodal accident evidence for comprehensive reasoning, and generates standardized, legally grounded liability analysis reports. Extensive experiments show that TrafficRAG consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving 77.32% Legal Norm Adaptation Accuracy, 81.71% Factual Faithfulness, and a Liability Ratio MAE of 5.48%. The results validate that integrating multimodal factual evidence with legal clauses via retrieval augmentation can effectively improve the reliability and accuracy of traffic accident liability determination.

AI.tldr: TrafficRAG是一个多模态检索增强框架，通过视觉-语言模型生成结构化场景描述、混合检索获取法规与案例、大语言模型融合多模态证据进行推理，在交通事故责任分析任务上实现了77.32%的法律规范适配准确率和5.48%的责任比例MAE，显著提升了分析报告的可靠性与合法性。
AI.motivation: 现有交通事故责任分析方法存在效率低、主观性强、结果不一致等问题，而大语言模型在处理噪声视频输入时表现受限且缺乏领域法律知识，导致自动化责任分析的可信度和准确性不足。
AI.method: TrafficRAG首先采用视觉-语言模型将事故视频转换为结构化文本描述作为检索查询，然后通过BM25稀疏检索与稠密嵌入检索相结合的混合检索策略获取相关交通法规和相似历史案例，最后大语言模型融合检索到的法律知识与多模态事故证据进行综合推理，生成标准化的责任分析报告。
AI.result: 实验结果表明TrafficRAG在多个指标上持续优于基线方法，达到了77.32%的法律规范适配准确率、81.71%的事实忠实度，以及5.48%的责任比例平均绝对误差，验证了检索增强机制对法律知识整合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过检索增强将多模态事故事实证据与法律条款进行有效整合，能够显著提升交通事故责任判定的可靠性和准确性，为智能交通和法律辅助领域的自动化分析提供了有效范式。

title: Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank: A Zero-Shot Reasoning-Aware Framework for Composed Video Retrieval
summary: Composed Video Retrieval (CoVR) seeks the target video that results from applying a free-form textual modification to a reference video. We address the \emph{Reason-Aware} CoVR (CoVR-R) challenge at the CVPR~2026 VidLLMs workshop, where retrieval is strictly zero-shot. We present \textbf{R3-CoVR} (\emph{Reason, Retrieve, Re-rank}), a training-free pipeline built entirely from frozen foundation models. A multimodal large language model (Qwen3-VL-8B) reasons about the \emph{after-effects} an edit implies -- state transitions, action phases, scene, camera and tempo -- and verbalises a concise post-edit description; a contrastive video--text encoder (SigLIP-2) embeds this description and the gallery for first-stage retrieval; finally a constraint-aware re-ranking stage uses the same multimodal model as a judge that scores each shortlisted candidate against the intended edited result. On the challenge test set, R3-CoVR attains \textbf{91.9\% R@1} and \textbf{98.2\% R@10}. Two findings drive these results: (i)~matching the description length to the contrastive encoder's text window lifts \Rk{1} from $67.5$ to $72.7$; and (ii)~the constraint-aware re-ranker, which reorders only the shortlist, lifts \Rk{1} from $72.7$ to $91.9$ -- the single largest gain. We analyse the re-ranker's behaviour, the retrieve/re-rank blend, and the shortlist depth, and we release a clean three-layer implementation.

AI.tldr: R3-CoVR是一个完全无需训练的零样本组合视频检索管道，通过冻结的基础模型（Qwen3-VL-8B进行推理和重排序，SigLIP-2进行嵌入检索）实现，在CVPR 2026 VidLLMs研讨会的CoVR-R挑战中取得了91.9%的R@1和98.2%的R@10，其中约束感知重排序带来了最大的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 组合视频检索（CoVR）要求根据对参考视频的自由形式文本修改来检索目标视频，现有方法在零样本设定下难以有效理解编辑操作隐含的状态变化、动作阶段、场景、镜头和节奏等语义信息，因此需要一种无需训练且能进行推理感知的检索方案。
AI.method: R3-CoVR是一个三阶段无需训练的管道，由冻结的基础模型组成：首先使用多模态大语言模型（Qwen3-VL-8B）推理编辑操作的后效，生成简洁的编辑后描述；然后使用对比式视频-文本编码器（SigLIP-2）对该描述和候选库进行第一阶段的嵌入检索；最后使用相同的多模态大语言模型作为评判器，对候选列表进行约束感知的重排序，评估每个候选与预期编辑结果的一致性。
AI.result: 在挑战测试集上，R3-CoVR达到91.9%的R@1和98.2%的R@10。两个关键发现：将描述长度匹配到对比编码器的文本窗口使R@1从67.5提升到72.7；约束感知重排序仅对候选列表进行重排，使R@1从72.7提升到91.9，这是最大的单一增益。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了两个关键洞察：描述长度与对比编码器文本窗口的匹配至关重要；约束感知重排序在短列表上带来了最大的性能提升，表明推理能力的引入能显著提升零样本组合视频检索的效果。研究还分析了重排序器的行为、检索与重排序的混合策略以及候选列表深度，并开源了简洁的三层实现。

title: Better with Experience: Self-Evolving LLM Agents for Evidence-Grounded Health Community Notes
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-augmented Community Notes offer a scalable path for timely, evidence-grounded correction of health misinformation on social platforms. However, they still reset at every post, leaving useful correction experience from prior cases unused. We introduce EvoNote, an agentic framework that enables health Community Notes generation to self-evolve through an evolving experience memory of prior misinformation correction episodes. Its core is fine-grained credit assignment: EvoNote grounds trajectory-level feedback in health-specific note qualities and distills it into action-level memory for claim analysis, evidence acquisition, and note writing. We evaluate EvoNote on MM-HealthCN, a 1.2K-instance multimodal benchmark of user-flagged health posts with human-written Community Notes and crowd-derived helpfulness labels. Under a human-validated hierarchical utility judge, EvoNote-generated notes are preferred over corresponding human-written notes in 89.6% of cases; on a separate set of Needs More Ratings posts without a crowd helpfulness verdict, EvoNote produces helpful notes for 82.0% of cases. It also reduces the median time needed to produce a candidate correction from over 13 hours in the human-note pipeline to under 2 minutes. Analyses link these gains to stronger evidence use and reusable correction strategies, positioning self-evolving note generation as a promising paradigm for health misinformation governance.

AI.tldr: EvoNote是一个面向健康类社区笔记的智能体框架，通过演化经验记忆和细粒度信用分配机制，使LLM驱动的笔记生成能够从既往错误纠正案例中自主学习进化，在1.2K多模态基准上生成的笔记在89.6%的案例中优于人工撰写笔记，并将生成时间从13小时以上缩短至2分钟以内。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM增强的社区笔记虽然在健康谣言纠正方面具有可扩展性，但每一条新帖子仍需要从头开始生成纠正信息，无法利用以往虚假信息纠正案例中积累的有用经验，导致每次纠正都重置状态，缺乏跨案例的知识复用和学习进化能力。
AI.method: EvoNote提出了一种自进化的智能体框架，其核心是构建一个不断演化的经验记忆库，存储先前虚假信息纠正案例中的经验；同时采用细粒度信用分配机制，将轨迹级别的反馈基于健康领域特定的笔记质量指标进行分解，并蒸馏为行动级别的记忆，分别用于主张分析、证据获取和笔记撰写三个子任务。
AI.result: 在包含1.2K实例的多模态健康社区笔记基准MM-HealthCN上，经人类验证的分层效用评估表明，EvoNote生成的笔记在89.6%的情况下比对应的人工撰写笔记更受偏好；在另外一组缺少人群有用性评分的Needs More Ratings帖子中，EvoNote对82.0%的案例生成了有用笔记；同时将候选纠正的生成中位时间从人工管线的13小时以上降至2分钟以内。
AI.conclusion: EvoNote的实验结果证实，通过演化经验记忆和细粒度信用分配，自进化的笔记生成框架能够显著提升健康谣言纠正的效果和效率，其改进归因于更强的证据利用和可复用的纠正策略，为健康虚假信息治理提供了一种有前景的新范式。

title: TriAlign: Towards Universal Truth Consistency in Personalized LLM Alignment
summary: Personalized large language models adapt responses to users' preferences and social attributes, but can introduce substantial universal truth inconsistencies across social groups, where some groups systematically receive less accurate responses on objective tasks. Existing alignment methods either ignore personalization or mainly focus on subjective preference alignment, largely overlooking fairness and consistency in universal truths. To address this gap, we study Truth-Invariant Alignment (TIA), an alignment problem for personalized LLMs that aims to ensure universal truths remain consistent across social groups while preserving personalization. We propose TriAlign, the first offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for TIA, where each social group is modeled as an agent interacting. TriAlign jointly optimizes universal truth accuracy, cross-group truth consistency, and personalization through a fairness-aware objective and an explicit inconsistency penalty. Experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that TriAlign achieves a stronger balance among these three objectives than strong baselines, reducing universal truth disparities across social groups while improving both objective task performance and personalization quality.

AI.tldr: 提出TriAlign，首个面向个性化大语言模型的离线多智能体强化学习框架，用于解决Truth-Invariant Alignment问题，在保持个性化的同时减少通用真理在不同社会群体间的不一致性。
AI.motivation: 个性化大语言模型会根据用户偏好和社会属性调整回复，但这可能导致不同社会群体在客观任务上系统性接收到不一致的准确响应，引发通用真理不一致问题。现有对齐方法要么忽略个性化，要么主要关注主观偏好对齐，缺乏对通用真理公平性和一致性的关注。
AI.method: 提出TriAlign框架，将每个社会群体建模为一个智能体，采用离线多智能体强化学习（MARL）联合优化三个目标：通用真理准确率、跨群体真理一致性和个性化程度。该框架通过一个公平性感知目标和显式的不一致性惩罚项实现三重目标的协同优化。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试上的实验表明，TriAlign在三个目标之间取得了比强基线方法更优的平衡，显著减少了跨社会群体的通用真理差异，同时提升了客观任务表现和个性化质量。
AI.conclusion: TriAlign验证了通过多智能体强化学习可以同时兼顾个性化、真理准确性和跨群体公平性，为个性化LLM的公平对齐提供了有效的技术路径，对构建兼顾个性化与公平性的语言模型具有重要启示。

title: Single-Channel Tissue Segmentation via Cross-Modal Distillation from Foundation Models
summary: Multiplexed fluorescence microscopy improves tissue segmentation by providing complementary channels including nuclear (DAPI) and membrane (E-cadherin), that together encode richer spatial context than single-channel imaging alone. However, multiplexed models require all channels at inference, limiting deployment where only a subset is available. This work proposes a cross-modal knowledge distillation framework that transfers semantic information from a frozen foundation model teacher processing multiplexed input to a lightweight student operating on the nuclear channel only. The distillation objective combines MSE-based probability matching, boundary-aware supervision, and learnable uncertainty weighting. SAM ViT-H and CellSAM are evaluated as teachers across four U-Net students: Swin-Tiny (27M), ResNet18 (11M), EfficientNet-B0 (5.3M), and MobileNetV3 (1.5M), on TissueNet and BBBC038. On TissueNet, the SAM-distilled Swin-Tiny student achieves Dice 78.36 (plus or minus 1.44), a 13.05-point improvement over the no-KD baseline (65.31 plus or minus 1.35) and 87.9% recovery of teacher oracle performance (89.12 plus or minus 1.21) at a 23x parameter reduction. KD consistently improves all four students by approximately 12 Dice points, confirming architecture-agnostic distillation. SAM ViT-H outperforms CellSAM as teacher across all settings. Cross-dataset evaluation on BBBC038 shows consistent gains without teacher retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出一种跨模态知识蒸馏框架，利用冻结的SAM ViT-H基础模型教师处理多通道荧光显微图像，将语义信息蒸馏至仅使用核通道的轻量级U-Net学生模型，在TissueNet上实现23倍参数量缩减下恢复教师87.9%性能，学生Dice提升约12个点。
AI.motivation: 多通道荧光显微成像虽能显著提升组织分割精度，但现有复用模型在推理时要求所有通道齐备，限制了其在仅部分通道可用场景下的部署；研究旨在解决多通道模型对输入模态的刚性依赖，实现仅核通道下的高性能分割。
AI.method: 提出跨模态知识蒸馏框架，以冻结的SAM ViT-H或CellSAM作为教师处理多通道（DAPI与E-cadherin）输入，以Swin-Tiny、ResNet18、EfficientNet-B0或MobileNetV3为骨架的U-Net作为学生仅处理核通道；蒸馏损失由MSE概率匹配、边界感知监督和可学习不确定性加权三部分组合而成。
AI.result: 在TissueNet上，SAM蒸馏的Swin-Tiny学生达到Dice 78.36，较无KD基线（65.31）提升13.05个点，以23倍参数量恢复教师oracle性能（89.12）的87.9%；四种学生架构均一致提升约12个Dice点，证实蒸馏的架构无关性；SAM ViT-H教师优于CellSAM；在BBBC038跨数据集评估中无需重新训练教师即取得一致增益。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏能有效将多通道基础模型的语义知识迁移至单通道轻量学生，实现大幅参数压缩下接近教师性能的分割精度；该范式具有架构通用性和跨数据集泛化能力，为实际场景中仅可获取有限荧光通道的显微图像分析提供了实用解决方案。

title: Unified Context Evolution for LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents can solve multi-step interactive tasks by combining reasoning with environment feedback, yet each episode starts from the same fixed context and any useful strategy discovered along the way is lost once the task ends. Existing approaches either limit learning to the current task or pool all experience into a single untyped store, without distinguishing knowledge types, tracking quality through use, or balancing what the library still lacks. We introduce Unified Context Evolution (UCE), a gradient-free framework that externalizes agent experience into an evolving library of typed Evolvable Context Units (ECUs). UCE decomposes experience into four complementary types (Memory, Strategy, Workflow, and Skill), each generated from trajectories under type-specific conditions, retrieved at decision time, scored through repeated usage outcomes, and pruned when no longer valuable. A scheduling module allocates each cycle's generation budget toward the types where the library is weakest. Across two interactive benchmarks, UCE raises ALFWorld success from 75.4% to 96.3% and WebShop task score from 45.1% to 61.3%, and the accumulated library transfers to alternative actor backbones without retraining.

AI.tldr: UCE提出了一种免梯度框架，通过将智能体经验外部化为四类可演化上下文单元（记忆、策略、工作流、技能）并动态调度生成预算，解决了LLM智能体在交互任务中跨回合经验积累与知识类型区分的问题，在ALFWorld和WebShop上显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在执行多步交互任务时，每个回合从固定上下文开始，回合中发现的任何有用策略在任务结束后即丢失；已有方法要么将学习限制在当前任务内，要么将所有经验不加区分地存入单一存储库，既不区分知识类型，也不通过使用情况跟踪质量或平衡库中缺失的知识类型。
AI.method: UCE提出了一种免梯度框架，将智能体经验外部化为一个可演化的库，库中包含四类可演化上下文单元（ECU）：Memory（记忆）、Strategy（策略）、Workflow（工作流）和Skill（技能），每个ECU从轨迹中依据类型特定条件生成，在决策时检索，通过重复使用结果评分，并在不再有价值时剪枝；一个调度模块将每轮的生成预算分配给库中最弱的类型。
AI.result: 在两个交互式基准测试中，UCE将ALFWorld的成功率从75.4%提升至96.3%，将WebShop的任务分数从45.1%提升至61.3%；累积的库可迁移到替代的智能体主干模型而无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: UCE通过结构化的外部经验库和自适应调度机制，有效实现了LLM智能体的跨回合知识积累与复用，显著提升了交互任务的性能，且所学知识具有良好的跨模型可迁移性，为构建持续学习的智能体系统提供了新思路。

title: Token Predictors Are Not Planners: Building Physically Grounded Causal Reasoners
summary: Current benchmarks for embodied vision-language planning often favor linguistic next-token prediction over physically grounded next-state reasoning. This rewards models that mimic statistical language priors rather than track causal dependencies, reducing physical planning to shallow sequence modeling. We argue that reliable physical autonomy requires a shift from linguistically grounded token prediction toward physically grounded causal reasoning. To this end, we introduce Causal-Plan-Bench, a high-fidelity diagnostic suite curated through multi-stage verification to evaluate embodied planning across four causal dimensions. We also construct Causal-Plan-1M, a million-scale corpus of explicit reasoning traces produced by a four-stage annotation pipeline over egocentric videos. Extensive evaluation shows that leading models still struggle to demonstrate genuine physical agency, with Gemini 3 Pro reaching only 38.18 on our benchmark. In contrast, our training recipe enables Causal Planner, built on Qwen3-VL-8B, to internalize physical logic for more accurate next-state estimation. The model achieves strong in-domain performance and cross-benchmark generalization, and reveals a Causal Scaling Law: scaling causal training data to one million instances yields a 36.3% relative gain, from 33.22 to 45.28. Overall, our work provides a concrete step toward turning agents from superficial token predictors into physically grounded causal reasoners.

AI.tldr: 本文提出因果规划基准Causal-Plan-Bench和百万级因果推理语料Causal-Plan-1M，并基于Qwen3-VL-8B训练出Causal Planner模型，揭示了因果缩放定律，推动具身智能体从浅层语言统计预测转向物理因果推理。
AI.motivation: 当前具身视觉-语言规划基准倾向于奖励基于语言统计先验的下一词元预测，而非基于物理因果的下一状态推理，导致智能体将物理规划退化为浅层序列建模而缺乏真正的物理自主性，因此亟需从语言驱动的词元预测转向物理驱动的因果推理。
AI.method: 论文构建了Causal-Plan-Bench诊断基准，通过多阶段验证覆盖四个因果维度进行具身规划评估；同时构建Causal-Plan-1M百万级语料，采用四阶段标注流水线从自我中心视频中提取显式因果推理轨迹；并基于Qwen3-VL-8B训练Causal Planner模型，使其内化物理逻辑以实现更准确的下一状态估计。
AI.result: 主流模型在Causal-Plan-Bench上表现不佳，Gemini 3 Pro仅达38.18分；而Causal Planner在域内性能和跨基准泛化上均表现强劲，并揭示了因果缩放定律：将因果训练数据扩展至百万规模带来36.3%的相对提升（从33.22升至45.28）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为将具身智能体从 superficial 的词元预测器转变为物理因果推理者提供了具体路径，证明了因果推理数据的规模化训练能显著提升模型对物理逻辑的内化能力及下一状态估计的准确性。

title: CV-Arena: An Open Benchmark for Instructional Computer Vision Problem Solving with Human-AI Collaborative Preferences
summary: Instruction-guided image editing is becoming a general interface for visual work, yet existing benchmarks still focus largely on narrow appearance edits and do not fully capture the diversity of real-image tasks in professional workflows. Here, we define instructional computer vision problem solving as a broader formulation of image editing: given a real input image and a natural-language instruction, a system must produce an edited output that realizes the requested transformation while satisfying explicit preservation, geometric, physical, and usability constraints. We introduce CV-Arena, an open benchmark designed to evaluate this capability at professional scales. CV-Arena contains 12K high-resolution real-image instruction pairs spanning 16 instruction-based visual task types, constructed using CogRetriever, a dual-track retrieval-and-curation pipeline that combines targeted web search, agentic query refinement, verification, and traceability. To evaluate models at scale while preserving human fidelity, we propose Active Elo, a human-AI collaborative preference protocol that leverages CV-Judge, a logic-gated, multi-dimensional VLM evaluator, to reject clear failures and resolve high-confidence comparisons; and to route close, high-quality comparisons to expert raters. Mixed human and AI supervision is then aggregated through reliability-weighted Elo updates. Our comprehensive evaluation of 21 systems, including proprietary, open-source, and agentic models, on CV-Arena reveals persistent gaps in instruction adherence, physical reasoning, structural control, and fine-grained detail preservation. We further develop CV-Agent, a lightweight agentic model that combines planning, editing, and verification, and demonstrate that closed-loop reasoning is a promising direction for professional-grade instruction-following visual editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CV-Arena，一个包含12K高分辨率真实图像指令对、覆盖16种视觉任务类型的指令驱动图像编辑基准，并引入Active Elo协议和CV-Judge评估器以高效、保真地评测模型；在21个系统上的评估揭示了当前模型在指令遵循、物理推理和细节保持方面的持续不足，而所提出的轻量级智能体模型CV-Agent展示了闭环推理在专业级编辑中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有的指令驱动图像编辑基准大多局限于狭义的表面外观编辑，无法全面反映专业工作流中真实图像任务的多样性。本文旨在填补这一空白，将指令驱动的计算机视觉问题求解定义为更广义的图像编辑形式，并构建一个覆盖多种约束（如保留性、几何、物理和可用性）的大规模、高保真基准，以系统评估模型在专业场景下的能力。
AI.method: 本文构建了CV-Arena基准，包含12K高分辨率真实图像指令对，覆盖16种指令型视觉任务类型，数据通过双轨检索与筛选管道CogRetriever（结合目标化网络搜索、智能体查询精化、验证和可追溯性）生成。为平衡大规模评估与人类保真度，提出了Active Elo协议，利用逻辑门控的多维VLM评估器CV-Judge拒绝明显失败样本并解决高置信度比较，将难分样本路由给专家评审员，通过可靠性加权的Elo更新聚合人类与AI的混合监督。此外，开发了轻量级智能体模型CV-Agent，整合规划、编辑和验证的闭环推理流程。
AI.result: 在CV-Arena上对21个系统（包括专有、开源和智能体模型）的全面评估表明，当前模型在指令遵循、物理推理、结构控制和细粒度细节保持方面仍存在持续不足。CV-Agent作为轻量级智能体模型，通过闭环推理在专业级指令遵循型视觉编辑任务上展示了有前景的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了现有图像编辑模型在专业级指令理解与多约束满足方面的显著差距，证明了闭环推理（规划-编辑-验证）是提升指令驱动视觉编辑性能的有效方向，并为该领域提供了一个开放、可扩展的基准评估框架。

title: TVIR: Building Deep Research Agents Towards Text--Visual Interleaved Report Generation
summary: Deep Research Agents have shown strong capability in multi-step information retrieval, reasoning, and long-form report generation, but existing benchmarks and systems remain predominantly text-centric, with limited evaluation of whether visual elements are factually reliable and well aligned with the surrounding analysis. To address this gap, we introduce TVIR (Text--Visual Interleaved Report Generation), which includes TVIR-Bench, a benchmark of 100 expert-curated multimodal deep research tasks that require visual elements to serve specific analytical sub-goals, and TVIR-Agent, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that serves as a strong baseline for constructing outlines, retrieving images, generating charts with traceable sources, and composing reports through context-aware sequential writing. We further develop a dual-path evaluation framework that combines Textual Assessment and Visual Assessment. Experiments across nine deep research systems show that TVIR-Agent achieves strong overall performance, underscoring the importance of explicit multimodal design and evaluation for evidence-driven report generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TVIR，包含TVIR-Bench基准（100个专家精选的多模态深度研究任务）和TVIR-Agent（层次化多智能体框架），用于评估和生成文本-视觉交错报告，实验表明显式多模态设计和评估对证据驱动报告生成至关重要。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究智能体主要聚焦文本处理，缺乏对视觉元素（如图表、图片）在事实可靠性和与文本分析对齐方面的系统评估，亟需涵盖文本-视觉交错报告生成的基准和评估框架。
AI.method: 提出TVIR-Agent，一个层次化多智能体框架，包含提纲构建、图像检索、可溯源图表生成和上下文感知顺序写作等模块；同时构建TVIR-Bench（100个专家精选的多模态深度研究任务）以及结合文本评估与视觉评估的双路径评价框架。
AI.result: 在九个深度研究系统上的实验表明，TVIR-Agent取得了优异的整体性能，验证了显式多模态设计和评估对于证据驱动报告生成的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了现有深度研究系统在视觉元素可靠性方面的不足，强调了在报告生成中显式融入多模态设计与评估的必要性，为未来多模态深度研究智能体的发展提供了基准和基线框架。

title: Does Compression Preserve Uncertainty? A Unified Benchmark for Quantized and Sparse LLMs via Conformal Prediction
summary: Model compression techniques such as quantization and pruning are widely used to reduce the deployment cost of large language models (LLMs), with existing evaluations focusing almost exclusively on accuracy preservation. However, in safety-critical applications, a model's ability to reliably quantify its own uncertainty is equally important. We ask: does compression preserve this ability? To answer this question, we benchmark 12 LLMs under various compression configurations across five NLP tasks, using conformal prediction to provide a rigorous, distribution-free measure of uncertainty. Our experiments reveal that: (I) compression frequently decouples accuracy from uncertainty; (II) larger models absorb compression-induced uncertainty far more effectively than smaller ones; and (III) uncertainty inflation is often threshold-like rather than gradual. These results suggest that accuracy-only evaluation is insufficient for assessing the deployment readiness of compressed LLMs, and that uncertainty-aware benchmarking should be a standard component of model compression pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究模型压缩（量化和剪枝）对大型语言模型不确定性量化能力的影响，发现压缩会显著破坏模型校准的可靠性，并提出应将不确定性感知评估纳入压缩管道标准流程。
AI.motivation: 现有模型压缩评估几乎仅关注精度保持，忽略了安全关键应用中模型可靠量化自身不确定性的同等重要性，本文旨在填补这一研究空白，探究压缩是否破坏了不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 对12种大型语言模型在多种压缩配置下进行基准测试，覆盖五项NLP任务，采用共形预测（conformal prediction）提供严格的无分布不确定性度量，以系统评估压缩对不确定性量化能力的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现：(I) 压缩经常导致准确率与不确定性解耦；(II) 大型模型吸收压缩引入的不确定性的能力远强于小型模型；(III) 不确定性膨胀往往呈现阈值式而非渐进式特征。
AI.conclusion: 仅以准确率评估不足以判断压缩后LLM的部署就绪状态，不确定性感知的基准测试应成为模型压缩管道的标准组成部分，为安全关键应用提供更全面的模型可靠性保障。

title: Boundary-Protection W8A8 HiFloat8 Quantization for Large-Scale Text-to-Video Diffusion Transformers
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to ICME 2026 Grand Challenge
summary: We present a post-training quantization (PTQ) approach for Wan2.1-T2V-14B, a 14-billion-parameter text-to-video diffusion transformer, targeting the W8A8 HiFloat8 (HiF8) format on Ascend 910B NPUs. A central challenge in quantizing video DiT models is the heterogeneous activation distribution across transformer blocks: boundary blocks (the first and last few blocks) exhibit fundamentally different statistical properties from middle blocks, making uniform quantization ineffective. We conduct a systematic per-block activation analysis across all 40 WanAttentionBlocks and use the findings to motivate a boundary-protection strategy that retains the first two and last three blocks in BF16 while quantizing the remaining 35 blocks with W8A8 HiF8. The proposed PTQ method matches or marginally exceeds the BF16 baseline on all five VBench dimensions evaluated, indicating no measurable accuracy loss within the 5-prompt evaluation set. An ablation study over four protection configurations confirms that full boundary protection yields the highest average VBench score, validating the data-driven block selection. We additionally investigate quantization-aware training (QAT) as a complementary fine-tuning stage and analyze the conditions under which it fails to outperform plain PTQ on single-card hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对140亿参数文生视频DiT模型Wan2.1-T2V-14B的后训练量化方法，通过边界保护策略（前2后3块保留BF16、其余35块量化至W8A8 HiF8）在Ascend 910B NPU上实现无损量化，在VBench五个维度上持平或超越BF16基线。
AI.motivation: 视频DiT模型量化面临的核心挑战在于Transformer块的激活分布存在异质性：边界块（前几个和最后几个块）与中间块的统计特性根本不同，导致均匀量化策略失效，亟需针对性的非均匀量化方案以在不损失精度的情况下实现模型压缩。
AI.method: 对所有40个WanAttentionBlock进行逐块激活分析，基于分析结果设计边界保护策略：保留前2个和最后3个块使用BF16精度，其余35个块量化至W8A8 HiF8格式；此外还研究了量化感知训练作为后训练量化的补充微调阶段，并分析了其未能优于纯后训练量化的条件。
AI.result: 所提后训练量化方法在所有五个VBench维度上匹配或略微超过BF16基线，在5个提示的评估集内未观察到可测量的精度损失；消融实验表明完全边界保护配置在所有四种保护配置中取得最高的平均VBench分数，验证了数据驱动的块选择策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于激活分布异质性分析的边界保护策略可以有效实现视频DiT模型的无损量化，量化感知训练在单卡硬件上可能无法超越纯后训练量化方法，这为大规模视频生成模型的部署提供了实用的量化指导原则。

title: PaSBench-Video: A Streaming Video Benchmark for Proactive Safety Warning
summary: Between the first visible sign of danger and the moment an accident occurs, there is often a window where intervention remains possible. Video-capable multimodal large language models (MLLMs) could serve as always-on safety monitors that issue warnings during this window. Yet current benchmarks do not test this ability: they rely on static inputs, ignore timing precision, and omit false-positive measurement on safe scenes. We present PaSBench-Video, a 740-video benchmark with 481 risk and 259 no-risk videos across four domains: driving, healthcare, daily life, and industrial production. Risk videos are annotated with frame-level risk onset and accident boundaries. A model must observe the video causally and produce a warning that is both temporally calibrated and content-correct. Testing 13 MLLMs, we find that no model exceeds 20.0% on our strictest metric, and recall is tightly coupled with false-positive rate, with Pearson correlation 0.64: higher detection comes only at the cost of triggering warnings on the majority of safe clips. Performance splits sharply by domain: models achieve moderate recall at low false-positive rates in daily life, where risks are inherently anomalous, yet fire indiscriminately in driving, where routine and hazardous scenes look alike. These results indicate that current models rely on scene-level activity cues rather than reasoning about emerging harm.

AI.tldr: PaSBench-Video 是一个包含 740 个视频（481 个风险场景和 259 个无风险场景）的基准测试，用于评估多模态大语言模型在危险发生前发出及时警告的能力，覆盖驾驶、医疗、日常生活和工业生产四个领域。实验表明，现有模型在此任务上表现不佳（严格指标下准确率不超 20.0%），且召回率与误报率高度相关（Pearson 系数 0.64），表明模型更多依赖场景活动线索而非对危害的推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试无法评估视频多模态大语言模型在危险信号出现到事故实际发生之间的时间窗口内发出及时、精确警告的能力：它们依赖静态输入、忽略时间精度要求，并且缺乏对安全场景误报率的测量。这一能力缺口对于将 MLLM 用作全天候安全监控器至关重要。
AI.method: 作者构建了 PaSBench-Video 基准测试，包含 740 个视频（481 个风险视频和 259 个无风险视频），涵盖驾驶、医疗、日常生活和工业生产四个领域。风险视频标注了帧级别的风险起始边界和事故边界，要求模型以因果方式观察视频并发出在时间校准和内容正确性上均满足要求的警告。论文测试了 13 个多模态大语言模型在该基准上的表现。
AI.result: 所有 13 个模型在最严格指标下均未超过 20.0% 的准确率，召回率与误报率之间呈现强相关（Pearson 相关系数 0.64），即更高的检测率必然以在大多数安全视频上触发警告为代价。模型性能在不同领域差异显著：在日常生活领域（风险本质上具有异常性）能以较低的误报率达到中等召回率，而在驾驶领域（常规场景与危险场景外观相似）则几乎不加区分地触发警告。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态大语言模型在预防性安全监控任务中表现不足，其行为依赖于场景层面的活动线索而非对潜在危害的因果推理，并且在视觉相似性高的安全与危险场景之间缺乏区分能力。这揭示了现有模型在时间敏感的安全应用中的根本局限性，需要新的推理机制来弥合观测与预判之间的鸿沟。

title: EVA-Net: Subject-Independent EEG Motor Decoding with Video-Derived Motor Priors
summary: Practical non-invasive Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) systems require EEG decoders with strong cross-subject generalization and minimal calibration. However, inter-subject variability and signal non-stationarity often entangle motor semantics with subject-specific noise, limiting subject-independent decoding. Recent multimodal approaches use text as a semantic anchor, yet text provides sparse and static supervision for inherently dynamic motor processes. To address this issue, we propose EVA-Net, a two-stage framework that uses action videos as semantic priors for subject-independent EEG motor decoding. In the first stage, EEG and video features are aligned in a shared space using cross-modal and supervised contrastive objectives to reduce subject-specific variation. In the second stage, video category prototypes and knowledge distillation transfer video-derived priors to an EEG-only classifier without adding inference overhead. Experiments on two public datasets show that EVA-Net achieves strong subject-independent decoding performance, including an 8.66% LOSO accuracy gain on EEGMMI. Ablation results further suggest that video provides a more effective semantic anchor than the text baseline considered in this work.

AI.tldr: EVA-Net提出了一个两阶段框架，利用动作视频作为语义先验实现跨被试的EEG运动解码，通过跨模态对比学习和对齐视频类别原型来减少个体差异，无需增加推理开销，在EEGMMI数据集上留一法准确率提升了8.66%。
AI.motivation: 非侵入式BCI系统需要具备强跨被试泛化能力且校准成本低的EEG解码器，但个体间差异和信号非平稳性常导致运动语义与被试特定噪声纠缠，限制了被试无关解码的性能；现有的多模态方法以文本作为语义锚点，但文本对被试间动态运动过程的监督是稀疏且静态的，无法有效捕捉运动信号的动态变化。
AI.method: EVA-Net是一个两阶段框架：第一阶段利用跨模态对比学习和有监督对比学习目标，将EEG和动作视频特征对齐到共享嵌入空间，从而减少被试特定变异；第二阶段通过视频类别原型和知识蒸馏技术，将视频导出的先验知识迁移至纯EEG分类器中，不引入额外推理负担。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，EVA-Net实现了强大的被试无关解码性能，在EEGMMI数据集上留一法准确率提升达8.66%；消融实验表明，视频作为语义锚点比文本基线更有效。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，利用动作视频作为语义先验可以有效提升EEG运动解码的跨被试泛化能力，且视频提供的动态监督优于静态文本锚点，为开发无需校准的实用BCI系统提供了新思路。

title: Reasmory: 3D Reconstruction as Explicit Memory for VLMs Spatial Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit emerging spatial reasoning capabilities, yet they remain unreliable on tasks requiring precise spatial understanding, such as viewpoint reasoning, directional comparison, and distance estimation. In multi-view images and monocular videos, relevant spatial cues are often sparse and distributed across redundant observations, making them difficult to organize and exploit. Reconstruction-based Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) offer a natural way to aggregate such observations into explicit spatial memory, such as point clouds. However, simply exposing reconstruction models as free-form tools is brittle, VLMs may invoke tools incorrectly, skip required spatial transformations, or misuse intermediate results. We propose \textbf{Reasmory}, a framework that formulates spatial reasoning as structured program execution over reconstructed spatial memory. Reasmory constructs explicit 3D memory, augments it with semantically grounded 3D object instances, and introduces a lightweight Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that constrains how VLMs query objects and cameras, transform viewpoints, and render observations during reasoning. Generated programs are parsed and validated before execution, enabling more reliable interaction with spatial memory than unconstrained tool use. Experiments on multi-view image and video spatial reasoning benchmarks show consistent gains of 6--18\% over strong baselines, including GPT-5-mini and Gemini-3-flash, indicating that explicit 3D memory is most useful when accessed through constrained, validated operations rather than free-form tool calls.

AI.tldr: Reasmory是一个将空间推理形式化为结构化程序执行的框架，通过构建显式3D记忆、语义化3D目标实例和轻量级领域特定语言(DSL)，使VLMs以受约束和可验证的方式查询和操作空间记忆，在多视图图像和视频空间推理基准上比强基线提升6–18%。
AI.motivation: VLMs虽然展现出新兴的空间推理能力，但在需要精确空间理解的任务（如视点推理、方向比较和距离估计）上仍不可靠。多视图图像和单目视频中的相关空间线索稀疏且分布在冗余观测中，难以组织和利用。重建基础模型虽能聚合观测为显式空间记忆，但将其作为自由形式工具暴露给VLMs时，模型可能错误调用工具、跳过必要的空间变换或误用中间结果，缺乏可靠性。
AI.method: Reasmory提出将空间推理形式化为结构化程序执行过程：首先构建显式3D记忆并增强语义化的3D目标实例，然后引入轻量级领域特定语言(DSL)来约束VLMs在推理过程中查询对象和相机、变换视点以及渲染观测的方式。生成的程序在执行前经过解析和验证，相比无约束的工具使用能够实现更可靠的空间记忆交互。
AI.result: 在多视图图像和视频空间推理基准上，Reasmory比包括GPT-5-mini和Gemini-3-flash在内的强基线方法取得了6–18%的持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，显式3D记忆在通过受约束、可验证的操作而非自由形式的工具调用访问时最为有效，这揭示了结构化程序执行范式对于提升VLMs空间推理可靠性的关键价值。

title: Towards Multidisciplinary Summarization of Hospital Stays: Efficient Sentence-Level Clinical Provenance Categorization
comment: 5 pages. Submitted preprint version of a paper accepted to AIME 2026. This version may differ from the camera-ready manuscript and the final Version of Record. The Version of Record will be available from Springer Nature once published
summary: Effective "all-team" summarization in high-complexity settings like the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) requires aggregating insights from diverse disciplines (physicians, nurses, therapists) spread across hundreds of clinical free-text notes. Simply pooling heterogeneous text often leads to incoherent outputs. Structured summarization therefore first requires accurate categorization of sentence-level provenance across multi-source notes. This pilot study introduces a clinical provenance categorization pipeline using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of large language models (LLMs). We adapted two Llama-3 models (8B and 70B) to MedSecId, a corpus of 2,002 MIMIC-III (Adult ICU) notes annotated with clinical provenance headers, achieving in-domain Macro F1 scores above 92% for both models. To evaluate cross-domain generalization, we assessed model capacity (8B vs. 70B) and quantization on a gold-standard dataset of 227 sentence-level spans derived from three multi-disciplinary NICU summaries. Experimental results demonstrate a scale-dependent transfer effect: while SFT produced only marginal changes for the 8B model, it substantially improved the 70B model, increasing Macro F1 by 7%. Notably, the quantized fine-tuned 70B model outperformed its full-precision baseline while substantially reducing computational requirements. These findings suggest that sufficient model capacity is critical for preserving semantic flexibility during cross-domain clinical transfer and that efficient quantized adaptation can enable structured provenance modeling for downstream summarization.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）有监督微调的临床来源分类流水线，用于新生儿重症监护室（NICU）多学科摘要生成。通过微调Llama-3模型（8B和70B），在域内F1超过92%并在跨域迁移中验证了模型容量对语义灵活性的关键作用，其中70B模型经量化微调后性能提升7%且计算开销显著降低。
AI.motivation: 现有"全团队"摘要方法在高复杂度临床场景（如NICU）中难以有效聚合来自多学科（医生、护士、治疗师）的数百份临床自由文本笔记，直接混合异构文本会导致输出不连贯，因此亟需一种能够准确分类句子级来源的结构化摘要技术。
AI.method: 提出临床来源分类流水线，采用有监督微调（SFT）方法适配Llama-3（8B和70B）模型至MedSecId语料库（2,002份MIMIC-III成人ICU笔记，含临床来源标注）。在跨域泛化评估中，测试了模型容量（8B vs. 70B）和量化策略对包含227个句子级跨度的多学科NICU摘要金标准数据集的影响。
AI.result: 两个模型在域内均取得超过92%的Macro F1分数；跨域迁移中，SFT对8B模型提升有限，但使70B模型的Macro F1提升7%；量化后的微调70B模型性能超越全精度基线模型，同时大幅降低了计算需求。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，足够的模型容量是跨域临床迁移中保持语义灵活性的关键，高效的量化适配方法能够在不牺牲性能的前提下实现结构化来源建模，为下游汇总摘要任务提供了可行路径。

title: Absorbing Complexity: An Interaction-Native Knowledge Harness for Financial LLM Agents
summary:
Financial AI agents often fail for a simple reason: they make users carry the complexity. A user must repeatedly restate goals, risk preferences, portfolio context, past judgments, and shifting market assumptions, while the agent answers, retrieves, acts, and forgets. In finance, this is not just inconvenient. In tasks such as market analysis, copy-trading review, and trade preparation, forgotten context and stale memory can create latency, repeated errors, weak auditability, and unsafe decisions.
  We propose the interaction-native knowledge harness (InKH), an architecture for financial LLM agents that absorbs complexity into the system. InKH converts user, market, portfolio, and tool events into structured operational knowledge. It uses passive knowledge injection to assemble a bounded working context buffer before the main model step, temporal graph memory for low-latency retrieval, a wiki audit surface for human-readable governance, and background extraction with maturity, decay, and write-time invalidation.
  We evaluate InKH on a reproducible controlled synthetic benchmark with 24 random seeds, 4 rounds, 80 episodes per round, and 6 baselines, producing 46,080 baseline-conditioned evaluations. InKH achieves mean task quality of 0.815 at 900 ms latency. Compared with agent-driven wiki-walk memory, it reduces latency by 82.95 percent, token cost by 82.29 percent, and stale-knowledge usage by 96.58 percent, while improving quality by 0.108 and traceability by 0.461. Compared with a temporal-graph system without invalidation, it improves quality by 0.050 and reduces stale-memory usage by 96.58 percent with comparable serving cost.
  The results support a design thesis for financial AI: adoption happens when complexity is absorbed by the system rather than transferred to the user. The benchmark validates architecture-level behavior, not live trading performance.

AI.tldr: 提出交互原生知识框架（InKH），一种面向金融LLM智能体的架构，通过被动知识注入、时序图记忆、Wiki审计面和带衰变与失效的提取机制，将上下文与记忆管理的复杂性吸收到系统中，在合成基准上以900ms延迟实现0.815任务质量，同时相比智能体驱动的Wiki-walk记忆降低82.95%延迟、82.29%令牌成本和96.58%过时知识使用。
AI.motivation: 现有金融AI智能体往往将复杂性转嫁给用户：用户需要反复陈述目标、风险偏好、投资组合上下文和历史判断，而智能体每次回答、检索、执行后即遗忘。这种遗忘的上下文和陈旧记忆导致延迟、重复错误、弱可审计性和不安全决策，亟需一种将复杂性吸收到系统内部的架构。
AI.method: 提出交互原生知识框架（InKH），核心包括：（1）被动知识注入，在主模型步骤前自动组装有界工作上下文缓冲；（2）时序图记忆，支持低延迟检索；（3）Wiki审计表面，提供人类可读的治理界面；（4）背景提取机制，引入成熟度、衰变和写时失效策略，将用户、市场、投资组合和工具事件转化为结构化操作知识。
AI.result: 在可复现的受控合成基准（含24个随机种子、4轮、每轮80个episode、6个基线）上共获得46,080次基线条件评估：InKH达到平均任务质量0.815、延迟900ms；相比智能体驱动的Wiki-walk记忆，延迟降低82.95%、令牌成本降低82.29%、过时知识使用降低96.58%，质量提升0.108，可追踪性提升0.461；相比无失效机制的时序图系统，质量提升0.050，过时记忆使用降低96.58%，服务成本相当。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持的设计论点是：金融AI的采纳发生在复杂性被系统吸收而非转移给用户时。InKH在架构层面验证了记忆管理、失效和可审计性设计对金融智能体的有效性，但基准验证的是架构级行为而非实盘交易性能。

title: An Open-Source Benchmark and Baseline for Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and language-guided grounding abilities, yet their capacity for multi-temporal visual reasoning remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation (MTRS)}, a new task that aims to segment language-described temporal changes from multi-temporal images. MTRS extends conventional referring segmentation and change detection by jointly requiring temporal correspondence reasoning, language grounding, and pixel-level mask prediction. We propose \textbf{CRAFT-Agent}, an automated data construction pipeline with human auditing, and build \textbf{MTRefSeg-21K}, the first MTRS benchmark, containing 21K high-quality multi-temporal image-text-mask triplets across diverse scenes, viewpoints, and domains. Benchmarking a broad set of VLM- and LVLM-based models reveals that direct inference performs poorly, while task-specific fine-tuning remains limited. To address this, we propose \textbf{MTRefSeg-R1}, a change-aware LVLM framework trained with a two-stage strategy. It first learns general temporal-change perception from 20K vision-only bi-temporal samples, and is then fine-tuned on MTRefSeg-21K for fine-grained language-guided temporal localization. MTRefSeg-R1 explicitly models cross-temporal visual differences, aligns language instructions with temporal variations, and predicts referred change masks. Extensive experiments show that MTRefSeg-R1 achieves strong and often superior performance compared with existing LVLM baselines, demonstrating the challenge and potential of MTRS.

AI.tldr: 提出多时序指代分割（MTRS）新任务及首个基准MTRefSeg-21K，并设计CRAFT-Agent自动化数据构建流程与MTRefSeg-R1两阶段训练框架，实验表明该框架在语言引导的多时序变化分割中显著优于现有LVLM基线。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视觉理解和语言引导定位方面表现优异，但其对多时序图像的视觉推理能力（尤其是语言描述的时序变化分割）尚未被充分探索，缺乏相应的任务定义、数据和专用模型。
AI.method: 首先定义了多时序指代分割（MTRS）任务，要求模型同时完成时序对应推理、语言定位和像素级掩码预测；提出了CRAFT-Agent自动化数据构建管线并辅以人工审核，构建了包含21K高质量多时序图像-文本-掩码三元组的MTRefSeg-21K基准；提出了MTRefSeg-R1框架，该框架采用两阶段训练策略：先在20K纯视觉双时序样本上学习通用时序变化感知能力，再在MTRefSeg-21K上进行细粒度语言引导的时序定位微调，显式建模跨时序视觉差异并实现语言指令与时序变化的对齐。
AI.result: 在MTRefSeg-21K基准上对多种VLM和LVLM模型进行评估，发现直接推理效果较差，任务特定微调仍有局限；MTRefSeg-R1在所有基线中取得了强且通常最优的性能，证实了MTRS任务的挑战性及所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MTRS是一项融合时序推理、语言理解和像素级分割的具有挑战性的新任务；CRAFT-Agent和MTRefSeg-21K为后续研究提供了可靠的数据基础；MTRefSeg-R1的两阶段训练策略为LVLM在多时序场景下的语言引导变化感知提供了有效范式。

title: SkillHarm: Lifecycle-Aware Skill-Based Attacks via Automated Construction
summary: Agent skills occupy a privileged position in the agent workflow, as agents are expected to implicitly follow and execute them, rendering third-party skills a vulnerable attack surface. Existing studies have revealed unsafe agent behaviors induced by skill-based attacks, but they primarily evaluate poisoned skills within a single task execution and enumerate harms through ad-hoc risk lists. To bridge these gaps, we introduce SkillHarm, a benchmark of skill-based attacks across the skill-use lifecycle, paired with a systematic taxonomy of skill-relevant risks. SkillHarm evaluates two attack scenarios: Fixed-Payload Poisoning (FPP), where a fixed poisoned skill package directly compromises any task session that invokes it, and Self-Mutating Poisoning (SMP), where an initially benign execution silently mutates persistent skill content, deferring harm until a subsequent reuse. It further defines 12 risk types based on the agent workflow component targeted by the harm: data pipelines, system environments, and agent autonomy. To instantiate these attacks at scale, we build AutoSkillHarm, an automated construction pipeline with coding agents driven by natural-language harnesses. The resulting benchmark contains 879 attack samples across 71 skills. Experiments show that current agents remain vulnerable with attack success rates up to 86.3% in FPP and 69.3% in SMP. Our analysis further reveals a latent risk: many apparent attack failures stem from the agent failing to engage with the poisoned file rather than genuine resistance, and current defenses still fail to reliably mitigate the threat.

AI.tldr: SkillHarm 是一个针对智能体技能使用生命周期的基准测试，系统性地定义了固定载荷投毒（FPP）和自变异投毒（SMP）两种攻击场景及12种风险类型，并通过自动化构建管道 AutoSkillHarm 生成879个攻击样本，实验表明当前智能体在FPP和SMP下的攻击成功率分别高达86.3%和69.3%，且现有防御措施难以可靠缓解该威胁。
AI.motivation: 现有研究揭示了由技能引发的智能体不安全行为，但主要局限于在单次任务执行中评估投毒技能，并通过临时性风险列表枚举危害，缺乏对技能使用全生命周期中攻击场景和风险类型的系统性定义与评估。
AI.method: 作者提出了SkillHarm基准，包含两种攻击场景：固定载荷投毒（FPP）——固定投毒技能包直接危害任何调用它的任务会话；自变异投毒（SMP）——初始良性的执行静默变异持久化技能内容，将危害延迟到后续复用。基于智能体工作流中受危害的组件（数据管道、系统环境、智能体自主性），定义了12种风险类型，并构建了AutoSkillHarm自动化管道，由自然语言驱动的编码智能体大规模生成攻击样本。
AI.result: SkillHarm包含71个技能下的879个攻击样本。实验表明，当前智能体在FPP下攻击成功率高达86.3%，SMP下为69.3%。分析还揭示了一个潜在风险：许多看似攻击失败的情况实际上是由于智能体未能与中毒文件交互，而非真正的抵抗，且现有防御措施仍无法可靠地缓解威胁。
AI.conclusion: 该研究系统性地揭示了智能体技能使用全生命周期中的安全漏洞，指出了当前防御机制的不足，并强调许多攻击失败表象下隐藏着智能体未能正确触发中毒文件的潜在风险，为未来智能体安全研究提供了重要的基准和方向。

title: SMH-Bench: Benchmarking LLM Agents for Environment-Grounded Reasoning and Action in Smart Homes
summary: Smart homes are evolving toward complex state-dependent living environments, requiring Large Language Models (LLMs) to reason over user intent, preferences, and multi-device interactions. However, existing smart-home benchmarks often focus on static instruction-to-API mapping or limited simulations, failing to evaluate whether LLMs can reason, interact, and act reliably in realistic household scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce SMH-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLMs in smart-home environments. Built upon HomeEnv, an executable and verifiable smart-home simulator, SMH-Bench contains 1,100 high-quality tasks spanning 7 categories and 22 fine-grained subcategories. It further stratifies tasks across simple, medium and complex homes, ranging from small apartments to dense multi-room environments with 135 devices. Experiments show that although frontier LLMs achieve strong performance on explicit control and query tasks, they still exhibit significant weaknesses in automation task scheduling, ambiguity handling and personalized reasoning, especially as home complexity increases. We hope SMH-Bench will facilitate the development of more reliable, context-aware, and practically deployable smart-home agents.

AI.tldr: SMH-Bench是一个基于可执行可验证的HomeEnv模拟器构建的智能家居基准测试，包含1,100个高质量任务，覆盖7大类22个子类，用于评估LLM在复杂家庭环境中的推理、交互和动作能力；实验表明前沿LLM在显式控制任务上表现优异，但在自动化调度、歧义处理和个性化推理方面仍存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有智能家居基准测试通常局限于静态指令到API的映射或受限模拟，无法全面评估LLM在真实家庭场景中进行推理、交互和可靠动作的能力，缺乏对状态依赖型多设备交互环境的系统评测。
AI.method: 论文构建了HomeEnv可执行可验证的智能家居模拟器，并在此基础上设计了SMH-Bench基准测试，包含1,100个高质量任务，涵盖7大类别和22个细分子类，任务按简单、中等、复杂三级家庭环境分层，最高包含135个设备的多房间密集环境。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，前沿LLM在显式控制和查询任务上表现强劲，但在自动化任务调度、歧义处理和个性化推理方面表现显著薄弱，且随着家庭复杂度增加性能下降明显。
AI.conclusion: SMH-Bench揭示了当前LLM在真实可部署智能家居场景中的关键短板，为开发更可靠、上下文感知的智能家居智能体提供了系统化的评估框架和未来研究方向。

title: SWARD: Stochastic Window-Attention-Based Relational Distillation for Cross-Architectural Semantic Segmentation
summary: Large-scale vision foundation models have driven substantial gains on dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation, but their size makes deployment impractical in resource-constrained settings, motivating knowledge distillation as a means of transferring their capabilities to lightweight student networks. However, modern foundation teachers are predominantly transformer-based that encode global context, whereas efficient students are typically convolutional networks with locally biased receptive fields. Existing distillation methods largely assume architectural homogeneity and rely on direct feature mimicry, which fails to bridge this representational gap and neglects the structured spatial dependencies and discriminative organization required for accurate semantic segmentation. In this paper, we propose SWARD, a knowledge distillation framework that addresses this gap through two complementary mechanisms. First, we introduce a Multi-Scale Windowed Attention Distillation (MWAD) module that aligns teacher-student attention-based relations within stochastically shifted window partitions whose offsets are randomly resampled at every training iteration. This removes window boundary bias, and, combined with the multi-scale design, captures both short- and long-range spatial dependencies. Second, we introduce Prototype Discriminative Regularization (PDR), a loss that helps shape the student's feature distribution by enforcing inter-class separation and intra-class compactness, further sharpening the discriminative structure beyond what feature mimicry alone can produce under the student's reduced capacity. Experiments across different vision applications (i.e., urban scene parsing and medical image segmentation) show that SWARD achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: SWARD提出了一种针对视觉基础模型知识蒸馏的新框架，通过多尺度窗口注意力蒸馏（MWAD）和原型判别正则化（PDR）两种机制，有效弥合了Transformer教师网络与CNN学生网络之间的表征鸿沟，在城市场景解析和医学图像分割任务上均取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模视觉基础模型在语义分割等稠密预测任务上性能优异，但其参数量庞大难以部署于资源受限环境，因此需通过知识蒸馏将其能力迁移至轻量级学生网络。然而，现有蒸馏方法假设师生网络架构同质，多采用直接特征模仿策略，无法有效桥接Transformer教师（全局上下文编码）与CNN学生（局部偏置感受野）之间的表征差异，且忽略了语义分割所需的结构化空间依赖与判别性特征组织。
AI.method: SWARD框架包含两个核心模块：一是多尺度窗口注意力蒸馏（MWAD），通过在每轮训练迭代中随机重采样偏移量的随机移位窗口划分来对齐师生网络的注意力关系，消除窗口边界偏差，并结合多尺度设计同时捕获短程与长程空间依赖；二是原型判别正则化（PDR），通过强制类间分离与类内紧凑的损失项来塑造学生网络的特征分布，在学生容量受限的条件下进一步强化判别性结构。
AI.result: 实验在城市场景解析与医学图像分割等多个视觉应用上进行，结果表明SWARD在各项任务上均达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: SWARD通过引入注意力关系对齐与判别性正则化两项机制，有效解决了异构架构下知识蒸馏中表征鸿沟的关键难题，为将大规模Transformer教师的能力高效迁移至轻量级CNN学生网络提供了新的范式，其跨领域的最优表现验证了方法的通用性与有效性。

title: AutoMedBench: Towards Medical AutoResearch with Agentic AI Models
summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to support end-to-end medical-AI research workflows, moving beyond isolated prediction tasks or short-form clinical question answering. However, existing medical agent benchmarks primarily evaluate final outputs, providing limited visibility into agent behavior within the research process. To address this gap, we present AutoMedBench, a workflow-aware benchmark for autonomous medical-AI research across diverse medical imaging and multimodal inference tasks, organizing agent execution into a unified five-stage workflow (S1-S5): Plan, Setup, Validate, Inference, and Submit. It comprises long-horizon tasks with each run averaging 33 agent turns, spanning five research tracks: segmentation, image enhancement, visual question answering (VQA), report generation, and lesion detection. Each task is evaluated under two difficulty tiers, Lite and Standard, which use the same data and metrics but differ in the amount of task-brief scaffolding, and each run is scored using both final task performance and S1-S5 stage scores, enabling stage-level analysis from the initial task brief to the final submitted artifact. Across thousands of recorded runs, stage-level scoring reveals that Validate is the weakest workflow stage on average, whereas Setup is the strongest, suggesting that current agents are better at making pipelines executable than at verifying their reliability. Post-run error analysis further shows that verification and submission failures dominate tagged errors, accounting for 37.7% and 38.1% of fired codes respectively, whereas task-understanding errors are rare at 0.9%, and runs with one fired error code have a 48% lower overall score than runs with no error code on average.

AI.tldr: AutoMedBench 是一个面向自主医学AI研究的流程感知基准，通过将任务组织为统一的五阶段工作流（计划、搭建、验证、推理、提交）并引入阶段级评分，揭示了当前智能体在验证环节最薄弱、搭建环节最强的行为特征。
AI.motivation: 现有医学智能体基准主要评估最终输出，缺乏对智能体在研究流程内部行为的可见性，无法深入分析智能体在各执行阶段的表现与失败模式。
AI.method: AutoMedBench 将医学AI研究任务组织为统一的五阶段工作流（S1-S5：计划、搭建、验证、推理、提交），涵盖分割、图像增强、VQA、报告生成和病灶检测五个研究轨道，每项任务设Lite和Standard两个难度层级并以相同数据和指标评估，同时使用最终任务得分和S1-S5阶段级得分进行多维度评分。
AI.result: 在数千次运行记录中，阶段级评分显示验证（Validate）是最薄弱的环节而搭建（Setup）是最强的环节；错误分析表明验证失败和提交失败分别占标签错误的37.7%和38.1%，而任务理解错误仅占0.9%；出现一次错误代码的运行其总体得分平均比无错误代码的运行低48%。
AI.conclusion: 当前自主智能体在构建可执行流水线方面表现较好，但在验证其可靠性方面存在明显不足，提示未来研究应重点关注增强智能体的验证能力以减少流程后期的关键失败。

title: TextFake: Benchmarking AI-Generated Image Detection on Text-Rich Images
summary: Recent AI-generated image (AIGI) detectors perform well on natural-image benchmarks, but their behavior on text-rich forgeries, such as fabricated screenshots, documents, and news pages prevalent in misinformation, remains untested. We introduce TextFake, a 20,000-image benchmark for text-rich AIGI detection spanning 28 languages, 4 topic categories, and 2 scene modalities. Fake images are synthesized via a four-stage pipeline that annotates real images along three controlled dimensions and generates counterparts through distribution-aligned structured prompting, ruling out covariate shortcuts. Zero-shot evaluation of 14 specialized detectors and 3 frontier VLM APIs reveals a large systematic gap: no method exceeds 80% accuracy, with some dropping over 60% from natural-image benchmarks. Diagnostic evaluations identify three failure modes: the Text Density Curse, where dense glyphs overwhelm low-level detectors; Cloaking via Rendering Fidelity, where stronger text rendering suppresses enerative artifacts; and Threshold Collapse, where routine perturbations drive detectors toward chance-level performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TextFake基准，系统评估AI生成图像检测器在文本丰富伪造内容上的表现，发现现有方法准确率均低于80%，并揭示了文本密度诅咒、渲染保真度伪装和阈值崩溃三种关键失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器在自然图像基准上表现良好，但文本丰富的伪造内容（如伪造截图、文档和新闻页面）在 misinformation 中广泛存在，而检测器在这类场景下的表现尚未被系统检验，存在显著研究空白。
AI.method: 构建了TextFake基准，包含20,000张图像，覆盖28种语言、4个主题类别和2种场景模态；通过四阶段流水线生成伪造图像，包括对真实图像沿三个受控维度进行标注，并通过分布对齐的结构化提示生成对应伪造图像以排除协变量捷径；对14个专门检测器与3个前沿VLM API进行零样本评估。
AI.result: 零样本评估显示所有方法在TextFake上准确率均未超过80%，部分检测器性能相比自然图像基准下降超过60%；诊断评估识别出三种失效模式：文本密度诅咒（密集字形压倒低级检测器）、渲染保真度伪装（强文本渲染抑制生成伪影）、阈值崩溃（常规扰动将检测器推向随机水平）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明当前AI生成图像检测器在文本丰富场景下存在系统性性能鸿沟，其主要失效模式源于文本密度、渲染保真度和扰动鲁棒性三个维度，为未来面向真实世界 misinformation 场景的检测器设计提供了关键洞察和改进方向。

title: SafeMCP: Proactive Power Regulation for LLM Agent Defense via Environment-Grounded Look-Ahead Reasoning
comment: Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026), Main Conference
summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly leverage the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to operate in complex environments, the expansion of their action spaces offers agents unsafe capabilities and underscores the risk of power-seeking. While broad action space and greater environment influence are essential for task fulfillment, they create a fragile risk surface where minor errors or hallucinations are magnified into catastrophic failures. In response, we propose SafeMCP, a {server-side} defense plugin that constrains tool acquisition via predictive reasoning regarding future safety risks. SafeMCP utilizes an internal world model for look-ahead reasoning to implement a two-tier defense: proactive tool filtering to constrain hazardous power expansion and immediate intervention as a fail-safe. To train SafeMCP, we introduce a three-stage pipeline comprising environmental dynamic grounding, safe policy initialization, and reinforcement learning (RL) with dual verifiable rewards. Experiments on PowerSeeking Bench, ToolEmu, and AgentHarm show that SafeMCP achieves a safe equilibrium, effectively mitigating risks while preserving agent utility.

AI.tldr: SafeMCP是一种服务端防御插件，通过基于推理的未来安全风险预测来约束工具获取，利用内部世界模型进行前瞻推理，实现主动工具过滤和即时干预双重防御，在多个基准测试上实现了安全性与代理效用的平衡。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在通过模型上下文协议（MCP）操作复杂环境时，其扩展的动作空间提供了不安全的潜能，放大了权力寻求风险。虽然广阔的动作空间和环境影响力对任务完成至关重要，但微小的错误或幻觉可能被放大为灾难性失败，因此亟需一种能在服务端防御的方法来约束代理的工具获取行为，降低安全风险。
AI.method: SafeMCP是一个服务端防御插件，采用内部世界模型进行前瞻推理（look-ahead reasoning），实现两层防御机制：主动工具过滤（proactive tool filtering）以约束危险权力扩展，以及即时干预（immediate intervention）作为故障安全机制。训练采用三阶段流程：环境动态基础（environmental dynamic grounding）、安全策略初始化（safe policy initialization）以及具有双重可验证奖励的强化学习（reinforcement learning with dual verifiable rewards）。
AI.result: 在PowerSeeking Bench、ToolEmu和AgentHarm三个基准测试上的实验表明，SafeMCP实现了安全均衡（safe equilibrium），有效缓解了安全风险，同时保持了代理的效用不受显著损害。
AI.conclusion: SafeMCP证明了通过在服务端结合前瞻推理与强化学习来约束工具获取，可以在不牺牲代理任务效用的前提下有效降低LLM代理在复杂环境中的安全风险。该方法为构建更安全的LLM代理系统提供了可行的防御范式，尤其适用于通过MCP协议扩展能力边界的场景。

title: 3DCodeBench: Benchmarking Agentic Procedural 3D Modeling Via Code
comment: Project Page: https://www.3dcodebench.com/; 11 pages (main), with appendix
summary: Procedural 3D modeling through code is emerging as a versatile paradigm, offering deterministic, engine-ready, and precisely editable assets that neural 3D generators inherently lack. Authoring such procedural content, however, demands deep expertise in 3D software APIs, parametric design, and code-level geometric reasoning. In this paper, we propose 3DCodeBench, a systematic benchmark for evaluating vision-language model (VLM) agents for procedural 3D generation in 3D modeling software. Specifically, 3DCodeBench evaluates how effectively 12 advanced VLMs can serve as procedural 3D modelers by translating text and image references into procedural code for 3D modeling software. Recognizing that automated metrics may not fully capture the perceptual quality of 3D shapes, we build 3DCodeArena, a ranking platform based on pairwise human preferences over generated 3D outputs. From extensive evaluations and results, we observe that: (1) Failures mostly arise from API mismatches, while successful renders still suffer from disconnected or floating 3D geometric components. (2) Test-time scaling, such as higher thinking budgets and multi-turn refinement, improves performance overall. Our findings highlight a critical need for high-quality procedural coding data to advance commercial VLMs. Furthermore, effective procedural 3D modeling requires a robust execution environment that provides high-fidelity feedback for iterative refinement. We release 3DCodeBench, including the curated large-scale dataset of multimodal (text/image) prompts, procedural code, 3D object triplets, evaluation protocol, and the public 3DCodeArena platform as a foundational toolkit for exploring VLM-based procedural 3D modelers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DCodeBench基准和3DCodeArena平台，系统评估12种视觉语言模型通过代码生成程序化3D内容的能力，发现失败主要源于API不匹配和几何组件断裂/漂浮，而测试时扩展策略可提升性能。
AI.motivation: 程序化3D建模能生成确定性、可直接用于引擎且精确可编辑的3D资产，但这需要深厚的3D软件API、参数化设计和代码级几何推理专业知识；现有神经3D生成器缺乏这些特性，而视觉语言模型在此领域的潜力尚未被系统评估。
