AI.method: 提出3DCodeBench系统基准，评估12种先进VLM代理将文本和图像参考翻译为3D建模软件程序化代码的能力；同时构建3DCodeArena排名平台，基于成对人工偏好对生成的3D输出进行排序，以弥补自动指标无法完全捕捉3D形状感知质量的不足。
AI.result: 实验发现：（1）失败主要源于API不匹配，即使渲染成功，生成的3D几何组件也存在断开或漂浮问题；（2）测试时扩展策略（如更高的思考预算和多轮细化）可整体提升性能；高质量程序化编码数据和提供高保真反馈的鲁棒执行环境是关键需求。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示商业VLM在程序化3D建模中仍需高质量程序化编码数据，且有效建模需要具备高保真反馈的鲁棒执行环境以支持迭代细化；发布的3DCodeBench数据集、评估协议和3DCodeArena平台为基于VLM的程序化3D建模研究提供了基础工具。

title: Extreme Low-Bit Inference in Reasoning Models: Failure Modes and Targeted Recovery
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) rely on long reasoning traces, making inference expensive. While low-bit quantization reduces per-token decoding cost, we show that aggressive 2-bit inference can fail to deliver end-to-end speedup because instability in the generation process inflates total token count. Instead of merely lowering answer accuracy, 2-bit quantization often produces much longer traces with repetitive loops, budget exhaustion, delayed commitment, and unclosed reasoning segments. We analyze full reasoning traces of Qwen3 reasoning models across mathematical and commonsense benchmarks and show that accuracy degradation is tightly linked to these process-level failures. To address them, we introduce two lightweight controls: FP16 planning, which gives the 2-bit model a short high-precision outline, and loop rescue, which detects repetitive traces and either commits to an earlier answer or falls back to FP16. On MATH-500, loop rescue improves Qwen3-8B accuracy from 17.2% to 74.2%, while planning plus loop rescue improves Qwen3-32B from 65.0% to 87.2%. Overall, our results show that extreme low-bit reasoning becomes practical when its failures are treated as controllable generation pathologies: with lightweight detection and selective FP16 support, 2-bit inference can recover accuracy while preserving real end-to-end speed. Our code is available at: https://github.com/brain-lab-research/quantized-reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文发现2-bit量化虽降低单token解码成本，但会导致长推理模型生成不稳定、token数激增，从而抵消端到端加速；通过引入FP16规划与循环救援两种轻量级控制方法，可在极端低比特推理中恢复精度并实现真实加速。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型依赖长推理链导致推理成本高昂，低比特量化虽可降低单token解码开销，但2-bit量化在生成过程中的不稳定性可能导致总token数膨胀，从而无法实现端到端加速，现有研究对量化引发的过程级失效模式缺乏系统性分析与控制。
AI.method: 本文分析了Qwen3推理模型在数学与常识基准上的完整推理轨迹，揭示了2-bit量化引发重复循环、预算耗尽、延迟承诺等过程级失效。提出两种轻量级控制方法：FP16规划，为2-bit模型提供简短高精度推理大纲；循环救援，检测重复轨迹并执行早期承诺或回退至FP16。
AI.result: 在MATH-500上，循环救援将Qwen3-8B准确率从17.2%提升至74.2%；规划加循环救援将Qwen3-32B准确率从65.0%提升至87.2%，表明极端低比特推理可在轻量级检测与选择性FP16支持下恢复精度并实现真实端到端加速。
AI.conclusion: 2-bit量化对推理模型的影响不仅是降低答案准确率，更关键的是通过延长推理链破坏效率；将量化失效视为可控生成病理，通过轻量级检测与选择性高精度回退，可使极端低比特推理在保持加速的同时恢复性能。

title: A Multiscale Network with Supervised Contrastive Learning for Real-Time Facial Emotion Recognition
summary: Real-time emotion recognition from facial expressions is a challenging task, particularly in video-based scenarios where multiple emotional states may occur over time. The difficulty increases further due to the fact that each emotional state is associated with facial expressions that vary significantly across individuals. The change of facial expressions portraying emotional state is not discrete, but rather continuous, which is very challenging to represent through computational aids. A system with the ability to detect variations in facial expressions can have a significant impact on determining the emotional state of an individual. Such a system can be very beneficial for psychologists during counseling by providing additional insights into the emotional state of a subject. In this paper, a deep learning-based system is presented to detect emotional changes in real-time video of a person by modeling the change in facial expressions. The current study is conducted on a standard dataset for training of the deep learning system and the system has provided very satisfactory outcomes in this respect.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的实时面部表情识别系统，通过对视频中连续面部表情变化进行建模来检测个体的情绪状态变化，在标准数据集上取得了满意的效果。
AI.motivation: 实时视频中面部表情驱动的情绪识别面临多重挑战：情绪状态随时间连续变化而非离散突变，且不同个体表达同一情绪时面部表情差异显著，传统计算方法难以有效表征这种连续变化模式，现有系统缺乏捕捉表情动态演变的能力。
AI.method: 本文采用深度学习方法，通过对视频中个体面部表情的连续变化进行建模，构建了一个能够实时检测情绪变化的系统；系统在标准情绪数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 系统在标准数据集上完成训练和评估，实验结果表明该方法在实时视频情绪变化检测方面取得了非常满意的效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度学习系统能够有效建模面部表情的连续变化过程，实现对个体情绪状态的实时检测，可为心理咨询等场景提供有价值的辅助分析工具。

title: Where Do Deep-Research Agents Go Wrong? Span-Level Error Localization in Agent Trajectories
summary: Deep-research agents solve tasks through long trajectories of search, tool use, evidence inspection, and answer synthesis. Evaluation based on final answers shows whether an agent succeeds, but not which parts of the trajectory make the answer unreliable. We study span-level error localization for deep-research agents. We collect 2,790 real trajectories from two agent frameworks, three backbone models, and three benchmarks, convert raw logs into semantic spans, and annotate harmful error spans through LLM-assisted expert review. From these annotations, we build TELBench, a 1,000-instance benchmark for identifying error spans among normal exploration, failed searches, tentative hypotheses, and harmless noise. We further propose DRIFT, a claim-centric auditing framework that tracks agent claims, checks their support in trajectory evidence, and marks spans where unsupported or conflicting claims affect the answer path. Experiments across model families and auditing frameworks show that DRIFT improves span-level error localization and first-error accuracy by up to 30 percentage points. Our work provides a process-level view of reliability in deep-research agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TELBench基准和DRIFT审计框架，用于对深度研究代理的长轨迹进行片段级错误定位，实验表明DRIFT在错误定位和首次错误准确率上最高提升30个百分点，为代理推理过程可靠性提供了过程级分析视角。
AI.motivation: 现有对深度研究代理的评估仅关注最终答案是否正确，无法判断轨迹中哪些环节导致了答案不可靠，缺乏对代理长轨迹进行过程级错误定位的方法和基准。
AI.method: 收集来自两个代理框架、三个骨干模型和三个基准的2,790条真实轨迹，将原始日志转化为语义片段，并通过LLM辅助专家审查标注有害错误片段，构建了包含1,000个实例的TELBench基准。进一步提出DRIFT框架，通过追踪代理声明、检查轨迹证据中的支持关系，标记出无支持或矛盾声明影响答案路径的片段。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多个模型系列和审计框架，DRIFT在片段级错误定位和首次错误准确率上比基线方法最高提升30个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了深度研究代理可靠性的过程级分析视角，表明通过声明中心式的轨迹审计可以有效定位推理过程中的错误源头，弥补了仅依赖最终答案评估的不足。

title: Chameleon: Style-Content Disentangled Framework for Cross-Domain Object Compositing
comment: The last two authors are co-corresponding authors. Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/Chameleon/
summary: Image compositing aims to seamlessly insert a foreground object into a background image, and recent advances in diffusion models have significantly enhanced the quality, especially when the foreground and background images come from the same domain (e.g., natural images). However, cross-domain compositing, where the foreground and background come from different domains, is relatively underexplored and remains challenging because the model must preserve the foreground object's identity while stylizing it to match the background domain. Existing cross-domain compositing approaches largely rely on training-free blending and refinement strategies. This is partly due to the lack of large-scale paired datasets for cross-domain compositing, limiting the development of training-based solutions. As a result, they are limited to tone-level alignment and often produce style-inconsistent or overstylized results. To overcome such limitations, we construct ChameleonDataset, the first large-scale training dataset for cross-domain compositing, with a comprehensive evaluation benchmark, built through a scalable data construction pipeline. Building on this, we propose Chameleon, a novel two-stage training-based cross-domain compositing framework. In the first stage, we propose Joint Hard Contrastive Learning (JHCL) to train ChameleonEncoder, which effectively disentangles style and content representations. In the second stage, we introduce Spatio-Temporal Attention Gating (STAG) into a diffusion transformer for effective stylization, adaptively regulating how style tokens from the first-stage encoder are injected across spatial and temporal dimensions. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art in-domain and cross-domain compositing models, sequential pipelines and commercial models, achieving improvements in both compositional plausibility and stylistic fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出首个大规模跨域图像合成训练数据集ChameleonDataset及两阶段训练框架Chameleon，通过联合硬对比学习和时空注意力门控机制，实现前景对象跨域合成时的内容保持与风格迁移，性能超越现有领域内、跨域合成模型及商业模型。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像合成中表现优异，但主要针对前景与背景同域场景；跨域合成（前景与背景来自不同域）因缺乏大规模配对训练数据，现有方法局限于无训练混合与微调策略，仅能实现色调级对齐，常产生风格不一致或过度风格化的结果。
AI.method: 提出Chameleon两阶段训练框架：第一阶段通过联合硬对比学习（JHCL）训练ChameleonEncoder，实现风格与内容表征的有效解耦；第二阶段在扩散Transformer中引入时空注意力门控（STAG），自适应调控第一阶段的风格标记在空间和时间维度上的注入方式，实现有效风格化。
AI.result: 构建了首个大规模跨域合成训练数据集ChameleonDataset及评估基准；所提方法在组合合理性和风格保真度上均优于最先进的域内合成模型、跨域合成模型、顺序流水线及商业模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建大规模训练数据集并设计两阶段解耦-注入框架，有效解决了跨域图像合成中内容保持与风格匹配的权衡问题，为训练驱动的跨域合成方法开辟了新路径。

title: Learning When Not to Act: Mitigating Tool Abuse in Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning can induce tool abuse, where models overuse external tools even for queries solvable by internal reasoning. Existing approaches mitigate this issue with uniform tool-use penalties or hard limits, which reduce tool frequency but may also suppress useful tool-assisted exploration. We propose EAPO, an Efficient Agentic Policy Optimization framework that learns selective tool use. EAPO introduces tool-free trajectories into each rollout group, applies difficulty-aware reward shaping to penalize redundant tool calls mainly on easier queries, and uses confidence-aware token reweighting to improve policy learning. Across nine mathematical and knowledge-intensive reasoning benchmarks, EAPO consistently improves the accuracy efficiency trade-off on Qwen2.5-3B, Qwen2.5-7B, and Llama3.1-8B. Compared with GRPO, EAPO improves average performance by 10.45%, 7.27%, and 9.69%, while reducing average tool calls by 18.33%, 18.33%, and 24.59%, respectively. These results show that agents can learn when not to use tools without compromising tool-integrated reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出EAPO框架，通过引入无工具轨迹、难度感知奖励整形和置信度感知令牌重加权，使智能体学习选择性调用工具，在多个推理基准上显著提升准确率-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 智能体强化学习会导致工具滥用问题，即模型过度使用外部工具来处理那些仅靠内部推理就能解决的查询。现有方法采用统一的工具使用惩罚或硬性限制来缓解此问题，但这些方法虽能降低工具调用频率，也可能抑制有用的工具辅助探索。
AI.method: 提出EAPO（高效智能体策略优化）框架，该方法在每个 rollout 组中引入无工具轨迹，并采用难度感知奖励整形来主要在简单查询上惩罚冗余工具调用，同时使用置信度感知令牌重加权来改进策略学习，从而实现选择性工具使用的学习。
AI.result: 在九个数学和知识密集推理基准上，EAPO在Qwen2.5-3B、Qwen2.5-7B和Llama3.1-8B上一致提升了准确率-效率权衡。相比GRPO，EAPO平均性能分别提升10.45%、7.27%和9.69%，同时平均工具调用分别减少18.33%、18.33%和24.59%。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明智能体能够学习何时不使用工具，同时不损害工具集成的推理能力，实现了工具使用的精准控制而非简单的频率压制。

title: Dual-Route Top-K Retrieval with 1v1 VLM Reranking for the CoVR-R
summary: We describe \emph{Dual-Route Top-K Retrieval with 1v1 VLM Reranking} for the CoVR-R challenge. The method treats composed video retrieval as two coupled problems: finding a sufficiently complete top-k candidate set, and then safely deciding whether any candidate should replace a strong current top-1. We first improve the reasoning/text seed with a VLM slot selector over existing candidates, without introducing DFN visual retrieval. We then add a visual route from contact-sheet embeddings using DFN-H/DFN-L. The routes are merged into a top-10 candidate set, after which a VLM final reranker performs conservative 1v1 comparisons between the current top-1 and each challenger. On the hidden test split, the final system reaches 95.28 R@1, 97.47 R@5, 98.48 R@10, and 99.66 R@50. The main lesson is that CoVR-R benefits more from recall-selection decoupling than from broad text reranking or direct multi-candidate VLM classification.

AI.tldr: 本文针对组合视频检索（CoVR-R）任务，提出双路径Top-K检索与1v1 VLM重排序方法，通过将检索解耦为候选集构建与保守重排序两个子问题，在测试集上达到95.28 R@1，表明召回-选择解耦策略优于广泛的文本重排序或多候选VLM分类。
AI.motivation: 组合视频检索（CoVR-R）任务面临两个核心挑战：如何构建足够完备的Top-K候选集，以及如何安全地决定是否用候选替换当前Top-1结果；现有方法在候选集构建与最终决策之间的耦合程度较高，缺乏有效的解耦策略。
AI.method: 方法将组合视频检索分解为两个子问题：首先通过VLM槽位选择器在现有候选中优化推理/文本种子（不使用DFN视觉检索），同时引入基于联系表嵌入的视觉路径（使用DFN-H/DFN-L）；两条路径的候选集合并为Top-10候选集，随后使用VLM最终重排序器对当前Top-1与每个挑战者进行保守的1v1比较。
AI.result: 在隐藏测试集上，最终系统达到95.28 R@1、97.47 R@5、98.48 R@10和99.66 R@50，取得了优异的检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 主要启示是：CoVR-R任务从召回-选择解耦策略中获得的收益大于广泛文本重排序或直接多候选VLM分类方法，这为组合视频检索任务的设计提供了重要的方法论指导。

title: S3TS: Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search for Advanced Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Effective scheduling in the energy sector is essential to ensure the reliable operation of electrical grids and their connected assets by, for instance, optimizing the dispatch of generation units and storage systems. An effective planning strategy must (a) accommodate advanced and potentially non-linear system models -- exploiting the increasing data availability of modern grids, and (b) explicitly handle uncertainties arising, for instance, from the integration of renewable energy sources. While existing approaches can address either non-linearity (e.g., Monte Carlo Tree Search) or uncertainty (e.g., stochastic mathematical optimization), there is a lack of planning techniques capable of addressing both challenges simultaneously. To bridge this gap, we propose a Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search (S3TS) algorithm that explicitly represents uncertainty through scenario trees while enabling the integration of advanced non-linear models. We evaluate S3TS on a simulated demand response signal publication problem, largely mimicking the imbalance settlement mechanism in Belgium. The results demonstrate near-optimal performance in linear, analytically tractable settings, with costs within 14% of the mathematically optimal solution conditioned to the scenario trees. In highly non-linear scenarios, S3TS significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving cost reductions of up to 51% and 5.4% compared to a myopic algorithm and deterministic MCTS, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种随机场景结构化树搜索（S3TS）算法，该算法通过场景树显式建模不确定性，同时支持集成非线性系统模型，填补了现有调度方法无法同时处理非线性和不确定性两大挑战的空白，在比利时不平衡结算机制仿真的需求响应场景中，S3TS在非线性条件下相比基线方法实现了高达51%的成本降低。
AI.motivation: 现有的能源调度规划技术要么能够处理非线性系统模型（如蒙特卡洛树搜索），要么能够处理不确定性（如随机数学优化），但缺乏能够同时应对这两个关键挑战的调度方法，而现代电网中非线性和不确定性问题因数据增长和可再生能源集成而愈发突出。
AI.method: 提出随机场景结构化树搜索（S3TS）算法，通过场景树显式表示不确定性，并在此框架内集成先进的非线性系统模型，从而在单一规划框架内联合解决非线性和不确定性挑战。
AI.result: 在模拟比利时不平衡结算机制的需求响应信号发布问题上，S3TS在线性可解析场景下达到接近最优的性能，成本与数学最优解（限定于场景树条件）的差距在14%以内；在高度非线性场景下，S3TS相比贪心算法和确定性MCTS分别实现了最高51%和5.4%的成本降低。
AI.conclusion: S3TS作为一种能够同时处理非线性和不确定性的规划框架，在能源调度中展现出显著优势，为现代电网中复杂调度问题提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案。

title: Temporal Evidence Routing with Structured Visual Evidence for TimeLogicQA
summary: TimeLogicQA evaluates whether video question answering systems can reason over temporal relations such as event existence, ordering, persistence, boundary conditions, and overlap. We address this task with a visual evidence routing pipeline that separates perception from symbolic temporal reasoning. The system first parses each question into event targets, answer mode, candidate options, and temporal operators. It then routes videos according to duration and operator difficulty, using ordered full-frame evidence for short clips and event-focused candidate windows for long videos. A multimodal large language model produces structured visual evidence for the relevant events, while programmatic verifiers recover dense action intervals and a deterministic reducer applies operator-specific temporal rules to produce the final answer. Conservative fusion accepts an answer only when the visual evidence, temporal program, and confidence checks agree, reducing noisy answer flips. On the official test evaluation, our final system achieves an AvgAcc of 81.8.

AI.tldr: TimeLogicQA引入视觉证据路由流水线，将感知与符号时序推理解耦，通过结构化视觉证据提取、程序化动作区间恢复和确定性时序规则归约，在时序视频问答任务上达到81.8的AvgAcc。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答系统在推理事件存在性、顺序、持续性、边界条件和重叠等时序关系时能力不足，缺乏将视觉感知与符号化时序推理有效分离的框架，导致对复杂时间逻辑问题的回答质量不稳定。
AI.method: 提出视觉证据路由流水线：首先将问题解析为事件目标、回答模式、候选选项和时序算子；然后根据视频时长和算子难度路由，短片使用有序全帧证据，长视频使用事件聚焦候选窗口；多模态大语言模型提取结构化视觉证据，程序化验证器恢复密集动作区间，确定性归约器应用算子特定时序规则生成答案。采用保守融合策略，仅当视觉证据、时序程序和置信度检查一致时才接受答案，减少噪声翻转。
AI.result: 在TimeLogicQA官方测试集上，最终系统实现了81.8的平均准确率（AvgAcc），验证了所提流水线在时序推理任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将感知与符号推理解耦的流水线设计能够有效提升视频时序问答的准确性和鲁棒性，保守融合策略在减少错误答案翻转方面发挥了关键作用，为构建具有可靠时序推理能力的视频理解系统提供了可行范式。

title: Distilling Neuro-Symbolic Programs into 3D Multi-modal LLMs
summary: Current 3D spatial reasoning methods face a fundamental trade-off: neuro-symbolic 3D (NS3D) concept learners achieve interpretable reasoning through compositional programs but are constrained to closed-set concept vocabularies and simple programs; end-to-end 3D multi-modal LLMs (3D MLLMs) could handle complex natural language and open-vocabulary concepts but suffer from black-box reasoning without explicit spatial verification. We introduce APEIRIA, a neuro-symbolic 3D MLLM to bridge two paradigms by distilling symbolic reasoning patterns into MLLMs with natural language chain-of-thought. Our three-stage curriculum progressively builds reasoning capabilities: a) 3D perception alignment grounds object visual-geometric features to the LLM, b) CoT-SFT teaches query decomposition and stepwise verification from symbolic program traces, and c) CoT-RL extends reasoning patterns to open-set concepts and deeply nested instructions. By transferring reasoning patterns rather than concept-specific knowledge, APEIRIA preserves key NS3D virtues: transparent reasoning and modular interchangeability of planning and perception components. Evaluations on grounding, question answering, and captioning show that APEIRIA surpasses prior NS3D methods and matches state-of-the-art 3D MLLMs on 3D spatial reasoning datasets, unifying symbolic methods' systematic reasoning with MLLMs' flexibility. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/APEIRIA.

AI.tldr: APEIRIA通过三阶段课程训练将神经符号3D推理的模式蒸馏到多模态大语言模型中，在保持可解释推理和模块可替换性的同时，弥合了符号方法与端到端MLLM之间的差距，在3D空间推理任务上超越现有神经符号方法并匹配最先进的3D MLLM性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D空间推理方法存在根本性权衡：神经符号3D概念学习器通过组合式程序实现可解释推理，但局限于封闭集概念词汇和简单程序；端到端3D多模态大语言模型（3D MLLM）能处理复杂自然语言和开放词汇概念，但推理过程不透明且缺乏显式空间验证。两者之间缺乏能同时具备可解释推理与灵活泛化能力的统一框架。
AI.method: APEIRIA提出一种神经符号3D MLLM框架，通过三阶段课程学习将符号推理模式蒸馏到MLLM中：a) 3D感知对齐阶段将物体视觉-几何特征对齐至LLM；b) CoT-SFT阶段利用符号程序轨迹进行查询分解和逐步验证的监督微调；c) CoT-RL阶段通过强化学习将推理模式扩展到开放集概念和深层嵌套指令。该方法传递推理模式而非概念特定知识，保留了透明推理和规划/感知模块的可互换性。
AI.result: 在3D空间推理数据集的接地（grounding）、问答和字幕生成任务上的评估表明，APEIRIA超越了先前的神经符号3D方法，并与最先进的3D MLLM性能相当，成功统一了符号方法的系统性推理与MLLM的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 通过蒸馏推理模式而非概念知识，APEIRIA有效弥合了神经符号3D方法与端到端MLLM之间的范式差距，证明符号推理模式可以通过课程蒸馏迁移到MLLM中，同时保持可解释性和模块可替换性，为构建兼具严谨性与灵活性的3D空间推理系统提供了新路径。

title: From Capability Models to Automated Planning: An AAS-Native Approach for Automatic PDDL Generation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE 22nd International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)
summary: Engineers designing production systems need to verify that a given layout supports all required production sequences. Automated planning techniques can answer such questions, but formulating the required planning problems in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) demands specialized expertise that production engineers typically lack. Asset Administration Shells (AAS) have emerged as the standardized Digital Twin for industrial assets in Industry 4.0. We show that AAS capability models, structured using four established Industry 4.0 standards (VDI 3682 for process descriptions, IEC 61360-1 for semantic property qualification, IDTA 02011 for type hierarchies, and IDTA 02016 for instance descriptions), contain sufficient information to generate complete PDDL problems automatically. Unlike prior work that introduced PDDL-specific submodels, our approach derives all planning elements from domain-level descriptions of resource functions, so-called capabilities, allowing engineers to model capabilities without any exposure to PDDL syntax or planning concepts. Our extraction algorithm transforms distributed Multi-AAS architectures into complete PDDL planning problems. We validate the approach on AAS models of a laboratory production system, comparing four layout variants using optimal planning to demonstrate how engineers can systematically explore design trade-offs by modifying the AAS model and regenerating the planning domain

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动将基于Asset Administration Shells (AAS)的工业能力模型转换为完整PDDL规划问题的方法，无需工程师掌握PDDL语法，并通过实验室生产系统验证了其在布局变体比较中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 生产系统工程师需要验证给定布局是否支持所有必需的生产序列，但自动规划技术所需的PDDL建模要求专业领域知识，而生产工程师通常缺乏此技能；现有方法需引入PDDL专用子模型，增加了额外复杂度和学习成本。
AI.method: 提出一种从基于AAS的能力模型中自动提取并生成完整PDDL规划问题的算法；该能力模型整合了VDI 3682、IEC 61360-1、IDTA 02011和IDTA 02016四项工业4.0标准，从资源功能的领域级描述（即能力）中推导出所有规划元素，无需任何PDDL子模型介入；算法支持将分布式多AAS架构转换为一组完整的PDDL问题。
AI.result: 在实验室生产系统的AAS模型上验证，对四种布局变体采用最优规划进行对比；结果表明工程师可通过修改AAS模型并重新生成规划域来系统性地探索设计权衡，从而验证了该方法在实际场景中的可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明标准化的AAS能力模型蕴含足够信息以自动生成完整的PDDL规划问题，避免了工程师接触PDDL语法；该方法弥合了工业领域建模与自动规划之间的鸿沟，为生产系统设计验证提供了可操作的工程实践路径。

title: HakushoBench: A Japanese Chart and Table VQA Benchmark from Governmental White Papers
summary: Understanding chart and table images is essential for applying vision-language models (VLMs) to real-world document understanding. While English benchmarks have advanced rapidly, non-English counterparts remain scarce, leaving it unclear whether this progress generalizes across languages. A key obstacle is the difficulty of collecting realistic and diverse non-English chart and table images at scale. To address this, we leverage governmental white papers as a scalable source for benchmark construction beyond English, as they contain naturally occurring charts and tables across diverse formats and domains and are freely accessible in many countries. As a first instantiation, we introduce HakushoBench, a challenging Japanese chart and table VQA benchmark built from 33 governmental white papers. HakushoBench contains 2,053 images spanning over 10 image types, with manually annotated QA pairs, designed to assess deep and holistic understanding of charts and tables, rather than local visual cues alone. Experiments across a broad range of VLMs demonstrate that HakushoBench remains challenging for open-weight models: the best open-weight model achieves only 58.6% accuracy, and a 34.9-point gap between open-weight and proprietary models highlights substantial room for improvement in complex chart and table understanding. We release our dataset and code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HakushoBench，一个基于日本政府白皮书构建的日语图表VQA基准，包含2,053张图像和人工标注的问答对。实验表明该基准对开源VLM具有挑战性（最高准确率58.6%），且开源与闭源模型之间存在34.9个百分点的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有图表和表格理解的视觉语言模型基准主要集中于英语，非英语基准稀少，导致跨语言泛化能力不明确。收集大规模、真实且多样化的非英语图表图像是构建此类基准的主要障碍。
AI.method: 利用各国政府白皮书作为超越英语的基准构建可扩展数据源，因其自然包含多种格式和领域的图表与表格且免费可获取。作为首次实例化，从33份日本政府白皮书中构建了HakushoBench基准，包含2,053张图像、覆盖10种以上图像类型，并配有手工标注的问答对，旨在评估对图表和表格的深层整体理解而非局部视觉线索。
AI.result: 在多种VLM上的实验表明，最佳开源模型在HakushoBench上仅达到58.6%的准确率，而开源与闭源模型之间存在34.9个百分点的显著性能差距，说明该基准对于复杂图表理解任务具有挑战性且仍有较大改进空间。
AI.conclusion: HakushoBench揭示了当前VLM在非英语图表理解任务上的局限性，特别是开源模型的显著不足。该基准为跨语言图表理解研究提供了新的评估资源，有助于推动VLM在真实多语言文档理解场景中的进步。

title: On the Limits of Token Reduction for Efficient Unified Vision Language Training
summary: Unified vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual understanding and visual generation within a single autoregressive backbone, but their joint training is computationally expensive and largely overlooked from an efficiency perspective. In this work, we study the feasibility and limits of token-reduction-based acceleration for unified VLM training. Through a systematic analysis of layerwise attention allocation, we uncover a fundamental asymmetry: visual understanding exhibits substantial late-layer visual redundancy, whereas visual generation maintains persistent dependence on image tokens across depth. Guided by this observation, we design task-specific accelerators that selectively reduce image-token computation for each objective. While these methods achieve significant efficiency gains in isolated settings, we observe a consistent synergy loss under unified training -- task-specific token dropping necessitates divergent parameter pathways and eliminates the mutual performance gains typically observed in joint optimization. Our findings suggest that efficient unified modeling requires preserving shared cross-task structures, highlighting the need for synergy-aware acceleration strategies. Project page: https://chicychen.github.io/TokenReductionUnifiedVLM/.

AI.tldr: 通过分析统一视觉-语言模型（VLM）中逐层注意力分配，发现视觉理解在深层存在显著冗余而视觉生成则持续依赖图像token，据此设计任务特定的token缩减加速器；然而在联合训练中，任务特定token丢弃会导致协同效应损失，表明高效统一建模需要保留跨任务共享结构。
AI.motivation: 统一视觉-语言模型（VLM）将视觉理解与视觉生成集成在单一自回归架构中，但其联合训练计算成本极高，而现有工作鲜有从效率角度系统探索该问题的加速方法。
AI.method: 通过逐层注意力分配的系统性分析，揭示出视觉理解在深层存在大量视觉冗余而视觉生成在深度方向上对图像token保持持续依赖这一根本性不对称；基于此观察，设计针对不同任务（理解/生成）的选择性图像token缩减加速器，在隔离场景下分别降低计算量。
AI.result: 任务特定的token缩减方法在隔离场景下取得显著效率提升，但在统一联合训练中观察到一致的协同性能损失——任务特定token丢弃导致参数路径分叉，消除了联合优化中通常存在的互惠性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 高效统一VLM建模需要保留跨任务共享结构，而非激进的独立任务特定加速，亟需协同感知的加速策略来兼顾效率和联合训练的性能提升。

title: POIROT: Interrogating Agents for Failure Detection in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Orchestrating Large Language Models into Multi-Agent Systems (LLM-MAS) has unlocked remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet emergent failures and hallucinations that resist characterisation block their deployment in safety-critical domains -- a gap made legally untenable by emerging AI regulation. Existing evaluation paradigms share a common flaw: centralised judgment creates single points of failure and demands domain-specific expertise. Here we present POIROT, a protocol that repurposes a system's own agents as its diagnostic layer, leveraging the epistemic diversity already present in the architecture. Across evaluated settings, POIROT outperforms single-LLM evaluator baselines, with gains that scale with problem complexity (OR = 1.60, $p = 0.008$), agent count, and fault dimensionality, persisting under compound fault conditions. These results demonstrate that safety oversight need not be externalised: the agents executing a role carry sufficient collective intelligence to audit it. We release POIROT as an open-source library alongside BLAME, a benchmark for fault attribution in safety-critical multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: POIROT 提出一种利用多智能体系统自身代理作为诊断层的协议，通过架构内已有的认知多样性进行故障归因，在无需外部监督的情况下超越了单 LLM 评估基线，证明了集体智能足以支撑安全审计。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 多智能体系统在安全关键场景中存在难以表征的涌现故障与幻觉，而传统评估范式依赖集中式判断，不仅形成单点故障，还需要领域专业知识，这在日益严格的 AI 法规下已不可持续。
AI.method: POIROT 采用一种协议设计，将系统自身的智能体重构为诊断层，利用架构内已有的认知多样性进行故障检测与归因，无需引入外部评估器或领域专家。
AI.result: 在多种评估设置下，POIROT 优于单 LLM 评估基线，性能增益随问题复杂度（OR = 1.60, p = 0.008）、智能体数量及故障维度增加而提升，并在复合故障条件下保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明安全监督无需外部化：执行特定角色的智能体携带足够的集体智能来完成审计任务。团队同时开源了 POIROT 库及用于安全关键多智能体系统故障归因的基准 BLAME。

title: CoSTL: Comprehensive Spatial-Temporal Representation Learning for Moment Retrieval and Highlight Detection
summary: Video Moment Retrieval (MR) and Highlight Detection (HD) are crucial tasks in video analysis that aim to localize specific moments and estimate clip-wise relevance based on a given text query. Recent approaches treat them as similar video grounding tasks and use the same architecture to solve them. These tasks require both fine-grained comprehension at the image level and high-level temporal understanding across the entire video. Existing approaches have primarily focused on temporal modeling using frame-level features, often neglecting the rich visual information related to the text query within individual frames. This oversight leads to inaccurate grounding results. To address this limitation, we propose a Comprehensive Spatial-Temporal Representation Learning Framework (CoSTL), which captures both fine-grained image-level information and temporal dynamics. Specifically, CoSTL incorporates a text-driven progressive fine-grained image encoder, performing a two-step text-driven knowledge extraction process to learn fine-grained spatial representations. Furthermore, a multi-scale temporal perception module captures comprehensive spatial-temporal representations, enhancing the model's ability to process temporal dynamics. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on four public benchmarks: QVHighlights, Charades-STA, TACoS, and TVSum.

AI.tldr: CoSTL提出一种综合时空表征学习框架，通过文本驱动的渐进式细粒度图像编码器和多尺度时序感知模块，同时捕捉图像级细节与视频级时间动态，在视频时刻检索和高亮检测任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时刻检索与高亮检测方法多采用统一架构，侧重基于帧级特征的时序建模，却忽略了单帧内与文本查询相关的丰富视觉信息，导致细粒度图像级理解不足，影响了定位的准确性。本文旨在弥补这一研究空白。
AI.method: CoSTL框架包含两个核心模块：一是文本驱动的渐进式细粒度图像编码器，通过两步式文本驱动知识提取过程学习细粒度空间表征；二是多尺度时序感知模块，用于捕获综合的时空表征，增强模型对时间动态的处理能力。该框架同时兼顾图像级精细信息与视频级时间动态。
AI.result: 在QVHighlights、Charades-STA、TACoS和TVSum四个公开基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能，验证了该方法在时刻检索和高亮检测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 同时建模细粒度图像级空间信息与多尺度时间动态能够显著提升视频接地任务的准确性，为面向文本查询的视频理解提供了更全面的表征学习范式。

title: Forget Attention: Importance-Aware Attention Is All You Need
summary: Combining attention's global retrieval with the sequential importance signal of state space models (SSMs) is the open challenge of hybrid language modeling. Transformers see everywhere but cannot prioritize; SSMs know what matters but cannot revisit. Existing hybrids -- Jamba (block level) and Hymba (head level) -- place the two in separate compartments, so neither informs the other during the attention computation itself. We propose SISA (SSM-Informed Softmax Attention), which adds an SSM-derived importance term directly inside the attention score and realizes the full operation as a single SDPA call on augmented query/key vectors -- no recurrent state, no custom kernel. At 152M / 5B tokens, SISA reaches LAMBADA-greedy 17.3% (vs. Transformer 13.9 and Mamba-3 15.5) and attains NIAH 100% from step 1K, 7x faster than Transformer's retrieval convergence; at 369M, Mamba-3 leads LAMBADA while SISA preserves perfect NIAH and stock-SDPA execution. SISA thus defines a third design axis for SSM-attention hybrids -- score-level fusion -- beyond the block-level and head-level paradigms that have dominated the field.

AI.tldr: SISA（SSM-Informed Softmax Attention）通过在注意力分数中直接引入SSM派生的重要性项，实现了分数级别的SSM-注意力融合，在不使用循环状态或自定义内核的情况下，在长程检索和语言建模基准上取得了优于Transformer和纯SSM模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有混合语言模型中，Transformer具备全局检索能力但缺乏优先级区分，SSM能捕获序列重要性信号但无法回溯历史信息；现有的混合模型（如Jamba的块级融合和Hymba的头级融合）将两者置于独立的分隔空间中，导致注意力计算过程中两者无法相互影响，亟需一种更细粒度的融合机制。
AI.method: SISA提出在注意力分数计算中直接加入SSM派生的重要性项，实现分数级别的SSM-注意力融合；该方法通过构造增广的查询和键向量，将完整操作转化为一次标准的SDPA（Scaled Dot-Product Attention）调用，无需维护循环状态或编写自定义CUDA内核，从而保持与现有高效注意力实现的兼容性。
AI.result: 在152M/5B token设置下，SISA在LAMBADA-greedy指标上达到17.3%（Transformer为13.9，Mamba-3为15.5）；在NIAH（Needle-In-A-Haystack）任务上，SISA从第1K步即达到100%检索准确率，比Transformer的检索收敛速度快7倍；在369M参数规模下，Mamba-3在LAMBADA上领先，但SISA仍保持完美的NIAH检索性能和标准SDPA执行效率。
AI.conclusion: SISA定义了SSM-注意力混合模型的第三种设计轴——分数级别融合（score-level fusion），超越了现有块级和头级融合范式，表明在注意力分数层面融合SSM重要性信号能够兼顾长程检索能力与计算效率，为混合语言建模提供了新的设计方向。

title: Feature Alignment Determines Fusion Strategy: A Comparative Study of Cross-Attention and Concatenation in Multimodal Learning
summary: The choice between cross-attention and concatenation for multimodal fusion remains governed by practitioner intuition rather than principled understanding. In this paper, we demonstrate that feature alignment quality, not data scale alone, is the primary determinant of which fusion strategy excels. Through controlled experiments on Flickr8k using two feature extraction backbones (ResNet18 and CLIP ViT-B/32), we show that concatenation outperforms cross-attention by 4.1-5.1 percentage points across all tested scales (2048-16384 samples) when features are pre-aligned by a vision-language pretraining objective. We provide a theoretical explanation grounded in sample complexity analysis: concatenation requires O(d_v + d_t) samples to learn its fusion projection, while cross-attention requires O(d_v * d_t) samples to learn bilinear attention weights, over 256 times as many for 512-dimensional CLIP features. When features are already aligned, the approximation error gap between the two methods vanishes, and concatenation's sample efficiency dominates at all practical dataset sizes. An alignment degradation study confirms a monotonic trend: as feature alignment degrades, concatenation's advantage grows from 1.3% to 2.8%. These findings provide a principled decision framework for fusion method selection in multimodal systems, with direct implications for the design of Multimodal Large Language Models.

AI.tldr: 本文证明特征对齐质量而非数据规模是决定多模态融合策略选择的关键因素，并通过样本复杂度分析揭示了拼接（concatenation）在特征预对齐场景下相比交叉注意力（cross-attention）具有显著样本效率优势，为多模态系统的融合方法选择提供了理论指导框架。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态融合中交叉注意力与拼接方法的选择缺乏理论依据，仅依赖实践者直觉，本研究旨在揭示决定两种融合策略优劣的核心因素，填补该领域缺乏原理性理解的研究空白。
AI.method: 通过在Flickr8k数据集上使用ResNet18和CLIP ViT-B/32两种特征提取骨干网络进行受控实验，对比不同数据规模（2048-16384样本）下拼接与交叉注意力融合的性能差异；从样本复杂度角度给出理论解释，分析两种方法学习融合投影所需样本量的差异（拼接需O(d_v+d_t)样本，交叉注意力需O(d_v*d_t)样本）；并通过特征对齐退化实验验证对齐质量对融合效果的单调影响趋势。
AI.result: 当特征经过视觉-语言预训练目标预对齐后，拼接方法在所有测试数据规模下均以4.1-5.1个百分点的优势超越交叉注意力；理论分析表明，对于512维CLIP特征，交叉注意力所需样本量是拼接的256倍以上；对齐退化实验显示随着特征对齐程度降低，拼接的优势从1.3%单调增长至2.8%。
AI.conclusion: 特征对齐质量是决定融合策略选择的首要因素，在特征已对齐的场景下拼接因样本效率优势成为更优选择；该发现为多模态系统及多模态大语言模型的融合方法选择提供了原理性决策框架。

title: Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at the Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC) 2026. 40 pages (12 main + 28 appendix), 5 figures, 16 tables, 7 theorems
summary: Constrained Multi-agent reinforcement learning (CMARL) faces two intertwined challenges: the joint action space grows exponentially with the number of agents, and additional requirements couple agents in ways that reward structure alone does not capture. We introduce Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (CG-CMARL), a framework that addresses both challenges by combining coordination graphs with Lagrangian duality. The system decomposes the joint problem into pairwise regions, each served by a set of shared Q-functions, one for the primary objective and one for each of the constraints, so that the number of learned models is independent of the number of agents. At execution time, Max-Sum message passing coordinates actions across the factor graph, while a Lagrangian multiplier controls the objective--constraint tradeoff, allowing a single trained model to trace a Pareto front without retraining. We provide convergence guarantees under mild conditions, together with a compositional error bound that decomposes into separate interpretable sources, each traceable to a specific design choice and independently controllable. Experiments on cooperative navigation tasks (where teams of up to 10 agents must coordinate to reach target positions while satisfying pairwise constraints) show that our method produces Pareto fronts dominating established baselines trained at fixed reward-shaping ratios, while scaling to team sizes where centralized approaches become intractable.

AI.tldr: CG-CMARL 提出通过协调图与拉格朗日对偶性将约束多智能体强化学习中的联合动作空间分解为成对区域，使得学习模型数量与智能体数量无关，并能通过单次训练追踪帕累托前沿，在协作导航任务中优于固定奖励塑形比的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 约束多智能体强化学习面临两个相互交织的挑战：联合动作空间随智能体数量指数增长，以及额外约束以奖励结构无法捕捉的方式耦合智能体，现有方法难以在规模化场景下同时应对这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出 CG-CMARL 框架，结合协调图与拉格朗日对偶性，将联合问题分解为成对区域；每个区域由一组共享 Q 函数（一个主目标函数和每个约束各一个函数）服务，使得学习模型数量与智能体数量无关；执行时采用 Max-Sum 消息传递在因子图上协调动作，同时拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，允许单次训练模型绘制帕累托前沿而无需重新训练；提供了温和条件下的收敛保证及可分解的组合误差界。
AI.result: 在最多包含 10 个智能体的协作导航任务中，该方法生成的帕累托前沿优于以固定奖励塑形比训练的已有基线方法，并且能扩展到集中式方法无法处理的团队规模。
AI.conclusion: CG-CMARL 通过协调图分解与拉格朗日对偶性有效解决了 CMARL 中可扩展性与约束耦合的双重挑战，其组合误差界可追溯至特定设计选择并独立控制，为构建可扩展、可解释的约束多智能体强化学习系统提供了理论基础与实用框架。

title: The Image Reconstruction Game: Drawing Common Ground Through Iterative Multimodal Dialogue
summary: We introduce the Image Reconstruction Game, a fully automated benchmark in which a vision-language model issues corrective instructions to an image generator across multiple turns, making accumulated common ground directly observable as a rendered image. Benchmarking two Describer models crossed with two Generator models across seven image categories, we find that the describer is the dominant factor in reconstruction quality, while the generator determines whether iterative refinement helps or hurts. Mathematical and geometric images pose the greatest challenge. The describer's token budget strongly affects convergence: shorter budgets yield sparser first renderings with more room for visible improvement, while longer budgets raise absolute quality but leave less to fix. Stronger describers use a richer correction vocabulary spanning spatial, numeric, and structural categories, while weaker describers concentrate on surface properties and tend to stop after a few turns. Human validation shows that the best automated judge reaches only slight-to-fair agreement with human preferences, and automated scores require human recalibration to be used reliably.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Image Reconstruction Game（图像重建游戏），一个通过多轮对话让视觉语言模型指导图像生成器进行重建的全自动化基准测试，实验发现描述器是重建质量的主导因素，而生成器决定迭代优化是否有益。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏对视觉语言模型与图像生成器之间多轮交互中累积共同关注（accumulated common ground）的直接可观测度量，本文旨在通过一个完全自动化的图像重建游戏来填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 构建了一个全自动化的多轮交互基准测试框架，包含描述器（Describer）和生成器（Generator）两类模型，描述器根据当前图像与目标图像的差异生成纠正性指令，生成器据此更新图像，通过最终渲染图像直接量化多轮交互中累积的共同关注。
AI.result: 实验发现描述器是重建质量的主导因素，而生成器决定迭代优化是否有帮助；数学和几何图像最具挑战性；较短的token预算产生更稀疏的初版图像但改进空间更大，较长token预算提高绝对质量但修复余地更小；强描述器使用更丰富的校正词汇（空间、数字、结构类），弱描述器集中于表面属性且容易提前停止；最佳自动化评判器与人类偏好仅达到轻微到中等一致性。
AI.conclusion: 多轮视觉语言交互的质量主要取决于描述器的表达能力而非生成器的能力，且自动化评估结果需要经过人类校准才能可靠使用，这为构建更有效的多模态交互系统提供了重要设计启示。

title: SIRI: Self-Internalizing Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Skills for LLM Agent Training
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents can benefit from reusable skills, yet existing skill-based methods often rely on external skill generators during training or persistent skill retrieval at inference, increasing engineering complexity, context length, and deployment latency. We propose Self-Internalizing Reinforcement learning with Intrinsic skills (SIRI), a three-phase framework that enables agents to discover, validate, and internalize skills without external skill generators or inference-time skill banks. SIRI first warms up the policy with GiGPO to acquire basic interaction ability and collect successful skill-free trajectories. It then performs self-skill mining, where the current policy summarizes compact skills from its own successful plain rollouts and validates them through paired skill-augmented and skill-free rollouts. Finally, SIRI distills only beneficial skill-guided action tokens into the plain policy using trajectory-level utility and action-level advantage. At inference, the agent runs with the original prompt only. On ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SIRI improves GiGPO from 0.908 to 0.930 on ALFWorld and from 0.728 to 0.813 on WebShop, outperforming prompt-based, RL-based, and memory-augmented baselines. Further analysis shows that our self-mining strategy can achieve performance comparable to distillation with closed-source large model. Our code is available at https://github.com/kirito618/SIRI.

AI.tldr: SIRI是一个三阶段框架，使长程LLM智能体能够在不依赖外部技能生成器或推理时技能库的情况下，通过自我探索、验证和内化技能来提升性能，在ALFWorld和WebShop上显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于技能的长程LLM智能体方法通常依赖外部技能生成器进行训练或在推理时持续检索技能，这会增加工程复杂性、上下文长度和部署延迟，亟需一种无需外部依赖即可实现技能自主发现与内化的方法。
AI.method: SIRI包含三个阶段：首先使用GiGPO预热策略以获得基本交互能力并收集成功的无技能轨迹；然后进行自我技能挖掘，当前策略从自身成功的普通轨迹中总结紧凑技能，并通过成对的技能增强和无技能轨迹进行验证；最后，利用轨迹级效用和动作级优势将仅有益于技能引导的动作令牌蒸馏到普通策略中，推理时仅需原始提示。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct，SIRI将GiGPO的性能从0.908提升至0.930（ALFWorld）和从0.728提升至0.813（WebShop），优于基于提示、基于RL和记忆增强的基线方法；自我挖掘策略的性能可与使用闭源大模型进行蒸馏的方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: SIRI通过自内化机制有效解除了技能学习方法对外部生成器和推理时技能库的依赖，证明了LLM智能体可以通过纯自监督方式实现技能发现与内化，且自我挖掘策略能达到与使用更强闭源模型蒸馏相当的性能水平，为构建更自主、高效的LLM智能体提供了新范式。

title: HOLA: Holistic Multi-Modal Alignment for Open-Set 3D Recognition
summary: Open-set 3D recognition requires models that generalize to rare or unseen categories. Recent approaches address this by distilling language-vision knowledge into 3D encoders, typically relying on heavy 2D ViTs and aligning each point cloud with a single image or caption, thus anchoring representations to partial views. We propose aligning each point cloud with multiple images and textual descriptions to capture a more holistic understanding of 3D objects. To realize this idea, it is essential to design a loss function capable of jointly aligning a 3D instance with multiple matched signals, multi-view images and multiple texts, while separating positive aggregation from negative competition. We introduce such a function, termed the decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss. Our formulation enhances the loss's hardness-aware focus on challenging negatives, avoiding the "spotlight crowding" that occurs when many positives share the same softmax with all the negatives. Complementing this, we present a lightweight text adapter applied only to web captions, reducing the domain gap to curated annotations and enabling effective use of large-scale unsupervised text. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art open-vocabulary performance on long-tail benchmarks, yielding substantial zero-shot improvements while sustaining high frame rates.

AI.tldr: 提出一种解耦的多正面对比损失函数，将点云与多视角图像和多段文本联合对齐，以替代传统的单视图单文本对齐方式，在开放集3D识别长尾基准上取得SOTA零样本性能，同时保持高帧率。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集3D识别方法通过将语言-视觉知识蒸馏到3D编码器中，通常依赖笨重的2D ViT并将每个点云与单张图像或单段文本对齐，导致表征锚定在局部视角上，难以捕捉3D物体的全局语义，且对罕见或未见类别的泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出解耦的多正面对比损失函数（Decoupled Multi-Positive Contrastive Loss），使每个3D实例能同时与多视角图像和多段文本进行联合对齐，同时将正样本聚合与负样本竞争分离，避免多个正样本与所有负样本共享同一softmax导致的"聚光灯拥挤"问题，并增强损失函数对困难负样本的感知能力；此外，设计了一个轻量级文本适配器（Text Adapter）用于处理网页级无标注文本，以缩小与人工标注标注之间的领域差距。
AI.result: 在开放词汇3D识别长尾基准上达到SOTA性能，在零样本设定下取得显著提升，同时维持高推理帧率，验证了多模态多实例对齐策略在开放集3D识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦的多正面对比学习与轻量文本适配，能够有效利用多视角视觉信息和大规模无监督文本数据，在不增加计算负担的前提下显著提升3D模型对罕见类别的开放词汇识别能力。

title: MOC: Multi-Order Communication in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Despite the remarkable progress of Large Language Model (LLM) based Multi-Agent Systems, most research focuses on optimizing coordination topology while largely underexploring the equally critical problem: how to transmit and optimize messages among agents effectively? Current communication schemes typically rely on the direct concatenation of first-order neighbor responses, which induces a restricted evidence receptive field and leads to the dilution of crucial insights over multi-hop paths. To address these limitations, we propose the Multi-Order Communication (MOC) scheme, which reconstructs the inter-agent communication to capture multi-hop dependencies and incorporates a structural message consolidation strategy to ensure efficiency. Specifically, we formalize the communication mechanism to construct a structured multi-order evidence stream, and subsequently design a Semantic-Topological Merging algorithm to optimize semantic fidelity within token constraints. Extensive experiments across six diverse datasets and LLM backbones of varying parameter scales demonstrate that MOC consistently improves task performance and reduces communication costs. The code is available at https://github.com/yao-guan/MOC.

AI.tldr: 提出多阶通信（MOC）方案，通过构建结构化多阶证据流和语义-拓扑合并算法，解决多智能体系统中消息传递的证据感受野受限和关键信息稀释问题，在多个数据集和LLM主干上一致提升任务性能并降低通信成本。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的多智能体系统大多聚焦于协调拓扑的优化，而忽视了智能体间消息传输与优化这一关键问题。现有通信方案通常依赖一阶邻居响应的直接拼接，导致证据感受野受限，且关键信息在多跳路径中被稀释。
AI.method: 提出多阶通信（MOC）方案，通过重构智能体间通信机制以捕获多跳依赖关系，并设计结构化消息整合策略来保证效率。具体而言，形式化通信机制以构建结构化多阶证据流，并设计语义-拓扑合并算法，在令牌约束下优化语义保真度。
AI.result: 在六个不同数据集和多种参数规模的大语言模型主干上的大量实验表明，MOC一致地提升了任务性能并降低了通信成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化的多阶通信和语义-拓扑合并，MOC有效解决了多智能体系统中证据感受野受限和信息稀释问题，为提升多智能体协作效率提供了新思路。代码已开源。

title: Perception First: A Frontier Native-Video Model with Self-Consistency for Implicit Video Question Answering
summary: We describe our submission to the VRR Challenge @ CVPR 2026, built on the \emph{ImplicitQA} / \emph{VRR-QA} benchmark~\cite{implicitqa}: multiple-choice video question answering in which answers are deliberately \emph{not} observable in any single frame and must be inferred from spatial layout, motion, depth, viewpoint, causality, and social context across discontinuous frames of creative video. We conduct a systematic, training-free study spanning open-source Video-LMMs (Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{qwen25vl}, Qwen3-VL~\cite{qwen3vl}, InternVL3, Gemma-3, and the RL-tuned video reasoners Video-R1~\cite{videor1} and VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{videochatr15}) and a battery of inference-time strategies (chain-of-thought, question decomposition, describe-then-reason cascades, audio transcripts, spatial state prompting, self-consistency~\cite{selfconsistency}, multi-model ensembling, and category routing). Our central finding is that this benchmark is \emph{perception-bound rather than reasoning-bound}: reasoning-side augmentations are neutral-to-harmful, whereas base-model perceptual capability and lightweight test-time denoising are the only reliable levers. A per-category error analysis localizes the difficulty to low-level perception -- relative depth, viewpoint, and counting are the hardest categories, while causal and social reasoning are nearly solved -- and a prompt that explicitly injects monocular depth cues to attack the weakest category \emph{lowers} test accuracy by $5.8$ points, confirming that the model needs a better \emph{percept}, not a better \emph{procedure}.

AI.tldr: 通过对多种开源Video-LMMs和推理策略的系统性、免训练研究，本文发现VRR Challenge基准是感知受限而非推理受限的：推理增强策略效果中性甚至有害，而基础模型感知能力和轻量级测试时去噪才是提升性能的唯一可靠手段；细粒度错误分析表明相对深度、视点和计数是最困难类别，因果与社会推理已接近解决。
AI.motivation: 面向创意视频的多选题视频问答（VRR-QA基准）中，答案无法从单帧直接观测，需跨不连续帧推断空间布局、运动、深度、视点、因果关系和社会语境，现有研究缺乏对这一基准下模型瓶颈的系统性分析，尤其是推理能力与感知能力之间的相对重要性尚未厘清。
AI.method: 本研究对Qwen2.5-VL、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、Gemma-3以及RL微调的视频推理模型Video-R1和VideoChat-R1.5等多种开源Video-LMMs进行了系统的免训练评估，并测试了链式思维、问题分解、描述-推理级联、音频转录、空间状态提示、自一致性、多模型集成和类别路由等多种推理时策略，同时采用逐类别错误分析定位模型薄弱环节。
AI.result: 实验发现所有推理增强策略对性能均为中性甚至有害，只有基础模型感知能力和轻量级测试时去噪可提升准确性；逐类别分析表明相对深度、视点和计数是最困难类别，而因果推理和社会推理接近解决；明确注入单目深度线索的提示反而使测试准确率下降5.8个百分点，证实模型需要更好的感知能力而非更好的推理流程。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示VRR基准中的视频问答瓶颈在于低层感知而非高层推理，直接证明当前Video-LMMs的感知能力不足以支持从创意视频中推断空间关系、深度和视点等关键信息，为视频理解模型的发展方向提供了明确指引：应优先提升感知质量而非追求更复杂的推理策略。

title: Jailbreaking Multimodal Large Language Models using Multi-Clip Video
comment: 27 pages, 20 figures, Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026
summary: As multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced to process video inputs, concerns have emerged about their potential for malicious misuse. Prior jailbreak studies have shown that safety alignment in MLLMs can be bypassed through visual inputs, yet it remains unclear which properties of video inputs induce this vulnerability. To address this gap, we introduce Multi-Clip Video (MCV) SafetyBench, a dataset of 2,920 videos designed to evaluate how the diversity of video inputs affects the vulnerability of MLLMs. Each video consists of multiple short clips depicting diverse contexts related to a harmful query. Experiments on eight representative video MLLMs show that attack success consistently increases with the number of clips. Our results further indicate that the video modality is (1) more vulnerable than the image modality, (2) more vulnerable to dynamic videos than to static videos, and (3) more vulnerable when videos contain more diverse contexts. Building on these findings, we propose a defense strategy that leverages the relative robustness of the image modality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCV SafetyBench数据集，系统评估视频多模态大模型的安全性漏洞，发现攻击成功率随视频片段数量、动态性和上下文多样性增加而上升，并提出基于图像模态相对鲁棒性的防御策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大模型（MLLMs）已发展至支持视频输入，但其可能被恶意利用的安全风险日益突出，已有研究表明视觉输入可绕过MLLMs的安全对齐，但视频输入的哪些具体属性会导致这一漏洞尚不明确，本文旨在系统探究该问题。
AI.method: 构建了Multi-Clip Video (MCV) SafetyBench数据集，包含2,920个视频，每个视频由多个短片段组成，这些片段呈现与有害查询相关的多样化上下文；通过在八个代表性视频MLLM上进行实验，系统评估视频片段数量、动态性以及上下文多样性对模型安全漏洞的影响，并提出利用图像模态相对鲁棒性的防御策略。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：（1）攻击成功率随视频片段数量增加而持续上升；（2）视频模态比图像模态更脆弱；（3）动态视频比静态视频更容易引发攻击成功；（4）视频中包含更多样化的上下文时模型安全性更差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视频输入的多片段性、动态性和上下文多样性是导致MLLMs更易被攻击的关键因素，并提出基于图像模态相对鲁棒性的防御方向，为视频MLLM的安全性研究提供了重要见解和实用数据集。

title: COMAP: Co-Evolving World Models and Agent Policies for LLM Agents
summary: Equipping language agents with world models enables them to anticipate environment dynamics and evaluate candidate actions before execution. However, existing textual world models are typically fixed after training, preventing them from adapting to the on-policy state-action distributions induced by an evolving agent. Meanwhile, agent-improvement methods often rely on external rewards or verifiers, limiting their applicability in realistic interactive environments. In this paper, we propose COMAP, a novel framework that co-evolves textual world models and agent policies through closed-loop interaction. At each decision step, the world model predicts future state feedback for candidate actions, and the agent performs future-aware reflection by estimating the reliability of this feedback and refining its action accordingly. The resulting on-policy trajectories are then used to update the world model via self-distillation, allowing it to better match the agent's evolving interaction distribution. Across embodied task planning, Web navigation, and tool-use benchmarks, COMAP consistently outperforms competitive baselines, e.g., +16.75% relative improvement with Qwen3-4B. Further analyses show that the co-evolutionary loop improves the world model's prediction accuracy over time and leads to more effective long-horizon decision-making. Our code is available at: https://github.com/loyiv/CoMAP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMAP框架，通过闭环交互协同进化文本世界模型与智能体策略，使世界模型能在线适应智能体不断变化的交互分布，并在具身任务规划、网页导航和工具使用等基准上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本世界模型在训练后通常固定不变，无法适应演化中智能体产生的on-policy状态-动作分布变化；而智能体改进方法往往依赖外部奖励或验证器，在现实交互环境中适用性受限。现有方法难以让世界模型与智能体策略在闭环交互中共同进化。
AI.method: COMAP框架通过闭环交互协同进化世界模型与智能体策略：在每个决策步骤，世界模型预测候选动作的未来状态反馈，智能体通过估计该反馈的可信度进行未来感知反思并精炼动作；随后利用产生的on-policy轨迹通过自蒸馏更新世界模型，使其更好地匹配智能体不断演化的交互分布。
AI.result: 在具身任务规划、网页导航和工具使用等多个基准上，COMAP持续优于竞争基线，例如搭配Qwen3-4B时取得相对提升16.75%。进一步分析表明，协同进化循环能随时间提升世界模型的预测准确性，并带来更有效的长程决策能力。
AI.conclusion: COMAP证明了世界模型与智能体策略通过闭环交互协同进化的有效性，为在不依赖外部奖励的现实交互环境中提升智能体能力提供了新范式。动态适配的世界模型能更准确地反映智能体行为分布，从而显著改进长程决策表现。

title: Cross-modal linkage risk in clinical vision-language models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) trained on paired chest radiographs and radiology reports learn a shared embedding space that can preserve instance-level image-report correspondence. This poses a privacy risk in settings where radiographs and reports are deliberately kept separate after acquisition, such as image-only data sharing or access-controlled reports, because a de-identified image may be re-linked to its original narrative report through cosine similarity alone. We formalized this as image-to-report retrieval and used public paired cohorts, in which the true pairing is known by design, as ground-truth benchmarks to audit the risk rather than as the privacy scenario. Evaluating VLMs of increasing clinical specialization on 406,241 paired examples from 126,804 patients across MIMIC-CXR (43,793 held-out pairs) and external CheXpert Plus (29,296 pairs), we found that re-linkage rose systematically with specialization: the strongest VLM retrieved the correct report at 15 times chance at a candidate pool of N = 100, 50 times chance at N = 10,000, and well above chance at full-database scale. The signal persisted under pathology-matched hard negatives that removed disease-label shortcuts, indicating correspondence beyond broad diagnostic categories. To reduce it without retraining, we froze both encoders and applied differentially private optimization only to the projection heads defining the alignment layer (epsilon = 0.34, delta = 6x10-6). This reduced Recall@1 by 61.8% at N = 10,000 on MIMIC-CXR and transferred to CheXpert Plus without retraining, while image-side utility was largely preserved: macro AUROC for linear-probe classification across 14 labels shifted only from 79.63% to 79.43%. Targeted DP finetuning of the shared alignment layer can substantially reduce cross-modal re-linkage without materially degrading the image representations that make these models clinically useful.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉-语言模型在多模态医学影像中可通过余弦相似度重新关联原本分离的图像与报告，构成隐私风险，并提出仅对对齐层进行差分隐私微调的方法来显著降低重链接风险，同时保持图像表征的临床可用性。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）在胸部X光片与放射学报告配对训练后，会学习到保留实例级图像-报告对应关系的共享嵌入空间。在图像仅数据共享或报告受控访问等场景中，图像与报告被刻意分开保存，但VLM可通过余弦相似度将去标识图像重新链接到原始叙述性报告，构成隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 本文将隐私风险形式化为图像到报告的检索任务，利用已知真实配对的公共数据集作为基准来审计风险。使用MIMIC-CXR（43,793对保留样本）和CheXpert Plus（29,296对）共126,804名患者的406,241个配对样本，评估临床专业化程度递增的VLM。为降低风险，在不重训练编码器的情况下，仅对定义对齐层的投影头应用差分隐私优化（ε=0.34，δ=6×10⁻⁶）。
AI.result: 最强的VLM在候选池N=100时以15倍概率检索到正确报告，N=10,000时达50倍概率，在全数据库规模下仍显著高于随机水平；该信号在移除疾病标签捷径的病理匹配难负样本下依然存在。差分隐私微调后，MIMIC-CXR上Recall@1（N=10,000）降低61.8%，且无需重新训练即可迁移至CheXpert Plus；图像侧效用基本保持，14个标签的线性探测宏AUROC仅从79.63%微降至79.43%。
AI.conclusion: VLM的临床专业化程度越高，跨模态重链接隐私风险越大；对共享对齐层进行针对性的差分隐私微调，可以在不大幅降低临床有用图像表征质量的前提下，有效降低跨模态重链接风险。

title: Spatial Representation Learning Beyond Pixels: Unifying Raster Data and Vector Semantics for Human-Centric Geospatial Foundation Models
summary: Earth Observation (EO) has fundamentally transformed the monitoring of environmental processes and human activities up to planetary scale. Recent advances in self-supervised learning have given rise to Earth Observation Foundation Models (EOFMs), which leverage petabyte-scale unlabeled EO data to learn transferable representations across a wide range of downstream geospatial tasks. Despite these advances, current EOFMs remain largely confined to raster modalities, overlooking the rich, structured information encoded in openly-accessible vector data sources such as OpenStreetMap and Overture. Vector data provides explicit and compact representations of geographic entities, including geometry, topology, and semantic relationships, offering critical contextual signals that are often ambiguous or inaccessible in imagery alone. Raster and vector data thus represent complementary views of geographic space: raster data captures continuous physical and spectral patterns, while vector data encodes discrete objects and their relational structure and often represents more of the human rather than the physical systems (e.g. social or demographic data). However, existing geospatial representation learning paradigms treat these modalities in isolation, relying on imperfect and often lossy transformations to bridge them. This perspective paper calls for a paradigm shift toward joint Spatial Representation Learning (SRL) in an unified embedding space that integrate raster perception with vector-based reasoning. Building on emerging efforts in multimodal geospatial learning, we highlight conceptual foundations, technical challenges, and promising directions for aligning heterogeneous spatial data sources. We contend that such integration is essential for developing next-generation geospatial AI systems capable of more accurate, interpretable, and semantically grounded understanding of the Earth.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁地球观测领域从孤立的栅格或矢量表征学习范式转向统一的联合空间表征学习（SRL）框架，通过将栅格感知与基于矢量的推理对齐到同一嵌入空间，以构建下一代更准确、可解释且语义更丰富的地理空间AI系统。
AI.motivation: 现有地球观测基础模型（EOFMs）主要局限于栅格模态数据，忽略了OpenStreetMap等开放矢量数据源中蕴含的几何、拓扑与语义关系等结构化信息；栅格与矢量数据分别对应连续物理/光谱模式与离散对象/关系结构，是互补的地理空间视角，但现有表征学习范式将两者孤立处理，依赖有损的跨模态转换方法，缺乏统一的联合学习框架。
AI.method: 本文为展望性论文，提出向联合空间表征学习（Spatial Representation Learning, SRL）的范式转变，核心思路是在统一的嵌入空间中整合栅格感知与基于矢量的推理；该方法基于多模态地理空间学习的已有探索，强调构建异构空间数据源的对齐机制，但并未提出具体的模型架构或算法实现，而是系统论述了概念基础、技术挑战和有前景的研究方向。
AI.result: 本文未提供定量实验结果或基准评测结果，其"结果"主要体现在对现有EOFMs局限性的系统分析以及对联合SRL范式潜力的理论论证上；文中指出矢量数据能提供影像数据中往往模糊或不可及的关键上下文信号，且矢量数据更多代表人类系统（如社会或人口数据）而非物理系统，从而论证了融合两者的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心见解是：要实现下一代地理空间AI系统，必须打破栅格与矢量模态之间的壁垒，转向联合嵌入空间中的统一表征学习；这种整合有助于构建更准确、可解释且具有语义基础的地球理解系统，并为后续研究指明了对齐异构空间数据源这一关键方向。

title: PathAR: Structure-First Autoregressive Synthesis of Multimodal Pathology Images
summary: Data scarcity in multimodal pathology motivates unified generative models that synthesize modality-specific appearance while preserving anatomically coherent structure. Although modalities differ in appearance statistics, morphological structures such as cellular topology and tissue boundaries are largely preserved across acquisition protocols. However, existing methods often model these factors within a homogeneous token stream, implicitly coupling structure with appearance and weakening structural controllability under modality shifts. To address this, we propose pathology Autorgressive modeling (PathAR), a structure-first autoregressive synthesis framework that explicitly factorizes structure and appearance for modality-label-conditioned pathology generation.PathAR employs a dual vector quantization (Dual-VQ) tokenizer to decompose samples into mask-grounded structure and appearance tokens, and an interleaved autoregressive (IAR) transformer with asymmetric attention visibility to enforce structure-to-appearance dependence. PathAR stabilizes morphology under heterogeneous modality-specific appearances and enables spatially aligned image--mask pair generation. Extensive experiments show that PathAR improves structural consistency and modality fidelity over baselines, maintains sample diversity, supports downstream segmentation in data-scarce regimes, and demonstrates extensibility to finer-grained intra-modality organ-label variation.

AI.tldr: PathAR提出了一种结构优先的自回归合成框架，通过显式分解结构与外观并使用非对称注意力机制的交叉自回归Transformer，实现了模态标签条件化的病理图像生成，在保持结构一致性的同时支持多样化的模态外观生成与下游分割任务。
AI.motivation: 多模态病理学中数据稀缺问题严重，现有统一生成模型虽能合成不同模态外观，但通常将结构与外观耦合在单一token流中隐式建模，导致模态迁移时结构可控性弱化，难以在保持解剖学结构一致性的前提下灵活控制模态特异性外观生成。
AI.method: PathAR采用双向量量化（Dual-VQ）分词器将样本分解为基于掩码的结构token和外观token，并设计交叉自回归（IAR）Transformer，通过非对称注意力可见性强制结构到外观的依赖关系，实现模态标签条件化的病理图像生成，支持空间对齐的图像-掩码对联合生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，PathAR在结构一致性和模态保真度上优于基线方法，同时保持样本多样性，在数据稀缺场景下有效支持下游分割任务，并展现出对细粒度器官标签变化的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 显式解耦结构与外观的自回归生成范式能够有效稳定多模态病理生成中的形态结构，提升模态迁移下的结构可控性，为数据稀缺场景下的病理分析提供可行的生成式数据增强方案，并具备向更细粒度条件生成扩展的潜力。

title: Bridging the Sim-to-Real Gap in Semiconductor Visual Program Synthesis via Input Binarization
summary: Precise parametric control over circuit geometry is essential for semiconductor inspection, yet obtaining sufficient real training data remains costly. Although generative models such as diffusion models and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can augment training data, they cannot guarantee the nanometer-scale geometric accuracy required for metrology tasks. We propose a visual program synthesis framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) converts inspection images into editable Domain-Specific Language (DSL) code describing circuit geometries, enabling controlled generation of training data with exact parameter manipulation. Because the VLM is trained solely on synthetic DSL-rendered data, a domain gap arises when processing real Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) images. We bridge this gap with an input binarization strategy that strips SEM-specific texture and noise, letting the model focus on geometric structure. On the MIIC dataset, binarized inputs improve the mean Dice coefficient from 0.4393 to 0.5256 over the raw-input baseline, demonstrating that simple texture abstraction substantially mitigates the sim-to-real gap.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种视觉程序合成框架，利用视觉语言模型将半导体检测图像转换为可编辑的领域特定语言代码，并通过输入二值化策略弥合合成数据与真实SEM图像之间的领域差距，从而实现对电路几何结构的精确参数控制和可控训练数据生成。
AI.motivation: 半导体检测中对电路几何结构需要精确的参数化控制，但获取充足的真实训练数据成本高昂；同时，扩散模型和GAN等生成模型虽能增强训练数据，却无法保证计量任务所需的纳米级几何精度，因此亟需一种既能生成训练数据又能精确控制几何参数的方法。
AI.method: 提出一个视觉程序合成框架，利用视觉语言模型将检测图像转换为可编辑的领域特定语言代码，从而以精确参数操控方式生成训练数据；为弥合仅基于合成数据训练的VLM在处理真实SEM图像时的领域差距，采用输入二值化策略，去除SEM特有的纹理和噪声，使模型专注于几何结构。
AI.result: 在MIIC数据集上，二值化输入将平均Dice系数从原始输入基线的0.4393提升至0.5256，证明简单的纹理抽象策略能有效缓解仿真到真实的领域差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过视觉程序合成与输入二值化相结合，能够以较低成本实现半导体检测中高精度的几何参数控制与可控数据生成，为弥合合成数据与真实图像之间的领域差距提供了一种简洁有效的思路。

title: TLG: Temporal-Logic Grounding for Video Question Answering via Source-Annotation Reconstruction and Category-Targeted Reasoning
summary: The TimeLogic Challenge evaluates formal temporal-logic reasoning over video - 16 operators (before, after, until, since, always, co-occur, ordering, ...) in boolean and 4-way multiple-choice form. End-to-end video-language models (VLMs) hover near chance on this task because they treat video as a bag of frames and cannot localize when actions occur. We present TLG (Temporal-Logic Grounding), a three-tier system that (i) reconstructs each video's action timeline from the public source-dataset annotations the benchmark was generated from, parses every question into a temporal-logic program, and executes it deterministically; (ii) falls back to a strong open VLM where no annotation exists; and (iii) routes only the question categories where the VLM is empirically weakest to a frontier reasoning model. TLG raises test accuracy from a 46.9% VLM baseline to 71.37%, a +24.5 absolute gain, reaching within 3 points of the leaderboard top. We report extensive ablations, including three model-based timeline-reconstruction variants that all underperform a holistic VLM, isolating temporal grounding as the irreducible bottleneck and showing that real annotations - not larger models - drive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TLG系统，通过重构视频动作时间线并解析问题为时序逻辑程序，将时间逻辑推理测试的准确率从46.9%提升至71.37%，揭示了实际标注而非更大模型才是驱动精度的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视频语言模型将视频视为帧袋，无法定位动作发生的时间位置，在需要形式化时序逻辑推理的TimeLogic挑战中表现接近随机水平，亟需一种能够精确进行时序逻辑推理的方法。
AI.method: TLG是一个三层次系统：第一层从公开数据集标注重构视频动作时间线，将问题解析为时序逻辑程序并确定性执行；第二层在缺乏标注时回退到强开源VLM；第三层仅将VLM经验性最弱的问答类别路由到前沿推理模型。
AI.result: TLG将测试准确率从VLM基线模型的46.9%提升至71.37%，绝对提升达24.5个百分点，距离排行榜第一名仅差3个百分点；消融实验表明三种基于模型的时间线重构变体均不如整体VLM，隔离出时序定位作为不可约瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 时序定位是视频时序逻辑推理的核心瓶颈，真实标注而非更大模型才是驱动精度的关键因素；TLG通过符号化时序逻辑推理与VLM的混合架构显著超越纯端到端方法。

title: LLM-Evolved Pattern Generators for Optimal Classical Planning
summary: Learned heuristics have recently become a competitive alternative to traditional domain-independent heuristics for satisficing planning. Existing approaches, however, focus on improving search guidance rather than guaranteeing admissibility, which makes them unsuitable for optimal classical planning. We present the first method for learning domain-dependent heuristics that are admissible by design and thus preserve the optimality guarantees of A* search. Instead of learning a direct mapping from states to heuristic values, we learn to construct abstractions that induce admissible heuristics. We use an LLM-driven evolutionary program-synthesis framework to obtain, for each domain, a program that produces a pattern collection for any task in that domain, and we combine the resulting patterns admissibly via saturated cost partitioning. Empirically, the learned programs encode interpretable domain-specific insights, run with negligible overhead at test time and yield heuristics that match the coverage of state-of-the-art domain-independent baselines on several domains while evaluating each state substantially faster.

AI.tldr: 提出首个通过设计保证可采纳性（admissibility）的学习型启发函数方法，利用LLM驱动的进化程序合成框架为每个领域学习一个生成模式集合（pattern collection）的程序，并通过饱和成本划分（saturated cost partitioning）可采纳地组合这些模式，从而在保持A*最优性保证的同时实现快速评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的学习型启发函数在满意规划（satisficing planning）中表现出色，但无法保证可采纳性（admissibility），因此不适用于最优经典规划（optimal classical planning），这阻碍了学习型方法在需要最优性保证的规划任务中的应用。
AI.method: 提出一种LLM驱动的进化程序合成框架，为每个规划领域学习一个能自动生成模式集合（pattern collection）的程序；该程序在测试时对任意任务生成抽象模式，并通过饱和成本划分（saturated cost partitioning）可采纳地组合多个模式的启发值，从而保证整体启发函数的可采纳性。
AI.result: 在多个规划领域上，学习到的启发函数在覆盖度（coverage）上与最先进的领域无关基线方法相当，同时每个状态的评估速度显著更快；生成的程序编码了可解释的领域特定知识，且测试时运行开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次在保持A*最优性保证的前提下将学习型启发函数引入最优规划，证明了通过可采纳性设计的学习策略在实际应用中既高效又具有可解释性，为学习型方法在最优规划中的进一步应用奠定了基础。

title: Paving the Way for Point Cloud Video Representation Learning Using A PDE Model
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (T-PAMI) in 2026
summary: Investigating spatial-temporal correlations, specifically how spatial points vary over time, is crucial for understanding point cloud videos. Traditional methods, particularly flow-based techniques, struggle with these correlations due to the unordered spatial arrangement of sequential point cloud data. To address this challenge, we propose a novel approach that regularizes spatial-temporal correlation learning by formulating the problem as a solvable Partial Differential Equation (PDE). While PDEs have long been effective in the physical domain, their application to novel sequential data like point cloud video remains underexplored. Inspired by fluid analysis, we construct a simplified PDE, and the process of solving PDE is guided and refined by a contrastive learning structure between the temporal embeddings and the spatial embeddings. With this extra supervision, our method, named MotionPDE, serves as an effective, plug-and-play enhancement module for existing backbone models, adding minimal computational overhead and parameters. Capitalizing on the contrastive learning process, we delve deeper into the self-supervised capabilities of MotionPDE, yielding promising results that underscore its utility and adaptability in point cloud video data interpretation. The code repo with trained checkpoints will be available at https://github.com/zhh6425/motionpde.git for facilitating future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MotionPDE，一种将空间-时序相关性正则化为可解偏微分方程（PDE）的即插即用增强模块，通过对比学习结构引导PDE求解过程，有效提升点云视频现有骨干模型的表现，且仅引入极小的额外计算开销。
AI.motivation: 点云视频中空间点随时间变化的空间-时序相关性难以被传统基于光流的方法有效捕捉，根本原因在于序列点云数据的无序空间排列特性；此外，PDE在物理领域虽已被证明有效，但其在点云视频这类新型序列数据上的应用仍鲜有探索。
AI.method: 受流体分析启发，作者构建了一个简化的偏微分方程（PDE）来形式化空间-时序相关性学习，并通过时间嵌入与空间嵌入之间的对比学习结构来引导和精细调节PDE的求解过程；该方法以即插即用的增强模块形式集成到现有骨干网络中，仅增加极少的参数量和计算开销。
AI.result: MotionPDE作为增强模块在点云视频现有骨干模型上取得了显著的效果提升，验证了其有效性和即插即用性；进一步在自监督学习设定下，对比学习机制的引入取得了有前景的结果，证明了该方法在点云视频数据解释中的实用性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 将PDE正则化与对比学习相结合是建模点云视频空间-时序相关性的有效范式；MotionPDE以极低计算开销即可增强现有模型，且具备良好的自监督学习潜力，为点云视频理解提供了新的研究方向。

title: AGENTCL: Toward Rigorous Evaluation of Continual Learning in Language Agents
summary: Language agents spend substantial inference time solving individual tasks, yet the experience acquired in one episode is often underutilized in future episodes. Continual learning expects an agent to accumulate reusable experience across a stream of tasks, improve over time, and avoid interference from irrelevant experiences. Unfortunately, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate continual learning in language agents rigorously. Most efforts focus on retrieval and reasoning over long-context conversations or documents, while recent lifelong-adaptation benchmarks often rely on naive task streams with limited analysis of cross-task relationships, making it difficult to understand what an agent learns and reuses over time. This paper presents an evaluation framework AgentCL for continual learning in agents, centered on controlled task streams and metrics for transfer gains. AGENTCL constructs compositional streams where earlier sub-solutions, evidence, or workflows are intentionally reusable in later tasks, and contrasts them with naive streams where such reusability is not guaranteed. We use the benchmark to evaluate non-parametric memory designs for continual learning. To diagnose how memory design choices affect continual learning, we develop MemProbe, a probing method that stores interactions, insights, and skills, while filtering unreliable experiences during consolidation. Empirical analysis across coding, deep research, and language understanding/reasoning tasks shows that naive streams offer limited ability to distinguish memory designs, whereas controlled streams more clearly distinguish their plasticity. Meanwhile, naive and held-out settings often yield limited gains and can expose memory-induced degradation. These results highlight the need for stronger memory designs that balance plasticity and stable reuse.

AI.tldr: 提出AgentCL评估框架，通过可组合的任务流和非参数记忆探针MemProbe，系统研究语言代理的持续学习能力，发现可控任务流比朴素任务流能更清晰区分记忆设计的塑性差异，并揭示记忆退化风险。
AI.motivation: 现有语言代理在处理连续任务时积累的经验未被充分复用，而持续学习领域的 benchmarks 难以严格评估代理的跨任务复用能力：多数工作聚焦于长上下文对话或文档的检索与推理，近期终身学习基准则依赖朴素任务流，缺乏对跨任务关系的系统分析，无法揭示代理随时间真正学到和复用了什么。
AI.method: 提出AgentCL评估框架，核心包括可控任务流（compositional streams）和迁移增益指标；其中compositional streams有意构建前期子解、证据或工作流可在后期任务中复用的结构，与无此保证的naive streams形成对比。同时提出非参数记忆探针MemProbe，通过存储交互、洞察和技能并在整合过程中过滤不可靠经验来诊断记忆设计选择对持续学习的影响。
AI.result: 在编码、深度研究和语言理解/推理任务上的实证分析表明：naive streams区分记忆设计的能力有限，而controlled streams能更清晰地辨别不同记忆设计的塑性；naive和held-out设置下迁移增益有限，且可能暴露记忆诱导的性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了现有持续学习评估范式的不足，强调了需要更强的、能平衡塑性（plasticity）与稳定复用（stable reuse）的记忆设计，为语言代理的持续学习提供了更具诊断性的评估工具和方向。

title: Self-Improving Small Object Grounding in LVLMs
summary: Can internal attention patterns in Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) identify reliable small-object boxes without fine-tuning? In this work, we provide an affirmative answer. Attention structure in LVLMs encodes grounding quality-a lightweight IoU regressor trained solely on attention maps achieves strong IoU prediction (Pearson r > 0.67). This regressor powers the regressor-based variant of our Attention-based Candidate Selection (ACS) framework, called ACS-Learned, which selects the best box from multiple sampled candidates to improve object grounding. By analyzing what the regressor learns, we reveal which transformer layers and heads are most critical and derive ACS-Free: a training-free selector that ranks candidates by attention entropy on these discriminative heads, with no learned component at inference. Experiments on COCO and Objects365 demonstrate up to 19% self-improvement on small object localization, with ACS-Free ranking best among all training-free methods, demonstrating that useful attention structure improves both localization reliability and interpretability in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文证明大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的内部注意力结构可直接用于改进小目标定位，提出了基于注意力机制的候选框选择框架（ACS），无需微调即可实现高达19%的定位自提升，并揭示了哪些Transformer层和注意力头对定位质量最关键。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在细粒度视觉任务（如小目标定位）中表现不足，传统方法通常需要对模型进行微调或引入额外组件，而本文探索是否可以直接利用LVLM内部的注意力结构，在不经过微调的情况下识别出可靠的小目标边界框。
AI.method: 本文提出注意力候选选择（ACS）框架，包含两个变体：（1）ACS-Learned，使用轻量级IoU回归器（仅基于注意力图训练，Pearson r > 0.67）从多个采样候选中选择最佳框；（2）ACS-Free，通过分析回归器学到的知识，识别出最关键的Transformer层和注意力头，基于这些头部的注意力熵对候选框进行排序，推理时无需任何可学习组件。
AI.result: 在COCO和Objects365上的实验表明，该方法在小目标定位上实现了高达19%的自提升效果；ACS-Free在所有无需训练的方法中排名最优；轻量级IoU回归器仅基于注意力图即可实现强IoU预测（Pearson相关系数 > 0.67）。
AI.conclusion: LVLM内部注意力结构蕴含了可用的定位质量信息，通过适当利用这种结构，可以在不进行微调的情况下显著提升模型的小目标定位可靠性；该方法同时增强了模型的可解释性，揭示了哪些层和头对定位质量最为关键。

title: SafeSteer: Localized On-Policy Distillation for Efficient Safety Alignment
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, 14 tables. Submitted to EMNLP 2026
summary:
Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with human values often degrades their general capabilities, termed the alignment tax. Existing methods mitigate this by balancing dual objectives, which heavily rely on massive general-purpose data or auxiliary reward models.
  In this paper, we argue that, because safety features are inherently sparse within the output distribution, alignment requires localized modifications rather than global trade-offs. To this end, we propose SafeSteer, which performs on-policy distillation confined to safety tokens. First, we construct a safety teacher via activation steering. Based on this teacher, we develop a safety token selection algorithm. Consequently, SafeSteer restricts the reverse KL penalty to these tokens during training to preserve general capabilities.
  Experimental results across diverse models show that our SafeSteer achieves a superior trade-off between safety and general capability compared with existing methods, attaining strong safety performance on seven safety benchmarks with only minimal degradation on five general capability benchmarks. Notably, SafeSteer requires only 100 harmful samples without using any general-purpose data, less than 1% of what previous baselines used, considerably reducing alignment cost. More details are on our project page at https://anjingkun.github.io/SafeSteer.

AI.tldr: SafeSteer通过对安全token进行在线策略蒸馏，在仅需100条有害样本且不使用通用数据的情况下，实现了安全性与通用能力之间的优越权衡，显著降低了对齐成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型对齐方法常导致通用能力下降（对齐税），且缓解该问题的方法依赖大量通用数据或辅助奖励模型，成本高昂。本文基于安全特征在输出分布中天然稀疏的观察，提出应通过局部化修改而非全局权衡来解决对齐税问题。
AI.method: SafeSteer首先通过激活引导构建一个安全教师模型，然后基于该教师设计安全token选择算法，识别出与安全相关的关键token；在训练阶段，仅对这些安全token施加反向KL散度惩罚，从而在提升安全性的同时最小化对通用能力的干扰。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，SafeSteer在七个安全基准上取得强安全性表现，同时在五个通用能力基准上仅有极轻微的性能下降，优于现有方法。该方法仅需100条有害样本且完全不需要通用数据，数据量不足基线方法的1%，大幅降低了对齐成本。
AI.conclusion: SafeSteer验证了安全对齐可通过局部化修改实现高效微调，为减轻对齐税提供了新的思路；其极低的数据需求意味着该方法在实际部署中具有显著的成本优势。

title: MCP-Persona: Benchmarking LLM Agents on Real-World Personal Applications via Environment Simulation
summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has emerged as a transformative standard for connecting large language models (LLMs) with external data sources and tools, and has been rapidly adopted across personal applications and development platforms. However, existing benchmarks predominantly focus on generic information-seeking tools and fail to capture the practical challenges posed by personal social applications, where tools interact with individual accounts or local databases. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce MCP-Persona, the first benchmark specifically designed for evaluating agent performance on real-world, personalized MCP tools. MCP-Persona encompasses a diverse set of widely-used applications, ranging from social media platforms like Reddit and Xiaohongshu (Rednote) to enterprise collaboration suites such as Lark (Feishu) and Slack. Our extensive experiments on various state-of-the-art (SOTA) agents demonstrate their significant struggles with personalized tool use, thereby highlighting the benchmark's crucial role in identifying and addressing these limitations. MCP-Persona is publicly available at https://github.com/wwh0411/MCP-Persona}{https://github.com/wwh0411/MCP-Persona.

AI.tldr: MCP-Persona 是首个专为评估智能体在真实个性化 MCP 工具上性能的基准，覆盖 Reddit、小红书、飞书、Slack 等主流社交与企业应用，实验表明现有 SOTA 智能体在个性化工具使用上存在显著困难。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估智能体在通用信息检索工具上的表现，未能捕捉个人社交应用中工具与个人账户或本地数据库交互所带来的实际挑战，缺乏针对个性化 MCP 工具的性能评估体系。
AI.method: 提出 MCP-Persona 基准，涵盖从 Reddit、小红书等社交媒体平台到飞书、Slack 等企业协作套件的多样化真实应用，并在多种 SOTA 智能体上开展大规模实验评估其个性化工具使用能力。
AI.result: 多种 SOTA 智能体在个性化工具使用任务上表现出显著困难，证明该基准能够有效识别和定位当前智能体在真实个性化场景中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: MCP-Persona 填补了个性化 MCP 工具评估的空白，揭示了现有智能体在该领域的关键短板，为后续研究和改进提供了重要参考。

title: Goal2Pixel: Grounding Goals to Pixels for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a common foundation for vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE). Yet most VLM-based methods cast navigation as low-level action prediction, an interface that is ambiguous, tied to short-horizon motion primitives, and inefficient due to repeated VLM querying. We propose Goal2Pixel, a pure pixel-based paradigm that reformulates VLN-CE as navigable pixel grounding. Rather than predicting actions, Goal2Pixel uses the image plane as a unified spatial interface between VLM reasoning and robot motion: the model predicts a visible navigable pixel to the agent, which is back-projected into a 3D waypoint for forward navigation. For non-forward actions, we append auxiliary directive regions to the image plane, where the left/right/bottom regions are interpreted as turning left, turning right, and stopping, respectively. To enable long-horizon navigation, we propose a visibility-aware keyframe memory for compact and informative history representation. To adapt pretrained VLMs to navigable pixel grounding, we introduce semantic embeddings and coordinate-aware auxiliary losses. Goal2Pixel achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance while requiring fewer VLM inference calls than prior methods. On R2R-CE Val-Unseen it achieves 54.1% SR and 52.5% SPL with just 7.75 VLM calls per episode, 6x fewer than the 46.62 required by direct action prediction at 32.9% SR. The same trend holds on RxR-CE.Project Page: https://baobao0926.github.io/Goal2Pixel/.

AI.tldr: Goal2Pixel提出了一种纯像素级范式，将视觉-语言导航（VLN-CE）重新定义为可导航像素定位任务，通过在图像平面内预测导航像素并借助辅助指令区域实现长程导航，在R2R-CE和RxR-CE上以极少的VLM推理调用次数取得了具有竞争力的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的VLN-CE方法将导航建模为低层次动作预测，面临接口模糊、受限于短视运动基元、以及因重复VLM查询导致推理效率低下等问题，亟需一种更高效、更自然的空间交互范式。
AI.method: Goal2Pixel提出纯像素级范式，将VLN-CE转化为可导航像素定位问题：模型在图像平面上预测一个可见导航像素并反投影为3D航点用于前向导航；对非前向动作，在图像平面附加左、右、底部辅助指令区域分别对应左转、右转和停止；引入可见性感知关键帧记忆模块实现紧凑且信息丰富的历史表示；通过语义嵌入和坐标感知辅助损失适配预训练VLM完成导航像素定位。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE Val-Unseen上，Goal2Pixel以每集仅7.75次VLM调用（较直接动作预测的46.62次减少6倍）达到54.1% SR和52.5% SPL，超越后者32.9% SR的表现；在RxR-CE上同样保持优势，验证了方法的高效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Goal2Pixel验证了将VLN-CE转化为图像平面像素定位范式的可行性与高效性，通过统一的像素级空间接口大幅减少VLM推理开销，为视觉-语言导航提供了一种兼具性能与效率的新方向。

title: Bridging the Last Mile of Time Series Forecasting with LLM Agents
summary: Time series forecasting has advanced rapidly, especially with the emergence of foundation models that show strong zero-shot performance on numerical extrapolation. However, in real-world forecasting settings, a statistically plausible baseline is rarely the final forecast used in practice. Before a forecast becomes decision-ready, it often needs to be revised using weakly structured business context such as holiday effects, campaign plans, external events, historical analogs, and expert feedback. This practical stage remains underexplored in the forecasting literature. In this paper, we formulate this stage as the \textbf{last-mile forecasting} problem and present an LLM-agent framework that sits on top of a forecasting backbone. Our system maintains a unified forecast workspace, invokes tools to retrieve contextual evidence, and converts reasoning trajectories into explicit forecast revision actions under structural safety constraints. It also supports long-horizon forecasting through map-reduce-style decomposition and post-hoc reflection through a memory bank. The resulting system is designed to be controllable and auditable. Through real-world case studies, we show how LLM agents can bridge the gap between statistical prediction and business-ready forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并形式化了时间序列预测中的"最后一公里预测"问题，并设计了一个基于LLM智能体的框架，该框架在统计预测模型之上引入推理、工具调用和记忆机制，将原始预测转化为融合业务上下文与专家反馈的可审计预测结果。
AI.motivation: 现实中的时间序列预测在获得统计基线后，通常需要根据节假日、活动计划、外部事件等弱结构化业务上下文进行人工修订才能进入决策阶段，而这一关键环节在现有预测文献中尚未被系统研究。本文旨在将此阶段形式化为"最后一公里预测"问题，填补统计预测与业务就绪预测之间的空白。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个基于LLM智能体的框架，该框架位于预测主干模型之上，核心设计包括：统一的预测工作空间、用于检索上下文证据的工具调用机制、将推理轨迹转换为显式预测修订动作的结构化安全约束、通过map-reduce式分解支持长时域预测，以及通过记忆库实现事后反思。整个系统以可控和可审计为设计目标。
AI.result: 通过真实世界案例研究，本文展示了所提出的LLM智能体框架能够有效弥合统计预测与业务就绪预测之间的差距，验证了将弱结构化业务上下文纳入预测修订流程的可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了统计预测在实际落地中面临的关键瓶颈——缺乏对业务上下文的整合能力，并证明了LLM智能体作为一种可控、可审计的中间层，能够有效将非结构化业务知识转化为显式的预测修订动作，为未来将大语言模型纳入决策驱动的预测流水线提供了新的研究方向。

title: What to Test Next: Interpretable Coverage Gap Discovery in Driving VLMs
summary: Driving vision-language models (VLMs) must accurately understand scenes across diverse conditions defined by Operational Design Domains (ODDs), yet verification remains sparse: many slices are missing, making empirical failure rates unreliable. We propose SliceScorer, a deterministic scoring rule for missing-slice recommendation that combines (i) an exposure-based coverage prior to prioritize rare, under-tested regions, and (ii) a neighbor-failure prior that propagates risk from similar tested conditions. SliceScorer is deliberately simple - interpretable, auditable, and conservative - properties essential for safety-critical validation. For stress testing beyond the declared ODD, we embed SliceScorer within SliceNav, an LLM-orchestrated verification pipeline where the model interprets developer queries to select relevant operators (triage, scoring, acquisition, evaluation) and vocabulary extensions, composing verification workflows while keeping all scoring deterministic and auditable. Experiments on three driving VLMs (WiseAD, DriveMM, Cosmos-Reason2-2B) show that SliceNav surfaces high-risk coverage gaps more effectively than prior slice-discovery methods while maintaining diverse recommendations across the condition space. Ablations confirm both scoring components contribute, and qualitative analysis demonstrates end-to-end workflows from developer query to targeted evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出 SliceScorer 确定性评分规则与 SliceNav LLM 编排验证管道，用于自动驾驶视觉语言模型在操作设计域内外的缺失切片推荐与压力测试，实验证明其能有效发现高风险覆盖缺口且保持可解释与可审计性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶视觉语言模型需要在多样化的操作设计域条件下准确理解场景，但现有验证方法存在严重稀疏性——大量条件切片缺失，导致经验失败率不可靠，亟需一种可解释、可审计且保守的缺失切片推荐方法用于安全关键验证。
AI.method: 提出 SliceScorer 确定性评分规则，结合基于曝光度的覆盖先验（优先推荐罕见欠测试区域）和基于邻域失败的先验（从相似已测试条件传播风险）；在此基础上构建 SliceNav LLM 编排验证管道，模型理解开发者查询并选择相关算子（分诊、评分、获取、评估）及词汇扩展，组合出完整的确定性验证工作流。
AI.result: 在 WiseAD、DriveMM、Cosmos-Reason2-2B 三个驾驶 VLM 上的实验表明，SliceNav 在发现高风险覆盖缺口方面优于先前的切片发现方法，同时保持条件空间上推荐的多样性；消融实验确认两个评分组件均有贡献，定性分析展示了从开发者查询到目标评估的端到端工作流。
AI.conclusion: SliceScorer 和 SliceNav 为安全关键的自动驾驶 VLM 验证提供了一种可解释、可审计且保守的缺失切片推荐与压力测试方案，能有效揭示超出声明 ODD 的高风险区域，对提升自动驾驶系统验证的可靠性和完备性具有重要意义。
