title: Conditional Collapse in Sign Language Production: A Diagnostic and a Scaling Argument
summary:
Sign Language Production (SLP) is the task of generating avatar sign language motion from natural language
  text. The quality of the generated motion is typically evaluated by a motion-space Fréchet distance (FID) and
  back-translation (BT) BLEU score on benchmarks such as How2Sign. Both metrics can improve substantially
  while the underlying generator fails to faithfully represent the sign language gestures. In this work we
  propose to evaluate the generated motion at three independent levels: (τ1) initial-pose conditioning, (τ2)
  output diversity, and (τ3) target faithfulness. We compute these as pairwise-distance ratios using latent
  representations of a frozen motion autoencoder (MoAE). We evaluate 14 SLP model checkpoints on the How2Sign
  dataset, including a re-implemented Neural Sign Actors (NSA), and show that τ3 faithfulness is never
  attained, while FID varies by nearly two orders of magnitude and is uncorrelated with faithfulness. We show
  that on the isolated gloss dataset ASL3DWord favorable τ3 can be attained, hence isolating the size of the
  sentence-level paired-dataset as the bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在手语生成（SLP）任务中，现有评估指标（如FID和BT BLEU）可能虚高，无法真实反映生成动作的质量，提出了一个基于冻结运动自编码器（MoAE）的三层次评估框架（初始姿态条件、输出多样性、目标忠实度），并证明当前模型在句子级数据集上无法达到目标忠实度，而数据规模是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有手语生成（SLP）评估指标FID和BT BLEU在生成模型实际未能忠实表达手语手势时仍可能大幅提升，导致评估结果与真实生成质量严重脱节，缺乏对生成动作的细粒度、多层次质量评估方法。
AI.method: 提出三层次评估体系（τ1初始姿态条件、τ2输出多样性、τ3目标忠实度），利用冻结运动自编码器（MoAE）的潜层表示计算成对距离比率，以此量化生成动作在三个独立维度上的质量，并评估了14个SLP模型检查点（含复现的Neural Sign Actors, NSA）在How2Sign和ASL3DWord数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 在How2Sign数据集上，所有14个SLP模型检查点均未达到τ3目标忠实度，FID变化幅度接近两个数量级且与忠实度无相关性；在孤立词数据集ASL3DWord上可达到良好的τ3分数，表明句子级配对数据集规模是当前SLP的主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 当前SLP评估指标FID和BLEU具有误导性，无法反映生成动作是否真正忠实于输入语义；目标忠实度（τ3）的缺失揭示了句子级配对数据不足是核心瓶颈，未来应着力于扩大高质量句子级手语数据集或探索数据高效的学习方法。

title: Learning Label-Efficient Interpretable Medical Image Diagnosis via Semi-supervised Hypergraph Concept Bottleneck Model
summary: Deep learning has revolutionized medical image analysis, delivering exceptional diagnostic accuracy across diverse applications. Yet, the lack of interpretability in its decision-making hinders clinical adoption, particularly in high-stakes medical contexts where transparency is paramount for trustworthiness. For example, in Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS), subtle cues in ultrasound imaging challenge reliable diagnosis, rendering black-box models untrustworthy for accurate scoring. To address this, Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a promising avenue by embedding clinically meaningful intermediate concepts into the diagnosis pipeline, enabling clinicians to scrutinize and refine model outputs. However, conventional CBMs falter in capturing complex inter-concept dependencies and demand costly, expert-driven concept annotations, limiting their scalability. This study introduces a novel semi-supervised CBM framework designed for medical imaging, which leverages dual-level hypergraph learning to model high-order concept dependencies and generate domain-adaptive pseudo-labels. Our approach achieves superior interpretability and performance by integrating a concept-level hypergraph for enhanced reasoning and an image-level hypergraph for robust pseudo-label generation. Experiments on a newly annotated PAS ultrasound dataset and a breast ultrasound public dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed concept label-efficient interpretable framework. Its universality is further validated on the dermoscopic image dataset SkinCon. The code is available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/HyperCBM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于双层级超图学习的半监督概念瓶颈模型（HyperCBM），通过建模高阶概念依赖关系和生成领域自适应伪标签，在胎盘植入谱系超声数据集、乳腺超声公开数据集和皮肤镜数据集上实现了兼具高可解释性与高诊断性能的医学图像分析。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像分析中虽诊断精度优异，但缺乏可解释性，阻碍了其在高风险临床场景中的可信应用；传统概念瓶颈模型虽引入临床语义概念，但难以捕捉概念间复杂依赖关系且依赖昂贵的人工标注，限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出了一种半监督概念瓶颈模型框架HyperCBM，采用双层级超图学习：概念级超图用于增强概念间高阶依赖推理，图像级超图用于生成鲁棒的领域自适应伪标签，从而在减少概念标注成本的同时保持高可解释性。
AI.result: 在自标注的胎盘植入谱系超声数据集、公开乳腺超声数据集以及皮肤镜数据集SkinCon上进行了实验验证，结果表明所提框架在概念标签高效场景下兼具优异的可解释性与诊断性能，并展示了良好的跨领域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过双层级超图学习有效解决了概念瓶颈模型在医学影像中概念依赖建模不足和标注成本高两大关键问题，为高风险医学诊断场景提供了一种可解释且可扩展的建模框架，代码已开源。

title: Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs
summary: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content. Earlier solutions typically rely on fine-tuning or prompt engineering, which either undermine the advantages of pre-trained models or are prone to hallucination. In this work, we propose Density-Aware Translation (DAT) that refines image-text similarity scores using a local geometric density term derived from group reference sets. Our approach is motivated by the phenomenon that CLIP embeddings exhibit a modality gap and lie on an anisotropic shell in the feature space: common patterns cluster near the mean, while rare patterns are pushed outward. This geometry creates uneven alignment, where spurious correlations are amplified while semantically meaningful but rare cues are marginalised. To address this, we employ a relative measure to rescale similarities based on embedding density, suppressing overconfident scores in diffuse regions while preserving dense, semantically consistent matches. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in worst-group and average accuracy, highlighting density-aware translation as a simple and effective calibration mechanism for reliable zero-shot classification using multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 提出密度感知平移（DAT）方法，通过引入局部几何密度项修正图像-文本相似度分数，有效缓解多模态模型（如CLIP）在零样本分类中因虚假相关性导致的预测偏差，在多个基准数据集上一致提升了最差组精度和平均精度。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在零样本分类中性能强大，但其预测容易受到虚假相关性的影响，即上下文线索主导语义内容。现有解决方案（如微调或提示工程）要么削弱预训练模型的优势，要么容易产生幻觉，因此需要一种不破坏预训练知识且能有效校准模型预测的轻量级方法。
AI.method: 提出密度感知平移（Density-Aware Translation, DAT），该方法基于组参考集计算局部几何密度，利用该密度项重新缩放图像-文本相似度分数。该方法利用了CLIP嵌入空间中的模态间隙和各向异性壳结构：常见模式聚类在均值附近，罕见模式被推向外部，DAT通过抑制稀疏区域中的过度自信分数并保留密集的语义一致匹配来校准预测。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，DAT方法在零样本分类任务中一致提升了最差组精度（worst-group accuracy）和平均精度（average accuracy），证明了密度感知平移作为一种简单有效的校准机制能够提升多模态模型的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了CLIP嵌入空间中的几何结构（各向异性壳与模态间隙）与虚假相关性之间的内在联系，并提出了一种无需训练或微调的密度感知校准方法，为提升多模态模型在零样本分类中的鲁棒性提供了新的有效思路。

title: FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds
summary: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as DINOv2-ViT-S/14 provide robust semantic features, their latent manifolds exhibit prominent curvature, projecting uniform linear motion in physical space onto highly non-linear trajectories in the feature space, which hinders reliable reconstruction under sparse anchor conditions. To enable the aforementioned interpolation-based reconstruction, we introduce a residual transformation $\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$ to the raw foundation features $\mathbf{z}$, where $\text{Res}(\cdot)$ represents a learnable adapter. Our method explicitly suppresses manifold curvature using a mathematically grounded Pullback Flatness Loss that minimizes the deviation of intermediate features from the linear segment connecting adjacent anchors, thereby minimizing the intrinsic curvature of the manifold. Through this spatial flattening, map construction is formulated within an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework, decoupled into a continuous M-step for manifold adaptation and a conceptual E-step for optimal anchor selection guidelines. Experiments on the NCLT dataset demonstrate that the application of our adapter leads to significant performance improvements even under extremely sparse anchor conditions with 100m intervals and extreme seasonal changes.

AI.tldr: FlatVPR提出了一种基于几何校正的视觉位置识别范式，通过可学习的残差适配器和Pullback Flatness Loss显式抑制特征流形曲率，使得稀疏锚点间的描述子可通过线性插值精确重建，从而实现地图轻量化与定位精度的兼得。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉位置识别方法面临地图轻量化与定位精度之间的权衡困境：虽然基于基础模型（如DINOv2-ViT）的特征具有鲁棒的语义表达能力，但其潜在流形存在显著曲率，导致物理空间中的均匀线性运动在特征空间中投影为高度非线性的轨迹，从而在稀疏锚点条件下无法通过简单的线性插值实现描述子的可靠重建。
AI.method: FlatVPR引入一个可学习的残差适配器对原始基础特征进行变换，并设计了一种基于Pullback Flatness Loss的损失函数，从数学上最小化中间特征与相邻锚点间线性段的偏离程度，从而显式抑制流形曲率；随后将地图构建问题形式化为期望最大化（EM）框架，解耦为连续的M步（流形自适应）和概念性的E步（最优锚点选择准则）。
AI.result: 在NCLT数据集上的实验表明，即使在锚点间隔高达100米的极端稀疏条件下以及面临剧烈的季节变化，FlatVPR所提出的适配器仍然能够带来显著的性能提升，验证了该方法在极稀疏地图下保持高定位精度的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FlatVPR通过流形平坦化策略有效弥合了地图轻量化与定位精度之间的鸿沟，证明了对基础模型特征进行后处理以降低流形曲率是一种可行的途径；该工作为在资源和存储受限场景下部署高精度VPR系统提供了理论依据和实用框架。

title: Sensitivity as a Double-Edged Sword: A Trade-off Between Discriminability and Adversarial Robustness
summary: Modern neural networks are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations. In this work, we identify that part of this vulnerability stems from the sensitivity of the widely used fully connected (FC) classifiers to such perturbations. In contrast, simple $\ell_2$ distance-based classifiers exhibit significantly greater robustness. We provide thorough theoretical and empirical analysis showing that while FC classifiers' high sensitivity makes them discriminative, it also makes them vulnerable. Conversely, $\ell_2$-classifiers' insensitivity grants robustness but limits performance. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose a novel $\ell_2$-reclassifier based on a Hybrid Prototype Mixing (HPM) framework. This method retains the discriminative power of FC classifiers while leveraging the robustness of $\ell_2$ distance. It yields $\ell_2$-distance-based predictions by fusing two prototype types: (1) stable, dataset-level prototypes updated via EMA, and (2) dynamic, batch-level prototypes generated from the FC classifier's predictions using a Straight-Through Estimator (STE). However, this dynamic, STE-based architecture introduces significant challenges for evaluation, such as gradient obfuscation and forward discontinuity. To address this, we propose a new, rigorous evaluation protocol, the Mixed Surrogate Attack (MSA), which uses multiple surrogates along with powerful AutoAttack to ensure a fair and robust assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lightweight, plug-and-play module, with minimal fine-tuning, effectively enhances the adversarial robustness of various existing SOTA adversarially trained models.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了全连接分类器的高敏感性是导致神经网络易受对抗攻击的重要原因，而ℓ2距离分类器虽具鲁棒性但性能受限；为此提出基于混合原型混合（HPM）框架的ℓ2重分类器，结合两种原型实现鲁棒性与判别性的平衡，并设计了混合代理攻击（MSA）评估协议以确保公平评测，实验表明该方法能有效增强现有对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明神经网络极易受到对抗扰动的影响，但其中根本原因尚未充分理解。本文发现全连接（FC）分类器的高敏感性虽然赋予了模型判别能力，但也使其对对抗扰动极为脆弱；而ℓ2距离分类器虽具有天然的鲁棒性，但其性能不足以单独使用。因此，如何在保留FC分类器判别能力的同时引入ℓ2分类器的鲁棒性成为了一个关键的研究问题。
AI.method: 本文提出基于混合原型混合（HPM）框架的ℓ2重分类器，融合两类原型进行ℓ2距离预测：一是通过指数移动平均（EMA）更新的稳定数据集级原型，二是利用直通估计器（STE）从FC分类器预测中生成的动态批量级原型。为解决STE架构带来的梯度混淆和前向不连续等评估难题，提出了混合代理攻击（MSA）评估协议，利用多个代理模型结合强大的AutoAttack确保公平且鲁棒的评估。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，所提出的轻量级即插即用模块仅需少量微调即可有效提升多种现有最先进对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。理论分析和实验验证了FC分类器的高敏感性导致脆弱性，而ℓ2分类器的低敏感性带来鲁棒性但限制性能，HPM框架在二者之间取得了有效的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和实证研究揭示了FC分类器敏感性与脆弱性之间的内在关联，以及ℓ2分类器鲁棒性与性能之间的权衡关系。提出的HPM框架和MSA评估协议为提升模型对抗鲁棒性提供了新的思路和可靠评估手段，表明通过混合原型策略可以在不牺牲判别能力的前提下增强鲁棒性。

title: EvoCut: Multi-Layer Evolution-Aware Visual Token Compression for Efficient Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on image and video understanding tasks, but their inference efficiency is constrained by the large number of visual tokens produced by vision encoders. Most existing visual token compression methods estimate token importance from attention scores or representation properties at specific layers, overlooking how visual tokens evolve across the vision encoder. Such layer-specific criteria may provide incomplete importance estimates and limit performance preservation after compression. To address this issue, we analyze layer-wise visual token evolution directions and observe that tokens form multiple group evolution directions across vision-encoder layers. Our analysis further shows that informative tokens tend to exhibit persistent deviations from common group evolution directions. Based on this observation, we propose EvoCut, a training-free and attention-free visual token compression method that estimates token importance from multi-layer evolution deviation. Experimental results show that EvoCut can retain only 11.1\% of the visual tokens on LLaVA-1.5-7B while preserving 94.4\% of the average performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing efficiency and accuracy.

AI.tldr: EvoCut提出了一种无需训练和无需注意力计算的视觉Token压缩方法，通过跨层视觉Token演化偏离度评估Token重要性，在LLaVA-1.5-7B上仅保留11.1%的Token即可保持94.4%的平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Token压缩方法大多依赖特定层的注意力分数或表示属性来估计Token重要性，忽略了视觉Token在视觉编码器各层之间的演化动态，导致重要性估计不完整，压缩后性能损失较大。
AI.method: 通过对视觉编码器各层Token演化方向的分析，发现Token形成了多个组演化方向，且信息性Token会持续偏离公共组演化方向。基于此，提出了EvoCut方法，利用多层演化偏离度作为Token重要性的评估指标，无需训练和注意力计算即可实现视觉Token压缩。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上，EvoCut仅保留11.1%的视觉Token即可达到94.4%的平均性能保持率，在效率与准确性之间实现了有效平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视觉Token在多层的演化方向结构及其与信息性的关联，提出了利用跨层演化偏离度进行重要性估计的新视角，为高效LVLM推理提供了训练无关的轻量化压缩方案。

title: PlatonicNav: Unveiling Semantic Correspondence in Navigation with Platonic Topological Maps
summary: Embodied visual navigation, where an agent perceives a complex environment and acts to reach a goal from raw sensory input, underpins a wide range of applications such as household service robotics, assistive robotics, and large-scale autonomous exploration. However, recent attempts to unify vision-and-language navigation (VLN) and object goal navigation (ObjNav) remain at the level of architectural fusion, mixed-task training, and large vision-language pretraining, without examining whether independently trained vision and language encoders may already share a common semantic structure. Moreover, even object-centric topological maps still ground language goals through explicit cross-modal supervision such as CLIP or large vision-language models, leaving open whether such grounding is possible from a purely vision-built map. To address these challenges, we extend the Platonic Representation Hypothesis to embodied navigation and recast vision-only ObjNav, cross-modal ObjNav, and VLN as three different interfaces to the same object-centric semantic manifold. We further introduce PlatonicNav, a training-free framework whose Platonic Topological Map fuses geometric and semantic node distances from a self-supervised visual encoder, and grounds language goals via blind matching without any paired vision-language data. Extensive experiments on simulation benchmarks including HM3D-IIN, OVON, and R2R-CE on MP3D, together with deployment on Unitree Go2, demonstrate that PlatonicNav generalizes across tasks, modalities, and embodiments without explicit cross-modal training. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/PlatonicNav. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/PlatonicNav.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlatonicNav框架，将Platonic表象假说扩展至具身导航，通过统一的自监督视觉编码器构建柏拉图拓扑地图，在无需跨模态训练或视觉-语言配对数据的情况下，同时支持纯视觉目标导航、跨模态目标导航和视觉-语言导航，并在多种仿真基准和真实机器人上验证了其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有具身导航研究（如VLN和ObjNav）的融合停留在架构拼接和混合训练层面，未探究独立训练的视觉和语言编码器是否已共享公共语义结构；同时，基于目标中心拓扑地图的方法仍依赖CLIP或大型视觉-语言模型进行显式跨模态监督，尚不清楚纯视觉构建的地图能否完成语言目标的地面化。
AI.method: 本文将Platonic表象假说推广至具身导航，将纯视觉ObjNav、跨模态ObjNav和VLN统一视为同一目标中心语义流形的三种不同接口；提出PlatonicNav框架，其核心是Platonic拓扑地图，通过融合来自自监督视觉编码器的几何距离和语义节点距离构建地图，并通过盲匹配（blind matching）实现语言目标的地面化，完全无需配对视觉-语言数据。
AI.result: 在HM3D-IIN、OVON和R2R-CE（MP3D）等仿真基准以及Unitree Go2机器人上的实验表明，PlatonicNav无需显式跨模态训练即可在不同任务、模态和具身形态上实现泛化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了独立训练的视觉和语言编码器在具身导航任务中已共享公共语义结构，证明了纯视觉拓扑地图足以实现语言目标的地面化，为无需跨模态监督的通用导航框架提供了理论依据和实用方案。

title: STaR-KV: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting for KV Cache Compression in GUI Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language-model-based graphical user interface (GUI) agents have shown broad automation capabilities, yet deployment is bottlenecked by a key-value (KV) cache that grows linearly with interaction steps. For instance, UI-TARS-1.5-7B consumes 76 GB of GPU memory on merely five screenshots, approaching the capacity of mainstream 80 GB accelerators. Existing KV compression methods share two structural assumptions: aggregating visual-token importance into a single shared saliency map, and applying a fixed top-B cutoff to the fused score distribution. Pilot measurements refute both: spatial specialization lives at the attention-subspace level and migrates across layers, while the score distribution drifts in shape along a trajectory. We propose STaR-KV (Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting), a training-free KV cache compression framework that calibrates token importance along three axes: (i) subspace-aware scoring driven by online spatial mutual information; (ii) a temporal stability discount that suppresses redundant cache entries from persistently attended subspaces; and (iii) an entropy-derived temperature that adaptively reshapes the score distribution. Across four GUI benchmarks, STaR-KV achieves the strongest average accuracy among state-of-the-art KV compression methods (e.g., GUIKV, SnapKV) at matched budgets, with no compression-stage FLOPs overhead (-0.07%) and cutting peak GPU memory by nearly 40% at a 20% KV-cache budget. Code is available at https://github.com/kawhiiiileo/STaR-KV.

AI.tldr: 提出STaR-KV，一种无需训练的KV缓存压缩框架，通过子空间感知评分、时间稳定性折扣和熵驱动温度重塑来压缩视觉语言模型GUI智能体的KV缓存，在匹配预算下达到SOTA平均准确率，峰值GPU内存降低近40%。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型驱动的GUI智能体在部署时面临KV缓存随交互步骤线性增长的瓶颈，例如UI-TARS-1.5-7B在仅处理五张截图时就消耗76 GB GPU内存，接近主流80 GB加速器的容量上限。现有KV压缩方法（如分配单一共享显著图、应用固定top-B截断）在结构上存在两个被实验推翻的假设：视觉token的重要性在注意力子空间层面存在空间特化且跨层迁移，而评分分布的形状沿轨迹发生漂移。
AI.method: 提出STaR-KV（Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting），一种无需训练的KV缓存压缩框架，沿三个轴线校准token重要性：一是基于在线空间互信息的子空间感知评分；二是时间稳定性折扣，抑制来自持续被关注子空间的冗余缓存条目；三是熵导出的温度参数，自适应重塑评分分布。该方法不引入压缩阶段的FLOPs开销。
AI.result: 在四个GUI基准测试上，STaR-KV在匹配预算下达到了现有最优KV压缩方法（如GUIKV、SnapKV）中最强的平均准确率，压缩阶段FLOPs开销为-0.07%，在20% KV缓存预算下将峰值GPU内存降低近40%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有KV压缩方法中关于视觉token重要性聚合和评分分布截断的结构性假设缺陷，证明了注意力子空间层面的空间特化与评分分布漂移的存在。STaR-KV通过子空间感知、时间稳定性折扣和自适应温度三个维度的协同校准，在不增加计算开销的前提下实现了更优的KV缓存压缩效果，为GUI智能体的大规模部署提供了可行方案。

title: Unsupervised Collaborative Domain Adaptation for Driving Scene Parsing
summary: Reliable driving scene parsing is a fundamental capability for autonomous vehicles operating in open and dynamic driving environments. However, adapting perception models to new deployment domains remains challenging because pixel-level annotations are expensive to obtain, while source-domain data are often inaccessible due to privacy, security, or ownership constraints. Existing source-free unsupervised domain adaptation methods typically rely on a single pre-trained source model, which makes the adapted perception system vulnerable to source-specific biases and limits its robustness under diverse road layouts, illumination conditions, weather patterns, and traffic conditions. This article presents an unsupervised collaborative domain adaptation (UCDA) framework for driving scene parsing in a source-free setting, which transfers complementary knowledge from multiple pre-trained source models to a unified target model without accessing any original source samples. To compare predictions from independently trained models, UCDA constructs a class-level prototype memory bank and estimates cross-model prediction reliability through prototype similarity, reducing the effect of inconsistent confidence scales across source models. Based on the resulting complementary supervision, UCDA adopts a two-stage transfer strategy: multiple source models are first refined on unlabeled target-domain driving data through collaborative optimization with positive and negative consistency constraints, and their validated expertise is then distilled into a single deployable target model. Comprehensive evaluations on public driving-scene datasets and real-world data collected from an autonomous vehicle platform demonstrate that UCDA effectively consolidates complementary multi-source knowledge, improving target-domain scene parsing reliability and generalization across diverse driving environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督协作域自适应（UCDA）框架，在无需访问原始源域数据且不依赖单一预训练源模型的条件下，通过整合多个源模型的互补知识，实现面向自动驾驶场景解析的鲁棒目标域适应。
AI.motivation: 现有源无关无监督域自适应方法通常依赖单一预训练源模型，导致感知系统易受源域特定偏差影响，在多样的道路布局、光照条件、天气模式和交通状况下鲁棒性不足；同时像素级标注成本高昂且源域数据常因隐私或安全限制不可获取。
AI.method: UCDA框架首先构建类别级原型记忆库，通过原型相似度估计跨模型预测可靠性，以统一多个预训练源模型的置信度尺度差异；进而采用两阶段迁移策略：第一阶段利用正负一致性约束对多个源模型在无标注目标域数据上进行协同优化，第二阶段将验证后的专家知识蒸馏至单一可部署目标模型。
AI.result: 在公开驾驶场景数据集和真实自动驾驶平台采集数据上的综合评估表明，UCDA能够有效整合多源互补知识，提升目标域场景解析的可靠性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明通过无监督协作方式聚合多个源模型的互补知识，能够在源数据不可访问的条件下有效提升自动驾驶感知系统在开放动态环境中的适应性与鲁棒性，为源无关多源域自适应提供了可行范式。

title: Hist2Style: Histogram-Guided Stylization with Bilateral Grids
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Extended results are at https://www.dekelgalor.com/hist2style
summary: Photorealistic style transfer aims to match the color and tone of an input image to that of a style target while preserving the content and details of the original scene. Although existing large image models can facilitate these kinds of appearance edits, their high computational demands, potential for hallucinations, and limited user control make them unsuitable for high-resolution, real-time workflows. We introduce Hist2Style, a bilateral-grid formulation for fast, edge-aware stylization that preserves visual fidelity by constraining operations to locally affine transforms in bilateral space. Our model distills a large image editing model into a lightweight network by training on a large supervised corpus generated with language and vision-language models, targeting spatially varying color edits. The network conditions on a histogram-based embedding of the style target to provide an interpretable interface for adjusting the output style by modifying the target color distribution. Overall, Hist2Style maintains content structure by construction, avoids hallucinations, and supports real-time, high-resolution photorealistic stylization with interactive user-controllable color and tone adjustments.

AI.tldr: Hist2Style 提出一种基于双边网格的光照风格传递方法，通过蒸馏大图像编辑模型为轻量网络，结合直方图风格嵌入实现实时、高分辨率、可交互的光真实感风格迁移，避免幻觉并保持内容结构。
AI.motivation: 现有大图像模型虽能完成外观编辑，但计算开销大、易产生幻觉且用户控制能力有限，难以满足高分辨率实时工作流的需求。
AI.method: Hist2Style 采用双边网格（bilateral-grid）公式进行快速、边缘感知的色调迁移，将操作约束为双边空间中的局部仿射变换；通过蒸馏大图像编辑模型为轻量网络并在语言和视觉语言模型生成的大规模监督语料上训练；网络以基于直方图的风格目标嵌入为条件，提供可解释的用户交互界面。
AI.result: 该方法在保持内容结构的同时避免了幻觉，支持实时、高分辨率的光真实感风格化，并允许用户通过修改目标颜色分布进行交互式色调调整。
AI.conclusion: Hist2Style 通过双边网格约束和轻量蒸馏网络，在保持视觉保真度的前提下实现了可交互、无幻觉的实时光真实感风格传递，为高分辨率图像编辑提供了高效可控的解决方案。

title: Hierarchically Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts for Robust Traffic Sign Recognition in Complex Driving Scenarios
summary: Traffic sign detection is a fundamental component of environmental perception in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. However, most existing detectors rely on static inference with globally shared parameters, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse and unstructured traffic scenarios. As a result, a single static model often struggles to simultaneously handle both clear near-range samples and challenging conditions such as distant small targets or adverse weather environments. To address this limitation, we propose CBDES MoE TSR, a hierarchically decoupled heterogeneous mixture-of-experts(MoE) framework for traffic sign recognition. The proposed framework departs from the conventional globally shared parameter paradigm by introducing a heterogeneous You Only Look Once (YOLO) expert pool together with a lightweight gating network, enabling an image-level dynamic routing mechanism. Based on the semantic characteristics of the input image, the gating module selectively activates the most suitable expert model from the expert pool, enabling a shift from fixed parameter fitting to on-demand dynamic representation. This design enhances feature extraction capability for specific scenarios while maintaining controlled inference overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a remarkable balance between detection accuracy and efficiency on the composite traffic sign dataset. Specifically, our method attains an mAP50-95 of 76.8%, yielding a 2.3% improvement over the baseline method (74.5%) while simultaneously reducing computational overhead by approximately 39.4%. These findings robustly validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出CBDES MoE TSR，一种分层解耦的异构混合专家框架，通过图像级动态路由机制按需激活最合适的YOLO专家模型，在交通标志检测任务上以76.8% mAP50-95超越基线2.3%，同时降低约39.4%的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有交通标志检测器大多依赖静态推理和全局共享参数，无法灵活适应多样化的非结构化交通场景，导致单个静态模型难以同时处理好近处清晰样本与远处小目标、恶劣天气等挑战性条件。
AI.method: 提出CBDES MoE TSR框架，采用分层解耦的异构混合专家结构，构建异构YOLO专家池并搭配轻量级门控网络，基于输入图像的语义特征实现图像级动态路由，选择性激活最适合当前场景的专家模型，从而将固定参数拟合转变为按需动态表征。
AI.result: 在复合交通标志数据集上，该方法达到76.8%的mAP50-95，相比基线方法（74.5%）提升2.3%，同时计算开销降低约39.4%，在检测精度与效率之间取得了显著平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了在交通标志检测中引入动态路由与混合专家机制的有效性，表明按需激活专家模型能够在保持可控推理开销的同时显著提升特定场景下的特征提取能力，为面向复杂环境的自适应感知系统提供了可行方案。

title: ROGLE: Robust Global-Local Alignment with Automated Region Supervision for Text-Based Person Search
summary: Text-Based Person Search (TBPS) aims to retrieve pedestrian images using natural language queries. However, existing TBPS models, especially those based on CLIP, struggle with fine-grained understanding due to global representational bias and semantic sparsity inherited from training on short captions. This results in weak fine-grained alignment, exacerbated by the scarcity of region-level annotations. To address this, we propose ROGLE (Robust Global-Local Embedding), a unified framework that overcomes reliance on costly manual annotations through an automated Region-to-Sentence Matching (RSM) strategy. RSM automatically mines pseudo region-sentence pairs for scalable fine-grained supervision. Furthermore, ROGLE employs a multi-granular learning strategy that fuses global contrastive learning with region-level local alignment. We also introduce the P-VLG Benchmark, a large-scale dataset constructed by curating and enriching images from established public benchmarks. It features over 100,000 annotated regions and rich long-form captions, making it the first TBPS benchmark to support both global and local assessment protocols. Extensive experiments show that ROGLE significantly outperforms existing approaches, particularly on challenging long-form queries. Code and the P-VLG benchmark will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出ROGLE统一框架，通过自动区域-句子匹配（RSM）策略和P-VLG基准数据集，解决CLIP等模型因全局表示偏差和语义稀疏导致的细粒度文本-行人检索对齐问题，在长文本查询任务上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的文本行人搜索模型由于在短描述上训练，存在全局表示偏差和语义稀疏性问题，导致细粒度对齐能力弱；同时，区域级标注的稀缺进一步加剧了这一问题，限制了模型对局部细节的理解。
AI.method: 提出ROGLE框架，核心包括自动区域-句子匹配（RSM）策略，通过挖掘伪区域-句子对提供可扩展的细粒度监督；采用多粒度学习策略，融合全局对比学习和区域级局部对齐；并构建P-VLG基准数据集，包含超10万标注区域和长文本描述，支持全局与局部评估。
AI.result: 大量实验表明ROGLE在文本行人搜索任务上显著优于现有方法，尤其在具有挑战性的长文本查询场景下表现突出；P-VLG成为首个同时支持全局和局部评估协议的TBPS基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 自动化细粒度监督策略可有效替代昂贵的人工标注，全局-局部多粒度对齐是提升TBPS模型细粒度理解能力的关键方向；P-VLG基准为未来研究提供了更全面的评估平台。

title: Polaris: Scaling Up Instruction-Guided Image Generation Towards Millions of Personalized Style Needs
summary: Users increasingly expect image generation models to quickly adapt to highly diverse and personalized requirements, such as producing images with distinctive styles or characteristics. Traditional approaches rely on fine-tuning, which is costly and difficult to scale. To cope with these limitations, the community has accumulated a growing library of fine-tuned modules and adapters, where each component targets specific generation needs and collectively serves as a foundation for handling new demands. This naturally raises a question: instead of repeatedly training new models, can we systematically exploit this expanding ecosystem to better fulfill user instructions? To this end, we present Polaris, an intelligent retrieval framework that automatically selects and integrates suitable models from the model library based on a user's instructions. The key insight is that harnessing such a massive and heterogeneous pool requires not only finding the most relevant modules among thousands of candidates, but also aligning them effectively for instruction-driven generation and editing. Polaris addresses this challenge by indexing over 6,500 checkpoints and 75,000 adapters, and retrieving the most relevant components given a user's input and instruction. In doing so, it delivers scalable, controllable, and well-aligned generation -- without any additional training.

AI.tldr: Polaris是一个智能检索框架，可从包含6,500个checkpoints和75,000个适配器的大规模模型库中自动选择和集成最相关的模型组件，实现零训练、可扩展且对齐良好的图像生成与编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成模型依赖微调来适应个性化需求，成本高且难以扩展；尽管社区积累了大量微调模块和适配器组成的模型库，但缺乏系统性的方法来自动利用这些已有组件来满足用户指令，而不是重复训练新模型。
AI.method: Polaris提出一个智能检索框架，通过对超过6,500个checkpoints和75,000个适配器建立索引，根据用户输入的文本指令自动检索并集成最相关的模型组件，在无需任何额外训练的条件下实现指令驱动的图像生成与编辑。
AI.result: Polaris在包含6,500+ checkpoints和75,000+适配器的异构模型库上实现了高效的组件检索与集成，能够根据用户指令交付可扩展、可控且对齐良好的生成结果，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: Polaris表明，通过智能检索而非重复训练，可以系统性利用社区积累的庞大模型生态系统来满足多样化的用户需求，为个性化图像生成提供了一种可扩展、低成本的新范式。

title: Adversarial Attacks on Robot Localization Systems via Deep Feature Perturbation
summary: Robot localization systems are critical for autonomous navigation and safety. Adversarial perturbations can mislead these systems, resulting in mislocalization, navigation errors, or unsafe interactions, especially in mission-critical scenarios. This paper investigates the vulnerability of deep learning based localization pipelines to adversarial attacks. We propose a novel framework for generating adversarial queries that specifically target Product Quantization (PQ) in visual localization systems. Our method employs a Lightweight Product Quantization Network (LPQN) to perturb query feature encodings, misleading the retrieval process by returning semantically irrelevant database entries. Adversarial queries are generated via a two-phase procedure: a forward pass that perturbs feature distributions and a backward pass that refines the perturbation through optimization. The lightweight design of LPQN allows the creation of subtle yet highly effective perturbations with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments in both controlled and real-world robotic environments demonstrate that our approach substantially degrades PQN performance, exposing critical vulnerabilities in practical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用轻量级乘积量化网络（LPQN）生成对抗查询以攻击视觉定位系统中乘积量化（PQ）模块的框架，通过前后向优化过程产生细微但高效的扰动，显著降低定位系统性能，揭示了深度学习定位管道在对抗攻击下的严重脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的机器人定位系统在自主导航中至关重要，但现有研究对其在面对对抗性扰动时的脆弱性探究不足，尤其是针对定位管道中核心的乘积量化（PQ）检索模块的对抗攻击尚缺乏系统性研究，这可能导致严重的安全隐患。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段对抗查询生成框架：前向阶段通过轻量级乘积量化网络（LPQN）扰动查询特征分布，后向阶段通过优化过程精炼扰动；LPQN以极小的计算开销生成细微而高效的对抗扰动，专门用于误导视觉定位系统中PQ的检索过程，使其返回语义无关的数据库条目。
AI.result: 在受控环境和真实机器人场景中的大量实验表明，所提方法能够显著降低乘积量化网络（PQN）的定位性能，有效暴露了深度学习定位管道在实际应用中的关键脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了基于深度学习的视觉定位系统在面对针对性对抗攻击时的严重安全缺陷，强调在任务关键型机器人应用中必须重视定位管道的对抗鲁棒性，为后续防御机制的研究提供了重要方向。

title: Train, Test, Re-evaluate: Schedule-Sensitive Evaluation of Generative Data for Hand Detection
summary: Generated (or synthetic) image data is increasingly used to augment or replace real training datasets when target imagery is scarce, expensive, or biased. For hand detection, particularly in occupational safety settings, public datasets mostly contain bare hands. This under-represents the variation in hand appearance introduced by gloves, tattoos, jewelry, and other personal protective equipment, creating a distribution shift that safety-critical applications encounter at deployment. We test whether generative inpainting, editing only the hand region of a real photograph to introduce accessories, can close this shift gap. On a paired dataset of real images and their synthetic counterparts, we train YOLOv8n hand detectors under six training-and-scheduling regimes (Experiments A-F, three random seeds each), evaluate every detector on a real test set and on a real-gloves-only test split, and report the mean average precision (mAP) at two overlap thresholds (mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95) along with paired statistical tests. A two-stage experiment: train on real U synthetic data, then fine-tune the resulting weights on real-only at a lower learning rate, increases mAP@0.5 compared to the real-only baseline model on the standard real test set, and improves the real-gloves out-of-distribution gap. Another three-stage experiment preserves box-tightness best, reaching the highest mAP@0.5:0.95 of any other experiment in the study. The synthetic-data utility for safety-critical hand detection is determined by the training procedure, and simple multi-stage experiments extract substantial real-deployment benefit from inpainted accessory data.

AI.tldr: 本文验证了生成式修补（inpainting）在手部检测中通过合成配件（如手套、饰品）缩小学徒数据与真实部署之间的分布偏移，并提出两阶段与三阶段训练策略有效提升真实场景检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有公开手部检测数据集主要包含裸手图像，对手套、纹身、珠宝等配件引入的手部外观变化覆盖不足，导致在职业安全等关键应用场景中出现分布偏移，影响模型部署后的泛化性能。
AI.method: 采用生成式修补技术仅对真实照片中的手部区域进行编辑以添加配件，构建配对数据集；基于YOLOv8n训练手部检测器，设计六种训练与调度方案（实验A-F，各三个随机种子），包括在两阶段实验中使用真实数据微调合成预训练权重，以及三阶段实验保留框紧密度。
AI.result: 两阶段训练（先合成后真实低学习率微调）在标准真实测试集上相比纯真实基线提升mAP@0.5，并缩小了真实手套测试集上的分布外差距；三阶段训练取得全实验最高mAP@0.5:0.95，最佳保持了检测框紧密度。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据在手部检测中的效用高度依赖训练流程设计，通过简单的多阶段训练策略即可从修补生成的配件数据中提取显著的现实部署收益，为安全关键场景下的数据增强提供了实用方案。

title: Residual Decoder Adapter: ID-Preserving Tokenizer Adaption for Autoregressive Text Rendering
summary: Visual Autoregressive (AR) models generate images by predicting discrete tokens that are decoded by a visual tokenizer. Despite demonstrating strong overall image generation ability, they still underperform on text rendering with blur strokes and disrupt letter shapes. In this work, we trace this limitation to the visual tokenizer, which struggles to reconstruct fine-grained detail. Improving the tokenizer is straightforward but expensive, as it necessitates retraining both the tokenizer and the AR model. Can we improve text rendering performance of AR models without retraining the existing tokenizer and AR model? To achieve this, we propose the Residual Decoder Adapter(RDA) that upgrades an existing tokenizer post-hoc without changing its token space. Specifically, it refines the decoder output of the visual tokenizer by introducing two novel components: (i) a paired codebook that shares the token distribution with the original one; (ii) a parallel branch to learn the tiny differences (residual) between the reconstructed image and the ground-truth images in the pixel space. This residual design allows us to enhance the tokenizer non-invasively while preserving compatibility with prior AR models. RDA substantially improves text rendering significantly by a large margin. For instance, we boost finetuned Janus-Pro OCR accuracy rises from 24.52% to 58.26% (TextVisionBlend), from 12.75% to 36.81% (StyledTextSynth) on competitive TextAtlas benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/CSU-JPG/RDA

AI.tldr: 提出残差解码器适配器（RDA），在不重新训练现有视觉分词器和自回归模型的前提下，通过引入配对码本和平行分支学习像素级残差，显著提升视觉自回归模型的文本渲染能力，在TextAtlas基准上将OCR准确率提升至原有水平的2-3倍。
AI.motivation: 视觉自回归（AR）模型在图像生成方面表现强劲，但在文本渲染任务中普遍存在笔画模糊、字母形状失真等问题，主要原因是底层视觉分词器难以重建细粒度细节。直接改进分词器虽有效但代价高昂，需要同时重训练分词器和AR模型。因此，本文旨在不重新训练现有分词器和AR模型的前提下，提升AR模型的文本渲染性能。
AI.method: 本文提出残差解码器适配器（RDA），是一种后置式（post-hoc）升级现有视觉分词器的轻量组件，不改变原有token空间。RDA包含两个核心模块：（i）配对码本（paired codebook），与原码本共享token分布；（ii）并行分支（parallel branch），在像素空间中学习重建图像与真实图像之间的微小差异（残差）。该残差设计以非侵入方式增强分词器解码能力，同时保持与已有AR模型完全兼容。
AI.result: RDA在TextAtlas基准上显著提升了AR模型的文本渲染性能。以微调后的Janus-Pro为例，OCR准确率在TextVisionBlend子集上从24.52%提升至58.26%，在StyledTextSynth子集上从12.75%提升至36.81%，提升幅度超过2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了视觉分词器的解码能力是制约AR模型文本渲染性能的关键瓶颈，并验证了通过后置残差增强机制可以在不改动原始token空间和AR模型的前提下有效突破该瓶颈。RDA提供了一种高效且兼容性强的解决方案，为后续提升AR模型细粒度生成质量提供了新思路。

title: Unified Driving Tokens: Representation- and Geometry-Guided Discrete Tokenizer for Driving World Models and Planning
summary: Discrete visual tokens should provide a compact representation for both token-based world modeling and planning in autonomous driving. However, most tokenizers are inherited from image generation and are optimized mainly for pixel reconstruction, which may leave a gap between what is easy to generate and what is useful to decode for driving decisions. We present a representation-guided and geometry-enhanced tokenizer that learns discrete tokens under joint supervision. The tokenizer aligns its discrete bottleneck with a frozen DINO feature space through feature decoding, while preserving appearance via RGB reconstruction with perceptual and adversarial losses. To inject geometric state-related cues, we add adjacent-frame depth and relative-pose supervision during training and stabilize joint objectives with multi-codebook quantization. We evaluate the same learned tokens with a lightweight planning readout and a GPT-style next-token world model. Experiments on NAVSIM show improved reconstruction fidelity and representation consistency, competitive planning performance under a fixed decoder, and better generative quality under matched settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合表示引导与几何增强的离散视觉分词器，通过在离散瓶颈层对齐DINO特征空间、联合深度与相对位姿监督以及多码本量化，使学习到的离散令牌同时适用于世界建模和自动驾驶规划，在NAVSIM上取得优于传统分词器的重建保真度、表示一致性和规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶中的离散视觉分词器大多直接继承自图像生成任务，优化目标以像素重建为主，导致分词器倾向于生成易于解码的令牌而非对驾驶决策有用的令牌，在令牌级世界建模和规划之间存在表征鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出表示引导与几何增强的分词器，在离散瓶颈层通过特征解码与冻结的DINO特征空间对齐，同时使用感知损失和对抗损失进行RGB外观重建；引入相邻帧深度和相对位姿监督以注入几何状态信息，并采用多码本量化来稳定联合优化目标。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准上，所提方法在重建保真度和表示一致性上优于基线；在固定解码器设置下规划性能具有竞争力，在相同配置下生成质量更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征空间对齐和几何监督联合训练离散令牌，能够弥合像素重建与驾驶决策之间的表征差距，使得同一套令牌可同时有效支持轻量规划读取和GPT式自回归世界模型，为自动驾驶中的令牌化表征学习提供了新方向。

title: SAVMap: Structure-Aided Visual Mapping of Large-Scale 2.5D Manhattan Wireframes from Panoramic Video
summary: Precise 3D representations of industrial environments enable tasks such as robot localization and digital twin generation. We propose SAVMap, a method for generating a semantic wireframe map of warehouse shelf and light structures using only a panoramic video camera as the sensor input. Sequences of rectified images with shelf and ceiling-facing views are extracted from a panoramic video captured along the warehouse aisles. Using a semantic segmentation network front end, a set of sparse, semantic structure feature points (e.g., corners of shelf structures, centers of lights) are extracted from each image and tracked across the sequences. By accounting for real-world geometric relationships among the points such as Manhattan grids, a constrained structure-from-motion algorithm yields the 3D points that form a wireframe map. We demonstrate the scalability and accuracy of our proposal in a warehouse with 46 shelving rows, each with faces spanning 55\,m by 7\,m. From an hour of panoramic video content, we create wireframe maps for over 5000 shelf elements across the rows, achieving an aggregate mean absolute error of 4.8\,cm with respect to ground-truth.

AI.tldr: SAVMap 提出一种仅利用全景视频相机输入、通过语义分割网络提取稀疏结构特征点并融合曼哈顿网格几何约束的结构光流算法，为仓库货架与灯光结构生成精确的语义线框地图，在46排货架上实现了4.8 cm的平均绝对误差。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中精确的三维表示对于机器人定位和数字孪生生成等任务至关重要，但现有方法通常依赖激光雷达等多传感器方案，成本高且部署复杂；本文旨在仅使用低成本的全景视频相机作为唯一传感器，实现仓库场景中货架与灯光结构的语义线框地图构建。
AI.method: SAVMap 首先从沿仓库通道采集的全景视频中提取经过校正的货架朝向和天花板朝向图像序列；然后利用语义分割网络从每帧图像中提取稀疏的语义结构特征点（如货架角点、灯中心点），并在序列间进行跟踪；最后，通过引入曼哈顿网格等真实世界几何关系约束，设计一种带约束的结构光流算法，将这些2D特征点重建为构成线框地图的3D点。
AI.result: 在包含46排货架（每排货架面尺寸55 m×7 m）的仓库中，利用一小时的全景视频数据，为超过5000个货架元素生成了线框地图，相对于地面真值的累计平均绝对误差仅为4.8 cm，验证了该方法在大规模场景下的可扩展性和精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明仅依靠全景视频相机和几何约束即可在大规模工业仓库场景中实现高精度的语义线框地图构建，为低成本的机器人定位与数字孪生应用提供了可行方案；该工作为后续在更复杂工业环境中融合语义与几何信息的稀疏地图构建研究奠定了基础。

title: Beyond Low-Rank: Low-Rank Sparse Prompting via Spiking Neural Network and Prompt Factorization
summary: Visual Prompting (VP) has emerged as an efficient paradigm for adapting large-scale pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks by incorporating learnable prompts at the input level. However, existing VP methods typically employ dense pixel-level prompts, which often suffer from redundant perturbations, limited generalization and energy inefficiency. To overcome these limitations, we propose to integrate brain-inspired spiking learning into visual prompt learning tasks. As we know that spiking neuron can perform inexpensive information processing by transmitting the input data into discrete spike trains and return sparse outputs. Inspired by this, we propose \textbf{Lo}w-\textbf{R}ank visual \textbf{S}pike \textbf{P}rompting (LoRSP), a novel framework that learns dynamic low-rank sparse visual prompts naturally via a Spiking neuron learning mechanism. The core idea of LoRSP is to exploit the brain-inspired sparse firing mechanism of spiking neurons to generate pixel-level sparse prompt for each instance. To be specific, we first construct a series of prompt factors via low-rank factorization to capture distinct prompt subspaces. These prompt factors are then fed into an SNN architecture, which performs the integrate-and-fire process to emit spikes. As a result, our LoRSP generates a \emph{sparse} visual prompt while maintaining the low-rank constraint. This design enables instance-specific selective prompting, leading to more compact and robust adaptation across diverse downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on five heterogeneous vision backbones and multiple benchmarks demonstrate that LoRSP achieves competitive performance while requiring fewer tunable parameters compared to existing VP methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoRSP（Low-Rank Visual Spike Prompting），一种融合脉冲神经元机制的视觉提示学习框架，通过低秩分解与脉冲发放机制生成实例级稀疏视觉提示，在多个视觉骨干网络和基准上以更少的可调参数取得了具有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示方法通常采用稠密的像素级提示，存在冗余扰动多、泛化能力有限以及能效低的问题，亟需一种更紧凑、高效且鲁棒的提示学习范式。
AI.method: LoRSP利用低秩分解构造一系列提示因子以捕捉不同的提示子空间，并将这些因子输入到脉冲神经网络（SNN）中，通过 integrate-and-fire 机制发放离散脉冲，从而自然地生成具有低秩约束的稀疏视觉提示，实现实例级的选择性提示。
AI.result: 在五个异构视觉骨干网络和多个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，LoRSP在取得竞争性性能的同时，所需的可调参数数量少于现有的视觉提示方法。
AI.conclusion: 脑启发的脉冲学习机制可有效用于视觉提示学习，通过生成稀疏、低秩的提示实现更紧凑和鲁棒的下游任务迁移，为高效视觉适配提供了新思路。

title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pretrained Models for Instance Segmentation Tasks
comment: Published by the Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction Journal
summary: Research and applications in artificial intelligence have recently shifted with the rise of large pretrained models, which deliver state-of-the-art results across numerous tasks. However, the substantial increase in parameters introduces a need for parameter-efficient training strategies. Despite significant advancements, limited research has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods in the context of transformer-based models for instance segmentation. Addressing this gap, this study investigates the effectiveness of PEFT methods, specifically adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), applied to two models across four benchmark datasets. Integrating sequentially arranged adapter modules and applying LoRA to deformable attention--explored here for the first time--achieves competitive performance while fine-tuning only about 1-6% of model parameters, a marked improvement over the 40-55% required in traditional fine-tuning. Key findings indicate that using 2-3 adapters per transformer block offers an optimal balance of performance and efficiency. Furthermore, LoRA, exhibits strong parameter efficiency when applied to deformable attention, and in certain cases surpasses adapter configurations. These results show that the impact of PEFT techniques varies based on dataset complexity and model architecture, underscoring the importance of context-specific tuning. Overall, this work demonstrates the potential of PEFT to enable scalable, customizable, and computationally efficient transfer learning for instance segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次系统性地探索了参数高效微调（PEFT）方法（适配器与LoRA）在基于Transformer的实例分割任务中的应用，仅微调约1-6%的模型参数即可达到与传统微调（40-55%参数）相当的竞争性能，其中每个Transformer块使用2-3个适配器以及将LoRA应用于可变形注意力机制是关键发现。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型预训练模型在众多任务中取得了最先进的结果，但其参数规模急剧增长，亟需参数高效的训练策略。然而，在基于Transformer的实例分割模型中，针对参数高效微调（PEFT）方法的系统性研究尚属空白，这一研究缺口是本文试图填补的核心问题。
AI.method: 本研究系统探究了两种PEFT方法——适配器（Adapter）和低秩自适应（LoRA）——在基于Transformer的实例分割模型中的应用。具体而言，在模型中集成按序排列的适配器模块，并将LoRA首次应用于可变形注意力机制（Deformable Attention），在两个模型和四个基准数据集上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法仅微调约1-6%的模型参数即可达到竞争性能，而传统微调需要更新40-55%的参数。关键发现包括：每个Transformer块使用2-3个适配器可实现性能与效率的最佳平衡；LoRA应用于可变形注意力时展现出强劲的参数效率，在某些配置下甚至超越适配器方案。PEFT技术的效果因数据集复杂度和模型架构差异而不同。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了PEFT方法在实例分割任务中实现可扩展、可定制且计算高效的迁移学习的巨大潜力，强调了根据具体上下文（数据集和模型架构）选择适配微调策略的重要性。

title: MT-EditFlow: Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Turn Image Editing with Flow Matching
summary: Recent breakthroughs in instruction-based image editing have captured significant attention, as models are now capable of handling real-world editing demands with the practicality required by everyday users. However, editing models trained primarily for single-turn edits often break down in multi-turn editing--the natural interactive setting where a user iteratively refines an image based on the model's own previous outputs. This failure stems from the all-or-nothing requirement, where a single failed turn compromises the entire sequence, and error propagation, where exposure bias leads to compounding editing errors. To address these challenges, we introduce MT-EditFlow, a flow-matching reinforcement learning framework designed to optimize reward signals for sequential image editing. MT-EditFlow integrates a multi-turn perspective with a multi-reward formulation to provide a unified structure applicable to both GRPO and NFT-based reinforcement learning methods. We systematically analyze and optimize the reward signal by investigating effective scoring strategies for turn-level aggregation, VLM reasoning modes to trade off reward bias and variance, and advantage fusion levels to prevent reward hacking. Our findings reveal that broadcasting the aggregated advantage across the entire editing trajectory effectively bridges the gap between local planning and global multi-turn task success. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MT-EditFlow significantly improves performance across diverse base models. Notably, it boosts FLUX.1-Kontext-dev by 6.85 points in turn-3 overall performance, surpassing state-of-the-art open-source models such as Qwen-Image-Edit. By maintaining high marginal success rates and reducing exposure bias, MT-EditFlow provides a foundation for more reliable and natural human-AI collaboration in visual content creation.

AI.tldr: 提出MT-EditFlow，一个基于流匹配强化学习的框架，通过多轮视角与多奖励公式优化序列图像编辑中的奖励信号，有效解决多轮编辑中的单轮失败传播和曝光偏差问题，在FLUX.1-Kontext-dev上提升turn-3整体性能6.85分，超越Qwen-Image-Edit等开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指令的图像编辑模型主要为单轮编辑设计，在多轮交互编辑场景中会因单轮失败导致整个序列失效（全有或全无问题），以及曝光偏差导致错误累积传播，缺乏针对多轮序列编辑优化的方法。
AI.method: 提出MT-EditFlow框架，采用流匹配强化学习，融合多轮视角与多奖励公式，提供统一结构兼容GRPO和无NFT强化学习方法；通过回合级聚合策略、VLM推理模式权衡奖励偏差与方差、优势融合级别防止奖励篡改等机制系统优化奖励信号，并将聚合优势广播至整个编辑轨迹以弥合局部规划与全局任务成功之间的差距。
AI.result: 实验表明MT-EditFlow在多种基础模型上显著提升多轮编辑性能，将FLUX.1-Kontext-dev的turn-3整体性能提升6.85分，超越Qwen-Image-Edit等当前最优开源模型，同时保持了高边际成功率和降低曝光偏差。
AI.conclusion: MT-EditFlow通过将聚合优势广播至整个编辑轨迹有效弥合局部规划与全局任务成功之间的差距，为更可靠、更自然的视觉内容创作人机协作奠定了基础，表明多轮强化学习优化是解决序列图像编辑中错误传播问题的有效途径。

title: A Structured Benchmark for Text-Guided Anomaly Detection: When Language Stops Conditioning the Decision
summary: Industrial anomaly detection has historically been a unimodal task. Recent multimodal vision-language models have produced systems that admit textual input alongside the image and are presented as enabling text-guided zero- and few-shot inspection. Yet these methods are evaluated with protocols inherited from unimodal benchmarks that hold the textual condition constant and therefore cannot measure whether language conditions the decision; whether reported gains reflect text guidance or strong pretrained visual features remains open. We introduce Text-Guided Anomaly Detection (TGAD), a structured benchmark that progressively increases the functional role of language across three scenarios: a controlled prompt-sensitivity setting on MVTec AD; a component-tagged extension of MVTec AD that requires the model to restrict its assessment to an instructed part; and the new Assembled Panel Dataset (APD), a realistic industrial setting that requires both defect-type and component-location knowledge. We evaluate one representative model per paradigm: generative large vision-language, training-free discriminative, and embedding-adaptive discriminative. In all three, the textual interface conditions the decision only superficially: prompt content is absorbed unless the object noun is removed (the generative model's I-AUROC drops from 97.4 to 82.6); component-level instructions do not constrain the decision once defects outside the instructed part are admitted as normal (from 90.3 to 66.3); and when both combine on APD, image-level discrimination collapses below the MVTec level, in one case below chance (71.2, 50.5, 31.5). These results suggest that standard benchmarks overstate the text-guided capabilities of current multimodal anomaly detection systems, and that a protocol of this kind is a prerequisite for models that can be reliably controlled through language for industrial deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前多模态异常检测系统在标准基准下的表现被高估，提出TGAD基准测试来系统评估语言对决策的引导能力，发现现有模型仅在表层受文本条件影响，语言控制的可靠性远低于报告结果。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态异常检测方法虽宣称支持文本引导的零样本和少样本检测，但其评估协议继承自单模态基准，文本条件保持恒定，无法衡量语言是否真正影响决策，所报告的性能提升无法区分是来自文本引导还是预训练视觉特征，存在被高估的风险。
AI.method: 本文提出Text-Guided Anomaly Detection (TGAD)基准，通过三个逐步增加语言功能角色的场景进行评估：MVTec AD上的受控提示敏感性设置、基于组件标签扩展的MVTec AD（要求模型仅评估指定部件）、以及新构建的Assembled Panel Dataset (APD)（需同时具备缺陷类型和组件位置知识），并对生成式大视觉语言模型、免训练判别式模型和嵌入自适应判别式模型三类代表性模型进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明三类模型的文本接口仅产生表层条件作用：生成式模型在移除物体名词后I-AUROC从97.4降至82.6；组件级指令在部件外缺陷被当作正常后AUROC从90.3降至66.3；APD上图像级判别能力崩溃至低于MVTec水平，某模型降至31.5（低于随机）。
AI.conclusion: 标准基准夸大了当前多模态异常检测系统的文本引导能力，语言对决策的控制极为有限；基于TGAD的协议是实现可通过语言可靠控制的工业部署模型的必要前提。

title: Distortion-Aware Fusion of Statistical and Vision-Language Features for Blind Image Quality Assessment
summary: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) aims to predict perceived image quality without access to a reference image. Classical natural scene statistics (NSS) descriptors and modern vision-language model (VLM) embeddings address this problem from fundamentally different perspectives, yet whether combining them yields complementary benefits and how to weight their contributions per input image remains unexplored. We propose a distortion-aware fusion framework that integrates a 138-dimensional NSS descriptor with two complementary VLM embeddings, SigLIP and CLIP-H, through a multiplicative gating mechanism that learns per-input stream weights conditioned on image content. Unlike static concatenation fusion, the proposed gating network suppresses or amplifies each stream's contribution based on the input, producing weights that correlate positively (Spearman rank correlation rho=0.33) with the per-distortion NSS contribution measured by independent ablation on KADID-10k. The framework requires no end-to-end fine-tuning of the VLM backbones and is trained with a hybrid loss combining mean squared error, Pearson linear correlation, and pairwise ranking objectives. We evaluate on three standard benchmarks: KonIQ-10k (SROCC=0.9142, PLCC=0.9279), KADID-10k (SROCC=0.9715, PLCC=0.9733, surpassing recent state-of-the-art methods), and LIVE Challenge in-the-Wild (SROCC=0.8527, PLCC=0.8802 with cross-dataset pretraining and fine-tuning). A per-distortion analysis on KADID-10k reveals that NSS features contribute most on noise and color-shift distortions where pixel statistics are directly affected, and least on perceptual distortions such as color saturation changes. The learned gate values validate these findings, confirming that the model autonomously discovers distortion-stream affinity patterns consistent with the manual per-distortion study.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于乘性门控机制的失真感知融合框架，将自然场景统计描述符与SigLIP、CLIP-H两种视觉语言模型嵌入进行自适应加权融合，在无需微调VLM骨干的条件下，在KADID-10k等多个BIQA基准上取得超越现有方法的性能，并揭示了不同模态特征对不同失真类型的贡献规律。
AI.motivation: 经典自然场景统计描述符和现代视觉语言模型嵌入从根本不同的角度解决无参考图像质量评估问题，但两者组合是否能带来互补增益，以及如何针对每张输入图像自适应地权衡它们各自的贡献，这一问题尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出一种失真感知融合框架，集成138维NSS描述符与SigLIP、CLIP-H两种互补的VLM嵌入，通过一个基于图像内容条件化的乘性门控机制学习每个输入流的权重，而非采用静态拼接融合；框架无需对VLM骨干进行端到端微调，训练时采用均方误差、皮尔逊线性相关和成对排序目标组成的混合损失函数。
AI.result: 在KonIQ-10k上达到SROCC=0.9142、PLCC=0.9279；在KADID-10k上达到SROCC=0.9715、PLCC=0.9733，超越近期最先进方法；在LIVE Challenge上通过跨数据集预训练和微调达到SROCC=0.8527、PLCC=0.8802；门控学习到的权重与独立消融实验测得的逐失真NSS贡献呈正相关（斯皮尔曼等级相关系数ρ=0.33），且模型自动发现失真-流亲和性模式，即NSS特征对噪声和颜色偏移类失真贡献最大，对色彩饱和度变化等感知失真贡献最小。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了NSS与VLM嵌入在BIQA任务上具有互补性，自适应门控融合优于静态拼接，且模型能够自主发现与人工分析一致的失真-特征流亲和性模式，为可解释的多模态质量感知融合提供了新思路。

title: Normality-Preserving Continual Industrial Anomaly Detection via Orthogonal LoRA Banks
comment: 33 pages,6 figures,Submitted to Advanced Engineering Informatics
summary: Continual industrial anomaly detection with diffusion models suffers from historical normality prior drift and catastrophic forgetting. Existing continual diffusion methods preserve previous knowledge through replay or constrained optimization, but they lack an explicit mechanism for isolating and protecting category-specific normality priors during sequential adaptation. Although low-rank adaptation provides modular residual updates, standard LoRA neither freezes historical normality subspaces nor prevents new adapters from interfering with previous ones. To address this issue, we propose a normality-preserving continual anomaly detection framework based on two modules: History Frozen Orthogonal LoRA Bank (HF-OLB) and Hierarchical Novelty Adaptive Bank Growth module (HNABG). HF-OLB freezes both the pre-trained U-Net backbone and the learned LoRA banks, and constrains new task-specific normality residuals to the orthogonal complement of historical LoRA subspaces. HNABG further allocates layer-dependent residual capacity and expands the bank only when the residual normality novelty exceeds the expressive capacity of existing banks. Extensive experiments on MVTec and VisA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On the challenging VisA 2x6 setting, our method achieves 83.6/91.8 image and pixel level A-AUROC with 3.8/3.9 FM, improving pixel level A-AUROC over the state of the art by 3.2 points while reducing pixel level FM by 1.3. These results show that our method effectively preserves historical normality priors in long horizon continual category sequences.

AI.tldr: 提出基于历史冻结正交LoRA库（HF-OLB）和层次化新颖性自适应库增长（HNABG）的持续工业异常检测框架，通过正交约束和新颖性驱动的库扩展机制有效防止灾难性遗忘，在MVTec和VisA基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 持续工业异常检测中的扩散模型面临历史正常性先验漂移和灾难性遗忘问题，现有基于回放或约束优化的持续扩散方法缺乏显式机制来隔离和保护任务特定的正常性先验，标准LoRA既无法冻结历史正常性子空间，也无法阻止新适配器干扰已有适配器。
AI.method: 提出基于两个模块的正常性保持持续异常检测框架：History Frozen Orthogonal LoRA Bank (HF-OLB) 冻结预训练U-Net主干网络和已学习的LoRA库，并将新任务特定正常性残差约束到历史LoRA子空间的正交补空间上；Hierarchical Novelty Adaptive Bank Growth (HNABG) 根据层级分配残差容量，仅当残差正常性新颖性超出已有库的表达能力时才扩展库。
AI.result: 在MVTec和VisA数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，在VisA 2x6设定下达到图像级和像素级A-AUROC分别为83.6/91.8，FM分别为3.8/3.9，像素级A-AUROC较SOTA提升3.2个点，像素级FM降低1.3。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式的正交约束和新颖性驱动的库增长机制，有效保留了长期持续类别序列中的历史正常性先验，为解决持续异常检测中的灾难性遗忘提供了新的正交子空间隔离范式。

title: TIDES: Time-Derivative Event Simulation via Deformable Reconstruction
summary:
Event cameras emit asynchronous events in response to environmental appearance changes. The scarcity of real-world event datasets makes simulation essential. However, most simulators infer event timestamps from frame sequences, forcing many threshold crossings to share a small set of discrete times; a failure mode we term timestamp batching that worsens under fast motion and occlusion.
  We present TIDES, a continuous-time event simulator built on dynamic Gaussian splatting. Because TIDES operates on an explicit 3D scene representation with learnt geometry and motion, it can derive per-pixel intensity dynamics directly from the scene, rather than by differencing rendered frames. This enables accurate threshold-crossing prediction, including multiple crossings per rendering step, without temporal upsampling or frame interpolation. The same 3D scene model reveals where objects partially occlude one another; TIDES uses this to guide adaptive time stepping, concentrating computation only in regions where occlusion dynamics make simple models of brightness change unreliable.
  Finally, we model finite sensor bandwidth using a tile-level arbiter whose throughput, jitter, and event drops reproduce realistic sensor artifacts. Across paired RGB-event benchmarks, TIDES attains state-of-the-art event-stream fidelity. We also show that events simulated by TIDES transfer more effectively to real downstream tasks than competitors'.

AI.tldr: TIDES提出了一种基于动态高斯溅射的连续时间事件模拟器，直接从3D场景表示中推导逐像素强度动态以进行精确的阈值穿越预测，并利用显式遮挡引导自适应时间步进，同时通过瓦片级仲裁器建模传感器非理想效应，在事件流保真度和下游任务迁移性上达到了最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有事件相机模拟器大多从帧序列推断事件时间戳，导致大量阈值穿越共享少量离散时间，产生所谓的"时间戳批处理"失效模式，该问题在快速运动和遮挡条件下尤为严重；此外，真实世界事件数据集稀缺，因此亟需能够产生高保真连续时间事件的模拟方法。
AI.method: TIDES基于动态三维高斯溅射构建显式3D场景表示，直接从场景的几何与运动信息推导逐像素强度动态曲线以预测精确阈值穿越时间，支持单渲染步骤内多次穿越而无需时间上采样或帧插值；利用显式3D场景中的部分遮挡信息引导自适应时间步进策略，仅在遮挡动态导致简单亮度变化模型不可靠的区域集中计算资源；此外，采用瓦片级仲裁器建模有限传感器带宽，再现吞吐量、抖动和事件丢包等真实传感器伪影。
AI.result: 在成对RGB-事件基准测试上，TIDES达到了事件流保真度的最优水平；进一步实验表明，TIDES模拟的事件在真实下游任务中的迁移效果优于同类竞争者。
AI.conclusion: TIDES通过连续时间建模、显式场景引导计算分配和传感器非理想效应建模，从根本上克服了传统帧驱动事件模拟的时间戳批处理问题，为高保真事件数据生成提供了有效方案，并验证了模拟数据向真实任务的良好迁移能力。

title: FACT: A Simple and Efficient Framework for Active Finetuning
comment: ACCEPTED for publication as a REGULAR paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
summary: The main goal of active finetuning is to improve a pretrained model's performance on a specific task or domain by finetuning it with carefully selected informative or challenging data. Previous research has predominantly focused on the active aspect (i.e., data selection) while uniformly employing full finetuning for model adaptation, which inevitably distorts pretrained features due to distribution shift. This issue becomes particularly pronounced when the model size is large relative to the finetuning data quantity, leading to heightened overfitting risks. To address this critical gap, we formally outline the FiAF task that emphasizes systematic exploration of finetuning methodologies in active learning. We propose FACT, a three-phase hierarchical finetuning framework featuring both efficiency and simplicity, specifically designed for active finetuning scenarios. Our comprehensive experiments span: (1) Three major dataset categories encompassing classic (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1k), imbalanced (CIFAR10-LT, CIFAR100-LT), and fine-grained (StanfordCars, FGVCAircraft) image classification datasets, each evaluated under 3-5 distinct sampling ratios; (2) Diverse pretrained architectures including Convolutional Neural Network (ConvNeXt), Vision Transformer (ViT), and Vision LSTM (ViL) networks; (3) A systematic investigation of frozen feature augmentation (FroFA) strategies. (4) A comprehensive and rigorous analysis of efficiency and generalizability. The results demonstrate significant improvements with strong generalization and robustness. Notably, under low sampling ratios, our framework achieves remarkable performance gains of over 20% on the ViT model for CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and ImageNet-1k benchmarks. This systematic approach establishes new state-of-the-art performance while maintaining parameter efficiency, proving particularly effective when labeled data is scarce.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FACT，一个面向主动微调场景的三阶段层次化微调框架，通过系统探索微调方法而非仅关注数据选择，在多种数据集和架构上取得显著性能提升，尤其在低采样率下对ViT模型实现超过20%的增益。
AI.motivation: 现有主动微调研究过度聚焦于数据选择（主动学习方面），而统一采用全量微调进行模型适配，这会导致预训练特征因分布偏移而被扭曲，当模型规模相对微调数据量较大时，过拟合风险尤为突出。该研究旨在填补这一关键空白，系统探索主动学习中的微调方法。
AI.method: 论文正式定义了FiAF任务，并提出FACT框架，这是一个三阶段层次化微调框架，兼具高效性与简洁性，专门针对主动微调场景设计。实验涵盖经典（CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet-1k）、不均衡（CIFAR10-LT、CIFAR100-LT）和细粒度（StanfordCars、FGVCAircraft）三大类图像分类数据集，采用ConvNeXt、ViT和ViL等多种预训练架构，并系统研究了冻结特征增强（FroFA）策略。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FACT框架在多种设定下均取得了显著改进，具备强泛化性和鲁棒性。在低采样率下，该框架在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和ImageNet-1k基准上对ViT模型实现了超过20%的性能提升，同时保持了参数效率，在标注数据稀缺时尤为有效。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统化方法建立了新的最先进性能，证明了在主动微调中探索合适的微调方法比单纯关注数据选择更为关键，为标签稀缺场景下的模型适配提供了有效范式。

title: Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration for Long-Tailed Egocentric Mistake Detection
summary: In this report, we address the problem of determining whether a user performs an action incorrectly from egocentric video data. To this end, we propose an Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration Method (UE-MCM) that combines efficient coarse-grained video understanding with accurate fine-grained action reasoning. Specifically, UE-MCM contains a small model branch and a large model branch. The large model branch focuses on whether the fine-grained action itself is executed incorrectly, while the small model branch jointly takes the coarse-grained video and fine-grained segment as input to identify actions that may be locally correct but inconsistent with the overall workflow. The small model branch is built on a CLIP4CLIP video encoder initialized from a CLIP model enhanced by Diffusion Contrastive Reconstruction, and the large model branch uses the Qwen3-VL Embedding model to extract high-capacity representations from fine-grained action segments. The small-branch prediction and the large-branch prediction are then adaptively fused by a lightweight collaboration gate. To handle the long-tailed distribution of mistake instances, we optimize the classifiers with complementary objectives, including reweighted cross-entropy, AUC-oriented learning, and label-aware adjustment. The resulting system balances speed and accuracy, making it effective for detecting subtle, rare, and ambiguous mistakes in egocentric instructional videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种理解增强的模型协作方法（UE-MCM），结合小型模型（基于CLIP4CLIP与扩散对比重建）的粗粒度视频理解与大型模型（基于Qwen3-VL Embedding）的细粒度动作推理，通过自适应融合门和互补优化目标，高效检测自我中心视频中用户动作执行的错误。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测自我中心视频中用户动作执行错误时，难以同时兼顾全局工作流一致性与细粒度动作正确性，且错误实例存在长尾分布，导致对细微、罕见和模棱两可的错误检测效果不佳。
AI.method: UE-MCM包含小型模型分支和大型模型分支：小型分支基于经扩散对比重建增强的CLIP模型初始化的CLIP4CLIP视频编码器，联合粗粒度视频与细粒度片段作为输入，检测局部正确但整体不一致的动作；大型分支使用Qwen3-VL Embedding模型从细粒度动作片段提取高容量表征，判断动作执行本身的错误。两分支预测通过轻量级协作门自适应融合，并使用加权重交叉熵、AUC导向学习和标签感知调整等互补目标优化分类器以应对长尾分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，UE-MCM在自我中心教学视频的错误检测任务上实现了速度与精度的平衡，能够有效检测细微、罕见和模棱两可的动作执行错误。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的双分支协作框架通过粗粒度与细粒度信息的互补融合，结合面向长尾分布的优化策略，为自我中心视频中动作错误检测提供了一种高效且准确的解决方案。

title: Order within Chaos: Capturing Intrinsic Energy Anomalies for AI-Manipulated Image Forgery Localization
summary: Recent advancements in generative AI have led to image editing models capable of producing realistic forgeries that evade traditional image forgery localization methods, as these approaches depend on physical noise absent in synthetic data. To address this challenge, we theoretically demonstrate that the diffusion process inherently suppresses local high-frequency variance, creating a statistical energy gap that is distinguishable from the natural entropy of optical imaging. Guided by this insight, we propose FLAME, a unified framework that utilizes a LAD map to capture these intrinsic anomalies, coupled with a parameter-efficient adapter for SAM to achieve precise, pixel-level forgery localization. Furthermore, to bridge the lag between forensic benchmarks and evolving generative models, we introduce EditStream, an automated pipeline for continuous, instruction-based training data synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FLAME establishes a new state-of-the-art, significantly outperforming previous methods on AI-generated forgery datasets while effectively generalizing to unseen generative architectures. Our code is available at https://github.com/phoenixnir/FLAME.

AI.tldr: 提出FLAME框架，利用扩散过程固有的统计能量间隙（LAD图）结合参数高效的SAM适配器，实现像素级伪造定位，并引入EditStream自动化数据合成管道，在AI生成伪造图像检测上达到新最优。
AI.motivation: 现有图像伪造定位方法依赖物理噪声特征，无法有效检测生成式AI生成的逼真伪造图像，数据合成管道也滞后于快速演进的生成模型。
AI.method: 理论上证明扩散过程会抑制局部高频方差，产生可区分的统计能量间隙；基于此提出FLAME框架，利用LAD图捕获异常，结合参数高效SAM适配器实现像素级伪造定位；同时提出EditStream自动化管道，持续生成指令式训练数据。
AI.result: 在AI生成伪造数据集上显著超越此前方法达到新最优，并能有效泛化至未见过的生成架构。
AI.conclusion: 验证了扩散过程内在统计能量间隙作为伪造检测特征的可行性，提出统一框架有效提升了泛化能力，并提供开源工具以推动领域发展。

title: Ego-METAS: Egocentric online Multimodal Energy-efficient Temporal Action Segmentation benchmark
summary: To operate in the physical world, embodied agents must perceive their environment in an "always-on" fashion, selectively accessing the most informative sensors to balance energy constraints and task accuracy. Despite its importance for resource-constrained devices, energy-aware perception remains under-explored, with most prior work assuming unlimited compute. To address this, we introduce Ego-METAS: the first Egocentric online Multimodal Energy-efficient Temporal Action Segmentation benchmark. Ego-METAS provides a unified testbed of more than 100 hours of untrimmed egocentric video from EgoExo4D, CMU-MMAC, and CaptainCook4D, spanning 5 modalities (RGB, audio, gaze, IMU, and monochrome camera). We formulate an online temporal action segmentation task where models must dynamically select which sensors to activate at each timestep while strictly adhering to hardware-representative energy budgets. Alongside the benchmark, we release unified splits, cleaned annotations, pre-extracted features, and a diverse suite of baseline routing policies. Our evaluations show that optimal routing is highly scenario-dependent, and that existing policy-learning methods, designed primarily for trimmed clips, struggle to adapt to continuous, untrimmed environments. However, even simple dynamic fusion of complementary modalities (e.g., via random routing) proves critical for balancing predictive accuracy against strict energy budgets. Ultimately, Ego-METAS provides a standardized foundation to develop robust, cost-aware policies for autonomous, always-on embodied AI.

AI.tldr: Ego-METAS 是首个面向在线、多模态、节能时序动作分割的基准测试，包含超过100小时的第一人称视频和五种传感器模态，要求模型在严格能量预算下动态选择传感器，为资源受限的具身感知提供了标准化评估平台。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体在物理世界中需以“始终在线”方式感知环境，但资源受限设备上的节能感知研究严重不足，现有工作大多假设无限计算资源，缺乏衡量在线、多模态、能量约束下感知性能的统一基准。
AI.method: 作者构建了Ego-METAS基准，整合来自EgoExo4D、CMU-MMAC和CaptainCook4D数据集的总计超过100小时未修剪第一人称视频，涵盖RGB、音频、注视、IMU和单色相机五种模态；该基准定义了一个在线时序动作分割任务，要求模型在每个时间步动态选择激活哪些传感器，并严格遵循硬件可比的能量预算；同时发布了统一划分、清理标注、预提取特征及一系列基线路由策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，最优传感器路由策略高度依赖具体场景，现有的主要为修剪片段设计的策略学习方法在连续未修剪环境中表现不佳；但即使简单的模态动态融合（如随机路由）也对平衡预测精度与严格能量预算至关重要。
AI.conclusion: Ego-METAS为开发面向自主、始终在线具身AI的鲁棒、代价感知策略提供了标准化基础，揭示了在线、未修剪场景下节能感知研究的关键挑战与机遇。

title: Vision-language Models for Driver Monitoring Systems: A Driver Activity Description Dataset
summary: Understanding subtle driver actions is essential for building reliable driver monitoring systems. Existing visionlanguage models (VLMs) are trained on general datasets and struggle to recognize fine distinctions in driver behaviors. This paper addresses this limitation by creating a detailed natural language version of the Drive&Act dataset. We evaluate three VLMs on our new benchmark using LLM-based scoring methods. Their performance on the new benchmark shows that they cannot reliably generate accurate fine-grained driver activity descriptions. Based on the labeled Drive&Act dataset we create a new Drive&Act description dataset containing finegrained descriptions to train VLMs on driver activity understanding. Cross dataset evaluation on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) shows that the VLM fine-tuned on our new Drive&Act description dataset generalizes well to actions in the DMD dataset. The VLM fine-tuned on our Drive&Act description dataset achieves an ACCR score of 76 outperforming the zero-shot VLM baseline with an ACCR score of 66. These findings demonstrate that adapting VLMs with richly described driver actions can significantly improve their ability to interpret driver behavior while also highlighting the need for more diverse datasets to support broader generalization in future applications. Our Drive&Act description dataset and code will be publicly available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了Drive&Act描述数据集，将VLMs微调用于细粒度驾驶员行为理解，在ACCR指标上从66提升至76，并验证了跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在通用数据集上训练，难以准确识别驾驶员行为中的细微动作差异，缺乏针对细粒度驾驶员活动描述的专用数据集和评估基准。
AI.method: 基于Drive&Act数据集构建包含细粒度自然语言描述的Drive&Act描述数据集，采用三种VLMs进行评估，使用基于LLM的评分方法衡量性能，并对VLM进行微调训练，最后在Driver Monitoring Dataset上进行跨数据集评估验证泛化性。
AI.result: 微调后的VLM在ACCR评分上达到76，显著优于零样本基线模型的66；跨数据集评估表明模型能够良好泛化到DMD中的动作类别。
AI.conclusion: 通过丰富描述的驾驶员动作数据微调VLMs可以显著提升其对驾驶员行为的理解能力，同时研究成果揭示了当前数据集的多样性不足，未来需要更广泛的数据支持更好的泛化。

title: Cross-Domain Dead Tree Detection via Knowledge Distillation in Aerial Imagery
summary: Detecting dead trees in aerial imagery is vital for assessing forest health, especially as tree mortality increases globally due to climate change, but domain variability and scarce labeled data often limit model generalization. This study advances the TreeMort-1T-UNet (Tree Mortality 1-Task U-Net) model, initially trained on Finnish aerial imagery (source domain), by applying knowledge distillation (KD) to adapt it to various target domains, including Polish, German, and Estonian datasets representing diverse forest types. We assess four KD variants: Basic, Self, Feature-level, and Ensemble, against a fine-tuning baseline, using Mean Tree IoU, Instance F1-score, Instance Precision, and Mean Centroid Error as key metrics, alongside representational analyses (e.g., cosine similarity, CKA, SSIM, t-SNE, and linear probing) for domain invariance. Feature-level KD outperforms others, yielding a Mean Tree IoU of 0.106, Instance F1-score of 0.63, Instance Precision of 0.55, and Mean Centroid Error of 3.039 on the Polish dataset, with robust precision across other target domains (e.g., 0.15 on Finnish, 0.67 on Polish, 0.60 on German, 0.59 on Estonian). It excels in low-data scenarios with fewer false positives and shows superior representational invariance (e.g., higher deep-layer CKA/SSIM, better domain mixing in t-SNE, and linear probing AUC of 0.95), making it ideal for precision-critical forestry applications. Additional ablation studies confirm that key components like feature alignment enhance its performance balance across metrics. Our findings demonstrate KD's potential to enhance transfer learning in remote sensing, offering a scalable, domain-robust tool for ecological monitoring and sustainable forest management.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于知识蒸馏（KD）的域适应方法，将TreeMort-1T-UNet模型从芬兰航拍图像迁移至波兰、德国、爱沙尼亚等多国数据集，其中特征级KD在低数据场景下表现最优，实现了跨域树冠检测精度与表示不变性的显著提升。
AI.motivation: 航拍图像中枯死树检测对于评估森林健康至关重要，但全球气候变化导致树木死亡率上升，而域差异大和标注数据稀缺严重限制了模型在不同地理区域和森林类型间的泛化能力，亟需有效的域适应策略以提升模型的可迁移性。
AI.method: 以预训练于芬兰航拍图像（源域）的TreeMort-1T-UNet模型为基础，采用知识蒸馏（KD）技术将其适配至波兰、德国、爱沙尼亚等目标域数据集，系统比较了Basic KD、Self KD、Feature-level KD和Ensemble KD四种变体，并以微调作为基线；评估指标包括Mean Tree IoU、Instance F1-score、Instance Precision和Mean Centroid Error，同时利用余弦相似度、CKA、SSIM、t-SNE和线性探测等表示分析方法衡量域不变性。
AI.result: Feature-level KD在所有变体中表现最佳，在波兰数据集上达到Mean Tree IoU 0.106、Instance F1-score 0.63、Instance Precision 0.55、Mean Centroid Error 3.039，并在其他目标域上保持稳健精度（芬兰0.15、波兰0.67、德国0.60、爱沙尼亚0.59）；其在低数据场景下假阳性更少，表现出优异的表示不变性（深层CKA/SSIM更高、t-SNE域混合更好、线性探测AUC达0.95）。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏有效增强了遥感领域模型迁移学习的效果，特征级KD特别适用于对精度要求高的林业应用，消融实验进一步确认特征对齐等关键组件对性能平衡有重要贡献，为生态监测和可持续森林管理提供了可扩展、域鲁棒的工具。

title: Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval via Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in large vision-language models have expanded video retrieval from simple text-based search to more flexible scenarios, where users may specify the desired result through both visual examples and textual instructions. In the CVPR 2026 Reason-Aware Composed Video Retrieval Challenge, the system is required to retrieve a target video according to a reference video and a modification instruction. To address this task, we develop Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning for Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval. Our framework first uses frozen DINOv3 models to obtain a compact set of visually relevant candidates, and then applies large vision-language models to evaluate whether each candidate satisfies the modification instruction. A final reasoning-based refinement is further performed on the top candidates to improve the first-ranked prediction. Without training, our system achieves 48.78 Recall@1 and 51.48 Recall@5 on the test set. Future work may further improve retrieval accuracy through stronger video-LLMs and detailed integration between visual representations and language reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的视觉表示引导视频-LLM推理框架，通过DINOv3筛选候选视频并结合大视觉语言模型进行指令评估与推理优化，在CVPR 2026挑战赛中取得48.78 Recall@1和51.48 Recall@5的成绩。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索技术已从简单文本搜索扩展至更灵活的场景，用户可通过视觉示例和文本指令共同指定检索目标，但如何有效结合视觉表示与语言推理来实现无需训练的组成式视频检索仍是一个待解决的问题。
AI.method: 首先利用冻结的DINOv3模型获取一组紧凑的视觉相关性候选视频，然后使用大视觉语言模型评估每个候选视频是否满足修改指令，最后对排名靠前的候选视频执行基于推理的精细化调整以提升首位预测的准确性，整个框架无需训练。
AI.result: 在CVPR 2026 Reason-Aware Composed Video Retrieval Challenge测试集上，系统无需训练即达到48.78的Recall@1和51.48的Recall@5。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明基于视觉表示引导的视频-LLM推理方法可在无训练条件下有效完成组成式视频检索任务，未来可通过更强的视频-LLMs以及视觉表示与语言推理的细粒度集成进一步提升检索精度。

title: Multi-modal Video Representation Alignment for Robust Self-supervised Driver Distraction Detection
summary: Robust self-supervised learning of multi-modal video representations is critical for real-world applications such as driver distraction detection, where multiple sensors provide complementary but noisy signals. Conventional contrastive objectives, such as InfoNCE, assume all negatives are equally informative and all positives are reliable. However, this assumption is frequently violated in multi-modal data due to viewpoint changes, occlusions, or semantic overlap across modalities. In this work, we propose a novel framework for multi-modal global alignment that addresses these challenges by jointly modeling faulty negatives and unreliable or faulty positives. We introduce soft targets derived from cycle-consistency scores to relax the hard-negative assumption, and a weighting mechanism based on similarity distributions to mitigate the impact of noisy or faulty positives. Our approach extends traditional pairwise alignment to a principled global multi-modal setting, aggregating alignment information across all modality pairs. We evaluate our method on the Drive&Act dataset, demonstrating that it consistently outperforms both pairwise and existing global alignment baselines across RGB, IR, Depth, and Skeleton modalities. Cross-view ablation studies further show strong generalization to unseen camera perspectives, highlighting the robustness of our representations. Overall, our framework provides a scalable and effective solution for self-supervised global multi-modal representation learning, enabling reliable driver distraction detection and pioneering in real-world multi-modal video understanding. Our code will be published on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒的自监督多模态全局对齐框架，通过循环一致性软目标和基于相似度分布的加权机制分别处理错误负样本和不可靠正样本，在Drive&Act数据集上显著优于现有基线，实现可靠的驾驶员分心检测。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习目标如InfoNCE假设所有负样本等量信息且所有正样本可靠，但在多模态视频数据中，由于视角变化、遮挡或模态间语义重叠，这一假设频繁被违背，导致多模态表征学习的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出多模态全局对齐框架：利用循环一致性得分构建软目标来放松硬负样本假设，并基于相似度分布的加权机制缓解噪声或不可靠正样本的影响；将传统成对对齐扩展为全局多模态对齐，聚合所有模态对间的对齐信息。
AI.result: 在Drive&Act数据集上，该方法在RGB、IR、Depth和Skeleton四种模态上一致优于成对对齐和现有全局对齐基线；跨视角消融实验表明模型对未见过的相机视角具有较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自监督全局多模态表征学习提供了可扩展且有效的解决方案，能够实现可靠的驾驶员分心检测，为真实世界多模态视频理解奠定了坚实基础，代码将开源。

title: Do Multimodal Agents Really Benefit from Tool Use? A Systematic Study of Capability Gains
summary: Tool-augmented multimodal agents show strong benchmark gains, often taken as evidence that agents have learned to use tools. We argue that this interpretation can be premature: a tool-call trace alone does not show whether the tool supplied answer-critical information. We study two representative ``thinking with images'' agents, Thyme and DeepEyesV2, across real-world understanding, OCR, chart understanding, and mathematical reasoning. Each agent is compared with its Tool-Free counterpart and with a Pure-Text Reasoner trained from the same source pool without tool-calling trajectories. Tool access yields little consistent aggregate improvement, does not reliably reduce generated-token cost, and leaves only a small tool-only solved set: 93% of DeepEyesV2's tool-solved problems and 96% of Thyme's are also solved by at least one non-tool setting. Mechanism ablations further show that the full tool-use loop does not consistently outperform either the tool-call format or the returned execution result alone. In the settings we study, the analyzed agents appear to learn tool-calling patterns more reliably than tool-contributed capabilities, suggesting that evaluation should distinguish tool availability from whether tools actually expand what agents can solve.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑工具增强多模态智能体的有效性评估，通过对比实验发现，Thyme和DeepEyesV2等代表性智能体的工具调用并未带来一致的性能提升，且大部分工具解问题也可被非工具设置解决，表明现有评估可能混淆了工具可用性与工具实际贡献。
AI.motivation: 当前工具增强多模态智能体在基准测试中表现优异，但论文指出仅凭工具调用痕迹无法判断工具是否真正提供了回答关键信息，即存在将工具可用性误认为工具实际贡献的评估偏差，因此需要重新审视工具在智能体中的真实作用。
AI.method: 研究选取Thyme和DeepEyesV2两种代表性“思考与图像”智能体，在真实世界理解、OCR、图表理解和数学推理等任务上，分别与无工具版本、以及来自同一训练池但不含工具调用轨迹的纯文本推理器进行对比；同时通过机制消融实验，分析完整工具调用循环、工具调用格式与执行结果对性能的独立贡献。
AI.result: 工具访问未能带来一致的聚合性能提升，也未可靠地降低生成token成本；DeepEyesV2工具解问题的93%和Thyme的96%至少被一种非工具设置解决；机制消融表明，完整的工具调用循环并未一致优于仅工具调用格式或仅执行结果。
AI.conclusion: 被分析的智能体更可靠地学习了工具调用模式而非工具贡献的实际能力，提示评估设计应区分工具可用性（tool availability）与工具是否实际扩展了智能体的解题能力。

title: PRIMA: Boosting Animal Mesh Recovery with Biological Priors and Test-Time Adaptation
summary: We present PRIMA (*PRI*ors for *M*esh *A*daptation), a framework for robust 3D quadruped mesh recovery under severe species and pose imbalance. Existing animal reconstruction methods often regress toward mean shapes and poses due to limited 3D supervision and long-tailed species distributions, resulting in poor generalization to underrepresented animals and rare articulations. PRIMA addresses this challenge through three key contributions. First, we incorporate BioCLIP embeddings as biological priors to inject semantic and morphological knowledge into the reconstruction process, enabling more accurate and generalizable shape prediction across diverse quadrupeds. Second, we introduce a test-time adaptation (TTA) strategy that refines SMAL predictions using 2D reprojection constraints together with auxiliary keypoint guidance, improving pose and shape estimation while enabling the generation of high-quality pseudo-3D annotations from existing 2D datasets. Third, leveraging this TTA framework, we construct Quadruped3D, a large-scale pseudo-3D dataset that covers diverse species and pose variations to systematically improve model performance. Extensive experiments on Animal3D, CtrlAni3D, Quadruped2D, and Animal Kingdom demonstrate that PRIMA achieves state-of-the-art results, with particularly strong improvements on underrepresented species and challenging poses. Our results highlight the importance of biological priors and adaptation-driven data expansion for scalable and generalizable animal mesh recovery. Code is available at https://github.com/AdaptiveMotorControlLab/PRIMA.

AI.tldr: PRIMA 提出结合生物先验（BioCLIP嵌入）与测试时自适应（TTA）策略的框架，用于鲁棒的四足动物3D网格重建，解决了物种和姿态分布严重不平衡导致的泛化困难，并构建了大规模伪3D数据集Quadruped3D，在多个基准上取得最先进结果。
AI.motivation: 现有动物三维重建方法受限于3D监督数据稀缺和物种长尾分布，常回归到平均形状和姿态，对稀有物种和罕见关节动作的泛化能力较差，亟需一种能应对严重物种与姿态不平衡的鲁棒重建方法。
AI.method: PRIMA 首先引入 BioCLIP 嵌入作为生物先验，将语义和形态学知识注入重建过程以提升形状预测的准确性和泛化性；其次提出测试时自适应（TTA）策略，利用2D重投影约束和辅助关键点引导来优化SMAL预测，同时从现有2D数据集生成高质量伪3D标注；最后基于TTA框架构建了覆盖多样物种和姿态的大规模伪3D数据集Quadruped3D，用于系统性提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在 Animal3D、CtrlAni3D、Quadruped2D 和 Animal Kingdom 四个基准上的大量实验表明，PRIMA 取得了最先进的结果，尤其在稀有物种和困难姿态上表现出显著改进，验证了生物先验与自适应驱动数据扩展的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了生物先验知识和测试时自适应策略对于实现可扩展且通用化的动物网格重建的重要性，为应对长尾分布和标注稀缺问题提供了有效范式，数据和代码已开源。

title: Explainable Forensics of Manipulated Segments in Untrimmed Long Videos
summary: The rapid advancement of AI-driven video generation has transformed content creation, while simultaneously increasing the risk of misinformation through localized manipulations in long-form videos.
